translations.「一緒に美味しいお紅茶を◙飲みましょう」とメッセー◙ジカードが入っている。:
Comes with a note that
reads, "Let's drink
delicious tea together."
translations.お揃いＭＰ３プレイヤー◙リンコセレクションの曲が◙入っている。:
A matching MP3 player,
complete with songs
chosen by Rinko.
translations.Ｗプレートのネックレスに◙刻まれたＤＡＩＳＵＫＩの◙メッセージ。:
A double-plated
necklace engraved with
the word, "LOVE."
translations.やわらかい◙手編みのセーター◙サイズもぴったり。:
A soft, hand-knit
sweater. The size
is a perfect fit.
translations.手編みのマフラー◙少し目が乱れているが◙とても温かい。:
A hand-knit scarf.
Looks a little
funny, but it's
super warm.
translations.雪だるまがのった◙可愛らしい手作りケーキ◙甘くておいしい。:
A delicious hand-
made cake topped
with a cute snowman.
translations.ホワイトデーに◙渡しそびれたプレゼント。:
Bought as a
White Day present
translations.通信相手と接続が◙ 完了しました。◙データ送信を行いますが、◙:
Data transmission is
ready. Do you want to
send your data now？
translations.すでに保存されている◙ データがあります。◙ 上書きされますが、◙ よろしいで:
Do you want to
overwrite the
current data with
this new data？
translations.データ１のデータの◙削除が完了しました。◙前の画面へ戻ります。:
Finished deleting
data in Slot 1.
Return to
previous screen.
translations.データ２のデータの◙削除が完了しました。◙前の画面へ戻ります。:
Finished deleting
data in Slot 2.
Return to
previous screen.
translations.データ３のデータの◙削除が完了しました。◙前の画面へ戻ります。:
Finished deleting
data in Slot 3.
Return to
previous screen.
translations.彼女の想いが、◙少し冷めやすくなって◙しまいました。:
Your girlfriend's
feelings have become
a little cold.
translations.彼女の想いが、◙少し冷てしまいました。:
Your girlfriend's
feelings have become
cold.
translations.彼女の想いが、◙とても冷めてしまいました。:
Your girlfriend's
feelings have become
very cold.
translations.おはよう。◙今日も一日、◙がんばろう？:
Morning.
Do your best again
today, okay？
translations.おはよう。◙今日も学校がんばろ？:
Morning.
You've got to study
hard today, okay？
translations.今日の先生、◙機嫌がいいみたい。◙何かいいことあったんだね:
The teacher is in
a good mood today.
Seems like something
nice happened to him.
translations.ねぇ、授業中に◙マンガ読んでる人がいる。◙先生に◙見つかっちゃわないかな:
Hey, someone's
reading a comic book
in the classroom.
What if the teacher
finds out...？
translations.体育って好き？◙わたしは部活以外で◙体を動かすのも◙楽しくて好きだな:
Do you like P.E.
class？ I like to
move my body. Not
only during the
club activity, but
in P.E. class too.
translations.おはよ、眠くない？◙わたし、◙今日はちょっと眠いかも:
Morning.
Are you sleepy？ I'm
a bit sleepy today.
translations.おはようのキス◙しちゃうよ。◙チュ▼◙なんて:
I'll give you
a morning kiss.
Chu~▼
How's that？
translations.おはよ。◙カノジョからの◙モーニングメールだよ:
Morning. It's a
"morning mail" from
your girlfriend.
translations.Ｇｏｏｄ ｍｏｒｎｉｎｇ．◙今日も元気にいこ？:
Good morning.
Let's be active
today, okay？
translations.勉強がんばれば、◙その分放課後が◙楽しくなるよ。◙がんばろ！:
If you study hard
now, you can have
fun after school.
Do your best!
translations.おはよう。◙春眠暁を覚えず、◙かな？:
'Morning. There's
a saying; "In
spring, one sleeps
a sleep that knows
no dawn."
translations.おはよう。◙この季節の目覚めは◙気持ちいいね:
'Morning. It's so
nice to wake up
early this time of
year.
translations.みんな朝から◙グッタリしてる。◙暑いもんね:
Everyone becomes
exhausted due to
the heat, even in
the morning.
translations.おはよう。◙朝起きるのが◙少し辛くなってきたね:
'Morning.
It's hard to get up
early, right？
translations.おはよう。◙涼しくて気持ちいい◙朝だね:
'Morning. Cool air
in the morning
feels good.
translations.もうお腹◙空いてきちゃった。◙でもこれ、◙食欲の秋の◙せいだからね？:
I'm already
hungry. Does my
appetite grow in
the fall？
translations.おはよう。◙今日も寒いね、◙起きてすぐ◙暖房つけちゃった:
'Morning. It's so
cold that I turned
on the heater as
soon as I got up.
translations.おはよう。◙寒いけど、◙二度寝しちゃダメだよ？:
'Morning.
It's cold, but don't
hit the snooze button,
okay？
translations.教室でも◙コート脱がない人が◙結構いるみたい。◙寒いもんね:
It's so cold that
a lot of people
don't take their
coats off in
class.
translations.午前中の授業、◙どうだった？◙こっちはいつも通り。◙普通が一番、なんて:
How was your morning
class？ For me, it
was the same. The
usual is the best,
right？
translations.授業中にメールするのって◙ドキドキしちゃう。◙ほんとはいけないよね:
It's thrilling to send
e-mails during class.
It's not allowed,
right？
translations.今日は◙体育の授業があるから、◙気合入れちゃおっと:
There's a P.E. class
today. I'm in high
spirits.
translations.自習になったんだけど、◙男の子が◙騒いじゃって大変。◙注意した方がいいよね:
It's a study hall,
but the guys are being
so loud. Should I warn
them？
translations.お腹空いた？◙実はわたし、◙お昼の時間が◙待ち遠しかったの:
Are you hungry？
Actually, I can't
wait for lunch
break.
translations.ハローハロー、◙ちゃんと授業聞いてる？:
Hello, hello.
Are you listening
to the lecture？
translations.ねぇ、好きだよ▼◙学校ではこんなこと、◙口に出して◙言えないもんね？:
Hey, I love you▼
I can't say this to
you much at school.
translations.午後の授業もがんばろー！:
Do your best during
the afternoon classes
too!
translations.クラスの子にね、◙ファッション雑誌◙見せてもらったの。◙勉強しちゃうからね？:
A girl in my class
showed me a fashion
magazine. I'd better
study it.
translations.周りの子たちが、◙カレシの話題で◙盛り上がってるの。◙わたしも◙参加しちゃおうか:
Some girls in my
class are talking
about their
boyfriends. Should I
join their
conversation？
translations.男の子たちが、◙理想のタイプの話で◙盛り上がってるみたい。◙そういう話、◙気にな:
Guys in my class
are talking about
their ideal girl.
I don't know why,
but I'm really
interested in that.
translations.教室でカレシと◙仲良さそうにしてる◙子がいる。◙うらやましくなんて、◙ないよ？:
There are girls in
my class that get
along well with
their boyfriends.
Should I be jealous？
translations.こっちの教室、◙居眠りしてる人が◙たくさんいるの。◙そろそろ先生が◙起こす頃かな:
Many people are
sleeping in class
now. I guess the
teacher will wake
them up soon.
translations.今日はあったかくて◙気持ちいいね。◙学校抜け出して◙遊びに行きたいぐらい、◙なん:
It's warm today.
I feel like skipping
class and playing
outside.
...Just kidding.
translations.やっぱり暑いね……◙でも集中しなきゃ:
It's really hot,
but I have to
concentrate on
class.
translations.教室でシャツ◙脱いじゃった◙男の子がいる。◙恥ずかしいなぁ:
Some guys in my
class took off
their shirts. It's
embarrassing.
translations.やっぱり教室には◙クーラーが欲しいよね。◙先生にお願いして◙みようかな:
I really want an
air conditioner in
the classroom. Should
I ask the teacher？
translations.秋って、◙一番勉強がはかどる◙季節だと思わない？◙さ、がんばろ:
This season is
best for studying,
right？ So, do your
best.
translations.芸術の秋だし、◙美術の授業◙がんばっちゃお？:
Fall is the season
of arts. So, do
your best in art
class.
translations.窓の外に枯葉が舞ってる、◙あの葉っぱで◙おイモ焼いたら◙美味しいかな？:
I can see dry leaves
from the window.
They must be nice for
roasting potatoes.
translations.今日も寒そう。◙練習のとき大変かな:
It's cold again
today. Tough
weather for tennis
practice.
translations.教室にストーブが◙あるのはいいけど、◙休み時間には◙換気もしないとね。◙そっちの:
It'd be nice if we
had a stove in the
classroom. Is it cold
in your classroom？
translations.今日の体育は◙マラソンだよ。◙怪我しないように、◙ちゃんと準備運動◙しないとね:
There's a marathon
in P.E. class
today. I have to
make sure that I
stretch well, so
that I don't get
injured.
translations.今日の学校、◙どうだった？◙また明日もがんばろ？:
How was school
today？ Do your best,
okay？
translations.今日は宿題あった？◙遊ぶのは、◙宿題終わらせたあとだよ:
Do you have homework
today？ You can play,
but you must finish
your homework first.
translations.今日は基礎練が◙多かったな。◙試合のためにも、◙大事なことだもんね:
I have to practice
hard today. It's
really important
to practice for
the match, right？
translations.今日は試合形式の◙練習が多かったの。◙気が抜けなかったけど、◙楽しかったな:
I had to practice
a lot for the match.
It was fun, though.
translations.今日の練習、◙ちょっと物足りないかも。◙自主練しちゃおっかな:
I didn't do well in
today's match. I might
consider getting
special training.
translations.今日の練習はキツくって、◙みんな大変そう:
The match today was
pretty tough. Everyone
was really put
to the test.
translations.今日の部長、◙みんなに甘いかも。◙何かいいこと◙あったのかな？:
The club captain
was cheerful
today. Something
good must have
happened to her.
translations.サーブの調子が悪くて、◙フォルトばっかり。◙どこがおかしいのか、◙気付いたら教え:
I did terribly with my
serves. They were all
faults. What's wrong
with my form？
Please tell me.
translations.女子部のみんなが、◙自分たちの◙カレシの話してる。◙わたしが混ざるのは、◙ちょっ:
The girls in tennis
club are talking about
their boyfriends.
I'm too shy to say
anything.
translations.今日はダブルスの◙練習しちゃった。◙今度また、◙わたしと組んでね？:
I was practicing a
doubles match
today. Will you
pair up with me
next time？
translations.今日の部長、◙すごく厳しい。◙みんなは「何かあった」◙って噂してるけど、◙ほんと:
Our captain was very
strict today. Everyone
thought that something
might have happened
to her.
translations.聞いて！◙今日ね、◙男子部の◙手塚部長に勝てたの！◙やった！！:
Listen!
I won the match
against Captain
Tezuka of the boys
team! Yay!
translations.今日ね、◙部長に負けちゃった。◙でもね、◙次は負けないんだから:
I lost to the
captain today. But I
won't lose next
time!
translations.練習中に居眠りしてた◙１年生がいたの。◙春だからって、◙よく立ったまま◙寝られる:
It's spring. There
were some first year
members who fell
asleep during the
practice. They were
sleeping while
standing!
translations.今日、◙朝からずーっと寝てた◙クラスメイトがいたの。◙よく先生に◙気付かれなかっ:
Many of my classmates
were falling asleep
in the morning class,
but the teacher didn't
notice them.
translations.みんな練習に◙気合いが入らないみたい。◙春ってのんびり◙しちゃうもんね:
No one practiced
seriously today.
It's spring, after
all.
translations.今日みたいな日は、◙練習中にちゃんと◙水分とらないとね:
You need to drink
plenty of water on
a day like this.
translations.もう汗ビッショリ。◙:
I'm all sweaty.
I'm glad I brought
spare clothes to
school.
translations.今日は家に帰ったら◙すぐシャワー浴びよ。◙▲主人公＊▲も◙汗かいたままにしちゃ◙:
I'm going to take a
shower right after I
get home. You should
too. It's too hot
today.
translations.秋って、◙練習には一番いい◙季節かもしれないね:
Fall is the best
season for club
practice.
translations.この季節、◙練習の後はすごく◙お腹空いちゃう。◙今日も◙食べすぎちゃうかも♪:
This season makes
me overeat after
practicing♪
translations.今日は家に帰ったら◙お菓子作ろうかな。◙お腹空いたからじゃ、◙ないよ？:
Maybe I'll bake some
cake once I get
home. Are you
hungry？
translations.冬の練習の前は、◙ストレッチを長めに◙やらないとね:
You must do proper
warm ups in
winter, okay？
translations.こんなに寒いと、◙練習中もあまり◙体動かないね:
It's hard to move
around the court
on a cold day.
translations.今夜のお夕飯は何だった？:
What will you have
for dinner？
translations.今ね、◙テレビでテニスの◙試合観てたの。◙やる気出ちゃったから、◙今から少し◙ラ:
I feel so pumped after
watching a tennis
match on TV. Now I'm
swinging my racket.
translations.宿題は終わった？◙授業始まる前に◙急いでやるなんて、◙ダメだよ？:
Are you done with
your homework？
Don't wait until
right before
class, okay？
translations.わたしは今から宿題◙やって、寝るつもり。◙▲主人公＊▲も◙宿題あるのかな:
I just finished my
homework and I'm
about to go to bed.
How about your
homework？
translations.ずっとピアノ弾いてたら◙ママに怒られちゃった。◙つい時間忘れちゃったの、◙ご近所:
I stayed up so late
playing the piano that
Mama came to scold me.
translations.もう夜になっちゃった。◙今日はピアノ◙弾いてないけど、◙この時間じゃ◙音出せない:
I haven't played the
piano today, but it's
too late to play now.
translations.今日の練習は◙物足りなかったから、◙自主練した方がいいかな。◙でもたまには休むの:
My practice didn't go
well today. Maybe I
should consider getting
private lessons.
translations.ちゃんとご飯食べてる？◙健康はまず◙食生活からだよ？:
Did you eat proper
meals lately？ It's
important for your
health.
translations.今日の練習は◙大変だったから、◙ぐっすり眠れそうだよ:
The practice was
tough today. Now
I'm ready for bed.
translations.パパがね◙「最近マナカは帰りが◙遅い日が多いな」って。◙ママがフォローしてくれた:
Papa says that I often
come home late nowadays.
It was good that Mama
helped me out.
translations.あのね、◙パパが書斎でお勉強してる◙隙にこっそり◙バラエティ番組◙観ちゃった♪:
Hey, I'm watching
a variety show on TV
while Papa is working
in his room♪
translations.春のお料理って、◙なにが思い付く？◙季節のお料理、◙作ってみたいな:
What kind of food
do you think is
good for spring？
I'm deciding what
to cook.
translations.春になると、◙その、おかしな人が◙でてくるってほんと？◙わたし、◙なんのことか◙:
Will there be
something new coming
up this spring？ I
wonder.
translations.今、テレビで春の花の◙特集をやってたの。◙画面で見るのもいいけど、◙直接見に行け:
I'm watching a show
about spring flowers
on TV. It's better to
watch the real thing,
I guess.
translations.暑いからって◙あっさりしたものばかり◙食べてると、◙体によくないからね。◙気を付:
It's hot, but please
don't only eat instant
foods. Eat proper
meals, okay？
translations.今、テレビで花火の◙特集をやってたの。◙キレイだったけど、◙テレビの画面じゃ◙物:
I'm watching a
show about
fireworks on TV.
It would be better
if I can see the
real thing.
translations.毎日暑いけど、◙恋人なんだから◙いつもぴったり◙くっついてたいな。◙なんて、恥ず:
It's so hot, but
I don't mind being
close to you...
This is embarrassing.
translations.食欲の秋だけど、◙今日のお夕飯は食べすぎ◙ないようにしなきゃ:
My appetite grows in
fall. I'll try my best
not to overeat at
dinner tonight.
translations.今、テレビで秋の味覚◙特集をやってたの。◙お腹空いてきたけど、◙もうお夕飯食べた:
There's a show about
fall foods on TV.
I'm getting hungry,
but it's almost time
for dinner. I have
to be patient.
translations.お鍋がおいしい季節だね。◙今日のご飯は何かな？:
This is such a nice
season for some stew,
right？ I wonder what
I'll have for
dinner tonight.
translations.今、テレビでスキーの◙特集をやってたよ。◙行きたいな:
I'm watching a show
about skiing on TV.
Now I want to go
skiing.
translations.毎日寒いよね。◙こんなときはカレシに◙あっためてもらいたいな。◙なんて:
It's cold every day.
I wonder if my
boyfriend is going
to make me feel warm.
Just kidding.
translations.今夜は少し◙夜更かししちゃった。◙でももう限界、◙おやすみなさい:
I'm staying up a bit
late tonight, but
this is my limit.
Good night.
translations.おやすみ。◙今日もがんばったね:
Good night. Do
your best again
tomorrow, okay？
translations.おやすみなさい。◙また明日もね？:
Good night.
See you tomorrow,
okay？
translations.まだ起きてるよね？◙わたしはもう眠いかも:
Are you still awake？
I'm very sleepy now.
translations.読書してたら、◙こんな時間。◙もう寝なきゃね:
I've been reading
a book until this
late. Now I have
to sleep.
translations.珍しく遅くまで◙起きてたら、◙ママから◙もう寝なさいって◙言われちゃった。:
I stayed up so
late that Mama had
to tell me to go
to bed.
translations.おやすみ。◙今日も一日お疲れ様▼:
Good night.
You really did
a great job today▼
translations.おやすみのキスしちゃう、◙ほんとは直接◙あげたいんだけどな。◙チュ▼:
I'll give you
a good night kiss.
It's better to do
this in person, huh？
Chu▼
translations.お風呂って好き？◙わたしは結構◙長く入ってるのが好きかな:
Do you like to
take baths？
I really enjoy
my time in the
bathtub.
translations.おやすみ。◙春だからって、◙寝坊しちゃダメだよ？:
Good night.
It's spring now,
but don't oversleep.
translations.おやすみ。◙あったかくなったけど、◙窓開けて寝ちゃダメだよ？:
Good night.
It's getting warmer,
but don't forget to
close your windows
before going to bed.
translations.おやすみ。◙春のお布団って気持ちよく◙なっちゃうよね:
Good night.
Somehow, sleeping in
spring feels good.
translations.寝苦しい季節だけど、◙体は冷やさないようにね？◙おやすみ:
During this season,
it can be hard to get
to sleep, but good
night.
translations.おやすみ。◙暑いからって、◙あまり薄着して寝ると◙風邪ひいちゃうからね？:
Good night. It's so
hot, but if you don't
wear enough clothes
when you go to bed,
you can catch a cold.
translations.おやすみ。◙今日は暑いね、◙寝汗かいちゃうかな……:
Good night. It's hot
tonight; I'll probably
sweat when I sleep.
translations.おやすみ。◙もう寒くなってきたから、◙風邪には気を付けてね:
Good night.
It's getting cold,
so keep yourself
warm, okay？
translations.この季節、◙虫の鳴き声を聞いてると◙すぐ眠れちゃうの。◙おやすみ:
This season, I always
fall asleep from the
cicadas' noises.
Good night.
translations.秋の夜長っていうけど、◙わたしには◙満喫できないかも。◙もう寝るね、◙おやすみ:
The night is longer
in fall, but now I'm
getting used to it.
I'm falling asleep.
Good night.
translations.寒いから、◙あまり夜更かしすると◙風邪ひいちゃうよ。◙おやすみ:
It's cold, so don't
stay up too late.
You might catch a
cold. Good night.
translations.寒いね。◙あったかくして、◙早めに寝てね？◙おやすみ:
It's so cold. Keep
yourself warm when
you go to bed,
okay？ Good night.
translations.おやすみなさい。◙寒いから、◙風邪ひかないように◙あったかくして寝てね？:
Have a good night.
It's very cold.
Stay warm and go
to bed, so you don't
catch a cold, okay？
translations.おはよう、起きてる？◙お休みだからって、◙ずっと寝てちゃダメだよ？:
'Morning. Are you
awake？ It's a holiday,
but don't just sleep
all day. Okay？
translations.おはよ。◙お休みの日の朝は◙気分がいいんじゃない？:
'Morning.
It feels good to
get up early on
a holiday.
translations.おはよう。◙今日はゆっくり◙休むのかな、◙それともどこかに◙出かけるのかな:
Maybe I'll just
stay home and
relax today. Or
shall I go out
somewhere？
translations.お休みの日に◙家でお勉強するのって、◙おかしいのかな？◙わたしだけじゃ、◙ないよ:
Is it strange if
I study on a holiday？
Does anyone else do
that？
translations.お休みの日の◙朝を寝て過ごすなんて、◙もったいないよ？:
It's not good to
sleep all day during
the break, okay？
translations.気持ちがいい朝だね、◙いいことがありそうだよ？:
It feels so nice
this morning.
Something good
might happen today.
translations.今日は◙ちょっと起きられなくて、◙ママに起こされちゃった。◙たまにはこういうのも:
I overslept this
morning and Mama
had to wake me up.
Is it okay that
I'm like this
occasionally？
translations.オッス、おはよ。◙今日も元気に行こー！◙なんて:
Yo. 'Morning.
Let's be lively
today! Yeah.
translations.わたしが今日起きて、◙一番最初に◙何したかわかる？◙このメール送ったんだよ:
Do you know the first
thing I did when I
woke up？ I sent you
this e-mail.
translations.今日はパパとママと◙お外でお昼。◙たまにはこういうのも◙いいよね:
I had lunch outside
with Papa and Mama
today. It's nice to
do that every once
in a while.
translations.なんだか◙お昼寝しちゃいたい気分。◙子供みたいかな:
I feel like taking
an afternoon nap
today. Am I like
a kid？
translations.今日は患者さんのお孫さん◙が家に遊びに来たから、◙ピアノ教えてあげたの。◙可愛か:
Papa's patient
brought his niece
here today. I taught
her to play the piano.
She was so cute.
translations.今日のお昼は◙わたしの自信作。◙パパがおかわり◙してくれたの:
I cooked lunch for
my family today.
Even Papa asked
for another bowl.
translations.お休みの日は、◙わたしが洗濯するの。◙いつもがんばってる◙ママを助けないとね:
I'm doing laundry on
my holiday. I always
help Mama with
something like this.
translations.今日は少し◙お寝坊しちゃった。◙お休みだからって、◙ダメだよね:
I overslept today.
Even if it's a
holiday, it isn't
good to oversleep,
right？
translations.ママと一緒に◙庭のお手入れ。◙ガーデニング、楽しいよ:
I helped Mama in
the garden today.
Gardening is fun.
translations.今パパがいないから、◙ママと二人でご飯食べ◙ながらテレビ観ちゃった。◙お行儀悪い:
Papa isn't home now,
so I'm eating in front
of TV with Mama. Such
bad manners but somehow
it's fun♪
translations.今日はパパが研修で◙お出かけしてるから、◙ママと二人でお昼。◙甘い物も食べちゃお:
Papa went to a
training course today
so I had lunch with
Mama. I ate too much
dessert.
translations.今日のお夕飯は、◙わたしが作るの。◙パパとママ、◙褒めてくれるかな？:
I'm going to cook
dinner tonight. I
wonder if Papa and
Mama will praise
me.
translations.今日のお夕飯、◙ママがすごい◙気合入れてるの。◙何かあったのかな:
Mama is in high
spirits now. I
wonder if
something good
happened to her.
translations.軽くだけど、◙自主練しちゃった。◙オーバーワークに◙ならないように◙気をつけなき:
I practiced a bit
today. It wasn't
much. I had better
not overdo it.
translations.お菓子焼いたんだけど、◙作り過ぎちゃった。◙患者さんたちに◙おすそわけしようかな:
I baked too many
cakes. Maybe I should
give them away to
Papa's patients.
translations.お菓子作り、◙失敗しちゃった。◙まだたまに◙失敗しちゃうの。◙はぁ……:
My baking
failed... Every
once in a while,
this happens.
Hah...
translations.今ね、◙昔のアニメの◙再放送がやってるの。◙そういえば小さい頃、◙こういうの観な:
There was a rerun
of an old anime.
I wasn't allowed to
watch it when I was
a kid, though.
translations.ママがすごく熱心に◙お料理の番組観てる。◙そのうち◙作ってくれるのかな:
Mama is watching a
cooking channel on
TV now. Maybe she'll
cook something
later.
translations.今、何してると思う？◙ふふ、秘密:
What do you think
I'm doing now？
Hehe. It's a secret.
translations.今やってるテレビに◙ウサギさんが出てる。◙カワイイ▼:
They show rabbits
on TV now. So cute▼
translations.休みのうちに◙できることは、◙やっておこう？:
I'm thinking of a
plan to spend my
holidays wisely.
translations.少し自主練◙したいんだけど、◙この時間じゃ危ないかな。◙でもお庭で素振り◙くらい:
I want to go practice,
but it's too dangerous
if I go out now. Maybe
I'll just do some swing
practice in the garden.
translations.お庭で素振りしてたら、◙時間経つの忘れちゃって。◙パパに少し怒られちゃった:
I was practicing
my racket swing in
the garden until dark.
Then I got scolded
by Papa.
translations.パパ、今日も書斎で◙お勉強してる。◙やっぱり◙お医者さんになるのって、◙大変なん:
Papa is still working.
It's tough to be
a doctor.
translations.今ね、◙テレビでお相撲観てたの。◙やっぱり素敵だな、◙お相撲さん:
I'm watching sumo
on TV. Those sumo
wrestlers are really
wonderful.
translations.パパとママと３人でクイズ◙番組観てるんだけど、◙わたしが一番:
I'm watching a quiz
show with Papa and
Mama. I got the most
right answers. Papa
is feeling bitter now.
translations.今日のお夕飯、◙とっても美味しかった。◙ママはなんでも◙できてすごいな、◙わたし:
Dinner tonight was
really delicious.
Mama's cooking is
always good. I can't
catch up with her.
translations.今日のお夕飯、◙わたしが作ったんだけど◙……失敗しちゃった。◙パパとママは美味し:
I made dinner tonight,
but it was a failure...
Papa and Mama still said
that it tasted good, but
I think they lied...
translations.ママがね、◙昔のパパの話◙聞かせてくれたの。◙昔の二人の話聞くの、◙大好き:
Mama is talking
about Papa and her
in the past. I
really love to hear
their stories.
translations.パパとママがちょっと◙ケンカしてたんだけど、◙すぐ仲直りしちゃったの。◙夫婦って:
Papa and Mama had
a quarrel today.
They reconciled
afterward though.
It's tough to be
husband and wife, huh？
translations.おやすみ。◙今日は楽しい一日だった？:
Good night.
Did you enjoy
your day today？
translations.おやすみ。◙明日からもがんばってね:
Good night.
Do your best
tomorrow as well.
translations.ごめんね、◙こんな時間にメールして。◙なんだか今日は◙寝付けないの、◙こんなこと:
Sorry for sending you
an e-mail at this hour.
Somehow, I can't
sleep tonight...
translations.マナカはもう寝ます。◙おやすみなさい:
Manaka is going to
bed now. Good night.
translations.ね、まだ起きてる？◙特に用事はないんだけど、◙メールしたくなっちゃった:
Hey, are you still
awake？ I didn't have
anything to say.
Somehow, I just wanted
to message you.
translations.約束は守って？◙待ち合わせ、してたよね？:
Can't you keep
a promise？ I was
waiting, you know？
translations.わたし、◙ずっと待ってたんだけど:
I was waiting for
a long time.
translations.待ち合わせに◙来なかったけど、◙何かあった？◙連絡ください:
You didn't come to
meet me. Did
something happen？
Please contact me.
translations.デート中にカノジョのこと◙放っておくなんて、◙カレシのすることじゃ◙ないと思う。:
It's not a good thing
for a boyfriend to
leave his girlfriend
alone on a date.
Reflect on that.
translations.わたしにも悪いところ、◙あったのかも◙しれないけど。◙今日みたいな態度は、◙これ:
Was it because
I did something bad？
At least tell me
the reason.
translations.なんでわたしのこと、◙放っておいたの？◙嫌いになったわけじゃ、◙ないよね:
Why did you leave me
alone on a date？ You
don't hate me, do you？
translations.せっかくのデート◙だったのに、◙すごくイヤな気分に◙なっちゃった。◙どうして？:
It was our date,
but somehow I had
a bad feeling.
Why？
translations.さっきの態度は、◙何だったの？◙わたしも頭冷やしたから、◙今ならちゃんと話聞ける:
What was with that
attitude of yours？
I've cooled down now,
so please tell me.
translations.さっきはごめんね、◙あんな態度とって。◙でもわたし、◙納得できない:
I'm sorry about
earlier, but I
still don't
understand you.
translations.わたし、◙まだ怒ってるから。◙言い訳があるなら、◙聞くけど:
I'm still angry,
but if you have
something to say,
I'll listen.
translations.うんわかった、◙何か理由が◙あったんだよね。◙あんなメールして、◙ごめんね:
I get it. You must
have your reasons.
I'm sorry about my
previous mail.
translations.今回は許すけど、◙もうあんなこと◙しないでね。◙お願い:
I'll forgive you
this time, but
please don't do
this again.
translations.悪いと思うなら、◙最初からあんなこと◙しないで:
If you knew it was
bad, you shouldn't
have done it.
translations.そうなんだ、ごめん。◙それなら仕方ないけど、◙次からは気を付けてね:
I see. Sorry.
It couldn't be helped
then. Be careful next
time, okay？
translations.もう、言い訳してる。◙ちゃんと反省して:
You're making
excuses. Just
reflect on it.
translations.もう、バカ……◙そんなので◙ごまかそうとして。◙もういいから、◙今度は気を付けて:
You idiot... Don't
try to fool me.
Enough. Just be
more careful next
time.
translations.ごまかしてる……。◙そんなことが◙聞きたいんじゃないのに:
Don't try to fool me.
I didn't want to hear
you say that.
translations.やめて。◙今はそんな気分じゃ◙ないから:
Stop it. I'm not
in the mood for
that.
translations.ほんとはね、◙わたしから誘おうかなって◙思ってたの。◙誘ってくれて、ありがとう:
Actually, I was
thinking about asking
you out. Thank you.
translations.誘ってくれてありがとう。◙今度は、わたしから◙誘っちゃおうかな:
Thank you for asking
me out. Next time,
I should ask you
instead.
translations.デートのお誘い、◙ありがとう。◙楽しみにしてるから:
Thanks for asking
me out. I'm
looking forward to
our date.
translations.今回はわたしから◙連絡したけど、◙今度はちゃんと◙カレシから誘ってね？◙なんて:
This time I called
you, but next time
you should do your
job as a boyfriend
and ask me out...
Hmph.
translations.お誘い受けてくれて、◙ありがとう。◙実はね、◙ちょっと緊張したの。◙女の子の方か:
Thank you for
accepting my
invitation. Actually,
I was so nervous.
Is it okay for a
girl to ask first？
translations.きっとわたし達、◙明日のデートで◙もっと近づけるよね。◙早く会いたいな:
I think we'll get
closer after our
date tomorrow. I
want to meet you
earlier, though.
translations.今日は、◙明日のデートが楽しみで◙なかなか寝付けないかも。◙寝坊しちゃっても◙許:
I probably won't be
able to sleep tonight
because I'm too excited
about our date. Forgive
me if I'm late.
translations.明日、◙早く来ないかな……。◙なんでかは、わかるよね？:
Can tomorrow come any
faster？ You know why,
right？
translations.明日のデート、◙楽しみにしてるから。◙忘れたりしないでね？:
I really can't wait
for our date
tomorrow. Don't
forget about it,
okay？
translations.うん……でもわたしは◙デートまで待てないな、◙なんて:
Yeah... I can't wait
for our date.
Really...
translations.うん！◙二人がそう思ってれば、◙きっと楽しくなるね:
Yes!
If we both think the
same, our date will
surely be fun.
translations.うん、わたしもだよ。◙それじゃあね:
Yeah, me too.
See you then.
translations.うん……◙今すぐにでも◙会いたいな……。◙ごめんね、◙わがまま言って。◙じゃあね:
Yeah... I really
want to meet you
now. Sorry for
saying such a
selfish thing.
translations.もう。◙そんなの、◙わたしも同じに◙決まってるでしょ:
Hey.
Of course, I think
the same, too.
translations.そうだね、待ってる。◙じゃあね:
I see. I'll wait for
you. See you.
translations.わたしも……◙わたしも同じ気持ちだから:
Me, too...
I feel the same.
translations.もう、◙調子がいいんだから。◙デートのときは、◙ちゃんと目を見て◙言ってね？:
Come on. You can say
this to me directly
during our date,
can't you？
translations.もう。◙そういうことは、◙雰囲気のあるところで◙言ってほしいな:
Hey.
I'd prefer you say
that at the right
moment.
translations.別のクラスで抜き打ちの◙小テストがあったみたい。◙ちゃんと勉強してれば、◙大丈夫:
The other class got
a test. You'd better
study and be prepared.
translations.体育の授業で活躍すると、◙ヒーローになれるよね。◙▲主人公＊▲も◙がんばって:
You'll be a hero
if you participate
actively in P.E.
class, so do your best.
translations.そろそろ◙音楽の実技テストが◙あるんだって、◙覚えておいてね:
Soon, there will
be a skill test in
music class. Are
you ready？
translations.美術の課題の提出日、◙もうすぐだよ？◙気をつけて:
You'll have a theme
presentation in art
class soon, right？
Be prepared.
translations.チームメイトから◙勉強教えてって◙頼まれちゃった。◙▲主人公＊▲も◙普段から勉強:
A classmate asked me
some questions about
studying. Maybe you
should keep up with
your studies, too.
translations.もうすぐテニス部内の◙練習試合だね。◙わたしが応援したら、◙いつもよりもっと◙頑:
It's almost time for
a match within our
tennis club. I'll be
rooting for you, so
do your best.
translations.もうすぐ◙中間テストだけど、◙ちゃんと勉強してる？◙赤点なんて取ったら◙ダメだよ:
It's almost time for
midterms. Have you
been studying？ You
can't fail any of
them, okay？
translations.そろそろ休みに入るけど、◙その前に期末テストだね。◙もう勉強始めてないと、◙大変:
It's almost school
break, but we have
final exams first.
It's bad if you don't
study, okay？
translations.がんばってね。◙わたし、応援してるから:
Do your best.
I'll be rooting
for you.
translations.そう？◙でも、できれば◙がんばってほしいな:
Huh？ But if you
can, please do
your best.
translations.もう、そんなこと言って。◙困ったことになっても◙知らないから:
Hey, if you say that,
I won't help you when
you get in trouble.
translations.わたしと一緒に◙帰ってくれないかな？◙少しなら、◙寄り道してもいいから:
Will you walk home
with me today？ We
can stop by
somewhere if it
doesn't take too
much time.
translations.今日、わたしと一緒に◙帰ってくれると、◙嬉しいです。◙でも、寄り道はなし:
I'd be happy if you
walk home with me
today. But we can't
stop on the way,
okay？
translations.もしよかったら、◙今日一緒に◙帰ってくれませんか？◙放課後校門で待ってます:
If it's okay with you,
would you like to walk
home with me today？
I'll wait at the
school gate.
translations.今日、一緒に帰ろ？放課後◙に校門前で待ち合わせで◙いいよね？もし遅れたら、◙▲主:
Will you walk home with
me today？ Let's meet
at the school gate
after school. If you
are late, I'll fetch
you▼
translations.一緒に帰って◙欲しいな……。◙ＯＫなら、放課後校門前で◙待ち合わせ。でも待ってる:
I want to walk home
with you... Let's meet
at the school gate.
But it's embarrassing
to wait there, so
don't be late.
translations.今日、一緒に帰らない？◙よかったらで、◙いいんだけど:
Want to walk home
together today？
I hope you can.
translations.うん、おはよう。◙今日もがんばろうね？:
Yes, good morning.
Do your best today
as well, okay？
translations.おはよう。◙お寝坊さんだね？◙もっと早起きしないと◙ダメだよ？:
Morning.
Did you oversleep？
You'd better get up
earlier.
translations.おはよう？◙もう、今起きたの？:
Good morning!？ Did
you just wake up？
translations.今夕方だよ？◙もう、しょうがないなぁ:
It's evening already.
You're so helpless.
translations.おはようって、◙今夕方なんだけど？:
You said good
morning？ It's
evening already.
translations.ほんとに今起きたの？◙大丈夫かなぁ:
Did you really just
wake up？ Are you
all right？
translations.おやすみじゃなくて、◙おはよう？◙こんな時間になんで？:
Good morning？
Not good night？ It's
already this late.
translations.おはよ。◙こんな時間に◙目が覚めちゃったの？◙どこか悪いのかな:
Morning. Did you
just wake up？ Are
you sick？
translations.こんな時間に◙おはようって、◙わたし寝てたよ:
You're saying good
morning now？ I'm
about to go to
bed.
translations.おはよう、早いね。◙わたしはまだ寝てたよ:
Morning.
You're so early.
I'm still in bed.
translations.今からおやすみ？◙体の調子が◙悪いんだったら、ちゃんと◙病院行くんだよ？:
You're saying
good night now？
If you feel sick,
you should get a
check-up at the
hospital.
translations.おはようじゃなくて、◙おやすみ？:
Not good morning,
but good night？
translations.お昼寝するの？◙あまり寝過ぎないようにね:
Are you taking a nap？
Don't sleep too much.
translations.おやすみって、◙今から寝るんだ:
Are you going to
sleep now？
translations.今から寝るの？◙どこか悪いのかな:
You're going to
bed？ Are you sick？
translations.今から寝たら、◙今晩困るんじゃない？:
If you sleep now,
you won't be able to
sleep tonight.
translations.おやすみ。◙寝る前にメール◙くれるのって、◙なんか嬉しいな:
Good night.
I'm so glad to get
your e-mail before
going to bed.
translations.おやすみなさい。◙わたしもそろそろ◙寝ようかな:
Good night.
Shall I go to bed,
too？
translations.おやすみ。◙やっぱり夜遅いんだね:
Good night. You
really sleep late.
translations.今から寝るの？◙わたしはもう寝てたよ:
You're about to go
to bed？ I was
already asleep.
translations.おやすみ。◙今から寝て、◙生活リズム大丈夫？:
Good night. If you
sleep now, will
your biorhythm be
okay？
translations.今までずっと◙起きてたんだ。◙わたしは今起きたところ:
You've been staying
up until now？ I'm
about to get up.
translations.もう、授業中なのに◙メールなんてして。◙でもね、わたしも◙▲主人公＊▲と◙メール:
Hey, I'm in my
class. I was also
thinking about
sending you an
e-mail, but I knew
I shouldn't.
translations.授業中だよ。◙会いたくなっちゃった？◙なんて:
I'm in my class
I can't go see you
now.
translations.もう。◙授業中だよ？◙でもこっそりメール◙するのも楽しいかも:
Hey. I'm in my
class. But it
might be fun to
secretly write an
e-mail.
translations.授業中にメールするのは、◙よくないよ？:
It's not good to
send e-mails during
class, you know？
translations.もう、部活中に◙決まってるでしょ？◙しょうがないなぁ:
Hey, you know it's
still club
practice. What a
helpless guy.
translations.部活中だよ。◙次は練習に来てね？:
I'm at a club
practice. Next
time, you have to
come to practice
too, okay？
translations.部活中に◙決まってるでしょ、◙もう！:
Of course I'm at
a club practice!
translations.何してると思う？◙なんて:
What do you think
I'm doing？ Hmm？
translations.ぼーっとしてた。◙たまには息抜きしないと:
I've been idling.
Just taking a break.
translations.特に、何も。◙たまにはね:
Nothing in
particular. It's
nice to take a
break sometimes.
translations.眠ってたけど、◙起きちゃった。◙あんまり遅い時間に◙メールしちゃダメだよ？:
I was sleeping but now
I'm awake. Don't
e-mail me at late
hours, okay？
translations.眠ってた。◙わたし、◙寝るの早いから……:
I was sleeping. I
usually go to bed
early...
translations.眠ってた。◙こんな時間に◙メールしないで:
I was sleeping.
Don't e-mail me so
late.
translations.今、◙お風呂上がりだから……。◙その、恥ずかしいな:
I just got out of the
shower. ...This is
embarrassing.
translations.今、お風呂から◙あがったところ。◙髪乾かさなきゃ:
Just got out of
the shower. I have
to dry my hair
now.
translations.お風呂からあがったところ:
Just got out of the
shower.
translations.今はご飯◙食べてたんだけど、◙パパに隠れて◙こっそりお返事。◙ふふ♪:
I'm having dinner.
I secretly replied
this mail without
letting Papa know.
Hehe♪
translations.ご飯食べてたの。◙お食事中に◙メールするのは、◙お行儀悪いよね:
I'm having dinner.
It's not good
manners to write
e-mails during a
meal.
translations.勉強してたけど、ちょっと◙休憩したかったの。◙メールしてくれて、◙ありがと:
I was studying but
now I'm taking a
break. Thank you for
sending me a message.
translations.今日のデートは、二人が◙一緒に楽しめたよね。◙もっともっとこんな◙デートがしたい:
We both had a nice
time on our date
today, right？ I want
to have a date like
that again soon.
translations.デート、◙すごく楽しかった。◙大事にされてるの、◙わかっちゃった。◙なんて:
Today's date was
fun. I could feel
that you cared for
me. Yeah.
translations.デート、楽しかったよ。◙じゃあ、またね:
Today's date was fun.
Let's do this again.
translations.今日はありがとう。◙でも次はもっと◙楽しいデートだといいな:
Thanks for today.
I hope our next date
will be more fun.
translations.今日のわたし、◙つまらなそうに◙見えたかな。◙次はもっともっと◙いいデートにしよ:
Was I too boring
today？ I'll try
harder next time.
translations.キス、しちゃったね。◙次も、また……ね？:
We kissed... Next
time we'll do it
again, right...？
translations.なんだったのかな。◙その、今日のキスって。◙いつもと違って、◙すごくヘンな気分に:
What happened to me？
I think your kisses
today were different.
I had such strange
feelings...
translations.そういうことは、◙直接言ってくれた方が◙嬉しいかな。◙ううん、でもやっぱり◙直接:
It would be better to
hear you say that in
person. No, it would
be too embarrassing
then.
translations.どうして急に◙そんなこと言うの？◙何かあったの？:
Why did you say
that all of a
sudden？ Did
something happen？
translations.もう、しょうがないな……◙今回だけだよ？:
Come on...
It can't be helped
then. Just this once,
okay？
translations.そんな言葉で◙誤魔化すのって、◙よくないよ……:
It's not good to
overuse that word,
you know...？
translations.誤魔化してる……◙でもいいよ、許すから:
Don't overuse that
word... But, okay.
I forgive you.
translations.もういい……◙反省してないんだね:
Enough.
You didn't even
feel guilty.
translations.今日のデート、◙すごくステキだった。◙また色んなところに◙連れてってね:
Today's date was
wonderful. Next
time, take me out
again, okay？
translations.今日はありがとう。◙また今度、◙どこかに行こうね:
Thanks for today.
Let's go somewhere
together again.
translations.今日はちょっと◙残念だったな……◙今度は楽しいデートに◙しよう？:
Today was a bit
unfortunate...
Let's make our next
date a fun one.
translations.すごく残念。◙一日損しちゃった気分:
It was terrible.
I felt like I wasted
my whole day.
translations.プレゼント嬉しかったよ。◙大事にされてるんだって、◙感じちゃった:
I'm so happy for
the present. I'll
definitely treasure it.
translations.プレゼントありがとう。◙すごくうれしかったよ:
Thanks for the
present. I'm so happy.
translations.もっとって……そんなの、◙わたしきっと◙ヘンになっちゃう……:
Better？
You'll make me
a weirdo then...
translations.うん。◙気持ちで繋がってたいね:
Yeah... Our feelings
are linked then...
translations.今会ったばっかりなのに。◙ヘンなのかな、◙もう会いたくなっちゃった:
We have just met.
Is it weird that
I want to meet you
again？
translations.お話できて楽しかった。◙またすぐ会いたいな、◙なんて:
It was fun talking
with you. Let's meet
again soon, okay？
translations.また会いたくなったら、◙呼んでね。◙わたしも嬉しいから:
If you want to meet
me, just give me a
call. I'll be very
happy.
translations.会いたいって思ったときに◙すぐ会えるのが、◙恋人のいいところだよね:
It is lovers' privilege
to meet each other
whenever they want,
right？
translations.今日は楽しかったよ、◙またね:
Today was fun.
See you again.
translations.さっきはちょっと◙疲れちゃった。◙また、今度ね:
I'm a little tired
from earlier. See
you later.
translations.あんなところで会えて、◙びっくりしちゃった。◙神様からのご褒美みたい！:
It was such a surprise
to meet you there.
It was probably a
blessing from God!
translations.偶然会えちゃったね。◙次はどこで会えるかな？:
We ran into each
other. I wonder where
we'll meet again
next time.
translations.いつも今日みたいに◙お外をフラフラしてるの？◙勉強もしなきゃダメだよ？:
Do you often go out
and have fun outside
like that？ Don't
forget to study
sometimes, okay？
translations.今日はお疲れ様。◙また一緒に◙お勉強しようね？:
You did a great
job today. Let's
study together
again next time,
okay？
translations.今日は◙恥ずかしかったな……。◙誰にも言っちゃだめだよ？◙二人だけの、秘密だよ？:
Today was quite
embarrassing...
Don't tell anyone
about it, okay？
It's a secret between
us.
translations.自分のお部屋で◙キスするのって……。◙思い出しただけで、◙すごくドキドキしちゃう:
To be kissed in my
own room...
Now that I think of
it, my heart is
throbbing.
translations.あのね。◙わたしたち、◙前よりずっと◙近づけたと思わない？:
Hey, do you think we
have become closer
than before？
translations.最近のわたしたちって、◙その、ラブラブじゃない？◙なんて:
Lately, have we been
madly in love？
translations.わたしたちって、◙もう一緒にいるのが◙当たり前だよね？:
Can I be assured
that we will be
together like this
in the future？
translations.好きだよ。◙ずっとずっと、◙傍にいたいな:
I love you.
I want to be with
you all the time.
translations.うん。◙これから色んなところに◙行ったり、◙色んなことしようね:
Yeah. Let's do
a lot of things
together from now on.
translations.そっか。◙期待してるからね？◙なんて:
Really？
You're giving me
hope, you know？
translations.うん▼◙もっとラブラブしよ▼:
Okay▼ Let's be
more in love▼
translations.うん、もちろん♪◙これからずっとね:
Yeah, of course♪
We'll be more
in love, right？
translations.ごめんね、◙変なこと言って。◙ありがとう:
Sorry for asking
a weird question.
Thank you.
translations.ううん、ごめんね。◙それぐらい好きって◙ことだから:
Never mind. Sorry.
So that's how much
you love me...
translations.そうだよね、◙ずっと一緒だもんね。◙大好き、◙世界でいちばん大好き:
Right. We'll always
be together. I love
you. I love you more
than anything else
in the world!
translations.そっか。◙ちょっと期待し過ぎ◙ちゃったみたい:
I see. I probably
had too many
expectations...
translations.最近あまりメール◙してくれないね……。◙寂しいよ:
You haven't e-mailed
me much lately...
I feel lonely.
translations.最近あまりデートして◙くれない気がするけど……◙気のせいかな:
I feel like we
haven't met much
lately. Is it just
my imagination？
translations.もっとデートしたいな。◙だって、◙わたしたち恋人でしょ？:
Can we be together
a little more often？
We are lovers, right？
translations.最近デートしてないけど、◙わたしと、◙一緒に出かけたくない？:
What's going on？
You don't want to
see me anymore？
translations.わたし、待ってるからね。◙デートしたくなったら、◙連絡ちょうだいね:
I was waiting for
you. If you didn't
want to meet me,
at least give me
a call.
translations.クリスマス、◙一緒に過ごせなかったね。◙来年は、きっと一緒だよ？:
We didn't spend
Christmas together.
Can you make it
next year？
translations.わたしたちが◙付き合い始めた記念日、◙過ぎちゃった。◙来年は一緒にいよ？:
Our anniversary
has already passed...
Will we be able to
celebrate it next
year？
translations.バレンタイン、◙終わっちゃったよ。◙チョコ◙渡したかったのに……:
Valentine's Day has
ended. I wanted to
give you chocolate,
but...
translations.ねぇ、◙もしかして忘れてたの？◙もう過ぎちゃったよ……◙わたしの、誕生日:
Hey, did you forget
it？ It has already
passed... I mean...
my birthday.
translations.あのね。◙神戸で有名な◙たこ焼きみたいな食べ物、◙なんていったっけ？:
Do you know？
What is the name of
the famous food from
Kobe that looks
similar to takoyaki？
translations.あのね。◙サツマイモって、◙何科の植物だっけ？:
Do you know？
Which plant family
does sweet potato
belong to？
translations.あのね。◙握手するように◙ラケットを握る握り方、◙なんていったっけ？:
Do you know？
Which tennis grip
looks like handshake？
translations.あのね。◙一番スピードの出る◙サーブって、◙なんていったっけ？:
Do you know？ What
is the fastest
tennis serve？
translations.あのね。◙お相撲の結びの一番の◙後にある勝者の舞、◙なんていったっけ？:
Do you know？
What is the name of
the dance that the
sumo winner does？
translations.あのね。◙お相撲の三役って、◙大関と関脇と、◙あとひとつはなんだっけ？:
Do you know？
Apart from the Oozeki
and Sekiwake ranks in
sumo, which is the
other one？
translations.あのね。◙現代のピアノのこと、◙なんていったっけ？:
Do you know？
What do we call
modern day piano？
translations.あのね。◙ノクターンって、◙なんのことだっけ？:
Do you know？ What
is a musical
composition
inspired by the
night？
translations.あのね。◙お耳が垂れさがってる◙可愛いウサちゃん、◙なんていったっけ？:
Do you know？
What is the name
of the rabbit with
drooping ears？
translations.あのね。◙ウサギさんが出てくる◙日本の神話、◙なんていったっけ？:
Do you know？ What is
the color of the
rabbit that Alice
followed into
Wonderland？
translations.あのね。◙最近寝つきが悪いん◙だけど、何かいい方法◙ないかな？:
Do you know？
I can't get to sleep
lately. Is there a
good suggestion？
translations.あのね。◙テニスのスランプから◙抜け出すには◙どうしたらいいと思う？:
Do you know？
What should I do
to get out of a
tennis slump？
translations.あのね。◙わたしの魅力って◙何だと思う？:
Hey...
What do you think
my charm is？
translations.あのね。◙最近ママの機嫌が◙悪くて……◙なんでかな？:
Do you know？
Mama is in a bad
mood lately...
Why is that？
translations.あのね。◙最近パパの機嫌が◙良いの……◙なんでかな？:
Do you know？
Papa is in a good
mood lately...
Why is that？
translations.あのね。◙ついご飯を◙食べすぎちゃうんだけど、◙どうしたらいいと思う？:
Do you know？
What should I do when
I overeat？
translations.あのね。◙ピアノをもっと上手に◙弾けるようになるには、◙どうしたらいいと思う？:
Do you know？
What should I do
to improve my
piano skill？
translations.あのね。◙女の子がお相撲◙とるのって、どう思う？:
What would you think
about female sumo
wresters？
translations.あのね。◙最近患者さんたちから◙「マナカちゃんはキレイに◙なったね」って◙よく言:
Hey... Lately, the
patients at my dad's
clinic often say,
"Manaka-chan is
getting prettier."
What do you think？
translations.ありがと。◙ごめんね、◙へんなこと聞いちゃって:
Thank you. Sorry that
I asked such a weird
question.
translations.うーん、そう……かな？◙わざわざごめんね、◙ありがとう:
Um, is that so...？
Sorry for asking.
Thank you.
translations.高嶺愛花です、◙よろしくお願いします。◙その、お友達にメール◙するのって初めてで:
This is Takane Manaka.
It's my first time
sending e-mail to a
friend... I hope I
didn't do anything
weird.
translations.お返事ありがとう。◙今後とも◙よろしくお願いします:
Thank you for your
reply. Please be
nice to me from now
on too.
translations.ごめんなさい。◙特に用事はないんだけど、◙これからもたまに◙メールします:
I'm sorry. I don't
have anything in
particular. But I'll
send you some more
e-mails occasionally
after this.
translations.あけましておめでとう！◙一番乗りだったら、◙うれしいな。◙今年もよろしくね:
Happy New Year! I'll
be happy if I'm the
first one saying this
to you. Please be nice
to me this year as
well.
translations.ＨＡＰＰＹ ＮＥＷ ＹＥＡＲ！！◙今年も一緒に、たくさん◙楽しいことしようね:
HAPPY NEW YEAR!!
Let's have more fun
together this year.
translations.ふふ、ありがと。◙ママに着付け◙してもらわなきゃ:
Hehe. Thanks. I
don't have to ask
my Mama to come
along with me now.
translations.残念。◙再来年は一緒に行こうね？:
Too bad. Maybe we can
go together next year,
okay？
translations.明日、◙バレンタインデーだね。◙わたしはちゃーんと◙用意してるからね？◙ふふ▼:
Tomorrow is
Valentine's Day.
I'm totally prepared.
Hehe▼
translations.明日、◙やっぱり期待してる？◙ちょっとプレッシャー◙だけど、待ち遠しい、かな:
Are you expecting
something tomorrow？
I feel some pressure,
but I'm also looking
forward to it.
translations.明日は◙バレンタインデーだよ。◙ちゃんと期待してくれて◙いいからね？◙なんて、ふ:
Tomorrow is
Valentine's Day.
Are you expecting
something？ Hehe▼
translations.明日は◙ホワイトデーだけど、◙ちゃんと準備してる？◙なんて:
Tomorrow is White
Day. Are you well
prepared？
translations.明日、楽しみにしてても◙いいのかな。◙でもあまり◙無理はしないでね:
Can I expect something
from you tomorrow？
Anyway, don't overdo
it.
translations.明日はホワイトデーだよ！◙もちろん、覚えてたよね？:
Tomorrow is White
Day. You remember,
right？
translations.週末、神社で◙縁日があるんだって。◙一緒に行かない？:
There is a temple
fair at the shrine
this weekend. Shall
we go together？
translations.ふふ、よかった。◙浴衣着ていこっと:
Hehe. Great. I'll
wear a yukata.
translations.そうなんだ、残念。◙せっかく浴衣◙用意したんだけどな、◙また今度行こうね？:
I see. Too bad.
I already prepared
my yukata. Maybe
next time, okay？
translations.週末、ベイブリッジに◙花火を見に行かない？:
Shall we go to watch
fireworks at the
Bay Bridge together
this weekend？
translations.明日は◙クリスマスイヴだね。◙学校でパーティーが◙あるけど、◙もちろん行くよね:
Tomorrow is
Christmas. We're
having a party at
school. You'll be
there, right？
translations.明日だね、誕生日。◙わたしに一番に◙お祝いさせてね、お願い▼:
Tomorrow is your
birthday. Please let
me be the one who
makes you happy▼
translations.わたしの誕生日、◙忘れてた？◙少し怒ってるから:
Did you forget my
birthday？ I'm a
bit angry now.
translations.わたしの誕生日、◙過ぎちゃったよ。◙お祝いして◙ほしかったな……:
My birthday has
already passed. I
was expecting a
birthday wish from
you...
translations.カノジョの誕生日なんて、◙どうでもいいって◙思ってる？:
You just didn't
care about your
girlfriend's
birthday, huh!？
translations.そうなんだ。◙うーん、どうしよう:
Is that so？ Hmm,
what should I do？
translations.ふふ、そっか。◙ならいいの:
Hehe. Is that so？
Then it's good.
translations.ほんとに？◙うれしいな。◙これでも◙頑張ってるんだからね？◙ふふ、詳しくは秘密で:
Really？ I'm so glad.
I've really tried
hard, you know？
Hehe, I won't tell
you how much I tried
though.
translations.そうなの？◙わたし、◙これでも結構明るくしてる◙つもりだったんだけどな:
Really？ I intended
to be very lively,
you know？
translations.そうなんだ。◙わたし、まだ◙落ち着き足りないんだ。◙自分では◙わからなかったな…:
I see. So I'm still
not calm enough.
I didn't know that
about myself though...
translations.そっか。◙うん、わかった。◙変なこと聞いちゃったね:
I see. Um, I got it.
I asked you a weird
question, didn't I？
translations.もっと？◙自分では◙結構活発になったと◙思ってるんだけどな:
More？ I think I've
been very active
lately though.
translations.うん、活発だね？◙じゃあ◙がんばっちゃうから！:
Okay. Active, right？
I'll do my best!
translations.そうなんだ。◙これでも結構気をつけてた◙つもりだけど……:
I see.
I thought I have
been very careful
about that...
translations.そっか、そうなんだ。◙覚えておくね、ありがとう:
I see. I got it.
I'll try to remember
that. Thank you.
translations.あのね。◙最近のわたしって◙少し変わったと思う？◙どうかな:
Um, I think I've
changed lately.
What do you think？
translations.やった！◙努力しましたから、ふふ▼:
Yeah! I'm glad I've
tried so hard. Hehe▼
translations.うれしい。◙ちゃんとわたしのこと◙見ててくれてるんだね:
I'm glad. You've
really paid
attention to me.
translations.ホントに？◙よかった、◙がんばったんだもん▼:
Really？
I'm glad. I really
did my best▼
translations.そっか……◙ううん、いいの。◙なんでもないから、◙気にしないで:
I see... Um, okay.
It's not a big
deal. Never mind.
translations.そっか、興味あるんだね。◙ちょっと考えてみる:
So, you're interested？
I'll think about it.
translations.興味ないんだ。◙ううん、だったらいいの。◙気にしないで:
Not interested？
Okay, fine then.
Never mind.
translations.あのね。この間の◙髪の色の話だけど、◙好きな色って◙あるのかな？:
Um, we've talked
about hair color,
right？ What color
do you like？
translations.それって、◙今と変わらないよ？◙やっぱり今のままが◙いいってことかな:
Then it's not
different from my
current hair. So,
I'm fine, right？
translations.そうなんだ。◙覚えておこうっと、ふふ:
Okay. I'll keep that
in mind. Hehe.
translations.あのね。髪の色を変えてみようかな……って。どうかな？今度のデートで試してみようか:
Hey, I've been thinking
about changing my hair
color before our date.
Should I？
translations.ほんと？◙ちょっとドキドキ◙しちゃうな。◙あんまり驚かないでね？:
Really？ This is quite
exciting. Just don't
be too surprised,
okay？
translations.そう、イヤなんだ。◙ちょっとだけ残念かも、◙なんて:
So, you don't want
me to？ This is a bit
unfortunate. Sort of.
translations.あのね。◙そろそろまた髪の色変えて◙みようと思うんだけど、◙どうかな？:
Hey, I've been thinking
about changing my hair
color. What do you
think？
translations.ふふ。◙じゃあどんな色がいい？:
Hehe. Then what
color do you like？
translations.そっか、◙じゃあこのままにする。◙気に入ってくれてるんだね:
I see. So you like my
current hair color,
huh？
translations.明るい色ね。◙どんな色味がいいかな？:
A bright color？
What shade is good？
translations.いいかも。◙今度のデートのときに◙変えてみようかな:
Fine. Maybe I'll try
changing it before
our date.
translations.それって今の色かな。◙少し変えてみても◙いいかも:
That's my current
hair color. So I
guess I'm fine.
translations.あのね。◙たまに変わった髪の色◙してる子っているよね。◙わたしには似合わないかな:
Hey, I've seen a lot
of girls with unusual
hair colors lately.
Should I change mine,
too？
translations.うーん、じゃあ◙今度のデートのときに◙変えてみようかな。◙きっとビックリ◙しちゃ:
Hmm. Then I might
try changing it
before our date.
I wonder if you'll
be surprised.
translations.そうだよね、やめておく。◙ほんとはね、◙ちょっと怖かったの:
I see. I won't try
that then. Actually,
I'm too scared to
try.
translations.あのね。◙今のわたしの髪型って、◙好き？◙ちょっと気になっちゃった:
Um, do you like my
current hairstyle？
I'm just wondering.
translations.そっか、うれしい。◙じゃあこのままにしよっと:
Really？ I'm glad.
I'll keep it like

translations.ふふ、ほんとに？◙じゃあ、しばらく◙かけてみよっかな♪:

translations.そっか。◙ちょっと残念、かな:

translations.そういえばわたし、ずっと◙メガネかけてるけど、◙このままでもいいかな？:

translations.あのね。◙１２時からって◙時間空いてる？◙会いたいな……なんて:

translations.あのね。◙１時からって◙時間空いてる？◙会いたいな……なんて:

translations.あのね。◙２時からって◙時間空いてる？◙会いたいな……なんて:

translations.あのね。◙３時からって◙時間空いてる？◙会いたいな……なんて:

translations.あのね。◙４時からって◙時間空いてる？◙会いたいな……なんて:

translations.あのね。◙５時からって◙時間空いてる？◙会いたいな……なんて:

translations.あのね。◙６時からって◙時間空いてる？◙会いたいな……なんて:

translations.あのね。◙７時からって◙時間空いてる？◙会いたいな……なんて:

translations.よかった。◙中庭で待ってるから、◙またあとでね:

translations.そっか、◙無理なら仕方ないね。◙ごめんね、◙急に誘っちゃって:

translations.親密度って知ってるか？◙お互いの関係が深まる◙ほどに高まって、◙そうなると少しの:

- Dream Chaser
translations.デート楽しみにしてる: I can't wait for our date.
translations.早く会いたい: I want to see you soon.
translations.●の写真を部屋に飾る: Put my photo on your desk.
translations.おはよ。◙今日学校◙休みになんないかな。◙はぁ:

translations.おはよ。◙低血圧だからさ、◙朝辛い……:

was probably still
asleep.
translations.最悪、◙今日の先生機嫌悪い。◙居眠りしたら怒られるかな:
This is bad.
The teacher is moody
today. If I fall
asleep in class,
I'll get scolded
for sure.
translations.もういい。◙午後の授業からがんばる:
Now, I'll have to
do my best for the
afternoon classes.
translations.朝から体育とか、◙ほんとカンベンしてほしい:
I got P.E. class early
in the morning. Geez.
translations.おはよ。◙今日もてきとーにがんばる:
Morning.
I'll try to do my best
today.
translations.おはよ。◙あ～学校行きたくない！:
Morning.
Ah~ I don't wanna go
to school!
translations.おはよ。◙カノジョのメールで◙起きられるなんてさ、◙いい身分だよね、◙▲主人公＊:
Morning. It feels
good to wake up with
your girlfriend's
message, right？
translations.おはよ▼◙◙あ～、◙ハートとかつけちゃったよ:
Morning▼
Ah~ It was like you
knew what I was
thinking.
translations.こっちは春眠中、◙このまま寝てたい:
I'm sleeping.
I still don't want
to wake up.
translations.おはよ。◙春ってさ、◙なんでこんな眠いの:
Morning. I feel
even sleepier in
spring.
translations.春はのどかだね。◙これで授業さえなければ:
Spring is such
a peaceful season.
I can focus in my
class.
translations.おはよ。◙眠いのに、◙暑くて寝てらんないよ:
Morning. Even though
I'm sleepy, I can't
sleep in this heat.
translations.おはよ。◙今日も暑い……:
Morning.
Today is hot,
as usual...
translations.もうだめ。◙この暑さの中、◙学校来るだけで◙１日の体力使いきったし:
This is not good.
My energy is used up
for the day just by
coming to school under
this heat.
translations.おはよ。◙だんだん布団から出るのが◙辛くなってくるね:
Morning.
Getting out of bed
is getting harder
and harder.
translations.芸術の秋の目覚めは◙パンクに限るね:
In fall, it's best
to appreciate arts
while listening to
punk music.
translations.学校来るときに◙枯れ葉で肌切っちゃった、◙最悪:
My skin got scratched
by dry leaves on my
way to school.
What bad luck.
translations.寒いね、◙教室でもコート脱げないよ:
It's cold, right？
I don't even take
my coat off in class.
translations.寒くて布団から◙出らんないよ～:
I can't get out of
bed due to the
cold~
translations.放送部が流す◙曲のセンスは最悪:
The songs
currently airing
on the radio are
all bad.
translations.昼食べすぎた……◙おなか痛い:
I overate my
lunch... My
stomach hurts.
translations.連続であてられた、◙しかも数学と化学。◙わかるわけないっつーの:
This is boring.
Why do I have to
learn math and
chemistry!？
translations.授業早く終わんないかな:
I wish this class
could end faster.
translations.午後の授業ってさ、◙集中できないんだよね。◙昼食べたら眠くなるじゃん:
I can't focus in the
afternoon classes.
After lunch, I feel
so sleepy.
translations.▲凛▲は◙寝るよ。◙おやすみ。◙Ｚｚｚ……:
Rinko is going to
bed. Good night.
Zzz...
translations.午前中は◙だるかったけど、◙午後からはがんばる:
I was quite
sluggish this
morning, but I'll
do my best this
afternoon.
translations.やっと休み時間。◙少し寝よ:
Free time at last.
I'll take a nap.
translations.休み時間になるとハシャぎ◙出すのってなんなの？◙ガキ？:
Are you happy when
it's finally break
time？ What are you,
a kid？
translations.教室でヒットチャート◙の話するのは◙別にいいんだけどさ。◙ロック聴く人間が◙一人:
We talked about hit
music in class
today. To my
surprise, no one
listened to rock
music! What's going
on？
translations.クラスの女子はカレシと◙好きな男の話ばっか。◙でも▲凛▲は◙黙して語らず、だよ:
The girls in my class
were talking about
their boyfriends, but
I just sat there and
listened quietly.
translations.あのさ、教室でイチャつく◙人間ってどう思う？◙別に▲凛▲は◙そんなこと◙したくな:
Hey, what would you say
if someone flirted with
me in my classroom？
Not that it happened,
though. I just wanted
to know.
translations.なんかクラスメートに◙雑誌読まされた。◙「カレを誘惑する◙１０の小悪魔テクニック:
My classmate forced me
to read a magazine
scoop "Top 10 tricks
to lure guys." It was
just stupid!
translations.春だねぇ。◙周りも結構寝てるし、◙そこに一人加わったところ◙で問題ないじゃんね。:
It's spring.
People around me
are sleeping. I guess
it should be okay that
I join them. Now then,
good night.
translations.春はさ、◙授業サボって◙屋上で寝るのが◙一番気持ちいいんだよね:
In spring, it really
feels great to skip
a class and get some
sleep on the school's
rooftop, right？
translations.暑くもなく寒くもなく、◙一番いい季節だね。◙だからって勉強する気は◙おきないけど:
This season is not
too cold, but not too
hot. It's the best
season. Anyway, it's
hard to focus on
studying.
translations.偉くなったらさ、◙まず最初に全学校の◙全教室にクーラーを◙入れる法律を作る！:
If I become a
bigwig one day,
I'll order all
schools to add air
conditions in
classrooms!
translations.夏は男が羨ましい……ちっ:
When it's summer,
I always feel jealous
of the guys. Tsk.
translations.外に枯葉が舞ってる。◙ジャジィだね:
It looks as if dry
leaves are dancing
in the wind.
They are gorgeous.
translations.芸術の秋だから◙美術の補習だってさ、◙冗談じゃないっつーの。◙至高の芸術は音楽で:
Fall is the season to
appreciate arts, so I'm
taking supplementary
art lessons. Anyway,
music is the supremacy
of all arts, right？
translations.食欲の秋とか陳腐なこと◙言いたくないけど、◙お腹空いた。◙図書室にポテチ常備した:
I wonder if we really
get bigger appetite in
fall. I'm hungry...
If I eat potato chips
in the library, will
I get scolded？
translations.暖房ついた教室で◙寝るなっていう方が◙無理じゃん？:
Isn't it
unreasonable to
stop the students
from sleeping in
this heated
classroom？
translations.暑いの苦手だけどさ、◙だからって寒いのが◙平気ってわけでもないし。◙もう外に出た:
I hate the heat but
that doesn't mean I'm
okay with the cold...
I don't want to go out
now...
translations.今日の体育、◙球技って……。◙やだ、スキーがいい！:
P.E. class today is
so boring. I want to
go skiing!
translations.放課後ってさ、◙やる気出ないんだよね。◙ガッコ終わったばっかで◙疲れる:
I have no energy to
do anything after
school. I'm tired from
all the classes.
translations.また図書室の◙アンケートＢＯＸにゴミ◙入れてるやつがいるし。◙はぁ……:
There are people
who think that the
library's survey box
is a trash can.
Hah...
translations.ヒマ～。◙ま、ヒマなのはいいことだ:
I have nothing to do~
Anyway, that's good,
though.
translations.仕事忙しい……、◙みんな早く帰れ:
I'm busy with my
work... Everyone
wants to go home
now.
translations.イヤフォンしながら◙図書室で本読んでたら◙音漏れ注意された、不覚:
I was listening to
music in the library,
but I got a warning
because the sound
from my earphones was
too loud.
translations.プレイヤーの充電切れた、◙最悪！:
My music player ran
out of battery.
This is the worst!
translations.お腹空いたし、◙もう仕事あがろっかな:
I'm hungry.
I wish I could
finish my work soon.
translations.本がたくさんあって、◙音楽が聴けて、◙あとはこれでポテチが◙あれば完璧なんだけど:
It would be perfect if
they allow me to eat
potato chips in the
library.
translations.今月の推薦図書、◙珍しく面白かった。◙どうせヒマだろうから、◙読んでみたら？:
The library's
recommended book this
time is unusually fun.
If you have time, you
should try reading it.
translations.▲凛▲の◙カード、◙貸出冊数の◙上限きちゃったから、◙勝手に▲主人公＊▲の◙カー:
I already borrowed
maximum number of books
with my library card,
so I used yours to
borrow some more.
Thanks.
translations.下校中の小学生は◙元気だね。◙▲凛▲、◙帰ったら弟と遊ぼっかな:
Grade school students
are full of energy.
Maybe I'll play with
my little brother
after school today.
translations.たまに眺めるんだよね、◙ネコの写真集。◙でも生のネコ見たいな:
It's nice to have
a photo collection
of cats, but it's
better to play with
the real thing.
translations.図書室でおしゃべり◙してる女子の集団を◙注意しに行ったらさ、◙やっぱりホレたハレ:
I just warned a group
of girls for being too
loud in the library.
They were talking about
guys. Geez.
translations.春って過ごしやすいのは◙いいんだけど、◙いまいちロックじゃ◙ないよね。のどかでさ:
Spring is nice for
relaxing. But,
somehow, it's too
peaceful for rock
music.
translations.先生が秋だけじゃなくて◙「春の読書週間」も◙作ろうってさ。◙結局いつでもいいわけ:
The teachers just set
up "Spring's Reading
Week." I think we have
the reading week every
season now.
translations.図書室に寝に来てる◙やつってなんなの？◙家帰って寝ろっつーの:
Why do people come
to the library to
sleep？ If they want
to sleep, just go to
sleep at home!
translations.外では運動部が◙汗流してるね……。◙この暑いのに、よくやる:
Members of our
school's sports clubs
are practicing in this
hot weather. They
really work hard.
translations.図書室に涼みに来てる◙連中が多くてヤになる。◙喫茶店じゃないっつーの:
People just come to
the library to enjoy
the cool air. This is
not a coffee shop!
Geez.
translations.帰り道の暑さを想像すると◙……はぁ:
I can imagine the heat
outside when I walk
home. Hah...
translations.委員の仕事が忙しい……。◙読書の秋だから◙図書室って、◙短絡的過ぎるっつーの！:
The library committee's
work is so tough...
People enjoy reading
books in fall which
makes our library staff
so busy!
translations.ウチの図書室って、◙秋の間ずっと◙「秋の読書週間」◙やってるよね。◙もう週間じゃ:
Our school's library
will have "Fall's
Reading Week" coming
soon.
translations.読書の秋とかいうけど、◙冬の方が部屋にこもって◙本読むイメージじゃんね。◙なんと:
People say that fall
is the best season for
reading, but I think
it feels better to
read books at home
in winter.
translations.はぁ、帰り道も寒そう……:
Hah...
It must be cold when
I walk home from
school.
translations.図書室にコタツ欲しい、◙▲凛▲専用の◙やつ。一応、◙▲主人公＊▲にも◙使わせてあ:
I wish I could have a
personal heater in the
library. I could share
it with you, too.
translations.テレビ点けてみ、◙面白いのやってる:
I just turned on
my TV. There might
be something
interesting.
translations.今やってる音楽番組、◙最悪。◙プロデューサー◙呼べっつーの:
Songs on music
channel are so bad.
How could these
people call
themselves artists？
translations.夜はスピーカーで◙音楽聴けないけどさ、◙ヘッドフォンも結構◙好きなんだよね。◙音:
I can't use speakers
to listen to music
at night, but
headphones are nice
too. I can hear the
sounds better.
translations.今読み始めた本が◙面白いからさ、◙今夜中に読破してやるんだ:
The book I'm reading
is very interesting.
I think I'll read it
all night tonight.
translations.今日の委員会は◙忙しかった。◙もう一生分働いたよ:
The library
committee's work
today was such a
hectic. I worked
for your parts
too.
translations.今日の委員会は暇だった。◙いつもこうだったら◙いいのに:
There wasn't anything
much for the library
committee's work today.
I wish it could be like
this everyday.
translations.そういや宿題◙あったんだよね。◙別にやんなくてもいっか:
You have homework too,
right？ Don't you have
to finish it？
translations.なんか気が向いたからさ、◙宿題終わらせちゃった。◙何かに負けた気が◙するんだけど:
I was trying to finish
my homework, but now
I feel like I'm not
quite in the mood.
translations.外から◙ネコの鳴き声が聞こえる。◙見に行こっかな:
I can hear a cat's
noise from outside.
Maybe I should go out
to take a look.
translations.今日何食べた？◙なんとなく◙聞いてみただけだけど:
What did you have
for dinner today？ I
just wanted to ask.
translations.弟、もう寝ちゃった。◙寝顔もカワイイんだよね:
My little brother
has fallen asleep.
His sleeping face
is very cute.
translations.弟をお風呂に◙入れてきたよ。◙いつまで一緒に入れるかな:
I took a bath with
my little brother
today. I wonder how
long we can keep
doing this.
translations.今日は珍しくお父さんの◙帰りが早かったんだよね。◙たまにはいいんだけどね、◙普段:
Today, my dad came
home early. It was
so rare. Usually,
he's very busy.
translations.なんかお父さんがさ、◙学校であったこととか◙よく聞いてくるように◙なったんだよね:
My dad asked me
about school and
other things. I
wonder why. He'd
never asked me like
this before.
translations.春の特番って◙つまんないよね。◙今日はもう◙テレビ見るのやめ！:
TV programs are
all boring in
spring. I'd better
stop watching TV
from now on!
translations.春限定ポテチの、◙さくらんぼ味がさ。◙ゲテモノかと思いきや◙妙にクセになるんだよ:
Although spring's
limited edition cherry
flavor potato chips
taste weird, I kind of
get addicted to it now.
translations.おかしいな、まだこんな◙時間なのに眠い。◙早く寝ると◙損した気になるから、◙まだ:
This is strange.
It's still early but
I feel sleepy already.
I don't want to go to
bed now, so I'll try
to stay awake.
translations.テレビで特番やってる。◙「夏だ！海だ！」って、◙テンション高いよね。◙ごくろうさ:
There's a special
scoop, "It's summer.
Time for the ocean! on
TV. It's" quite fun.
translations.夏はさ、食欲でないよね。◙あー食べるのめんどくさい:
I lose appetite in
summer. Ah, eating
is so troublesome.
translations.暑い……アイス食べよ:
So hot... I want
some ice cream.
translations.今頃、◙夏フェスの番組やってる。◙行きたいけど、◙面倒じゃんね:
There's a summer
festival scoop on TV.
I want to go there
but it is quite
troublesome.
translations.食欲の秋とかさ、◙たくさん食べるための◙言い訳じゃん？:
People just say that
they have big
appetite in fall to
find some excuses to
eat more. That's
what I think.
translations.秋は物悲しい季節、◙なんて陳腐な表現だよね:
When people say that
fall is such a lonely
season, I feel like
that's so cliched.
translations.暑いときには◙熱いものを食べるのが◙いいとか言うけど、◙逆はないよね。◙まぁ今冷:
It's good to eat hot
foods in hot weather,
but it's totally not
good to eat cold foods
in cold weather, right？
translations.テレビで◙スキーの特集やってる。◙寒いのはヤだけど、◙滑りたいな:
There's a scoop about
skiing on TV. I hate
cold weather, but I
want to ski.
translations.今日は寒いから◙弟と一緒に寝ようかな。◙一緒に布団入るとさ、◙あったかいんだよね:
It's very cold today.
Maybe I'll sleep with
my little brother.
It's warm when we get
under the same blanket
together, you know？
translations.おやすみ。歯磨いた？:
Good night.
Did you brush your
teeth？
translations.もう寝る！◙おやすみ:
I'm going to bed!
Good night.
translations.やっぱり夜食は◙ポテチに限るね。◙カレルビーならモアベター:
It's the best to eat
Kalbee's potato chips
for late night snack!
translations.おやすみ。◙今日もがんばったから◙疲れた！:
Good night. I did my
best today and I'm
so tired now!
translations.深夜ラジオさ、◙たまにレアな曲が◙流れるから面白いよね。◙聞きながら眠っちゃった:
Late night radio show
usually airs some rare
tunes. That's nice.
I can listen to the
songs before going to
bed.
translations.今日もそろそろ終わり。◙やれやれって感じ:
Today has almost
ended. I feel like I'm
hanging in there.
translations.朝はあんなに◙ねむかったのに、◙なんで夜になると◙目がさえるんだろ:
I always feel
sleepy in the
morning and feel
alert at night.
Why is that？
translations.コンビニ◙行きたいんだけど、◙さすがにこの時間じゃ◙怒られるか。◙子供は損だね、:
I want to go to the
convenient store but
it's too late. I'll
get scolded if I go
out at this late
hour.
translations.布団の中から送信。◙おやすみ:
I send this
message from under
my blanket. Good
night.
translations.おやすみ。◙きっと明日は◙早起きするから。◙たぶん:
Good night. I'll
wake up early
tomorrow... I
guess.
translations.おやすみ。◙明日もがんばれ:
Good night.
Do your best again
tomorrow.
translations.おやすみ。◙今日も一日◙お疲れ様でした▼◙◙なんてね:
Good night.
You had done your
best for today,
I guess.
translations.▲凛▲の◙メールってさ、◙やっぱそっけないのかな。◙でも妙にハシャいだ◙文章書く:
Do you think my
messages are usually
too short？ I don't
like to type, so
just don't complain.
translations.おやすみ。◙これだけ布団が◙気持ちいいと、◙寝坊しない自信はないかも:
Good night.
It feels so good
being under the
blanket. I probably
won't stay up late
tonight.
translations.おやすみ。◙さすがに窓開けて◙寝るにはまだ早いか……:
Good night.
It's still too cold
to leave the windows
open when I go to bed.
translations.おやすみ。◙至福の時間の始まりだよ:
Good night.
The best time has
just started now.
translations.おやすみ。◙でもこれだけ暑いと、◙すぐには寝られないかも:
Good night.
With this heat, it
will probably take
me a while until
I fall asleep.
translations.お腹痛い。◙今日アイス２本◙食べたからかな:
My stomach hurts.
I ate two cups of
ice cream today.
translations.今日は弟が◙一緒に寝ようってさ。◙嬉しいんだけど、◙今の季節は暑いのがね……:
My little brother
wants to sleep with
me tonight. But the
weather is so hot that
I don't want to sleep
with him.
translations.おやすみ。◙虫の鳴き声がうるさい……:
Good night.
Those insects' noises
are too noisy...
translations.おやすみ。◙そろそろ朝起きるのが◙辛いんだよね:
Good night.
I'll try to get up
early but that's
so hard.
translations.最近たまに寒いけどさ、◙風邪なんてひかないでよ。◙おやすみ:
It's getting chilly
lately. Don't catch
a cold, okay？
translations.さむい！◙もう寝るよ、おやすみ:
So cold! I'm going
to bed now. Good
night.
translations.まだあんま眠くないけど、◙寒いからもう寝る。◙おやすみ:
I'm not sleepy,
but it's too cold
that I think I should
go to bed. Good night.
translations.おはよ。◙目さめちゃったけど、◙まだ寝てればよかったかな:
Morning.
I already woke up
but I feel like going
back to sleep.
translations.おはよ。◙今日もてきとーに◙がんばって:
Morning.
I'll try my best
again today.
translations.おはよ。◙休日の朝は気分がいいね:
Morning.
It feels good that
today is a holiday,
right？
translations.クラシックの◙番組やってる。◙たまにロックだよね、◙クラシックって:
I'm watching the
music channel. It
shows classic rocks
now.
translations.休みなのに◙早く目がさめた。◙損した:
It's a holiday but
I woke up so
early.
translations.さて、今日は何しよっかな:
Well, what shall I do
today？
translations.グッモーニン！◙▲凛▲もさ、◙たまには早起きするわけよ:
Good morning.
Sometimes, Rinko wakes
up early, too.
translations.今、弟と◙ヴォルヴァヴィン観てる。◙リンタロウ少年、◙なんで毎回こんなに◙ピンチ:
My little brother is
watching "Volvavin"
on TV now. That hero,
Rintaro boy, gets in
a pinch in every
single episode.
translations.今日は外で鳴いてた◙ネコの声で目がさめた。◙最高の目覚ましだね:
Today, I woke up by
a cat's noise. It was
the best way to wake
up.
translations.お父さんまだ寝てる。◙だらしない男はダメだね、◙わかってる？:
My dad is still
sleeping. Slovenly
guys are bad, you know？
translations.昼間に家にいるとさ、◙爆音で音楽聴けるから◙いいよね。◙いつもみたいに◙ヘッドフ:
It feels nice to listen
to music when I'm home
alone. I can turn the
volume up and I don't
need to use headphones.
translations.休日の昼のテレビって◙なんでこんな◙つまんないの。◙見るもの◙ぜんぜんないじゃん:
TV programs on
holidays are so
boring. I don't know
what to watch.
translations.起きるの遅かったからさ、◙今日のご飯は朝昼兼用:
I woke up late so
I just had my brunch.
translations.寝過ぎるとさ、◙頭痛くなるよね。◙あー、だるい:
You get a headache
when you
oversleep, right？
Ouch, my head
hurts.
translations.年頃の娘としてはさ、◙家事とか◙手伝った方がいいのかな:
As a daughter,
shall I help my
family with some
housework？
translations.弟は昼寝しちゃった。◙子供は気楽でいいよね:
My little brother is
napping. It's good
to be a kid, huh？
translations.まだパジャマ着てたら◙お母さんに怒られた。◙このままが楽なのに:
I was in my pajamas
until a while ago,
and then my dad
scolded me. I didn't
have any problem
wearing them all
day, though.
translations.弟と遊ぼうと思ったのに、◙外に遊びに行っちゃった。◙子供は元気だね:
I was thinking about
playing with my brother
but he already went to
play outside. Kids are
so energetic, huh？
translations.なんか休みの日の◙夕方が来るとさ、◙「損した！」って◙気になんない？◙学校のない:
It's my long awaited
school break, but
I didn't spend my day
wisely and the day
has almost ended now.
translations.つまんない番組ばっか。◙なんか面白いことない？:
TV programs are all
boring. Don't they
have anything fun for
me to watch？
translations.魔法少女ものの◙アニメがやってる。◙こういうの◙見なかったんだよね、◙興味なかっ:
There's that magical
girl anime on TV.
You don't watch it,
do you？ People will
make fun of you if
you do.
translations.今、何してる？◙こっちはけっこう◙暇なんだよね:
What are you gonna
do today？ I have
too much free time
now.
translations.そういや図書委員の仕事◙持ち帰ってたんだけど、◙やっぱめんどくさいから◙学校でや:
I took some work home.
It's the library
committee's work.
I should've done it
at school though.
translations.休みの日には１冊ぐらい◙本読んでおきたいよね:
I plan to read one
book a day during the
school break.
translations.ポテチ食べ過ぎた。◙晩御飯入るかな:
I ate too much
potato chips.
I wonder if I can
still eat dinner.
translations.今日のご飯なんだろ。◙あんまり嫌いなもの◙ないといいけど:
I hope my dinner
today wouldn't have
too many things that
I dislike.
translations.弟が外で遊び回ってて、◙今帰って来たとこ。◙▲主人公＊▲も◙小さい頃は◙こんな感:
Looking at my little
brother, I couldn't
help picturing you
when you were a kid.
translations.お母さんがさ、◙晩御飯の準備手伝えって。◙上手くできるかな……:
My mother asked me to
help preparing dinner.
I wonder if things
will go well...
translations.つかれたー、ねむいー:
I'm tired and I'm
very sleepy.
translations.そういや図書室から借りて◙まだ読んでない本が◙あったんだよね、◙片付けないと:
I borrowed some books
from the library but
I haven't read them
yet.
translations.今やってるバラエティの◙ジングルにデスジャビの◙曲が使われてた。◙たまにこういう:
The variety show I'm
watching now used
Deth Jabbi's tune
for its jingle. This
is interesting.
translations.今日テレビで伝説のバンド◙特集やるんだってさ、◙録画録画:
There's a scoop about
the Legendary Band
on TV now. I'll have
to record it.
translations.週末にだらけると、◙そこからテンション◙あげるのが大変だよね。◙スロースターター:
You feel a bit sluggish
on weekdays when you
do nothing on weekends,
right？ It's called
slow starter, I guess.
translations.宿題やるの忘れてた。◙まぁいっか:
I forgot to do my
homework. Well, like
I care.
translations.今日中に読みたい本が◙あったんだけど、◙ちょっと厳しそう。◙明日に持ち越すか:
I was thinking about
finishing this book
today, but I guess
I'll keep it until
tomorrow.
translations.たまには◙コメディ番組もいいね。◙こういう使い捨ての娯楽も◙世の中には必要だよ:
It's good to watch
a comedy show every
once in a while.
It's important to have
some humor in life.
translations.今日の休みはどうだった？◙充実してた？:
How did you spend
your day-off？ Did you
spend it wisely？
translations.家族４人で◙食事ってのもさ、◙悪くないね:
It's not bad to
eat dinner with
the whole family,
huh？
translations.お母さんが◙ドラマ見て興奮してる。◙芸能人ってそんなに◙いいもんかな？◙ミュージ:
My mother is so into
a TV drama. The actor
is very good. Anyway,
I prefer a musician
to an actor.
translations.弟がお母さんに◙怒られて泣いちゃってさ、◙▲凛▲が◙フォロー中。◙こうやって頼ら:
My little brother is
crying because my
mother scolded him.
I'm comforting him now.
I'm such a nice sister.
translations.あとは寝るだけ。◙おやすみ～:
I'm going to bed
soon. Good night.
translations.まだ起きてる？◙こっちはもう寝るよ、◙おやすみ:
Are you still awake？
I'll have to go to
bed. Good night.
translations.目がさえて寝られない！:
I couldn't sleep
no matter how much
I tried!
translations.そろそろ今日も終わりか。◙世はこともなし、だね:
Today has almost
ended. You're hanging
in there, right？
translations.もう限界。◙おやすみ:
I have to sleep
now. Good night.
translations.おやすみ。◙夢見るとさ、◙なんか得した気分に◙なんない？:
Good night.
Do you feel lucky
if you dream when
you sleep？
translations.おやすみ。◙明日も充実した◙一日だといいね:
Good night. Spend
your day wisely
tomorrow, okay？
translations.おやすみ。◙明日も無理せずがんばれ:
Good night.
Do your best again
tomorrow. But, just
don't overdo it,
okay？
translations.お父さん帰ってきた。◙こんな遅くまで◙よくがんばるよ:
My dad just got
home. He worked hard
until late.
translations.弟の部屋まで◙寝顔見に行っちゃった。◙天使みたいにカワイイよ:
I peeked into my
brother's room while
he was sleeping.
He was so cute,
like an angel.
translations.約束守らないのって、◙サイテー:
You can't keep
a promise.
You're the worst!
translations.あのさ、◙ずっと待ってた◙▲凛▲が◙バカみたいじゃん？:
Hey...
You made me wait
like an idiot.
translations.▲凛▲、◙ずっと待ってたんだけど。◙なんで来なかったの？◙何かあったの？:
Rinko was waiting
for so long. Why
didn't you come？
Did something happen？
translations.デートで◙カノジョのこと放置って、◙ありえない:
You can't leave
your girlfriend
alone on a date!
translations.いくら◙▲凛▲でもさ、◙デート中に◙ほっておかれたら、◙いい気しない:
Even if it's me,
I can't stand it
that you left me
alone on a date.
translations.デート中に◙無視すんなっつーの！:
Don't leave me alone
on the date!
translations.▲凛▲に◙飽きて、◙ほっておいたわけじゃ◙ないよね。◙だったら、どうして？:
I hope you didn't do
this because you got
bored of me. But
why？
translations.今日のアレ、◙なんだったわけ？:
We had something
to do today,
hadn't we？
translations.なんで◙あんな感じだったの。◙▲凛▲のこと、◙イヤになったの:
Why did it turn out
like this？ Did you
hate Rinko？
translations.反省してんなら、許す。◙だからもうしないこと:
I'll forgive you
this time. But never
do it again.
translations.はぁ。◙しょうがないな、もう:
Hah...
It can't be helped
then. Geez.
translations.謝るぐらいなら、◙最初からするなっつーの:
Instead of
apologizing, you
shouldn't have done
this from the start!
translations.……まったく。◙わかったって、◙騙されてあげる:
...Geez. I got it.
I'll let you off
for this time.
translations.そんなんで◙誤魔化されないっつーの！:
Don't try to deceive
me with this!
translations.さっきの電話さ、◙ありがと。◙▲凛▲から◙誘っても◙良かったんだけどさ:
Thank you for
calling me. Maybe
next time I'll be
the one asking you
out.
translations.さっきの電話。◙ちょうど暇だったし、◙いいタイミングだったかも:
I was doing nothing
when you gave me
a call. What a nice
timing.
translations.誘ってくれて、ありがと。◙次は▲凛▲◙から誘うかも:
Thanks for inviting
me. Maybe I'll be the
one asking you out
next time.
translations.わざわざ◙誘ってくれたんだし、◙一応礼ぐらい◙言っとくべき？:
Since you asked me
out, I should at
least thank you,
right？
translations.ＯＫしてくれてさ、◙ありがと。◙そんだけ:
Thanks for saying
okay. That's it.
translations.わざわざ▲凛▲◙から誘って◙あげたんだからさ、◙楽しみにしてて:
I took the trouble
to ask you out, so
you must make it
a fun date.
translations.そっちから誘えっつーの！:
Why did you wait until
I had to ask you out!？
translations.たまにはこんな風に◙▲凛▲から◙誘うかもしんないけどさ、◙別にいいでしょ:
Occasionally, it's
good that Rinko asks
you out, right？
translations.暇だったからさ、◙なんとなく◙誘ってみただけ。◙それじゃ:
I didn't have
anything to do, so
I thought I should
ask you. That's
it.
translations.あのさ、◙どうしたら早く◙明日が来ると思う？:
Hey, how can I
make tomorrow come
faster？
translations.明日、◙それなりに楽しみに◙してるんだからさ。◙ガッカリさせないでよ:
I'm really looking
forward to our date
tomorrow. Don't
disappoint me, okay？
translations.なんか今日１日長かった、◙なんでだろ。◙ところで明日さ、◙遅れたりしないこと:
Why is today getting
so long？ Anyway,
tomorrow, don't be
late.
translations.明日のアレさ、◙まさか忘れてないよね:
Do you know what to
do tomorrow？ Don't
tell me that you
forget.
translations.そんなの言わなくても◙わかってるからさ、◙安心してよ:
You don't have to
tell me. I already
know it, so rest
assured.
translations.当たり前じゃん、◙そんなの。◙今さら何言ってんのさ:
That's natural.
Why do you have to
tell me now？
translations.はいはい。◙わかってるから、◙落ち着くこと:
Okay, okay.
I know it, so you
can calm down.
translations.▲凛▲も◙そう思ってるってこと、◙わかってるでしょ？◙いじわる:
You know I feel
the same, right？
You're teasing me.
translations.我慢しろっつーの、◙▲凛▲だって◙すぐ会いたいんだから:
I can't be patient.
I really want to
meet you now.
translations.はいはい。◙わかってるからさ、◙そういう言葉は◙安売りしないの:
Yes, yes.
I know. But don't
use that word too
lightly, okay？
translations.そういうこと◙言っとけばいい、◙みたいな態度◙やめろっつーの:
Don't think that
everything can be
solved by just
saying that, okay？
translations.抜き打ちの小テストが◙あったみたい、◙２年生が騒いでた:
I've heard that
there will be
a pop quiz for the
2nd year's class.
translations.たまにさ、教室から◙▲主人公＊▲が◙体育してんの見えるよ。◙あんまりブザマな結果:
Sometimes I sneaked
out to see you during
your P.E. class.
So don't slack off,
okay？
translations.そっちの学年はそろそろ◙体力テストだってさ、◙ご苦労様:
I think you'll have
a physical strength
test soon. Do your
best.
translations.そっちの学年、◙音楽の実技テスト◙あるんだってさ。◙でもガッコのテストって◙さ、:
You'll have a test
in music class soon,
right？ Don't be too
clumsy then.
translations.美術の課題◙あるみたいだけど、◙てきとーにがんばってよ:
You'll have a
presentation in art
class, right？ Just
do your best then.
translations.図書委員たるもの、◙利用者に質問されても◙大丈夫なように、◙普段から蔵書の分類は:
To be able to assist
people as a library
committee, you have
to study book
classification too.
translations.本の整理は委員の仕事の◙基本なんだからさ。◙ちゃんとやれるように◙しといてよ:
Library committees
have to arrange books
on shelves very
often. You'd better
be prepared.
translations.本はさ、◙やっぱキレイに◙しとくべきだよ。◙だから書架の掃除は◙ちゃんとやっとく:
We have to keep the
books clean in the
library, so it's
important to
properly tidy up
bookshelves.
translations.なんかさ、◙推薦図書選ばなきゃ◙いけないじゃん、◙図書委員で。◙覚えておいてよね:
As a library
committee, you'll
have to write some
book reviews, too.
So be prepared.
translations.今度の図書室だよりの◙書評さ、もう何書くか◙考えてる？◙こっちはめんどくさくって:
Have you thought what
you would write for
a book review？ It's
so troublesome so I
haven't started yet.
translations.図書室の利用者には◙ちゃんと良い態度で◙接してる？◙これでもこっちは◙気をつけて:
It's important to
watch your
behavior toward
library users.
This is what I
have to be careful
too.
translations.委員の仕事、◙真面目にやってる？◙不真面目だと◙カッコつかないよ？◙人のことは◙:
Have you been
working diligently
as a library
committee？ You'd
better work hard.
translations.図書室に入荷する本、◙選んでる？◙少しはまともな本に◙してよね:
Are you going to
select the books for
our library？ You'd
better pick
something
worthwhile.
translations.もうすぐ中間テスト◙だけど、勉強してる？◙こっちは、ぼちぼち。◙そっちも、まぁが:
Midterm exams are
coming soon. Have you
been studying？ Do your
best.
translations.そうそう、◙素直に聞いとくもんだよ:
Good, good.
You listened to me
obediently.
translations.なにそれ、◙せっかく忠告してんのにさ:
What？ I warned you
nicely, though.
translations.今日さ、◙一緒に帰ってあげるって◙言ったら、嬉しいでしょ？:
Are you happy？
I'm saying that
I'll go home with
you today.
translations.帰り道のボディーガード、◙頼んであげてもいいけど:
I'm looking for a
bodyguard to walk
me home.
translations.今日、ふたりで帰りたい:
I want to walk home
with you today.
translations.今日の帰り、◙▲凛▲の隣が◙空いてるんだけど？:
How about we walk
home together
today？
translations.おはよ。◙今のメールで起きたよ、◙別にいいけど:
Morning.
I got up because
of your e-mail.
It's fine though.
translations.おはよ。◙もう昼だけど、◙どっか悪いの？:
Morning.
It's already late.
Did you get sick？
translations.昼まで寝てたって？◙いいご身分じゃん:
Did you sleep
until this late？
You enjoyed your
sleep, huh？
translations.おはよ。◙昼寝でもしてた？:
Morning. Did you
just get up from a
nap？
translations.寝てたの？◙今夕方じゃん:
Did you sleep
until now？ It's
already dark.
translations.寝てたんだ。◙調子悪いんじゃないなら、◙いいけど:
You've been sleeping？
If you didn't feel
sick, that's okay.
translations.今まで寝てたの？◙意味わかんない:
Have you been
sleeping until
now？ I don't
understand you.
translations.なにこの時間。◙おはようじゃないっつーの:
At this hour？
It's not morning
anymore.
translations.おはよ。◙まだこんな時間じゃん:
Morning.
Did you sleep
until now？
translations.早いっつーの！◙起きちゃったじゃん:
Is this your
morning？ You just
woke up!？
translations.徹夜してた？◙あんま無茶しないでよ:
Did you pull an
all-nighter？
Don't overdo it.
translations.今から寝るんだ。◙何、徹夜？:
Are you going to
sleep now？ What？
Pulling an
all-nighter？
translations.いいな、昼寝か。◙▲凛▲も◙一緒に昼寝したいよ:
Nice. Are you
taking a nap？
Rinko wants to
take a nap with
you.
translations.こんな時間に寝て◙大丈夫なの？◙あんま無理しないこと、◙いい？:
Are you okay？
You're going to bed
now？ Don't overdo
it, though.
translations.中途半端な時間に寝るね。◙明日辛くなっても◙知らないよ:
If you don't get
proper sleep, I won't
pity you if you feel
tired tomorrow.
translations.おやすみ、もう寝るんだ。◙▲凛▲の夜は◙まだこれからだけどね:
Good night.
You're going to bed
early. Rinko's night
has just started.
translations.おやすみ。◙寝るの結構早いじゃん:
Good night.
You go to bed very
early.
translations.おやすみ。◙へへ、▲凛▲も◙一緒のタイミングで◙寝よっと:
Good night.
Hehe, nice timing.
Rinko is about to
sleep too.
translations.おやすみ。◙こっちもそろそろ◙寝ようかな:
Good night.
I'm about to go
to bed too.
translations.おやすみ。◙さすがの◙▲凛▲も◙もう寝てたよ、タフだね:
Good night.
Even Rinko has to
go to bed now too.
translations.まだ起きてたんだ。◙こっちはもう◙寝てたっつーの:
You're still
awake？ I'm already
asleep.
translations.真面目に◙授業受けてるって。◙だからさ、◙心配しなくてもいいよ。◙オ・ニ・イ・ち:
I'm attending class
diligently. You don't
have to worry, Big
Brother▼
translations.授業中だっつーの。◙それでもカノジョに◙会いたいって？:
I'm in my class!
Why？ Do you miss
your girlfriend
already？
translations.つまんない授業受けてる。◙そっちも◙似たようなもんでしょ:
I'm in my class.
It's just so boring.
How's yours？ Boring
as well？
translations.授業中、◙っていうか◙寝てたんだけど。◙起こすなっつーの:
I'm in my class
but actually I was
sleeping. Your
message woke me
up!
translations.こっちは図書室で仕事中。◙いいけどさ、◙▲主人公＊▲の分も◙やっとくから:
I'm working at the
library. Don't worry.
I also cover up your
work.
translations.委員会。◙誰かさんは◙いないみたいだけど？:
I'm working at the
library. Someone is
skipping the duty
today, huh？
translations.委員会だっつーの。◙サボんな！:
I'm working at the
library. Why did
you skip your
duty!？
translations.ちょうど◙メールしようとしたときに◙携帯鳴るからさ、◙びっくりしたっつーの。◙こ:
When I was about to
e-mail you, my phone
rang. Don't scare me
like that! I was also
wondering what you
were doing.
translations.んー？◙なんだろね、教えない。◙へへ:
Huh？
What am I doing？
I won't tell you.
Hehe.
translations.別に。◙ただぼーっとしてただけ:
I'm doing nothing.
Just spacing out.
translations.これから寝るとこ。◙今のメールで◙起きたわけじゃないから、◙気にしないこと。◙お:
I'm about to go to
bed, so this mail
didn't wake me up.
Don't worry.
Good night.
translations.もう寝てた。◙いつもはまだ◙起きてるんだけどさ:
I was sleeping.
But usually I
don't sleep this
early.
translations.寝てたっつーの！◙こんな時間にメールすんな:
I was sleeping!
Don't message me
at this late hour!
translations.お風呂上がりだから、◙今の▲凛▲は◙無防備だよ。へへ:
I just came out of
the bathroom after a
bath. I'm
defenseless now.
Hehe.
translations.お風呂上がりだけど……◙ヘンな想像しないでよ:
I just got out of
the bathtub. Don't
imagine any weird
thing, okay？
translations.ちょうどお風呂から◙上がったとこ。◙お風呂はさ、◙嫌いじゃないよ:
I just finished
taking a bath. I
like taking a bath
in a bathtub.
translations.今、風呂上がり:
I just finished
taking a bath.
translations.今は食事中。◙弟の前で行儀が悪いこと◙したくないから、◙ちょっと抜けてきた:
I was having dinner. I
didn't want my little
brother to see this
bad manner, so I just
excused myself from
the table to write
this.
translations.食事中。◙お父さんが◙非難の目で見てる。◙意外にうるさいんだよね、◙マナーとかさ:
I'm having dinner.
Now, my dad is staring
at me. Table manners
are so troublesome.
translations.勉強してたけど、◙ちょっと休憩。◙ちゃんとあとで◙再開するって、へへ:
I was studying but
now I'm taking a
break. I'll resume
later. Hehe.
translations.珍しく◙勉強してるんだからさ、◙邪魔しないで:
It's very rare that
I'm in the mood to
study, so don't
bother me.
translations.今日のデートさ、◙やればできるじゃん。◙いつもこうだったら、◙▲凛▲も◙満足なん:
Today's date was
very fun. If it is
like this every
time, Rinko will be
satisfied.
translations.今日のデートは◙及第点って感じ。◙もっとがんばっても◙いいんじゃない？:
You got a passing
mark for today's
date. But it's
better to try
harder.
translations.今日のデート、◙悪くはなかったけど……:
Today's date wasn't
bad, but... You
know...
translations.疲れた、今日のデート。◙次はもっと楽しいの頼むよ:
I'm so tired from
today's date. Next
time, you'd better
make it more fun.
I beg you.
translations.今日のデート、◙すっごく疲れたんだけど？:
I'm very tired from
today's date.
translations.やっぱ今日みたいな日は◙恋人同士でデート◙するもんなんだね。◙陳腐でバカにしてた:
Today's date was just
like what lovers would
do, huh？ It wasn't bad
to act stupid and be
flirty, I guess.
translations.プレゼント、◙これでもちゃんと考えて◙選んだんだからさ。◙大事にしないと凹むから:
I really thought
carefully when I
picked that present
for you. You must
treasure it.
translations.またしちゃったね、キス。◙その、やっぱり次も◙するわけ？:
We kissed again...
Can we keep doing
this next time, too？
translations.今日のキス、ちょっと◙おかしくなかった？◙悪い意味じゃなくて……◙立ってらんない:
It felt so strange
when we kissed today.
It wasn't bad at all,
but my legs became
weak that I almost
couldn't stand...
translations.いきなりそういうこと◙言うの反則！！◙メールの文章読むだけで◙顔がニヤけるとか、:
Suddenly saying this
is a foul play! Now
I can't stop smiling
after I read your
message.
translations.悪い気はしないけどさ。◙そういうことは直接、◙▲凛▲の◙目を見て言ってみ？:
I don't feel bad with
your message. But can
you say it right in
front of me？
translations.いきなり何？◙なんか企んでんの？:
Why so sudden？
Did you scheme
something？
translations.あぁ、もう！◙そんな言葉で◙許しちゃうとか、◙▲凛▲◙ばかみたいじゃん:
Ah! Geez! Do you
think Rinko will
simply forgive you
when you say
that!？
translations.あのさ……まさかデートの◙失敗をそんな言葉で◙チャラにしようって◙わけじゃないよ:
Hey...
After standing me up
for a date, you think
this word will solve
everything？ You are
the worst.
translations.なるほどね、◙それですっぽかしたの◙誤魔化してるってわけだ。◙いいよ、◙もう怒っ:
I see. You stood me
up for a date and then
you said this. Fine.
I'm not angry anymore.
translations.その前に◙まず謝れっつーの！◙バカ！！:
Before saying
that, you should
apologize first!
You idiot!!
translations.デートから帰ってきても、◙まだドキドキ止まんない。◙責任とって、◙次もドキドキさ:
My heart is still
throbbing after I got
home. Now, it's your
responsibility to make
my heart throb like
this for every date.
translations.バレてたかも◙しんないけど、◙今日の◙▲凛▲は◙▲主人公＊▲に◙メロメロでした:
I don't know if
you could sense
it, but today you
made me fall madly
in love with you.
translations.まぁまぁだったかな、◙今日のデートは。◙欲を言えばもっとこう◙……ときめきっつー:
Today's date was just
so-so. Can I be greedy
and ask for more
heart throbbing
moments next time？
translations.今日のデート、◙正直イマイチ:
To be honest,
today's date
wasn't quite good.
translations.今日のデートさ……◙ちょっと、どうかと思う:
For today's date...
Do you think something
was lacking？
translations.あーぁ、◙デートつまんなかった。◙もっとちゃんと◙しろっつーの:
Ah~
Today's date was
boring! You'd better
try harder next time!
translations.一応言っとく。◙今日のデート、◙サイアクだったから！:
For your
information, today's
date was the worst
ever!
translations.今日くれたプレゼントさ、◙▲凛▲のこと◙ちゃんと考えて◙選んでくれたんだよね。◙:
You must've tried
your best to pick a
present for me. Just
thinking about it
makes my heart throb.
translations.ねぇ、▲主人公＊▲◙もしかして◙キス上手くなってない？◙いいんだけどさ、◙ちょっ:
Hey, do you think
your kissing skill
has improved？ I like
it, but this is very
embarrassing.
translations.▲凛▲、◙あんなキスがあるなんて◙知らなかった。◙今もまだ頭クラクラしてる:
I've never known that
you could kiss like
that. Now, my head is
still blank...
translations.本気？◙ったく、◙スケベなカレシにも◙困ったもんだね:
For real？
Geez. My boyfriend
is a pervert.
translations.次会えるのいつかな。◙あんまり待たせないでよ、◙▲凛▲はさ、◙ガマン強くないんだ:
I wonder when we can
meet again. Don't keep
me waiting for so long.
I have very little
patience.
translations.会いたかったらさ、◙また呼んでよ。◙だって、◙一応カノジョだし？:
Call me whenever
you want to see
me, okay？ I'm your
girlfriend, after
all.
translations.▲凛▲に◙会いたかったんでしょ？◙満足できた？◙へへ:
You've wanted to see
Rinko, right？ Now,
are you satisfied？
Hehe.
translations.さっき話できて、◙けっこう楽しかったよ:
I'm happy we got
a chance to talk
like that.
translations.さっきの◙呼び出しだけどさ。◙あぁいう何気ない◙会話ってのが、◙恋人には必要なの:
It's okay for lovers
to talk about trivial
things like we just
did, right？
translations.疲れた。◙さっきの呼び出し、◙ちょっと後悔してるかも:
I'm tired.
Now, I regret it that
I went to see you.
translations.運命なんて言葉◙嫌いだけどさ。◙好きな人と◙偶然会っちゃうのって、◙なんか嬉しい:
I don't like to say
that everything is
fated, but I'm very
happy to meet you
coincidently like
that.
translations.偶然会うのも◙いいんだけどさ、◙そもそもデートでもすれば◙良かったんじゃん？:
It's nice that we met
by chance, but it'd
be better if we can
go on a date, right？
translations.今日偶然会ったときもさ、◙暇そうにしてたよね:
We met coincidently
today. You must've
had so much free time,
huh？
translations.いつも今日みたいに◙フラフラしてんの？:
Do you always act
like what you did
today？
translations.今日の勉強会、お疲れ。◙珍しく勉強したから、◙ちょっと疲れた:
You did great when we
studied together
today. It is rare for
me to study, so I'm
tired now.
translations.自分の部屋で◙キスするのってさ、◙なんかすごくない？◙何がすごいのか、◙自分でも:
Do you think it's
awesome to be kissed
in your own room？
I don't really know
why, but it's really
awesome.
translations.▲凛▲たちさ、◙付き合い始めた頃に◙比べてなんか◙変わったと思わない？:
Do you think we've
changed since we
started dating？
translations.付き合ってるとさ、◙やっぱり相手のこと◙どんどん好きになる◙ものなのかな。◙だっ:
When people are
dating, do they
fall deeper in
love with their
partner？ Rinko is
now falling deeper
and deeper for
you.
translations.▲凛▲たちって◙さ、もう結構◙ラブラブなんじゃない？:
Do you think we are
madly in love now？
translations.一人がいい、◙なんて思ってた時期が◙▲凛▲にも◙あったなんて、◙今じゃ信じらんな:
I can't believe that
I used to prefer being
alone. Now I feel like
I can't live without
you.
translations.あのさ、好きだよ。◙何回言っても◙足りないからさ、◙ちょっと◙メールで送ってみた:
Hey, I love you. I
can't say it
enough so I have
to send it through
e-mail, too.
translations.だよね！◙よかった、◙そう思ってるの◙▲凛▲だけじゃ◙なくて:
Right! Rinko isn't
the one who thinks
like that then.
translations.へへ、◙じゃあ間違いないね:
Hehe. Now I have
no doubt.
translations.テンション高いね。◙ま、今の▲凛▲◙もだけどさ:
You are in high
spirits, huh？
Well, Rinko, too.
translations.じゃ、◙二人でいれば問題なし！◙ってことだね:
Well, as long as
we are together,
there's no problem
at all!
translations.ありがと、◙こたえてくれて。◙不安になってるわけじゃ◙ないんだけどさ:
Thanks.
Now that I know,
I can feel at ease.
translations.好き好き好き好き。◙なんてね、へへ:
I love you, love
you, love you.
Hehe.
translations.二人揃って、◙恋は盲目ってやつ？◙それでもいいけどさ:
People say that
love is blind. I
don't mind though.
translations.だったら。◙ひょっとして◙ひょっとすると、◙永遠の愛もあるかもね:
Maybe eternal love
does exist, then？
translations.最近さ、◙メールくれないよね。◙別にいいんだけど、◙やっぱりよくない:
You haven't replied
my e-mails lately. I
don't really mind,
but this is not
good.
translations.最近あまりデートしてない◙気がするんだけどさ。◙これっておかしくない？:
We rarely met each
other lately. Don't
you think it's weird？
translations.ねぇ、どうかしたの？◙最近ほとんど◙デートしてないじゃん:
Hey, what's going
on？ We haven't met
for quite a while.
translations.ぜんぜんデートしない◙恋人ってさ、◙おかしくない？:
Don't you think it's
weird？ We are lovers
but we rarely meet
each other. I want
to see you.
translations.▲凛▲待ってる◙からさ。◙そんなに怒ったり◙しないから、◙デートしようよ。:
I've been waiting.
I'm not mad at
you, so please
contact me.
translations.クリスマス、◙もう終わっちゃった。◙▲凛▲は◙そんなにイベント好き◙ってわけじゃ:
Christmas has already
passed. I'm not quite
fond of such an event,
but I wonder what
happened to you.
translations.▲凛▲たちが◙付き合い始めた記念日、◙もう過ぎちゃったの◙気付いてる？:
Did you notice that
our anniversary has
already passed？
translations.▲主人公＊▲の◙誕生日、◙もう過ぎちゃったじゃん。◙せっかく色々考えてたのに:
Rinko's birthday has
already passed. I was
planning a lot of
things though!
translations.チョコはもう◙▲凛▲が自分で◙食べちゃったからね！:
I already ate the
chocolate that I
prepared for you!
translations.なにも言ってこなかった◙ってことはさ、◙どうでもよかったって◙ことだよね。◙▲凛:
You didn't say
anything and you
didn't even come to
see me. It was my
birthday, you know？
translations.あのさ。◙モッシュのひとつで◙オーディエンスが◙ガツーンと◙ぶつかりあうやつ、◙:
Hey. In live
concert, when the
audiences slam
into each other,
it's called
moshing. Which one
