translations.おやすみ。◙今日もわたしの一日は◙▲主人公＊▲との◙メールで終わり:
Good night. My day
ended with emails
from ▲主人公＊▲.
translations.今日ね、◙星が良く見えるよ？◙それだけ、◙▲主人公＊▲に◙伝えたかったの:
Today, the stars
are really
visible. I just
wanted to tell you
that, ▲主人公＊▲.
translations.マナカは今日も◙▲主人公＊▲の◙おかげで幸せでした。◙なんて♪:
Thanks to ▲主人公＊▲,
I'm happy today too.
translations.考えたけど、なんで◙▲主人公＊▲に◙あんな態度とられたのか、◙わからない。◙どう:
I've been thinking,
but I don't understand
why you treated me
that way, ▲主人公＊▲. Why？
translations.▲主人公＊▲って、◙わたしがデートしたい◙なって思ってるときに◙誘ってくれるんだ:
You invite me when I
think about wanting
to go on a date.
That makes me happy,
▲主人公＊▲.
translations.デート、すごく楽しみ。◙▲主人公＊▲も◙だと、いいな？:
I'm really looking
forward to the date. I
hope you are too,
▲主人公＊▲.
translations.突然誘って、ごめんね。◙▲主人公＊▲と◙デートしたくて、ガマン◙できなくなっちゃ:
Sorry for inviting you
out of the blue. I
couldn't hold back
wanting to go on a
date with ▲主人公＊▲.
translations.ＯＫしてくれて、◙ありがとう◙▲主人公＊▲からも◙誘ってくれると、◙うれしいかな:
Thanks for saying
yes. I'd be happy
if you invited me
too, ▲主人公＊▲.
translations.ここ数日、明日のデートの◙ことばかり考えて、他の◙ことが手に付かないの。◙もう、:
I've been thinking about
tomorrow's date for
days, and I can't focus
on anything else. It's
all your fault, ▲主人公＊▲.
translations.授業中に突然あてられて、◙すごく慌ててる◙クラスメイトがいたの。◙▲主人公＊▲も:
During class, a
classmate was suddenly
called on and was
really flustered. Be
careful, ▲主人公＊▲.
translations.そういえば、◙もうすぐ体育の授業で◙体力テストがあるみたい。◙▲主人公＊▲は◙大:
By the way, it seems
like there's a physical
fitness test coming up
in gym class. Are you
okay, ▲主人公＊▲？
translations.クラスメイトが◙誰かの噂話してたの。◙そのうち▲主人公＊▲◙の噂もでてきたりして:
Some classmates were
gossiping about
someone. Soon, there
might be rumors about
▲主人公＊▲ too, so be
careful.
translations.先生から、◙「態度がいいですね」◙って褒められちゃった。◙▲主人公＊▲も◙がんば:
The teacher praised
me, saying, "You have
a good attitude." Do
your best too, ▲主人公＊▲.
translations.チームメイトと◙プロテニスの話題で◙盛り上がったの。◙▲主人公＊▲も◙プロの試合:
I had a lively
discussion about
professional tennis
with my teammates.
It might be good for
you to watch some
pro matches too,
▲主人公＊▲.
translations.男子部で活躍した人が◙いると、結構女子部でも◙評判になるんだよ。◙▲主人公＊▲の:
If someone stands out
in the boys' team,
they become quite
popular in the girls'
team too. I want to
hear about your
reputation, ▲主人公＊▲, so
be careful.
translations.女子部の仲間にテニス◙ウェアが素敵って褒められ◙て、嬉しかったな。◙▲主人公＊▲:
I was complimented by my
friends in the girls'
team for my nice tennis
wear, and it made me
happy. You might want to
pay attention to that
too, ▲主人公＊▲.
translations.顧問の先生に、◙君はテニスセンスがある◙って褒められたの。◙▲主人公＊▲も◙セン:
The coach praised me
for having good tennis
sense. If you polish
your skills, ▲主人公＊▲,
you might improve even
more.
translations.女子部のみんなが、◙男子部の部長は頼りに◙なってカッコいいって◙噂してたの。◙▲:
The girls' team was
gossiping that the
boys' team captain is
reliable and cool. You
might become someone
like that too, ▲主人公＊▲.
translations.顧問の先生に、◙真面目に練習してるって◙褒められたの。◙▲主人公＊▲も◙がんばっ:
The coach praised me
for practicing
seriously. Keep it up,
▲主人公＊▲.
translations.顧問の先生に、◙基礎がよくできてるって◙褒められたの。◙▲主人公＊▲も◙がんばっ:
The coach praised me
for having a good
foundation. Keep it
up, ▲主人公＊▲.
translations.おはよ。朝から◙▲主人公＊▲が◙メールくれたから、◙今日はいい日になりそう:
Good morning. Since
▲主人公＊▲ sent me a
message this morning,
it seems like today
will be a good day.
translations.おはよ、早いんだね。◙▲主人公＊▲の◙メールがモーニングメール◙になっちゃった:
Good morning, you're
early. Your message
became my morning
email, ▲主人公＊▲.
translations.部活中だけど……◙▲主人公＊▲と◙どこかに行けば◙よかったかな、なんて:
I'm in club
activities, but... I
wonder if I should
have gone somewhere
with ▲主人公＊▲.
translations.内緒……。◙ううん、嘘。◙▲主人公＊▲のこと◙考えてたよ。◙もしかして◙バレちゃ:
It's a secret...
No, just kidding.
I was thinking
about you, ▲主人公＊▲.
Did I maybe get
caught？
translations.そろそろ寝ようかなって◙思ってたところ。◙▲主人公＊▲の◙メールで起きたわけじゃ:
I was just thinking
about going to bed. I
didn't wake up because
of your email, so
don't worry, okay？
translations.今ね、お風呂から◙あがったところだよ。◙▲主人公＊▲は◙もう入ったのかな:
I just got out of
the bath. Have you
already taken one,
▲主人公＊▲？
translations.今はお食事中だよ。◙▲主人公＊▲は◙もう食べたのかな:
I'm currently
having a meal.
Have you already
eaten, ▲主人公＊▲？
translations.勉強中だよ。◙▲主人公＊▲は◙ちゃんと宿題終わらせた？:
I'm studying right now.
Did you finish your
homework properly,
▲主人公＊▲？
translations.今は勉強中。◙▲主人公＊▲は◙勉強しなくて大丈夫？:
I'm studying now.
Are you okay not
studying, ▲主人公＊▲？
translations.ほんとはね、◙今日帰りたくなかったの。◙ずっと、◙▲主人公＊▲と◙一緒にいたかっ:
To be honest, I didn't
want to go home today. I
wanted to be with you,
▲主人公＊▲, forever.
translations.▲主人公＊▲も◙楽しかったんだね。◙また今度行こう？:
You had fun too,
▲主人公＊▲. Let's go
out again
sometime？
translations.今日みたいな日に◙▲主人公＊▲と◙デートできて、◙すごく嬉しかった。◙これからも:
I was really happy
to go on a date with
you today. I want to
cherish moments like
this from now on.
translations.プレゼント◙喜んでもらえたかな。◙一生懸命選んだの、◙▲主人公＊▲のこと◙考えな:
I hope you liked the
present. I chose it
with you in mind.
translations.もう、恥ずかしいよ。◙でもすごく嬉しい。◙わたしも◙▲主人公＊▲の◙こと、大好き:
I'm so embarrassed.
But I'm really
happy. I love you
too, ▲主人公＊▲.
translations.今日のデート、◙帰りたくなかった。◙朝になっても次の日も◙その次の日も、ずっと◙:
I didn't want to go
home after today's
date. I didn't want
to be away from you,
▲主人公＊▲, even until
morning or the next
day.
translations.デートって、すごいね。◙だって、前よりもっと◙▲主人公＊▲の◙ことを好きになって:
Dates are amazing. I
like you even more
than before, ▲主人公＊▲. I
wonder how much more I
can love you.
translations.また、キスしちゃったね。◙キスするたびに、◙▲主人公＊▲との◙距離が近づいてく◙:
We kissed again. Every
time we kiss, I feel
like I'm getting closer
to you, ▲主人公＊▲.
translations.今日は◙▲主人公＊▲を、◙いつもよりすごく◙近くに感じたの。◙▲主人公＊▲も◙そ:
Today, I felt you,
▲主人公＊▲, closer
than usual. I hope
you feel the same.
translations.今日のキス……◙きっと忘れられない。◙まだ◙▲主人公＊▲が、◙わたしの唇に残って:
Today's kiss... I
definitely won't forget
it. I can still feel you
on my lips, ▲主人公＊▲.
translations.▲主人公＊▲と◙一緒にいると、◙時間忘れちゃうみたい。◙▲主人公＊▲も◙そうなの:
When I'm with you,
▲主人公＊▲, I seem to
forget time. Do you
feel the same？
translations.今日は◙▲主人公＊▲に◙偶然会えて◙嬉しかったけど、あんまり◙一人でお出かけしち:
I was happy to run into
you today, ▲主人公＊▲, but
you shouldn't go out
alone too much. Because
I'm here.
translations.ほんとはすごく◙恥ずかしかったんだよ？◙あんなの、◙▲主人公＊▲にしか◙見せない:
To be honest, I was
really embarrassed,
you know？ I only show
that side to you,
▲主人公＊▲.
translations.わたし、◙▲主人公＊▲と◙もっともっと近づきたいな:
I want to get even
closer to you, ▲主人公＊▲.
translations.わたしね、実は前より◙▲主人公＊▲のこと◙好きになっちゃったみたい:
Actually, I think I've
come to like you even
more than before,
▲主人公＊▲.
translations.もうね。◙▲主人公＊▲が◙隣にいないと、それだけで◙寂しくなっちゃうの:
Without you next to
me, ▲主人公＊▲, I start to
feel lonely.
translations.このままじゃわたし、◙▲主人公＊▲のこと◙しか考えられなく◙なっちゃうな:
At this rate, I
won't be able to
think about anything
but you, ▲主人公＊▲.
translations.▲主人公＊▲に◙会えない日はね、◙寂しくて泣きたく◙なっちゃうぐらい:
On days when I
can't see you,
▲主人公＊▲, I feel so
lonely I want to
cry.
translations.ねぇ。わたしね、◙▲主人公＊▲と◙だったら、◙ずっと一緒のまま◙二度と離れられな:
Hey. I think if
it's with you,
▲主人公＊▲, I wouldn't
mind being
together forever
and never
separating.
translations.ねぇ、わたしって◙▲主人公＊▲に◙とって、なんなの？◙デートしたいよ……:
Hey, what am I to
you, ▲主人公＊▲？ I
want to go on a
date...
translations.▲主人公＊▲の◙お誕生日、◙過ぎちゃったね。◙お祝いしたかったのに:
Your birthday has
passed, ▲主人公＊▲. I
wanted to celebrate
it.
translations.あのね。◙▲主人公＊▲のこと◙考えると◙切なくなっちゃうの。◙どうしたらいいと思:
You know, when I think
about you, ▲主人公＊▲, I
feel a bit sad. What
do you think I should
do？
translations.あけまして◙おめでとうございます。◙今年もきっと、わたしは◙▲主人公＊▲のこと◙:
Happy New Year! This
year too, I will
surely love you,
▲主人公＊▲.
translations.来年の初詣、◙一緒に行かない？◙来年もずっと◙▲主人公＊▲と◙過ごしたいなって思:
How about going to the
first shrine visit
together next year？ I
want to spend the whole
year with you, ▲主人公＊▲.
translations.明日は◙▲主人公＊▲の◙誕生日。◙わたし、自分のときより◙ワクワクしてる、ふふ:
Tomorrow is your
birthday, ▲主人公＊▲. I'm
more excited than for
my own, hehe.
translations.いよいよ明日だね。◙早く▲主人公＊▲に◙おめでとうって言いたいな:
It's finally tomorrow. I
want to say
congratulations to you,
▲主人公＊▲, soon.
translations.▲主人公＊▲の◙好みのタイプって◙どういう子？◙前から変わってたりする？:
What kind of girl is
your type, ▲主人公＊▲？ Has
it changed from before？
translations.あのね。◙今のわたしって、◙▲主人公＊▲の◙好みのタイプなのかな？:
By the way, am I your
type, ▲主人公＊▲？
translations.そうなんだ。◙▲主人公＊▲が◙そう言うなら、◙もっとがんばっちゃお♪◙なんて:
I see. If you say
that, I'll try even
harder♪ Just saying.
translations.そっか、◙落ち着き出てきたかな。◙▲主人公＊▲に◙そう言ってもらえると、◙うれし:
I guess I've started
to calm down. I'm
happy to hear you say
that, ▲主人公＊▲.
translations.あのね。◙もしわたしが◙髪の色を変えるとしたら、◙どう思う？◙▲主人公＊▲は◙見:
By the way, if I were to
change my hair color,
what do you think？ Would
you like to see it,
▲主人公＊▲？
translations.あのね。◙▲主人公＊▲って、◙どんな色が◙好きなんだっけ？:
By the way, what
color do you like,
▲主人公＊▲？
translations.あのね。デートに着ていくお洋服迷ってるんだけど……▲主人公＊▲はどういうのが好み: By the way, I'm having trouble deciding what to wear on our date... What do you like, ▲主人公＊▲？
translations.今日、▲主人公＊▲に◙もらったメガネかけて◙みたんだけど……◙どうだったかな？:
I tried on the
glasses you gave me
today, ▲主人公＊▲... How
did I look？
translations.▲主人公＊▲って◙インターネット使ってる？◙デートの情報が◙載ってるって、クラス:
Do you use the internet,
▲主人公＊▲？ A classmate told
me there's info about
dates on it.
translations.私はあの人と海へ行った。それも一夏の間に２度。するとある日、あの人は浜辺で私に…:
I went to the beach with that
person. Twice during the
summer. Then one day, that
person... I had such a dream.
Dream Chaser.
translations.あの人が好きだと言ったので、一緒にうさぎを見に行った。そしてある冬の日、うさぎが:
That person said they liked
me, so we went to see the
rabbits together. And one
winter day, the rabbit... I
had such a dream. Dream
Chaser.
translations.あの人は語った、将来の夢を。あの人はまさに白衣の天使に……◙そんな夢を見た。夢追:
That person talked about their
dreams for the future. That
person was truly an angel in a
white coat... I had such a
dream. Dream Chaser.
translations.ある日、あの人が幼い頃の話を聞かせてくれた。その姿を想像していた私の前に、まさに:
One day, that person told me
stories from their childhood.
Right in front of me, I
imagined that person as they
were back then... I had such a
dream. Dream Chaser.
translations.あれは……なんと説明すべきか。かの伝説が世に送り出された日、私はあの人のとんでも:
That was... how should I
explain it？ On the day the
legend was sent into the
world, I saw that person's
incredible form... I had such
a dream. Dream Chaser.
translations.私はあの人と共に演劇を観た。そう、あまり広い場所ではなかった。あぁ、どうしてあの:
I watched a play with that
person. Yes, it wasn't a very
large place. Ah, why is that
person who they are... I had
such a dream. Dream Chaser.
translations.私は聞かれた、あの人から食べ物の好みを。公園に２度行った秋の日のこと、まさかあの:
I was asked by that person
about my food preferences. On
an autumn day when we went to
the park twice, I never
expected that person to... I
had such a dream. Dream
Chaser.
translations.あの人は武芸にも興味を持っていた。あの人の好む武芸が盛んな春、もしくは秋に外で体:
That person was also
interested in martial arts. In
the spring or autumn when
their favorite martial arts
were active, I trained outside
ten times... I had such a
dream. Dream Chaser.
translations.私が見た、あの人の夢はこれですべて。もはやあの人の夢を見ることは叶わない。私はも: This is all the dreams I had about that person. I can no longer dream of that person. I am now a dream chaser who no longer dreams.
translations.あのね。◙わたしの髪型なんだけど、◙下ろしてるのと◙結ってるの、◙どっちが好きか:
You know, which
hairstyle do you prefer,
down or tied up？
translations.そっか、◙それなら髪は◙下ろすようにしようかな。◙その方が、◙喜んでくれるよね:
I see, then I should
wear my hair down. That
would make you happy,
right？
translations.そっか、◙それなら髪は◙結うようにしようかな。◙その方が、◙喜んでくれるよね:
I see, then I should
wear my hair tied up.
That would make you
happy, right？
translations.どっちでも？◙それなら、いいけど……:
Either is fine？ If so,
that's good, but...
translations.あのね。◙この間くれた◙動物の耳のカチューシャ、◙つけた方がいいのかな？:
You know, should I wear
the animal ear headband
you gave me the other
day？
translations.あの動物の耳の◙カチューシャ、◙またつけた方がいいかな？:
Should I wear that
animal ear headband
again？
translations.それならいいの。◙つけてほしいって◙言われたら、◙どうしようかなって:
If that's okay, I
was wondering what
to do if you said
you wanted me to
wear it.
translations.そっか……◙ほんとに、◙あれをつけるの？:
I see... Are you
really going to
wear that？
translations.そんなの持ってないよ……◙だから、だめ:
I don't have anything
like that... So, no.
translations.もう。◙▲主人公＊▲だけに◙見せるなら、いいよ:
Well, if it's just
for ▲主人公＊▲, then
it's fine.
translations.あのね。◙どんな水着が好きなの？◙よかったら、教えて？:
You know, what kind of
swimsuit do you like？
If you don't mind, can
you tell me？
translations.あのね。◙今度のデート、◙どんな水着がいいかな。◙意見聞かせて？:
You know, what kind of
swimsuit should I wear
for our next date？ Can
I get your opinion？
translations.うん、そっか。◙ちゃんと覚えておくね♪:
Yeah, I see. I'll
remember it properly♪
translations.なんでもいいの？◙それなら、いいけど:
Anything is fine？
If so, that's
good.
translations.今日も部活、◙がんばってたね。◙今度差し入れ◙しちゃおうかな、どう？:
You worked hard in
club activities today.
How about I bring you
a snack next time？
translations.いつも図書委員大変そう。◙今度差し入れ◙しちゃおうかな、どう？:
Being a library
committee member seems
tough. How about I bring
you a snack next time？
translations.いつもアルバイト◙大変そう。◙今度差し入れ◙しちゃおうかな、どう？:
Working part-time
seems tough. How about
I bring you a snack
next time？
translations.そう、ごめんね。◙おせっかいだったね……。:
Sorry about that. I was
being meddlesome...
translations.うん、わかった。◙でもちゃんと◙がんばらないと、◙なしだからね？:
Yeah, I
understand. But
you have to work
hard, or else
there's nothing,
okay？
translations.はい、わかりました。◙ちゃんとがんばってたら、◙持っていくね▼:
Yes, I understand. If
you work hard, I'll
bring you something▼.
translations.今日はプレゼント◙ありがとう、◙すごくうれしい♪◙また差し入れするね:
Thank you for the
present today, I'm
really happy♪ I'll
bring you
something next
time.
translations.プレゼントありがとう。◙大したことは◙できないけど、◙また差し入れしに行くね:
Thank you for the
present. I can't do
much, but I'll come by
with a snack again.
translations.今日はありがとう。◙プレゼント、◙すごくうれしい。◙迷惑じゃなければ、◙また差し:
Thank you for
today. The present
made me really
happy. If it's not
a bother, can I
bring you a snack
again？
translations.また今度差し入れ◙していいよね。◙今日のプレゼントのお礼、◙ね▼:
I can bring you a snack
next time, right？ This
is to thank you for
today's present, okay▼？
translations.プチ記念日の◙プレゼントありがとう、◙大切にするね:
Thank you for the gift
for our little
anniversary, I'll
cherish it.
translations.プレゼントありがとう。◙小さな記念でも、◙今日みたいに◙ずっと大切にしたいね:
Thank you for the
present. Even if it's
a small occasion, I
want to cherish it
like today.
translations.今日はプレゼント◙ありがとう、うれしい。◙またちゃんと◙お祝いしたいね、◙プチ記:
Thank you for the
present today, I'm
happy. I want to
celebrate properly
again, our little
anniversary.
translations.プチ記念日、◙ちゃんとお祝いできたね♪◙プレゼントもありがとう、◙大切にするから:
We properly celebrated
our little anniversary,
didn't we？♪ Thank you
for the present, I'll
cherish it.
translations.うん、◙いつもありがとう……。◙大好き:
Yeah,
thank you as always...
I love you.
translations.もう。◙でも▲主人公＊▲の◙ためなら、いいよ:
Well, but if it's
for ▲主人公＊▲, then
it's fine.
translations.あのね。◙テニスのことを漢字で◙どうやって書くんだっけ？:
You know, how do you
write 'tennis' in kanji？
translations.あのね。◙テニスの試合中、◙ボールを拾ったりする◙人のことを◙なんていうんだっけ:
You know, what do
you call the person
who picks up balls
during a tennis
match？
translations.あのね。◙ラケットに張るガットの◙テンションの強さを表す◙単位はなんだっけ？:
You know, what is the
unit that represents
the tension of the
strings on a racket？
translations.あのね。◙テニスの四大大会を◙一年間で◙全部制覇することを、◙なんていうんだっけ:
You know, what do
you call it when
someone wins all
four major tennis
tournaments in a
year？
translations.あのね。◙「ニホンノウサギ」は◙どの属に属するんだっけ？:
You know, which genus
does the 'Japanese
rabbit' belong to？
translations.あのね。◙ウサギに与える◙加工された餌のこと、◙なんていうんだっけ？:
You know, what do
you call the
processed feed given
to rabbits？
translations.あのね。◙ウサギに与えちゃ◙いけない野菜って、◙なんだっけ？:
You know, what
vegetables should
not be given to
rabbits？
translations.あのね。◙ウサギってどうやって◙数えるんだっけ？:
You know, how do you
count rabbits？
translations.あのね。◙サツマイモの生産量が◙一番多い国は、◙どこだっけ？:
You know, which
country produces the
most sweet potatoes？
translations.あのね。◙お芋に多く含まれてる◙栄養素はなんだっけ？:
You know, what
nutrient is abundant
in sweet potatoes？
translations.あのね。◙サツマイモの別名って◙なんていうんだっけ？:
You know, what is
another name for
sweet potatoes？
translations.あのね。◙サツマイモって英語で◙なんていうんだっけ？:
You know, what do
you call sweet
potatoes in English？
translations.あのね。◙お相撲の本場所は年に◙何回行われるんだっけ？:
You know, how many
times a year are the
main sumo tournaments
held？
translations.あのね。◙お相撲の世界のことを◙なんていうんだっけ？:
You know, what do
you call the world
of sumo？
translations.あのね。◙お相撲の反則のこと、◙なんていうんだっけ？:
You know, what do
you call a foul in
sumo？
translations.あのね。◙お相撲の勝負が◙長引いたとき、◙取組が中断されることを◙なんていうんだ:
You know, what do you
call it when a sumo
match is interrupted
due to a long fight？
translations.あのね。◙ピアノを略して◙表記するときは、◙どうやって書くんだっけ？:
You know, how do you
abbreviate 'piano' in
notation？
translations.あのね。◙標準的なピアノって、◙鍵盤がいくつ◙あるんだっけ？:
You know, how many
keys does a standard
piano have？
translations.あのね。◙即興演奏のことを◙英語でなんて◙いうんだっけ？:
You know, what do
you call
improvisation in
English？
translations.あのね。◙古典派の次に◙盛んになった音楽は◙なんだっけ？:
You know, what
music became
popular after the
Classical period？
translations.わたしもそうなの♪◙これも▲主人公＊▲の◙おかげ▼:
I'm like that too♪
Thanks to
▲Protagonist＊▲.
translations.そっか。◙▲主人公＊▲が◙うれしいと、◙わたしもうれしい、◙なんて:
I see. When
▲Protagonist＊▲ is
happy, I'm happy
too.
translations.なにかいいことあった？◙今度、お話聞かせて▼:
Did something good
happen？ Tell me about
it next time.
translations.それはわたしのおかげ？◙なんて、冗談♪:
Is that thanks to me？
Just kidding♪
translations.あのね。◙わたしも、そうなの。◙こうやって同じ時間に◙同じ気持ちで◙いられるって:
You know, I'm like
that too. It's
strange to be able
to share the same
time with the same
feelings.
translations.わたしも、かな。◙▲主人公＊▲と◙メールしてるから▼:
I guess so.
Because I'm
emailing
▲Protagonist＊▲.
translations.うん、そっか。◙長く続くといいね♪:
Yeah, I hope it
lasts long♪
translations.その元気、◙わたしにも◙わけてほしいな。◙わたしに元気がないって◙ことじゃないけ:
I want you to share
that energy with me.
Not that I'm lacking
energy.
translations.ずっとその調子で◙いくといいね、◙がんばって！:
I hope you keep
that up, keep it
up!
translations.うん、その調子。◙一緒にがんばろ？:
Yeah, keep it up.
Shall we do our
best together？
translations.そうなの。◙それなら、◙会ってお話もしたいな:
That's right. If so,
I want to meet and
talk.
translations.どうしたの？◙なにかいいこと、◙あった？:
What's wrong？ Did
something good
happen？
translations.そうなの。◙その秘訣、◙教えて欲しいな:
I see. I want to
know that secret.
translations.よかったね。◙わたしもちょっと◙元気出たよ:
That's great. I
feel a bit better
too.
translations.それで、◙わたしにメールくれたの？◙うん、ありがとう:
So, did you email me？
Yeah, thank you.
translations.そっか、◙いいことあったのね:
I see, you had
something good
happen.
translations.▲主人公＊▲の◙そういうこと、◙ちゃんと知りたいな:
I want to know
more about that
from
▲Protagonist＊▲.
translations.わたしの気持ちも◙知らないで、◙自分だけ……:
Without knowing my
feelings, you're
just thinking of
yourself...
translations.何かあったのね。◙辛いなら、言って？◙わたしにできることなら、◙してあげるから:
Something happened, huh.
If it's tough, tell me？
If there's something I
can do, I'll help.
translations.ありがとう、◙教えてくれて。◙落ち込んでるときに◙言うのもおかしいかも◙しれない:
Thank you for
telling me. It might
be strange to say
this when I'm down,
but I'm happy.
translations.そういうときもあるよね。◙言ってくれて、うれしい。◙わたしで力になれること、◙あ:
There are times like
that. I'm glad you told
me. Is there something I
can do to help？
translations.一人で抱えちゃダメ！◙わたしに相談して、◙▲主人公＊▲に◙頼られる彼女でいたいの:
Don't carry it alone!
Consult me, I want to
be the girlfriend that
▲Protagonist＊▲ can
rely on.
translations.わたしじゃ、◙力になれないかな？◙いつでも味方だから、◙それは忘れないで？:
Can't I help you？
I'm always on your
side, don't forget
that？
translations.▲主人公＊▲が悲しいと、◙わたしも悲しい……。◙早く元気に◙なってほしいから、◙:
When ▲Protagonist＊▲ is
sad, I'm sad too... I
want to help because I
want you to feel better
soon.
translations.そういうこともあるよね、◙しかたないよ……。◙あまり気にしないで？:
There are times like
that, it can't be
helped... Don't worry
too much？
translations.ほんとに少し？◙辛いなら、◙がまんしないで？:
Really just a
little？ If it's
tough, don't hold
back？
translations.そっか……。◙でも次に会うときは、◙元気なあなたで◙いてほしい。◙わたしにできる:
I see... But when we
meet next time, I
want you to be your
cheerful self. Is
there something I
can do？
translations.今は◙落ち込んでてもいいよ。◙会ったときに、◙きっとわたしが◙励ますから:
It's okay to be down
now. When we meet,
I'll surely cheer you
up.
translations.わたしの元気、◙わけてあげたいな。◙受け取って？:
I want to share my
energy with you.
Please accept it？
translations.どうすれば、◙元気になってくれるかな。◙わたし、考えるね？:
What can I do to make
you feel better？ I'll
think about it, okay？
translations.そう……。◙わたしに話して◙楽になるなら、聞くよ？:
I see... If talking to
me makes you feel
better, I'll listen,
okay？
translations.何かあったの？◙元気出してほしいな……:
Did something happen？
I want you to feel
better...
translations.気持ちはわかるよ……。◙でも立ち直らないと、ね？:
I understand your
feelings... But you need
to bounce back, okay？
translations.わたしにできること、◙きっとあるよね。◙遠慮、しないでね？:
There must be
something I can do
for you. Don't hold
back, okay？
translations.うん……。◙そっか、色々あるもんね:
Yeah... I see, there
are various things.
translations.上手くいかない◙ときだってあるよ:
There are times
when things don't
go well.
translations.そんなこと言われても、◙どうしたらいいか◙わからないよ……:
Even if you say that,
I don't know what to
do...
translations.わたしも少し。◙ほんとは少し◙じゃないけど。◙反省してるって◙ことなのかな:
I'm a bit down
too. It's not
really just a bit.
I guess it means
I'm reflecting.
translations.うん、何かあったのかな。◙でもね、わたしは元気な◙▲主人公＊▲の方が好き。◙力に:
Yeah, I wonder if
something happened. But
I prefer a lively
▲Protagonist＊▲. Let's
get better together.
translations.わたしの助け、必要？◙だったら絶対に◙遠慮しないで？◙頼られるのも、◙うれしいか:
Do you need my help？
If so, please don't
hesitate. I'm happy
to be relied on.
translations.お疲れ様。◙いつもがんばってるから、◙疲れることだって◙あるよね。◙今日は休んで:
Good job. You're always
working hard, so it's
natural to get tired
sometimes. Take a break
today.
translations.何かあった？◙わたしが助けられること、◙あるとうれしいな:
Did something happen？ I
would be happy if
there's something I can
help with.
translations.そう、毎日大変だね。◙でもわたしは味方、◙ちゃんと応援してるから:
Yeah, every day is
tough. But I'm on your
side, cheering for
you.
translations.うん、いつも◙一生懸命なの知ってる。◙だから疲れちゃうことも◙あると思う、◙しか:
Yeah, I know you're
always doing your
best. So it's natural
to get tired
sometimes, it can't be
helped.
translations.何に疲れたのかな。◙わたしにできること、◙あるといいけど:
I wonder what you're
tired from. I hope
there's something I
can do.
translations.もう。◙疲れちゃったの？◙あなたなら、◙もっとがんばれるよ。◙ファイト！:
Oh no. Are you
tired？ You can do
more, you know.
Fight on!
translations.うん、そうなっちゃう◙気持ちもわかる。◙もう少しがんばろ、ね？:
Yeah, I understand
that feeling. Let's
try a bit harder,
okay？
translations.そう……。◙じゃあ、休もう？◙わたしもいるから◙心配ないよ:
I see... Then,
shall we take a
break？ I'm here,
so don't worry.
translations.ストレス◙たまってるのかな？◙発散するの付き合うよ:
Are you feeling
stressed？ I'll help
you unwind.
translations.精神的なことかな。◙だったら遊びにいくのも、◙いいかも:
Is it something
mental？ If so, maybe
going out would be good.
translations.まだまだ。◙十羽野テニス部の底力、◙出していこう？:
Not yet. Let's show
the true strength of
the Juuhano Tennis
Club!
translations.そうなの。◙どうするのがいいかな。◙考えるね:
I see... What do you
think is best？ I'll
think about it.
translations.やっぱり◙休むのがいいと思うよ。◙無理はしないで？:
I think resting is the
best. Don't push
yourself, okay？
translations.たまにはゆっくりしよ？◙ね？:
Let's take it easy
sometimes, okay？
translations.何かあったのかな？◙辛いことがあったら◙相談してね:
Did something
happen？ If you're
feeling down, talk
to me.
translations.疲れてるのはこっち、◙誰かのせいで……:
I'm the one who's
tired, because of
someone...
translations.もう年末ね。◙恋人だったら、◙やっぱり初詣は◙一緒に行くのかな:
It's almost the
end of the year.
If we were lovers,
would we go to the
first shrine visit
together？
translations.今月は大切な◙イベントがあるね。◙ちゃんと覚えてる？:
There's an
important event
this month. Do you
remember it？
translations.今月の１４日、楽しみ。◙ふふ、書いちゃった♪:
I'm looking forward to
the 14th this month.
Hehe, I wrote it down♪
translations.もうすぐ４月１日。◙なんだかわくわくするね？◙楽しいことあるかな:
April 1st is coming
soon. I'm excited, I
wonder if there will be
fun things.
translations.ゴールデンウィークにね、◙恋人同士の素敵な◙おまじないが◙あるみたいなの:
During Golden Week, it
seems there's a
wonderful couple's
charm.
translations.もうすぐ学校の◙プールが始まるね。◙一緒に楽しいこと◙できるかな:
The school pool
will start soon. I
wonder if we can
have fun together.
translations.もうすぐ七夕。◙今年も色々準備しなきゃ:
Tanabata is coming
soon. I need to
prepare various things
this year.
translations.もうすぐ海水浴場で◙イベントがあるみたい。◙どんなイベントかな:
It seems there's an
event at the beach
soon. I wonder what
kind of event it will
be.
translations.もうすぐ体育祭。◙一緒にがんばろうね！:
Sports day is coming
soon. Let's do our
best together!
translations.もうすぐハロウィン。◙仮装パーティーなんて、◙楽しそう:
Halloween is coming
soon. A costume party
sounds fun.
translations.もうすぐ学園祭。◙一緒に回れたら、◙きっと楽しいね:
The school
festival is coming
soon. It would be
fun if we could go
together.
translations.もうすぐクリスマス。◙素敵な聖夜にしたいね、◙待ち遠しいな……:
Christmas is coming
soon. I want to make
it a wonderful holy
night, I can't wait...
translations.ふふ、早く来ないかな: Hehe, I hope it comes soon.
translations.そう……。◙それなら、いいの:
I see... If that's
the case, it's
fine.
translations.あのね。◙テレビで旅番組を観たの、◙旅行も楽しそう。◙▲主人公＊▲はどう思う？:
You know, I watched a
travel show on TV,
traveling seems fun.
What do you think,
▲主人公＊▲？
translations.あのね。◙テレビで旅番組を観たの、◙前の旅行のこと◙思い出しちゃった。◙▲主人公:
You know, I watched a
travel show on TV, and
it reminded me of our
last trip. Do you want
to go again, ▲主人公＊▲？
translations.うん、そうね。◙行ってみたいかも:
Yeah, I think I
might want to go.
translations.そう……◙変なこと聞いてごめんね:
I see... Sorry for
asking something
weird.
translations.パパがね、◙旅行に行きたいなーって。◙▲主人公＊▲は旅行に◙行くとしたらどこがい:
Dad wants to go on a
trip. If you were to
travel, where would
you like to go, ▲主人公＊▲？
translations.海？◙うん、◙砂浜で遊ぶのもいいし、◙夕陽や夜の散歩も◙ステキかも:
The beach？ Yeah,
playing on the sand
sounds good, and
watching the sunset or
taking a night walk
could be nice.
translations.温泉？◙なんだか大人っぽい。◙旅先でゆったり◙過ごすのもいいね……:
Hot springs？ That
sounds so grown-up.
Relaxing at the
travel destination
sounds nice too...
translations.あのね。◙親戚のお姉さんから◙聞いたの。◙この前彼氏さんと一緒に、◙旅行に行って:
You know, I heard from
my older cousin that
she went on a trip
with her boyfriend
recently.
translations.あのね。◙パパとママは新婚旅行で◙熱海に行ったんだって。◙きっと素敵な◙旅だった:
You know, Dad and Mom
went to Atami for
their honeymoon. It
must have been a
wonderful trip...
translations.合宿の話、もう聞いた？◙伊豆高:
Have you heard about
the training camp？ Izu
Takane.
translations.▲主人公＊▲が◙前に当てた熱海旅行。◙また懸賞が始まるみたい。◙さすがにもう、◙:
The Atami trip you
guessed before. It
seems another lottery
is starting. Surely,
it won't hit again...
translations.あのね。◙今度の旅行、◙最初に旅行に行ったときと◙似た雰囲気の髪型に◙してみよう:
You know, for the next
trip, I was thinking
of trying a hairstyle
similar to the first
time we traveled. What
do you think？
translations.ほんとに？◙それなら、◙変えてみようかな……。◙ありがとう:
Really？ If that's the
case, maybe I should
change it... Thank
you.
translations.そう……ごめんね。◙それならいいの、◙気にしないで？:
I see... I'm
sorry. If that's
the case, it's
fine, don't worry
about it.
translations.一緒に旅行だなんて……◙すごくドキドキする。◙でも同じくらい、◙楽しみなの:
Going on a trip
together... makes me
really nervous. But
I'm just as excited.
translations.旅行、楽しみね。◙また次も、◙たくさん一緒に◙思い出作りたいな。◙いいでしょ？:
I'm looking
forward to the
trip. I want to
make many more
memories together
next time. Is that
okay？
translations.うん。◙素敵な、◙忘れられない◙思い出にしたい。◙今からもう、◙待ちきれない♪:
Yeah. I want it to
be a wonderful,
unforgettable
memory. I can't
wait already♪
translations.旅行の用意を◙してるんだけど、◙準備まで楽しいね。◙当日はもっと……かな♪◙▲主:
I'm preparing for the
trip, and even the
preparations are fun.
The day itself will be
even more... right？
How about you, ▲主人公＊▲？
translations.もう、そうなの？◙それなら一緒に◙準備するのもいいかも。◙お買い物に行ったり、ね:
Oh, really？ If that's
the case, it might be
good to prepare
together. Like going
shopping, right？
translations.ふふ、バッチリ？◙頼もしいね、◙わたしの準備も手伝って？◙なんて:
Hehe, all set？ You're
reliable, can you help
me with my
preparations too？
translations.旅行、楽しみね。◙すごくワクワク◙してるけど、◙それよりもっと◙ドキドキしてる…:
I'm looking forward to
the trip. I'm really
excited, but I'm even
more nervous...
translations.やっぱり、◙▲主人公＊▲も？◙二人ともそれだと、◙向こうで大変かも……。◙でも、:
So, you too, ▲主人公＊▲？
If both of us feel
that way, it might be
tough over there...
But I'm not worried!
translations.そうなの？◙すごいね、◙頼りにしてます♪:
Is that so？ That's
amazing, I'm
counting on you♪
translations.あのね。◙旅行で一番楽しみに◙してることって、◙何かな？:
You know, what's
the thing you're
looking forward to
the most about the
trip？
translations.うん、そうね。◙一緒にいろんな◙ところに行きたい。◙調べちゃお♪:
Yeah, I think I
want to go to
various places
together. I'll
look it up♪
translations.うん、それもいいな。◙色んなお風呂に◙入れるといいね:
Yeah, that sounds
good. I hope we can
try different baths.
translations.うん……◙ずっと一緒にいられるし、◙きっとたくさん◙お喋りできるね。◙わたしも楽:
Yeah... We can be
together all the time,
and I'm sure we'll have
a lot of chats. I'm
looking forward to it
too.
translations.明日はもう旅行の日。◙どうしよう、◙緊張して眠れないよ:
Tomorrow is the
travel day. What
should I do, I'm so
nervous I can't
sleep.
translations.そう、わたしと同じ。◙でももう寝ないとね。◙緊張もあるけど、◙興奮もしてるのかな:
Yeah, I'm the same.
But I need to sleep
now. I guess I'm
nervous, but also
excited.
translations.もう。◙寝坊なんてしません。◙すぐふざけるんだから。◙でもおかげで◙緊張ほぐれた:
Come on. I won't
oversleep. You always
joke around. But
thanks to that, I
might have relaxed a
bit.
translations.わたしたちの◙初めての旅行だったね。◙こんなに長くずっと◙一緒にいられて幸せ……:
It was our first trip
together. I'm so happy
we could be together for
so long... I'll never
forget it.
translations.今回の旅行も◙すごく楽しかったね。◙こうして思い出がどんどん◙増えていくのって、:
This trip was really fun
too. It's amazing how we
keep making memory after
memory.
translations.うん、うれしい……。◙これからも、◙もっとたくさん◙思い出作りたいな:
Yeah, I'm happy... I
want to make even
more moments
together.
translations.うん……ドキドキした。◙でもイヤじゃないの。◙大切な思い出だから:
Yeah... it was
thrilling. But I
didn't dislike it.
It's a precious
memory.
translations.お風呂がお気に入り？◙気持ちよかったもんね:
Do you like the
bath？ It felt nice.
translations.もう、◙お風呂がどうしたの。◙知りません:
Geez, what's wrong
with the bath？ I
don't know.
translations.わたし、待ってたのに◙旅行楽しみにしてたのに。◙もうやだ、ひどい:
I was waiting for you, I
was looking forward to
the trip. I'm done, this
is terrible.
translations.まだ旅行の気分が◙抜けないの。◙頭がぼーっとして、◙変な気分:
I still can't
shake off the
travel mood. My
head feels fuzzy,
it's a weird
feeling.
translations.お布団に入ると、◙旅行のこと◙思い出しちゃう。◙このすぐ隣に◙▲主人公＊▲が◙い:
When I get into
bed, I remember
the trip. You were
right next to me,
▲主人公＊▲...
translations.あの日のこと◙思い出したら、◙ドキドキして……。◙▲主人公＊▲も◙そうなのかな:
When I remember
that day, I get
all fluttery... I
wonder if ▲主人公＊▲
feels the same.
translations.ふいに旅行のこと◙思い出すの。◙ああ、▲主人公＊▲と◙一緒に行っちゃった……◙っ:
I suddenly remember
the trip. Oh, I went
with ▲主人公＊▲... Is that
strange？
translations.旅行、◙やっぱり楽しかったね。◙また一緒に行ったら、◙きっとステキな◙旅になると:
The trip was really
fun, after all. If we
go together again,
it'll surely be a
wonderful journey.
translations.ごめん、って……。◙意味がわからないよ:
Sorry, but... I
don't understand
what you mean.
translations.謝って許されるような◙ことじゃないと思う。◙嫌い:
I don't think it's
something you can
just apologize for.
I dislike it.
translations.そういう問題じゃ◙ないでしょ。◙旅行楽しみに◙してたのに……:
That's not the
point. I was
looking forward to
the trip...
translations.埋め合わせなんて……◙なんでこんなこと◙されたのか、◙わかんない:
Making up for it...
I don't understand
why this happened.
translations.だったらどうして、◙前もって言って◙くれなかったの。◙ひどいよ:
Then why didn't
you tell me in
advance？ That's
cruel.
translations.おはよう。◙これ、何通目の◙おはようメールなのかな♪:
Good morning. I wonder
how many good morning
emails this is？
translations.今日も一日、◙▲主人公＊▲が◙幸せでいられますように。◙ふふ▼:
I hope today is a
wonderful day for you,
▲主人公＊▲. Hehe.
translations.ステキな朝ね。◙今日も元気よく、ね？:
What a lovely
morning. Let's be
cheerful today,
okay？
translations.おはよう。◙今日もマナカが一緒だよ？◙なんて:
Good morning. Mana is
with you today, right？
translations.朝は好き？◙わたしは頭が◙すっきりするから好き。◙その分、夜は苦手だけど:
Do you like mornings？
I like them because
they clear my head.
But I'm not good at
nights.
translations.朝は勉強がはかどるよ。◙集中していこ？:
Mornings are great for
studying. Let's focus,
okay？
translations.おはよ！◙いつまでも◙疲れてちゃダメ！◙シャキっとしよ？:
Good morning! You
can't stay tired
forever! Let's
perk up!
translations.今日はまず◙何をしようかな。◙▲主人公＊▲は◙どうしてる？:
What should we do
first today？ How's
▲主人公＊▲ doing？
translations.今日も一日ステキな日に◙なりますように。◙ふふ、▲主人公＊▲に◙お願いしたんだよ:
I hope today becomes a
wonderful day. Hehe, I
asked ▲主人公＊▲ for that.
translations.▲主人公＊▲は◙今何考えてるのかな……。◙正解したらご褒美くれる？◙なんて:
I wonder what ▲主人公＊▲ is
thinking right now... If
I guess right, will I
get a reward？
translations.こんにちは。◙ご機嫌いかが？◙なんて、◙かしこまってみました:
Hello. How are you？
I tried to be
formal.
translations.今日ね。◙なんだかいいことが◙ありそうな気がする。◙ふふ、なんとなくね:
Today, I feel like
something good is
going to happen.
Hehe, just a
feeling.
translations.午前中はどうだった？◙午後もはりきっていこ？:
How was your morning？
Let's keep up the
energy this afternoon!
translations.今日はちょっと眠いの。◙でもシャンとしなきゃ。◙えいえいおー！◙なんて:
I'm a bit sleepy
today. But I need to
stay sharp. Let's go!
translations.ねむいときはね、◙少し体を動かすといいよ。◙あんまりがんばり◙すぎると、もっと◙:
When you're sleepy,
moving a bit helps. But
if you push too hard,
you'll get sleepier.
translations.休み時間に◙メールばかりしてたら、◙ヘンかな。◙▲主人公＊▲に◙送ってるの、◙バ:
Is it weird if I just
texted during break？ I
wonder if it's obvious
I'm texting ▲主人公＊▲.
translations.授業のノート、◙取り逃しちゃった。◙今度見せてね？:
I missed some
notes in class.
Can you show me
next time？
translations.今はのんびり……。◙午後もこんな感じかな:
Right now, I'm just
relaxing... I guess
it'll be like this
this afternoon.
translations.一日はまだまだ続くよ？◙何しよっか？:
The day is still going
on, you know？ What
should we do？
translations.おなかすいてない？◙なんとなく、◙聞いてみただけ:
Aren't you hungry？
I just wanted to
ask.
translations.疲れたりしてない？◙もしそうなら、休んでね。◙ごめんね急に。◙理由はないけど、◙:
Aren't you tired？ If so,
please take a break.
Sorry for asking
suddenly. I just care.
translations.この時間帯って好きなの。◙小さい頃から、◙ずっとそう。◙どうしてかな:
I like this time of day.
I've felt this way since
I was little. I wonder
why.
translations.スランプ……なのかな。◙今日の練習、◙上手くいかなくて。◙今度相談にのって？:
Am I in a slump？
Today's practice
didn't go well. Can we
talk about it next
time？
translations.ふふ、絶好調♪◙練習中ね、◙すごく体が軽かったの。◙どうしてかな:
Hehe, I'm in great
shape! During
practice, I felt so
light. I wonder why.
translations.今日の復習は大変そう。◙そっちは大丈夫？◙授業でやったところ、◙しっかり確認しよ:
Today's review seems
tough. Are you okay
over there？ Let's make
sure to check what we
did in class.
translations.今日は宿題もないし、◙少し楽かも。◙でも予習・復習は◙ちゃんとしないとね:
There's no homework
today, so it might
be a bit easier. But
I have to prepare
and review properly.
translations.ラケットの手入れって、◙つい夢中に◙なっちゃうよね。◙気付いたら◙暗くなってたり:
Taking care of the
racket can be so
engrossing. Before you
know it, it gets
dark... Is that weird？
translations.練習のない日って、◙なんだか物足りなくて。◙たくさん練習すると◙ご飯も美味しいし:
Days without practice
feel a bit
unsatisfying. When I
practice a lot, meals
are delicious, the
bath feels good, and I
can sleep well.
translations.なんだか退屈、かな。◙▲主人公＊▲はどう？:
I'm feeling a bit
bored, I guess. How
about you, ▲主人公＊▲？
translations.今日テレビでやってた◙テニスの試合、観た？◙すごかったね、◙わたしも練習しなきゃ:
Did you watch the
tennis match on TV
today？ It was amazing,
I need to practice
too!
translations.携帯電話の機能、◙たくさんあるよね。◙わたし、◙ぜんぜん使いこなせてない◙気がす:
There are so many
features on my phone. I
feel like I can't use
them at all...
translations.今日のお夕飯も◙おいしかったな。◙▲主人公＊▲は◙何を食べたの？:
Dinner was
delicious today.
What did you eat,
▲主人公＊▲？
translations.毎日一生懸命だと◙疲れるけど……◙それも楽しいね。◙一番は、▲主人公＊▲が◙いて:
Working hard every day
is tiring, but... it's
also fun. The best
part is having you,
▲主人公＊▲.
translations.今、◙ぼーっとしちゃってた。◙たまにはこういうのも、◙いいかな:
I was just zoning out.
Sometimes it's nice to
do this.
translations.はい、宿題終わり。◙そっちはどう？◙わたしの……勝ち？◙なんて:
Okay, homework's
done. How about
you？ Did I win？
Just kidding.
translations.夜も……◙▲主人公＊▲がそばに◙いてくれたらいいのにな:
I wish ▲主人公＊▲ was here
with me at night.
translations.ちょっと食べ過ぎ◙ちゃったかも……。◙いつもじゃないよ？◙今日はたまたま……ね？:
I might have eaten a
bit too much... It's
not usually like this,
okay？ It just happened
today... right？
translations.やっぱりわたしは、◙家族みんなで◙ご飯を食べるのが好き。◙▲主人公＊▲は◙寂しく:
I really like eating
meals with my family.
Aren't you lonely,
▲主人公＊▲？
translations.お休みの日は、◙ご飯の準備に時間が◙かけられてうれしいな。◙今日の献立は……秘密:
On my days off, I'm
happy to spend time
preparing meals.
Today's menu is... a
secret♪
translations.おやすみなさい。◙明日は▲主人公＊▲と◙何ができるかな:
Good night. I wonder
what I can do with
▲主人公＊▲ tomorrow.
translations.今日の最後に言わせて。◙わたしは、◙▲主人公＊▲が大好き▼:
Let me say this at the
end of today. I love
you, ▲主人公＊▲.
translations.今日はね、◙まだ眠くないよ。◙まだしばらく◙起きてよっと、ふふ♪:
I'm not sleepy yet
today. I think I'll
stay up a bit
longer, hehe♪
translations.わたしはもう眠いのに、◙パパはまだ起きてるの。◙朝も早いのに、◙すごいよね……:
Even though I'm
sleepy, Dad is still
awake. It's amazing
since he wakes up
early...
translations.今日は夢、見られるかな。◙それにできれば、◙▲主人公＊▲の夢、◙見たいな▼:
I wonder if I can dream
today. And if possible,
I want to dream of
▲主人公＊▲.
translations.今日もたくさん◙がんばった？◙そんなところも、◙大好きよ？:
Did you work hard
today？ I love that
part of you too.
translations.おやすみ。◙わたしもうね、◙半分眠っちゃってる◙みたい……:
Good night. I feel
like I'm already
half asleep...
translations.おやすみなさい。◙明日も一緒に◙がんばりたいな？:
Good night. I want
to work hard
together tomorrow
too.
translations.▲主人公＊▲は◙まだ起きてるよね？◙わたしはもう寝るね、◙おやすみ▼:
You're still awake,
right ▲主人公＊▲？ I'm
going to sleep now,
good night.
translations.そんなの知らない: I don't know anything about that.
translations.そうじゃないの。◙そうじゃなくて、◙気付いてよ……:
That's not it.
It's not that,
please realize...
translations.ねえ、本当に反省してる？: Hey, are you really reflecting on this？
translations.それならいいんだけど、◙でも……:
If that's the case,
then it's fine, but...
still...
translations.まだダメ、◙もう少し考えたいの:
Not yet, I want to
think a bit more.
translations.この間はゴメンね。◙でももう、◙寂しいのはイヤ……:
I'm sorry about
the other day. But
I don't want to
feel lonely
anymore...
translations.あのね。◙もう喧嘩なんて◙したくない、◙嫌われたくない……:
You know, I don't
want to fight
anymore, I don't
want to be
disliked...
translations.喧嘩しちゃっても、◙それでもやっぱり◙好きだから……。◙ね？:
Even if we fight,
I still love
you... Okay？
translations.ほんとに怖くて◙寂しかった。◙もうイヤだから、◙喧嘩なんてやめようね:
I was really scared
and lonely. I don't
want to do that
anymore, so let's
stop fighting.
translations.もう、◙ゆっくり休まないと◙ダメよ？:
You really need to
rest properly,
okay？
translations.メールなんてしないの。◙ほら、ちゃんと休もう？:
Don't send me
messages. Come on,
let's rest properly.
translations.メールくれるのは◙うれしいけど、◙今は▲主人公＊▲の◙体の方が大事だよ？:
I'm happy to get
messages, but
right now, your
health is more
important, okay？
translations.それより、◙体の方は大丈夫なの？◙まだ辛いなら、◙無理はしないで？:
More than that, are
you okay？ If it's
still tough, don't
push yourself.
translations.今はわたしのことより、◙自分のことを心配して、◙ね？:
Right now, worry about
yourself more than me,
okay？
translations.おはよう。◙体の調子はどう？◙無理して◙動かないようにね:
Good morning.
How's your health？
Make sure not to
overdo it.
translations.夜はよく寝られた？◙もし楽になっても、◙すぐには無理しないでね？:
Did you sleep well at
night？ Even if you feel
better, don't push
yourself right away.
translations.お昼はちゃんと食べた？◙食欲大丈夫かな。◙消化のいいものを◙選んでね:
Did you eat lunch
properly？ Is your
appetite okay？ Choose
something easy to
digest.
translations.ちゃんと安静にしてる？◙おとなしくしてないと、◙ダメだよ？:
Are you resting
properly？ You need to
stay calm, okay？
translations.ごめんね。◙あんまりメールするのも◙迷惑だと思うけど、◙心配で。◙早くよくなるよ:
I'm sorry. I know
messaging too much
might be a bother, but
I'm worried. Let's
rest properly so you
get better soon.
translations.今日の体調、◙どうだった？◙ちゃんと早めに◙寝るようにしてね？:
How was your
condition today？
Make sure to sleep
early, okay？
translations.ご飯はちゃんと食べた？◙しっかり栄養とらないと、◙よくならないよ？:
Did you eat properly？
You need to get enough
nutrition, or you won't
get better, okay？
translations.寝てたらごめんね。◙体が心配で◙メールしちゃった。◙あまり夜更かし◙しないように:
Sorry if I woke
you. I was worried
about you and sent
this email. Please
try not to stay up
too late, and rest
well？
translations.お見舞い、◙迷惑じゃなかったかな。◙思ったより元気そうで◙安心したけど、◙無理は:
I hope my visit wasn't
a bother. You look
healthier than I
expected, but please
don't push yourself？
translations.ごめんね。◙病気なのに押しかけて。◙でもお見舞い、◙したくて……:
I'm sorry for dropping
by when you're sick.
But I wanted to visit
you...
translations.うん。◙でも心配ぐらい、させて？◙カノジョなんだから:
Yeah. But let me worry a
little, okay？ I'm your
girlfriend after all.
translations.ごめんだなんて。◙かえって気を◙つかわせちゃったかな。◙わたしのことは◙気にしな:
Don't say sorry. I
might have made you
worry instead. Don't
mind me, just take it
easy？
translations.うん、できればあまり◙心配させないでほしいな。◙無理せず、◙しっかり治してね？:
Yeah, if possible, I’d
like you not to worry
too much. Take your time
to recover, okay？
translations.うん。もちろん◙そう言ってくれる方が◙安心するけど、少しは◙心配させてほしいな、:
Yeah. Of course,
it’s reassuring when
you say that, but
I’d like you to
worry a little, you
know？
translations.そう？◙それならよかった。◙でも無理しちゃダメ、◙治りかけが大事よ？:
Really？ I'm glad to
hear that. But don't
overdo it, the
recovery phase is
important, okay？
translations.心配かけてごめんね。◙早く治すようにするから:
I'm sorry for making
you worry. I'll do my
best to get better
soon.
translations.▲主人公＊▲に◙会えないの、寂しいな。◙よくなったら、◙甘えさせてね:
I miss seeing ▲主人公＊▲.
When I get better,
let me rely on you.
translations.わたしがいなくても、◙しっかりね？◙なんて。◙がんばって治すから、◙もう少し待っ:
Even without me,
take care of
yourself, okay？ I'll
work hard to
recover, so please
wait a little
longer.
translations.▲主人公＊▲は◙勉強も部活もがんばって。◙風邪の間のわたしの分も、◙なんて:
▲主人公＊▲, work hard in
your studies and club
activities. Do it for me
while I'm sick, okay？
translations.今どうしてる？◙会いたいけど、◙無理しちゃダメよね。◙▲主人公＊▲は◙風邪ひかな:
What are you doing
now？ I want to see
you, but you shouldn't
overdo it. Make sure
you don't catch a
cold, ▲主人公＊▲.
translations.あのね。◙やっぱり▲主人公＊▲の◙こと考えるのが、◙一番元気になるの:
You know, thinking
about ▲主人公＊▲ really
lifts my spirits.
translations.うん、ありがとう。◙▲主人公＊▲も◙体に気をつけて？:
Yeah, thank you.
Please take care
of yourself too,
▲主人公＊▲.
translations.心配させちゃった……。◙早く治すから、◙あまり気にしないで？◙でも、うれしい。◙:
I made you worry...
I'll get better soon,
so try not to think
about it too much,
okay？ But I'm happy.
Thank you.
translations.やっぱり忙しいのかな。◙会えないの、◙寂しいね……:
I guess you're busy
after all. It's lonely
not being able to see
you...
translations.あのね。◙風邪でお外に◙出られなくて、◙人に会えないと、◙やっぱり寂しいな◙……:
You know, I can't
go outside because
of my cold, and
not being able to
see anyone makes
me feel lonely...
translations.今日は◙お見舞いありがとう。◙▲主人公＊▲の顔見たら、◙やっぱり◙元気出ちゃった:
Thank you for visiting
today. Seeing ▲主人公＊▲'s
face really cheered me
up. Hehe♪
translations.お見舞いありがとう、◙わざわざごめんね。◙風邪うつらないように、◙うがいと手洗い:
Thanks for the visit,
sorry for making you
come all this way.
Please gargle and wash
your hands so you
don't catch my cold？
translations.今日来てくれて、◙うれしかった。◙わたしのこと◙大切にしてくれて、◙ありがとう。:
I was happy you
came today. Thank
you for caring
about me. I hope
to get better
soon, okay？
translations.お見舞いうれしかった、◙ありがとう。◙あのね。ママも◙「よかったわね」って。◙ふ:
I was happy for the
visit, thank you. By
the way, my mom said,
'I'm glad for you.'
Hehe▼
translations.あのね。◙風邪治ったみたい、◙心配かけてごめんね。◙もうきっと大丈夫よ:
You know, it seems
like my cold is
getting better.
Sorry for making you
worry. I should be
fine now.
translations.あのね。◙体の調子、もうだいぶ◙よくなったみたい。◙▲主人公＊▲の◙おかげかな？:
You know, my
condition seems to
have improved a lot.
Is it thanks to
▲主人公＊▲？ Hehe, thank
you♪
translations.あのね。▲主人公＊▲って◙優しいね。◙だからいつも、◙つい甘えちゃうの:
You know, ▲主人公＊▲ is
really kind. That's why
I often end up relying
on you.
translations.あのね。▲主人公＊▲って◙クールなところも◙あるよね。◙そういうところにも、◙た:
You know, ▲主人公＊▲ has a
cool side too.
Sometimes, I get a
little flustered by
that.
translations.あのね。▲主人公＊▲って◙積極的よね。◙わたしをリード◙してくれるから、◙安心で:
You know, ▲主人公＊▲ is
proactive. It makes me
feel secure when you
lead me.
translations.あのね。▲主人公＊▲って◙落ち着いてるよね。◙大人っぽくて、◙そういうところも◙:
You know, ▲主人公＊▲ is
calm. You seem mature,
and I think that's
wonderful...
translations.ふふ、◙調子にのっちゃった？◙なんて。◙でも本心よ、◙心からそう思ってるの:
Hehe, did I get
carried away？ But
it's true, I really
think so.
translations.そうかな？◙そんなところも◙あると思うんだけど:
Is that so？ I
think there are
parts like that
too.
translations.最近なんだか◙調子がよさそう。◙何かいいこと◙あったのかな？:
You seem to be in
good spirits
lately. Did
something good
happen？
translations.最近なんだか◙調子がいいね。◙もしかして◙プレゼントのおかげ？◙なんて:
You seem to be doing
well lately. Could
it be because of the
gift？ Just saying.
translations.旅行のことなら十羽野ツー◙リストにお任せ！ 今回は◙旅に役立つ情報を５回にわ◙た:
If it's about travel,
leave it to the Towano
Tourist! This time,
we'll share useful
travel tips in five
parts. Enjoy!
translations.またまた登場、十羽野ツー◙リスト！ 全５回のお役立◙ち情報を再度送信します。◙チ:
Here comes the Towano
Tourist again! We're
sending useful
information in five
parts again. Don't
forget to check!
translations.この季節、恋人と旅行にで◙も行こうと思っているあな◙たは要注意！ 旅行先で必◙要:
If you're thinking of
traveling with your
partner this season, be
careful! What's
essential at your travel
destination is your
foundation. Balance it
well!
translations.恋人との旅行。それは二人◙がずっと同じ時間を過ごす◙ということ。瞬間瞬間が大◙切:
Traveling with your
partner means spending
time together. Every
moment is a precious
memory, so don't take
your eyes off it!
translations.旅が素敵なものになるかど◙うか。それは旅行に行く前◙のやり取りも影響します。◙そ:
Whether the trip will be
wonderful or not depends
on the communication
before you go. Please
don't forget that.
translations.二人きりの旅行、一緒に過◙ごす甘い夜……。一瞬たり◙とも目が離せない、のんき◙に:
A trip for just the two
of you, a sweet night
together... You can't
afford to be careless
and let your guard down!
translations.旅情報も今回で最後。とに◙かく旅行には万全の準備◙を！ 恋人との思い出作り◙に妥:
This is the last travel
information. Make sure
you're fully prepared
for your trip! No
compromises in making
memories with your
partner! So, please take
care of the Towano
Tourist.
translations.十羽野ツーリスト緊急企◙画！ メール応募で熱海旅◙行に男女カップル２名さま◙をご:
Towano Tourist emergency
project! Apply via email
for a chance to win a
trip to Atami for two
couples! Winning is up
to luck？ Please apply!
translations.おめでとうございます！◙熱海旅行１泊２日に当選さ◙れました。チケットは後日◙お送:
Congratulations! You've
won a one-night, two-day
trip to Atami. Tickets
will be sent later.
translations.十羽野ツーリスト緊急企画◙にご応募ありがとうござい◙ました。今回はまことに残◙念:
Thank you for applying
to the Towano Tourist
emergency project.
Unfortunately, you were
not selected this time.
Please try again next
time.
translations.あのね。◙ふと思ったんだけど、◙▲主人公＊▲に◙出会ったときの髪型に◙戻すのって:
You know, I was just
thinking, how about
going back to the
hairstyle I had when
I met ▲主人公＊▲？
translations.うん。◙ちょっと懐かしい◙気分になるかも。◙ふふ♪:
Yeah. It might
feel a bit
nostalgic. Hehe♪
translations.そっか。◙ううん、いいの。◙なんとなくだったから:
I see. No, it's
fine. It was just a
thought.
translations.わたし、待ってたのに◙旅行楽しみにしてたのに。◙どうして……:
I was waiting for you. I
was looking forward to
the trip. Why...？
translations.謝ったら許してもらえると思ってる……◙次こんなことしたら知らないんだから。ほんと:
You think saying sorry will
make it all better... If you
do this again, I won't forgive
you. I'm really angry.
translations.ごめん、って……◙謝ればいいってわけじゃないと思う。◙◙◙◙でも、今回だけ……◙:
Saying sorry...
doesn't mean it's okay.
But, just this once...
I'll let it slide.
translations.旅行楽しみに◙してたのに……バカ。◙埋め合わせは絶対にしてもらうからね。◙行き先:
I was looking forward to the
trip...you idiot. You'll
definitely make it up to me. I
think Hawaii would be nice.
Just saying.
translations.埋め合わせだけじゃダメ。◙本当に悲しかったんだから。◙◙わたしがどうしてほしいか:
An apology isn't enough. I was
really sad. I want you to
think about what I want.
translations.そういうのは、すっぽかす前に言うべきだと思う。◙それならわたしだってこんなに怒ら:
You should say that before you
bail. If you did, I wouldn't
be this angry. Idiot.
translations.また今度って……◙ひどいよ。◙◙◙◙でも、何か事情があったんだよね。そういう時は:
Saying "next time"... that's
harsh. But I guess something
must have happened. I wish
you'd let me know in advance
next time.
translations.この前話したドーナツ屋さんのことなんだけど、お友達が木曜日にショッピング街で見か:
About that donut shop we
talked about, a friend saw it
in the shopping district on
Thursday. It seems it was
after school.
translations.ドーナツ屋さんの目撃情報！ あのね、先週の土曜日、お昼ごろに噴水公園で見かけたっ:
Sightings of the donut shop! I
heard from a friend that they
saw it at the fountain park
around noon last Saturday. It
might be worth checking out.
translations.噂のドーナツ屋さんなんだけど、ママがテレビで特集してるのを観たらしいの。電気街か:
The rumored donut shop was
featured on TV, according to
my mom. It was a live
broadcast from the electric
town on Sunday around noon.
translations.お友達がね、土曜のお昼に遊園地で噂のドーナツ屋さんを見かけたらしいの。大人気だっ:
A friend said they saw the
rumored donut shop at the
amusement park on Saturday
around noon. It seemed really
popular... I want to try it
soon.
translations.この前話したドーナツ屋さんのことだけど、ママが日曜日のお昼頃に植物園の近くで見か:
About that donut shop we
talked about, my mom saw it
near the botanical garden
around noon on Sunday. It
seems they leave as soon as
they sell out.
translations.ドーナツ屋さんの情報。お友達が土曜日のお昼頃にイベントホールの近くで見かけたらし:
Information about the donut
shop. A friend said they saw
it near the event hall around
noon on Saturday. I wonder if
they came for the event... not
sure.
translations.この前話してた美味しいクレープ屋さんのこと、お友達に教えてもらったの。土曜日のお: About that delicious crepe shop we talked about, a friend told me they saw it at the zoo around noon on Saturday.
translations.ジェラート屋さんの有力情報！ 土曜日のお昼頃に、遊園地で目撃されたらしいの。暑い:
Strong information about the
gelato shop! It seems it was
spotted at the amusement park
around noon on Saturday. It
must be delicious on a hot
day.
translations.この前話してた甘栗屋さんのことだけど、お友達がテレビで特集してるのを見たって教え:
About that sweet chestnut shop
we talked about, a friend told
me they saw it featured on TV.
According to the show, they
usually set up near the zoo on
Wednesday evenings.
translations.焼き芋屋さんの目撃情報！ この前の木曜の夜、テニス部の先輩が港の丘公園で見かけた:
Sightings of the baked sweet
potato shop! A senior from the
tennis club saw it at Minato
Hill Park last Thursday night.
I want to try it soon...
translations.この前した十羽野城のことだけど、他にも何人か声を聞いた人がいるみたいなの。お守り:
About the castle in Towano we
talked about, it seems there
are others who have heard
voices too. I heard it's good
to have charms or talismans,
but is that true？
translations.あのね、ビッグフットについて少し考えてみたの。見つけられるとしたら、薄暗くて静か:
You know, I thought a bit
about Bigfoot. If it can be
found, it might be during a
dim and quiet time... I don't
think it would come down from
the mountains, so we really
need to go to the mountains.
translations.ＵＦＯの目撃情報って、奥十羽野に集中してるみたいなの。晴れた夜によく出るって聞い:
It seems UFO sightings are
concentrated in Oku Towano. I
heard they often appear on
clear nights... is that true？
translations.湖に出るトワッシーの目撃情報って、雨の日に偏ってるって知ってた？ 実はそうらしい:
Did you know that sightings of
Towassy at the lake are biased
towards rainy days？
Apparently, that's the case.
Does it like the rain？
translations.とわのタウンアンケート◙▲エリア▲の空きスペースに入るテナントについてアンケート:
Towano Town Survey We are
conducting a survey about
tenants for the vacant space
in ▲Area▲. Please let us know
your wishes.
translations.■■とわのタウン情報！■■◙▲エリア▲にコーヒーショップがオープンいたしました。:
■■ Towano Town Information! ■■
A coffee shop has opened in
▲Area▲. We look forward to
your visit.
translations.■■とわのタウン情報！■■◙本日よりウイニングバーガー▲エリア▲店がオープンしま:
■■ Towano Town Information! ■■
Winning Burger has opened in
▲Area▲ today! All staff are
looking forward to your visit.
translations.■■とわのタウン情報！■■◙▲エリア▲にカレーショップがオープンいたしました。◙:
■■ Towano Town Information! ■■
A curry shop has opened in
▲Area▲. We look forward to
your visit.
translations.■■とわのタウン情報！■■◙▲エリア▲にラーメン店がオープンいたしました。◙ご来:
■■ Towano Town Information! ■■
A ramen shop has opened in
▲Area▲. We look forward to
your visit.
translations.■■とわのタウン情報！■■◙▲エリア▲に焼肉店がオープンいたしました。◙ご来店を:
■■ Towano Town Information! ■■
A yakiniku restaurant has
opened in ▲Area▲. We look
forward to your visit.
translations.■■とわのタウン情報！■■◙▲エリア▲に寿司店がオープンいたしました。◙ご来店を:
■■ Towano Town Information! ■■
A sushi restaurant has opened
in ▲Area▲. We look forward to
your visit.
translations.■■とわのタウン情報！■■◙▲エリア▲に和食甘味屋がオープンいたしました。◙ご来:
■■ Towano Town Information! ■■
A Japanese sweets shop has
opened in ▲Area▲. We look
forward to your visit.
translations.■■とわのタウン情報！■■◙▲エリア▲にケーキバイキングがオープンいたしました。:
■■ Towano Town Information! ■■
A cake buffet has opened in
▲Area▲. We look forward to
your visit.
translations.噴水公園では毎週日曜日にフリーマーケットを開催中です。ここでだけ出店されるチケッ:
A flea market is held every
Sunday at the fountain park.
The ticket shop that only sets
up here is a must-see.
translations.噴水公園では毎週日曜日がフリーマーケットの日です。ぜひお越しください。:
Every Sunday is flea market
day at the fountain park.
Please come by.
translations.あのね、次のデートで行ってみたい場所があるの。▲デート場所▲なんだけど……だめか:
You know, there's a place I
want to go on our next date.
It's ▲Date Location▲... is
that okay？
translations.あのね、雑誌に載ってたんだけど、最近、▲デート場所▲が恋人たちの聖地って呼ばれて:
You know, I read in a magazine
that recently, ▲Date Location▲
is being called a lovers'
sanctuary. I want to go there
on our next date...
translations.そっか。うん、無理しなくてもいいから。: I see. Yeah, you don't have to force yourself.
translations.わたしの行きたかった場所、やっぱり覚えててくれたね。うれしい。やさしいカレシのカ:
You remembered the place I
wanted to go. I'm so happy.
Being your kind girlfriend
makes Manaka happy ▼.
translations.この前の約束、覚えててくれてありがとう。これからも時々でいいから、わたしの行きた:
Thank you for remembering our
promise. From now on, I hope
you'll take me to the places I
want to go sometimes.
translations.わたしが行きたいってお願いしたデートなのに、あんまり楽しくなかったかもしれないね:
Even though it was a date I
asked for, it might not have
been that fun... Next time,
let's go to ▲Protagonist＊▲'s
favorite place.
translations.楽しみ▼ 早くデートの日にならないかな♪: I'm looking forward to it ▼ I can't wait for our date day♪
translations.忘れちゃダメよ。もし遅刻したら、ほっぺつねっちゃうから！ ……嘘♪: You can't forget. If you're late, I'll pinch your cheek! ... Just kidding♪
translations.カレンダーにハナマル付けちゃった。印つけなくても、絶対に忘れないけど♪:
I marked it with a star on the
calendar. Even without a mark,
I definitely won't forget♪
translations.どんなデートになるのか、今からワクワクしちゃうね。: I can't wait to see what kind of date it will be.
translations.どんなお洋服着ていこうか悩んじゃう……。秘密にしておいた方がいいかな。: I'm worried about what clothes to wear... Should I keep it a secret？
translations.デートの約束があると、ドキドキしちゃうね。寝不足になっちゃうかも▼:
Having a date promise makes me
excited. I might not get
enough sleep ▼.
translations.今度のデート、▲主人公＊▲が気に入ってくれそうなお洋服を着ていきたいな……失敗し: For our next date, I want to wear clothes that ▲Protagonist＊▲ will like... Please don't laugh if I fail？
translations.ねえ、▲主人公＊▲はカレンダーにマルは付けた？: Hey, did ▲Protagonist＊▲ mark it on the calendar？
translations.デートって、女の子から誘われた方がうれしいものなのかな？: Is it more exciting for a girl to invite for a date？
translations.デートの約束。忘れたらハリセンボンだからね！ 冗談です♪: About the date promise. If you forget, it'll be a blowfish! Just kidding♪
translations.明日のデートが待ちきれなくて、メールしちゃった。早く明日になってほしいなって。:
I couldn't wait for tomorrow's
date, so I texted you. I
really want tomorrow to come
soon.
translations.さて、明日は何の日でしょう？ 覚えてるならいいんです♪:
So, what day is tomorrow？
It’s good if you remember♪
translations.明日のデート、なにか美味しいもの食べられたらいいね。: For tomorrow's date, I hope we can eat something delicious.
translations.明日は晴れるといいね。もし天気がよくなくても、せめて曇りで。: I hope it will be sunny tomorrow. If the weather isn't good, at least cloudy.
translations.きっと、あなたよりもわたしのほうが楽しみにしてるよ、今度のデート。負けません♪: I'm definitely looking forward to our next date more than you are. I won't lose♪
translations.うん、わたしも。待ち合わせ場所に早く着いちゃっても、笑わないでね？: Yeah, me too. If I arrive early at the meeting place, please don't laugh, okay？
translations.はい。楽しいデートにしようね▼: Yes. Let's have a fun date▼
translations.ほんとにそう。早くデートの時間になればいいのに。: That's true. I wish the date time would come soon.
translations.今から会いに行っちゃ……ダメよね。わかってます。: I want to go see you now... but I know I shouldn't.
translations.もう、せっかちね。でも、気持ちはわかるから。: You're so impatient. But I understand how you feel.
translations.今のメール、消えないでほしいな……また見返したいから。: I hope this email doesn't disappear... I want to look back at it again.
translations.もう！ そんなメール受け取っちゃったら、携帯電話、絶対に誰かに見られないようにし: Geez! If I receive an email like that, I have to make sure no one sees my phone.
translations.あのね。今度のデートだけど、よかったらお弁当を作っていこうかなって思うんだけど…: You know, for our next date, I was thinking of making a bento. What do you think？
translations.はい。ご期待にそえるように、がんばります♪ 楽しみにしててね▼: Yes. I'll do my best to meet your expectations♪ Look forward to it▼
translations.うん。なら、いいの。また今度、必要だったら教えてね。: Yeah. That's fine. Let me know if you need anything next time.
translations.明日は雨の予報みたい。でも▲主人公＊▲と一緒なら、きっと楽しいデートになるよね。: It seems like rain is forecasted for tomorrow. But if I'm with ▲主人公＊▲, it will surely be a fun date.
translations.明日は曇るみたい。念のため、傘は持っておいた方がいいのかも。: It looks like it will be cloudy tomorrow. Just in case, it might be good to bring an umbrella.
translations.明日は晴れの予報です！ きっと楽しいデートになるね？: The forecast says it will be sunny tomorrow! It will surely be a fun date, right？
translations.また一緒に旅行に◙いけるんだね。◙今からドキドキしてるの。:
We can travel together
again . I'm already
excited.
translations.今度の旅行、◙たくさん思い出作り◙しようね。:
For our next trip,
let's make lots of
memories together.
translations.うん。◙忘れられないような◙思い出が作れると◙いいな。:
Yeah. I hope we
can make
unforgettable
memories.
translations.夜？◙うん、夜のお散歩とかも◙楽しそう。:
At night？ Yeah, a
night walk sounds fun.
translations.旅行の準備ってなかなか◙慣れないね。◙何を持っていっったら◙いいのか迷っちゃうね:
Preparing for the trip
is quite unfamiliar.
I'm not sure what to
bring.
translations.そんな準備だけで◙大丈夫？◙やっぱり一緒に◙準備する？:
Is that all the
preparation？
Should we prepare
together after
all？
translations.え？そうなの。◙お芋はおやつに◙含まれないよね？◙◙ふふ、なんて。:
Huh？ Is that so？
Sweet potatoes
don't count as
snacks, right？
Hehe, just
kidding.
translations.旅行の日まで◙待ちきれない。◙早く旅行の日に◙ならないかな……。:
I can't wait until
the day of the
trip. I wish it
would come soon...
translations.▲主人公＊▲も◙そうなんだ。◙やっぱり私たち◙気が合うね。:
▲主人公＊▲ feels the
same way. We
really get along.
translations.そうだね、◙待ってる間のワクワクも◙いいよね。◙さすが▲主人公＊▲◙だね。:
That's right, the
excitement while
waiting is nice too.
Just like you, ▲主人公＊▲.
translations.今度の旅行で◙一番したいことって◙何かな？:
What do you want
to do the most on
our next trip？
translations.そうだよね。◙いろんなところに行って、◙知らないこと、たくさん◙調べられたらいい:
That's right. I hope
we can go to various
places and learn a lot
of new things.
translations.ふふ、撮るのは◙風景なのかな？◙わたしなのかな？:
Hehe, will you be
taking pictures of
the scenery？ Or of
me？
translations.お散歩かな？◙ふたりで手をつないで◙歩けたらいいな。◙なんて。:
Maybe a walk？ I hope
we can hold hands
and walk together.
translations.もう寝たかな？◙明日は旅行だから◙早く寝ようね。:
Have you gone to
bed yet？ Since
tomorrow is the
trip, let's sleep
early.
translations.もう、起きてるじゃない。◙お互い、寝坊しないように◙しようね。◙おやすみなさい。:
You're already awake.
Let's make sure we don't
oversleep. Good night.
translations.やっぱり？◙実はわたしも眠れなくて◙メールしたんだ。◙でも、明日は早いから◙もう:
Really？ Actually, I
couldn't sleep either
and sent you a message.
But since tomorrow is
early, I really need to
sleep now. Good night.
translations.日光楽しかったね。◙一緒にすごす時間が◙長かった分だけ、◙おうちに帰ったら◙少し:
Nikko was fun. I felt a
bit lonely when I got
home after spending so
much time together. I
wish we could be
together more.
translations.今回の日光も◙すごく楽しかったね。◙▲主人公＊▲との◙思い出がどんどん◙増えてい:
This time in Nikko
was really fun too.
I'm so happy that my
memories with ▲主人公＊▲
keep increasing.
translations.これからも、◙ずっとずっと◙一緒にいようね。:
From now on, let's
be together
forever.
translations.ふたりで朝を迎えるって◙すごく幸せな気分。◙また行けたらいいな。:
Waking up together
feels so happy. I hope
we can do it again.
translations.お風呂？◙気持ちよかったもんね◙また入りたいね。:
The bath？ It felt
nice. I want to go
in again.
translations.この前の旅行のことが◙頭から離れなくて、◙今もなんだか変な気分。:
I can't get the last
trip out of my head,
and I still feel a bit
strange.
translations.朝起きたら隣に◙▲主人公＊▲が◙いるんじゃないかって◙今でも思っちゃう。◙旅行、:
When I wake up in
the morning, I still
think that ▲主人公＊▲
might be next to me.
The trip was so much
fun.
translations.夜になると旅行の日の◙こと思い出しちゃうの。◙どうしてかな。:
At night, I remember
the day of the trip. I
wonder why.
translations.▲主人公＊▲と◙一緒に眠った日のことを◙思い出してたの。◙とっても素敵な時間◙だ:
I was remembering the
day I slept with
▲主人公＊▲. It was such a
wonderful time.
translations.また行きたいね、旅行。◙それで、▲主人公＊▲◙との思い出をもっと◙たくさん作りた:
I want to go on
another trip. I want
to make even more
memories with ▲主人公＊▲.
translations.まだ先のことだけど、デート楽しみにしてるね。▲主人公＊▲も同じ気持ちだとうれしい: It's still a while away, but I'm looking forward to the date. I hope ▲主人公＊▲ feels the same way♪
translations.やっぱりデートのこと待ちきれなくて……。どんなデートになるのか、いろいろ想像しち: I can't wait for the date... I keep imagining what kind of date it will be.
translations.▲主人公＊▲とデートしてる夢を見ちゃった▼ 早く約束の日にならないかな。: I had a dream about going on a date with ▲主人公＊▲▼ I can't wait for the promised day.
translations.カレンダーにデートの日の印をつけてるから、まだ先なのがわかっちゃう。待ち遠しいな: I marked the date of the date on my calendar, so I know it's still a while away. I can't wait...
translations.今度のデート、すごく楽しみです。まだ先の話なのにね。おかしいかな。: I'm really looking forward to our next date. It's still a while away, though. Is that strange？
translations.まだ約束の日まで１週間以上あるね……早く日付が進みますように！: There's still more than a week until the promised day... I hope the date comes quickly!
translations.あのね、せっかくだから、今度のデートまでに髪型を変えてみようかなって……どうかな: You know, since it's a special occasion, I was thinking of changing my hairstyle before our next date... what do you think？
translations.はい。それじゃあ、考えてみます。失敗しても笑わないでね？: Yes. Well then, I'll think about it. Please don't laugh if I fail？
translations.そう。それなら、やめる。いいの。: Right. Then I'll stop. It's fine.
translations.あともう少し……やっぱり近づくほど、ドキドキしてくるの。: Just a little more... the closer I get, the more my heart races.
translations.▲主人公＊▲とデートしてる夢、見ちゃった。ふたりして同じ夢を見られたら素敵なのに: I had a dream about going on a date with ▲主人公＊▲. It would be wonderful if we both had the same dream...
translations.あと少しね。なんだかずいぶん長い間待った気がするけど……▲主人公＊▲はどうだった: Just a little longer. It feels like I've been waiting for a long time... how about you, ▲主人公＊▲？
translations.どんなデートになるのかな、すごく楽しみ……。わたしはいつも新鮮な気分です♪: I wonder what kind of date it will be, I'm really looking forward to it... I always feel fresh♪
translations.明日の約束、忘れてないよね。わたし、すごく楽しみにしてるから、お願いね？: You haven't forgotten our promise for tomorrow, right？ I'm really looking forward to it, so please？
translations.明日はどんなお洋服を着ていこうかな。これでもいろいろ考えてるんです。: What kind of clothes should I wear tomorrow？ I've been thinking about it.
translations.約束の場所、ちゃんと覚えてる？遅刻したら、メ！ ……なんて！: Do you remember the meeting place？ If you're late, it's a no! ...Just kidding!
translations.おはよう！ 今日はデート日和だよ♪: Good morning! Today is perfect for a date♪
translations.今日のデート、ドキドキね。もうお出かけの支度はした？ まだ早いかな♪: Today's date is exciting. Have you gotten ready to go out yet？ Maybe it's still early♪
translations.約束の時間が待ち遠しいね。それまでどうやってすごそうかな……。: I can't wait for the promised time. I wonder how I'll spend the time until then...
translations.あのね、前にも言ったかもしれないけど、わたしお料理を作るのが好きなの。それで、こ: You know, I might have said this before, but I love cooking. So, I was thinking of making more for ▲主人公＊▲... If it's not a bother, I'd like you to join me.
translations.外でお料理を食べるとき、どうしてもお味だけじゃなくて、素材や作り方も気になっちゃ: When I eat outside, I can't help but be curious about the taste, ingredients, and how it's made. Of course, during dates too. I'm quite the researcher♪
translations.デートのときに▲主人公＊▲と一緒に食べたお料理を参考に、自分のレパートリーを増や: I plan to expand my repertoire based on the dishes I eat with ▲主人公＊▲ on our dates. I want to try various types of cuisine.
translations.▲主人公＊▲はどんなお料理が好き？ レシピ本さえあれば、勉強して作ってあげる。: What kind of dishes does ▲主人公＊▲ like？ If I have a recipe book, I can study and make it for you.
translations.お料理の腕を上達させるには、ただ作るだけじゃなくて食べた人の意見や感想を聞くのが: To improve my cooking skills, I think it's important to listen to the opinions and feedback of those who eat it. So, I'd love to hear your thoughts, ▲主人公＊▲.
translations.お料理には調味料って大切よね。素材の良さを引き出してくれたり、お味をととのえてく: Seasonings are important in cooking, right？ They can enhance the quality of the ingredients and balance the flavors. But if used incorrectly, it can ruin everything.
translations.やっぱり新しいお料理を覚えると、人に食べてもらいたくなるの。もちろんわたしの場合: When I learn new recipes, I want to share them with others. Of course, in my case, it's with ▲主人公＊▲. Once I expand my repertoire, I'll invite you over, okay？
translations.よう、オレだ。彼氏力にはどんな意味があるかって？彼氏力が高いほど、キミのデートは: Hey, it's me. What does boyfriend power mean？ The higher your boyfriend power, the more fulfilling your date will be. It's crucial to be mindful of your actions leading up to the date to boost your boyfriend power!
translations.よう、オレだ。いつも同じデートじゃつまらない！同じデートスポットでも訪れる季節や: Hey, it's me. Having the same date all the time is boring! Even the same date spot can change depending on the season or time of day. Check out info online or in magazines!
translations.よう、オレだ。いつでもスキンシップ！会話中などカノジョに触れればいつでもスキンシ: Hey, it's me. Always go for skinship! You can touch your girlfriend during conversations whenever! Just be careful when there are many people around! A guy who doesn't know the time and place will be disliked!
translations.よう、オレだ。タッチスキンシップはタイミングが命。カノジョの気分を盛り上げるため: Hey, it's me. Timing is everything for touch skinship. To lift your girlfriend's mood, be gentle with your touches while being mindful of your surroundings!
translations.よう、オレだ。ロマンチックタイムを盛り上げろ！？カノジョの反応が過敏なところを攻: Hey, it's me. Amp up the romantic time!？ Attack your girlfriend's sensitive spots! But be careful, if you go too far, she might get upset!
translations.よう、オレだ。ロマンチックがとまらない！？過敏なところを攻め続けると出てくる紫の: Hey, it's me. The romance won't stop!？ If you keep attacking her sensitive spots, you'll see a purple heart! That's a warning of danger! If you stop attacking immediately, you'll get a big heart that guarantees success!
translations.よう、オレだ。デートのキスはためておけ！カノジョとキスをしたいのもわかるが、そこ: Hey, it's me. Save up kisses for the date! I know you want to kiss your girlfriend, but hold back and save them up for a mood-filled moment! Repeated kisses!! Your girlfriend will feel amazing!!
translations.よう、オレだ。バイオリズムを知ってるか？周期的に良くなったり悪くなったりする、人: Hey, it's me. Do you know about biorhythms？ It's like how a person's condition improves or worsens periodically. It affects exercise, studying, hobbies, fashion, and even dates.
translations.よう、オレだ。終わらないキス！繰り返されるキスの先にあるもの、それがフォーエバー: Hey, it's me. Endless kisses! What lies beyond repeated kisses is forever!! If you keep kissing in a romantic place, you'll stay connected with your girlfriend forever!! That's forever!!
translations.よう、オレだ。カノジョをデートに誘うなら、チェックすべきはデートスポット。ＷＥＢ: Hey, it's me. If you want to invite your girlfriend on a date, check out the date spots. Get info online regularly! And don't forget to check the weather. If it rains during the date, plans will change.
translations.よう、オレだ。放課後のデートでは行けない遠くのスポットや、時間をじっくり使ったデ: Hey, it's me. If you want to enjoy distant spots or take your time on a date after school, invite your girlfriend out on the weekend. Don't forget to keep polishing your boyfriend power even after making plans!
translations.よう、オレだ。カノジョと永遠にキスをし続ける……そんな夢みたいなことを体験するに: Hey, it's me. To experience something like an endless kiss with your girlfriend, you need a nice atmosphere and a girlfriend who's in a good mood. The final ingredient is your kindness in cherishing her.
translations.妄想の具現化？夢イベントをコンプリートするコツを伝授！: Manifesting fantasies？ Here are tips to complete dream events!
translations.よう、オレだ。リセットペナルティって何？ゲームを正しく終了せず強引に電源をＯＦＦ: Hey, it's me. What is a reset penalty？ If you forcefully turn off the power without properly ending the game, your girlfriend's mood will drop a bit. As a boyfriend, you should take care of her!
translations.よう、オレだ。カノジョへのプレゼントはなにがいいだろう？答えに迷ったら、カノジョ: Hey, it's me. What would be a good gift for your girlfriend？ If you're unsure, just ask her. "What color do you like？" "What stores do you like？" It's definitely quicker to communicate as a couple.
translations.スキンシップ初心者を卒業したあなたに、知っておきたいマル秘テクニック！: Secret techniques you should know as a skinship beginner!
translations.よう、オレだ。最近あまり上手くいかないことが多い……そんな風に思ったことは無いだ: Hey, it's me. Have you ever thought things haven't been going well lately...？ In such cases, checking your horoscope might be a good idea. There could be hints hidden there.
translations.よう、オレだ。カノジョのファッションに一言言いたいそんなキミ。自分の趣味をはっき: Hey, it's me. Do you want to say something about your girlfriend's fashion？ Don't forget that it's also a boyfriend's role to clearly express your preferences. Your girlfriend always wants to be liked by you, so try to express your honest feelings.
translations.よう、オレだ。髪は女の子にとって一番大切なファッション！少しでもカレに気に入られ: Hey, it's me. Hair is the most important fashion for girls! Many girls put in effort to be liked by their boyfriends. So, if your girlfriend asks about your hairstyle preferences, don't hesitate to share your thoughts!
translations.よう、オレだ。カノジョとの毎日を充実させるのが一番大事！でもたまには一人で外出す: Hey, it's me. Making every day with your girlfriend fulfilling is the most important! But sometimes going out alone isn't bad either; you might discover something new. If you keep visiting one place, you might develop a hobby and improve yourself.
translations.よう、オレだ。カノジョの部屋に行きたい？遠いようで近い、カノジョの部屋への道のり: Hey, it's me. Do you want to go to your girlfriend's room？ The path to her room may seem far but is actually close. What you need is your usual time spent with her. If you only meet occasionally, you won't get the chance to go to her room.
translations.アイツと俺はどれだけ仲良し？◙新密度をチェックして、デートでバッチリきめちゃおう:
How close are we？ Check the
intimacy level and make your
date perfect!
translations.よう、オレだ。カノジョにちょっと変わった格好をしてもらいたいと思ったら、場所は選: Hey, it's me. If you want your girlfriend to wear something a little different, you need to choose the right place. Yes, her room would be ideal. She probably doesn't want other guys to see her like that.
translations.よう、オレだ。たまにはカノジョからデートに誘われてみたい。そんなときは少し待つ姿: Hey, it's me. Sometimes I want my girlfriend to invite me on a date. In such cases, it might be good to show a little patience. After attracting her feelings, give it some time... then maybe she'll invite you？
translations.よう、オレだ。デート当日重要なこと。それは日々の彼氏力磨きと、あとは今の自分がど: Hey, it's me. Important things for the date day. It's about polishing your boyfriend power daily and considering what actions you can take before the date. Whether you go out casually or fully enjoy the date is up to you!
translations.よう、オレだ。デートは週末だけなんて誰が決めた？学校帰りのデートは学生の特権、青: Hey, it's me. Who decided that dates are only on weekends？ After-school dates are a privilege for students, a sweet experience that colors youth. If you're feeling it, don't hesitate to call and set up an after-school promise.
translations.よう、オレだ。カノジョとのデートをいつもと少し違う物にしてみないか？必要なものは: Hey, it's me. Why not make your date with your girlfriend a little different？ What you need is a ticket. Girls are weak against pre-planned events. Make her feel special with a well-planned date.
translations.よう、オレだ。デートスポットで一息ついたら、カノジョとのおしゃべりを楽しむのもい: Hey, it's me. After taking a break at a date spot, it would be nice to enjoy chatting with your girlfriend. Since you're together, why not let a little conversation bloom？
translations.よう、オレだ。デート中の雨はできれば天気予報を見て事前に避けたいところ。でも降っ: Hey, it's me. If it rains during the date, it's best to check the weather forecast in advance to avoid it. But if it does rain, there's no choice but to change locations. It's a boyfriend's duty to make sure your girlfriend doesn't catch a cold.
translations.よう、オレだ。食事中にカノジョにしてもらいたいことのひとつは「はい、あーん」。も: Hey, it's me. One thing I'd like my girlfriend to do during meals is "Here, ahh." Of course, there might be some embarrassment, but just be honest and eat properly. If she asks you to feed her, of course...
translations.よう、オレだ。カノジョの料理テクニック向上！デート中にいろんな種類の食事をすれば: Hey, it's me. Improving your girlfriend's cooking skills! If you try various types of food during dates, she'll learn to cook. If you give her a cookbook, it'll make it even easier for her to learn!
translations.よう、オレだ。カノジョの好き嫌い、知ってる？料理のジャンルによってカノジョにも得: Hey, it's me. Do you know your girlfriend's likes and dislikes？ She has strengths and weaknesses depending on the type of cuisine. She struggles to learn new recipes in her weak areas. That's where seasonings come in handy!
translations.よう、オレだ。デート中のカノジョの笑顔、心に焼き付けるだけじゃなく形で残しておき: Hey, it's me. If you want to capture your girlfriend's smile during a date, don't just memorize it—take a picture. Of course, be mindful of her feelings at that moment. Remember to behave properly.
translations.よう、オレだ。もしキミがカノジョの部屋でカメラを構える機会があったら、普段よりも: Hey, it's me. If you get a chance to take a picture in your girlfriend's room, be extra considerate. Improving the camera's performance so she doesn't notice is also a good strategy.
translations.よう、オレだ。人目には気をつけろ！！もし人目が最も多い場所で最高のスキンシップを: Hey, it's me. Be careful of onlookers!! If you try to have the best skinship and kiss in a crowded place, something might happen!! I can't say what, though!!
translations.よう、オレだ。特別な日のためにプレゼントを用意したものの、後でもっといいものを見: Hey, it's me. You might prepare a gift for a special day, but later find something better. In that case, don't worry and bring what you truly want to give her on the day.
translations.よう、オレだ。カノジョ以外の女友達との付き合いに悩んでいるカレシはいないだろうか: Hey, it's me. Is there any boyfriend struggling with friendships outside of his girlfriend？ If you feel bad about it, keeping some distance from friends might be a good idea. Do what you feel is best.
translations.もうすぐ年の瀬、大晦日のカウントダウンイベントについてお知らせするぞ。カウントダ: The year-end is approaching, and I want to inform you about the New Year's Eve countdown event. The main event starts at 23:30. Don't forget to experience it!
translations.ついに明日は大晦日、カウントダウンイベントについてお知らせするぞ。カウントダウン: Tomorrow is finally New Year's Eve, and I want to inform you about the countdown event. The main event starts at 23:30. Don't forget to experience it!
translations.よう、オレだ。オレのメルマガに登録ありがとう。これからカノジョとの恋愛生活に役立: Hey, it's me. Thanks for subscribing to my newsletter. I'll be sending topics that will help you in your romantic life with your girlfriend, so keep an eye out. But remember, the most important thing is your feelings. Yes, your feelings. Well then, take care.
translations.よう、オレだ。今までのアドバイス、どうだった？役に立ったらうれしいけど、オレから: Hey, it's me. How was the advice so far？ I hope it helped, but that's all I can say. The rest is up to you. Keep doing your best from now on. See you!
translations.幼いあの人の夢を見た後、私はふたたび幼いあの人の夢を見るだろう。そこであの人の将:
After dreaming of that young
person, I will dream of them
again. In that dream, I will
be involved in their future...
I had such a dream. Dream
Chaser
translations.あの人と一緒に水着を買い、水辺で食事をとること２度。すると私はあの人と協力し、あ:
I bought swimsuits with that
person and had meals by the
water twice. Then I cooperated
with that person to face those
two... I had such a dream.
Dream Chaser
translations.現実の時が流れる世界でひとつの季節の間の話。あの人と山に出かけること３度、さらに:
A story during one season in
the world where time flows. I
went to the mountains with
that person three times and
enjoyed a movie full of
dreams. Then that person... I
had such a dream. Dream Chaser
translations.酢飯に魚介をのせた食事をとる。さらに現実の時が流れる世界であの人と水棲動物を鑑賞:
I had a meal with vinegared
rice and seafood.
Additionally, in the world
where time flows, I admired
aquatic animals with that
person. Then that person...
their legs... I had such a
dream. Dream Chaser
translations.あの人の住まいへ５度、現実の時が流れる世界で同じ季節にあの人と湯治場を訪れること:
I visited that person's home
five times and went to a hot
spring with them three times
in the same season. I kissed
that person twelve times at
the hot spring. Finally, I...
I had such a dream. Dream
Chaser
translations.あの日と共に、雲に隠れた鐘を打つ遊戯を行うこと３度。現実の時が流れる世界で激しい:
On that day, I played a game
of striking a bell hidden in
the clouds three times. In the
season when I watched a video
showing intense movements with
that person, they... I had
such a dream. Dream Chaser
translations.現実の時が流れる世界でひとつの季節の間の話。体を動かす施設へ一人で訪れること１０:
A story during one season in
the world where time flows. I
visited a physical activity
facility alone ten times and
with that person three times,
interacting with them three
times. I received guidance
from that person... I had such
a dream. Dream Chaser
translations.現実の時が流れる世界でひとつの季節の間の話。あの人とふたりで歌唱すること２度、海:
A story during one season in
the world where time flows. I
sang with that person twice
and visited a huge store near
the sea twice. That person...
I had such a dream. Dream
Chaser
translations.現実の時が流れる世界でひとつの季節の間の話。あの人と海を訪れること２度、植物を観:
A story during one season in
the world where time flows. I
visited the sea with that
person twice and admired
plants twice. That person and
I... without anyone
interrupting... I had such a
dream. Dream Chaser
translations.■■■カメラ情報■■■◙この度は当社のカメラをご購入いただき、ありがとうございま:
■■■Camera Info■■■ Thank you
for purchasing our camera. We

features of the camera from
now on. Enjoy your camera

translations.■■■カメラ情報■■■◙基本的な機能についてご紹介します。カメラはＲボタンで構え:
■■■Camera Info■■■ Let’s
introduce the basic functions.
You can hold the camera with
the R button. To stop holding
the camera, press and hold the
R button. You can zoom with
the slide pad.
translations.■■■カメラ情報■■■◙高度な操作についてご紹介します。カメラにはフォーカスポイ:
■■■Camera Info■■■ Let’s
introduce advanced operations.
The camera has a focus point,
and if it moves, the photo
will be blurry. To avoid
blurriness, you need to stop
for a moment.
translations.■■■カメラ情報■■■◙フィルター機能についてご紹介します。カメラでは様々な特殊:
■■■Camera Info■■■ Let’s
introduce the filter function.
You can apply various special
effects to your photos with
the camera. If you find a
filter you like, be sure to
check it out at your nearest
camera shop.
translations.■■■カメラ情報■■■◙ズーム機能についてご紹介します。レンズをご購入頂くと、ズ:
■■■Camera Info■■■ Let’s
introduce the zoom function.
By purchasing a lens, you can
increase the zoom
magnification.
translations.■■■カメラ情報■■■◙シャッター性能についてご紹介します。シャッター音を静音化:
■■■Camera Info■■■ Let’s
introduce shutter performance.
If you mute the shutter sound,
the subject will be less aware
of being photographed. This
allows for capturing more
natural expressions.
translations.■■■カメラ情報■■■◙視線についてご紹介します。視線効果をカメラに適応頂くと、:
■■■Camera Info■■■ Let’s
introduce gaze effects. By
applying gaze effects to the
camera, the subject will be
less conscious of the camera's
presence.
translations.■■■カメラ情報■■■◙音声認識についてご紹介します。◙撮影のアドバイスですが、:
■■■Camera Info■■■ Let’s
introduce voice recognition.
For shooting advice, try
talking to the subject in
scenes where you can speak to
them. Start with their name or
relaxing words.
translations.■■■カメラ情報■■■◙音声認識（その２）についてご紹介します。◙カノジョが撮影:
■■■Camera Info■■■ Let’s
introduce voice recognition
(part 2). Once your girlfriend
gets used to being
photographed,

new parts for the camera,

■■■Camera Info■■■ Introducing
new parts for the camera,
image stabilization.
translations.■■■カメラ情報■■■◙カメラ用新パーツ、大容量記憶カードについてご紹介します。:
■■■Camera Info■■■ Introducing
new parts for the camera,
high-capacity memory cards.
translations.■■■カメラ情報■■■◙カメラ用新パーツ、剛性ボディユニットについてご紹介します:
■■■Camera Info■■■ Introducing
new parts for the camera,

translations.■■■カメラ情報■■■◙カメラ用新パーツ、スペシャルフィルターについてご紹介しま:
■■■Camera Info■■■ Introducing
new parts for the camera,
special filters.
translations.■■■カメラ情報■■■◙カメラ用新パーツ、スペシャルレンズについてご紹介します。:

translations.■■■カメラ情報■■■◙カメラ用新パーツ、スペシャル手ぶれ補正についてご紹介しま:
■■■Camera Info■■■ Introducing

translations.■■■カメラ情報■■■◙カメラ用新パーツ、超大容量記録カードについてご紹介します:
■■■Camera Info■■■ Introducing

translations.■■■カメラ情報■■■◙カメラ用新パーツ、スペシャルボディユニット高性能レンズに:
■■■Camera Info■■■ Introducing

translations.今日連れて行ってくれたお店、いろんなゲームがあってわくわくしちゃった。わたしゲー: The store you took me to today was exciting with all the different games. I'm not very knowledgeable about games, so please teach me about them？
translations.この前連れて行ってくれたゲームセンター、楽しかったね。お家でするゲームとはぜんぜ: The arcade you took me to last time was fun. It's totally different from games at home, right？ I want to go again.
translations.前に行ったゲームセンター、楽しかったね。まだやってみたいゲームもあるし、今度ゲー: The arcade we went to before was fun. There are still games I want to try, so how about a date at the arcade next time？
translations.友達にゲームセンター好きの子がいて、この前ゲームの面白さを教えてくれたの。今度は: I have a friend who loves arcades, and they taught me about the fun of games last time. I want to try medal games next.
translations.この前見たメダルゲームの、ジャックポットっていうんだね。キラキラしてすごく感動し: The medal game I saw last time is called Jackpot. It was so shiny and impressive. I want to see the jackpots of other games too.
translations.■■■ＷＥＢ情報■■■◙ＷＥＢサイト、ＴＯＷＡＮＯ．ＮＥＴです。今後、お得な情報:
■■■WEB Info■■■ This is the
website, TOWANO.NET. We will
be introducing great deals in
the future.
translations.■■■ＷＥＢ情報■■■◙ＴＯＷＡＮＯ．ＮＥＴです。スポット情報をご紹介！今話題の:
■■■WEB Info■■■ This is
TOWANO.NET. We will introduce
spot information! The latest
popular date spot information
has been updated. Be sure to
check it out!
translations.■■■ＷＥＢ情報■■■◙ＴＯＷＡＮＯ．ＮＥＴです。イベント情報をご紹介！デートス:
■■■WEB Info■■■ This is
TOWANO.NET. We will introduce
event information! Event
information held at date spots
has been updated. Be sure to
check it out!
translations.▲主人公＊▲に紹介されて、いろんな人とお話するの、楽しい。もしいやじゃなかったら: ▲Protagonist＊▲ introduced me, and talking to various people is fun. If you don't mind, I’d like you to keep introducing me from now on. I'm your girlfriend, after all.
translations.▲主人公＊▲にカノジョとして紹介されるの、やっぱり緊張しちゃう。わたし、おかしな: Being introduced as the girlfriend of ▲Protagonist＊▲ makes me nervous. I hope I didn't say anything strange. I don't want to be seen as an embarrassing girlfriend, so I'll do my best!
translations.▲主人公＊▲って、周りに人がたくさんいるのね。やっぱりすごいな……。わたしはお友: ▲Protagonist＊▲ has a lot of people around. That's amazing... I don't have many friends, but my close friends ask about you.
translations.これまでいろんな人を紹介してもらったけど、やっぱり▲主人公＊▲が一番！……なんて: I've been introduced to various people, but of course, ▲the protagonist＊▲ is the best! ...Just saying.
translations.あなたのこと自慢しちゃった。ちょっとしゃべりすぎちゃったかもしれなくて……思い出: I bragged about you. I might have talked too much... I'm getting embarrassed just thinking about it.
translations.ねえ、お友達と名刺を交換したの？どんな人かな、わたしにも教えてね。: Hey, did you exchange business cards with your friends？ I want to know what they're like.
translations.ぱずるだまって対戦で遊ぶととっても楽しいね。もっと上達して、たくさん連鎖させてみ: Playing Puzzle Ball in competition is really fun. I want to improve and create lots of combos.
translations.写真を撮ったから送るね。いっしょに写ってるのは▲ＨＮ＊＊＊＊▲さんのカノジョさん: I took a photo, so I'll send it to you. The person in it is ▲HN＊＊＊＊▲'s girlfriend.
translations.▲ＨＮ＊＊＊＊▲さんのカノジョさんと一緒に撮った写真です。もうすっかり仲良しだよ: Here's a photo with ▲HN＊＊＊＊▲'s girlfriend. We're already good friends.
translations.▲ＨＮ＊＊＊＊▲さんのカノジョさんとお料理の話で盛り上がったの。それで一緒に作っ: I had a great chat about cooking with ▲HN＊＊＊＊▲'s girlfriend. So we tried making something together. It turned out delicious!
translations.朝のお散歩のときに写真を撮ったの。あなたにも見せたくなって。: I took a photo during my morning walk. I wanted to show it to you.
translations.今日は時間があったから１人でお出かけです。: I had some free time today, so I went out alone.
translations.予定もないから、街を散策してました。一人で夕方の街を歩くのって、なんだか寂しいな: I had no plans, so I was wandering around the city. Walking alone in the evening feels a bit lonely.
translations.お買い物に来てます。たまには一人で、ね。: I'm out shopping. Sometimes it's nice to be alone.
translations.今日のわたしを１枚♪: Here's a picture of me today♪
translations.試しに髪を変えてみたの。こんな髪型どうかな？: I tried changing my hairstyle. How does this look？
translations.やった♪◙それじゃあこの髪型でデートに行こうかな。:
Yay♪ Well then, should I go
on a date with this hairstyle？
translations.それじゃあこっちにするね。どんな洋服が似合うかな。: Then I'll go with this one. I wonder what kind of clothes would suit it.
translations.わたしもそう思ってたの。じゃあさっきの髪型にするね。: I was thinking the same thing. I'll go with the hairstyle from earlier.
translations.そっか。じゃあデートの日まで考えておくね。: I see. Then I'll think about it until the date.
translations.お洋服を試着中なんだけど、この服どうかなあ？: I'm trying on clothes, but how does this outfit look？
translations.ホントに？じゃあ買っちゃおうかな。デートに着ていくから、楽しみにしててね▼: Really？ Then maybe I'll buy it. I'm looking forward to wearing it on our date▼.
translations.写真送ってみてよかった。じゃあこの服は買わないでおこっと。: I'm glad I sent the photo. Then I'll skip buying this outfit.
