translations.記念日、忘れてないよね？夕方は空けておいてほしいな。: You haven't forgotten our anniversary, right？ I hope you can keep the evening free.
translations.今日は楽しかった。あなたはどうだった？: I had fun today. How about you？
translations.誕生日の夜、時間空けておいてね。約束よ。: Keep the evening free for my birthday, okay？ It's a promise.
translations.あらためて言うね、お誕生日おめでとう！: Let me say it again, happy birthday!
translations.今日はありがとう。すごく嬉しかったよ。来年の誕生日も一緒にすごせたらいいな▼: Thank you for today. I was really happy. I hope we can spend next year's birthday together too▼.
translations.短冊に書く願い事、ちゃんと考えた？: Have you thought about your wish to write on the tanzaku？
translations.願い事、叶うといいね♪: I hope your wish comes true♪
translations.今頃、織姫と彦星もいっしょにいるのかな。: I wonder if Orihime and Hikoboshi are together right now.
translations.週末は十羽野祭りだよ。一緒に行かない？: The Juhano Festival is this weekend. Want to go together？
translations.週末のお祭り、楽しみね♪: I'm looking forward to the festival this weekend♪
translations.今日着ていく浴衣の写真。似合ってるかな？: Here's a photo of the yukata I'm wearing today. Does it suit me？
translations.花火、いよいよだね、楽しみ♪: The fireworks are finally here, I'm excited♪
translations.今日は花火大会の日だよ。: Today is the day of the fireworks festival.
translations.体育祭はお互いにがんばろうね！: Let's both do our best at the sports festival!
translations.まさかと思うけど、忘れてない？今日は体育祭よ。: I can't believe it, but you haven't forgotten？ It's the sports festival today.
translations.今日は疲れたね。でも楽しかった♪: I'm tired today, but it was fun♪
translations.ハロウィンパーティ、楽しみね。: I'm looking forward to the Halloween party.
translations.ちゃんと準備してる？パーティに遅れちゃダメよ。: Are you preparing properly？ You can't be late for the party.
translations.ハロウィン楽しかったね。こういうイベントもいいかも。: Halloween was fun. Events like this are nice too.
translations.いよいよ文化祭ね。がんばろ♪: The culture festival is finally here. Let's do our best♪
translations.おはよう。気持ちのいい朝だから、楽しい文化祭になりそうね。じゃあ学校で♪: Good morning. It's a nice morning, so it seems like the culture festival will be fun. See you at school♪
translations.今日は楽しかったね。でも文化祭の後って、ちょっと寂しい気持ちになるよね。: Today was fun. But after the culture festival, I feel a bit lonely.
translations.商店街でクリスマスの飾り付けが始まってるよ。今年のクリスマスは一緒にいようね。: The shopping district has started decorating for Christmas. Let's spend this Christmas together.
translations.ご近所のクリスマスイルミネーションがキレイなの。そろそろクリスマスツリーを出そう: The Christmas lights in the neighborhood are beautiful. I think it's time to bring out the Christmas tree.
translations.クリスマスイブ、とっても楽しみ♪: I'm really looking forward to Christmas Eve♪
translations.今日はクリスマスイブだよ。覚えてる？: Today is Christmas Eve. Do you remember？
translations.クリスマスに好きな人と過ごせるって、いいよね。今日は楽しかったな♪: Spending Christmas with someone you like is nice, right？ I had fun today♪
translations.あのね、渡したいものがあるの。: You know, I have something I want to give you.
translations.あけましておめでとうございます。今年もよろしくね♪◙今から初詣に行かない？:
Happy New Year! Let's have a
great year together♪ How about
going to the first shrine
visit now？
translations.あらためて、今年もよろしくおねがいします！: Once again, I look forward to this year!
translations.遠足♪なんだかウキウキしちゃうな。: Field trip♪ I'm feeling so excited.
translations.おはよう。今日は遠足よ。じゃあ学校でね。: Good morning. Today is the field trip. See you at school.
translations.今日の遠足、楽しかったね。いつものデートとはちょっと違うもんね。: Today's field trip was fun. It's a bit different from our usual dates.
translations.プール開き、あなたも楽しみにしてる？: Are you looking forward to the pool opening too？
translations.今日はプール開きだよ。夏って感じがするよね。: Today is the pool opening. It feels like summer.
translations.今日は付き合ってくれてありがとう。せっかくあたらしい水着を買ったんだし、海やプー: Thanks for spending the day with me. Since I bought a new swimsuit, let's go to the beach or pool too.
translations.もう食べてくれた？来年はどうしようかな……なんて。: Have you eaten it yet？ I wonder what to do next year...
translations.ちゃんと用意してるから安心してね。渡したいんだけど、会えるかな。: I'm preparing it properly, so don't worry. I want to give it to you, but will we be able to meet？
translations.わたしのほうから言うのはおかしいかもしれないけど、もし忘れてたらいけないから……: It might be strange for me to say this, but just in case you forgot... um, do you remember tomorrow？
translations.今日はすごく思い出に残るホワイトデーになったよ。プレゼントありがとう。: Today was a really memorable White Day. Thank you for the gift.
translations.今日は楽しかったね。お相撲さんに会えてよかった。: Today was fun. I'm glad we got to meet a sumo wrestler.
translations.うん、楽しみね。: Yeah, I'm looking forward to it.
translations.いい一日になりそうね。それじゃあ後でね。: It seems like it's going to be a nice day. See you later.
translations.じゃあ、忘れないように予定に入れておいてね。: Then, make sure to put it in your schedule so you don't forget.
translations.ほんとに。お疲れさまでした。: Really. Thank you for your hard work.
translations.わたしも同じこと考えてたよ。: I was thinking the same thing.
translations.そうね、一緒にいれば素敵なことがたくさん起こるよ。: Yeah, wonderful things happen when we're together.
translations.こういうのを言い合える関係って幸せね。: It's nice to have a relationship where we can say things like this.
translations.同じ本をいっしょに読むのって、なんだかわくわくするね。: Reading the same book together is exciting.
translations.赤毛のアン。寝るまえに少し読み進めておこうかな。今日中に同じところまで読もっと。: Anne of Green Gables. I think I'll read a bit before bed. I want to catch up to the same part today.
translations.最近一緒に読書してないよね、わたし続きが気になるんだけど……。: We haven't read together lately, and I'm curious about the continuation...
translations.読書の話。もう締め切りまであまり日がないよ。大丈夫？: About reading. There's not much time left until the deadline. Are you okay？
translations.赤毛のアンを一緒に読むの、楽しかったね♪学校のみんなも、あの書評をみて赤毛のアン: Reading Anne of Green Gables together was fun♪ I hope everyone at school gets interested in it after seeing that book review.
translations.今度はあなたがオススメの本を読んでみたいな。: Next time, I want to read a book you recommend.
translations.料理は経験だものね、いろいろ作るからこれからも試食をお願いね。: Cooking is all about experience, so I'll be making various dishes, so please keep tasting them.
translations.今は和食に凝ってるかな。: Right now, I'm into Japanese cuisine.
translations.今は中華に凝ってるかな。: Right now, I'm into Chinese cuisine.
translations.今は洋食に凝ってるかな。: Right now, I'm into Western cuisine.
translations.今はいろいろな料理にチャレンジ中だよ。: I'm currently trying out various dishes.
translations.今は特にお菓子作りに凝ってるかな。: Right now, I'm especially into making sweets.
translations.いろいろお勉強してるから、どんなものでも美味しく作れると思うよ: I'm studying a lot, so I think I can make anything delicious.
translations.和食がちょっと苦手かな？この前大失敗してから自信持てなくて……。: Are you a bit bad at Japanese cuisine？ I lost confidence after a big failure the other day...
translations.中華がちょっと苦手かな？この前大失敗してから自信持てなくて……。: Are you a bit bad at Chinese cuisine？ I lost confidence after a big failure the other day...
translations.洋食がちょっと苦手かな？この前大失敗してから自信持てなくて……。: Are you a bit bad at Western cuisine？ I lost confidence after a big failure the other day...
translations.最近ちょっとお料理がスランプ気味なの。: I've been in a bit of a cooking slump lately.
translations.お菓子作りがちょっと苦手かな？この前大失敗してから自信持てなくて……。: Are you a bit bad at making sweets？ I lost confidence after a big failure the other day...
translations.プレゼントのリサーチ？そうね、かわいい感じのものがいいな。: Gift research？ Well, I want something cute.
translations.プレゼントのリサーチ？そうね、清楚な感じのものがいいな。: Gift research？ Well, I want something elegant.
translations.プレゼントのリサーチ？そうね、カジュアルな感じのものがいいな。: Gift research？ Well, I want something casual.
translations.プレゼントのリサーチ？自分で考えてくれたものをプレゼントしてくれるのが嬉しいな。: Gift research？ I'm happy if you give me something you thought of yourself.
translations.プレゼント？秘密♪私が好きだと思うものを考えてみて▼: Gift？ It's a secret♪ Think of something you think I would like▼
translations.高嶺ちゃんの趣味……そうだな、最近は寒色系のものをチェックしてるみたいだぞ。: Takane's hobbies... well, it seems she's been checking out cool colors lately.
translations.高嶺ちゃんの趣味……そうだな、最近は暖色系のものをチェックしてるみたいだぞ。: Takane's hobby... well, it seems she's been checking out warm-colored things lately.
translations.高嶺ちゃんへのプレゼント？んーちょっと今データ不足なんだよ。悪いな。: A gift for Takane？ Hmm, I'm a bit short on data right now. Sorry.
translations.高嶺の趣味？そうね、最近は寒色系のものをチェックしてるかな。: Takane's hobby？ Well, it seems she's been checking out cool-colored things lately.
translations.高嶺の趣味？そうね、最近は暖色系のものをチェックしてるかな。: Takane's hobby？ Well, it seems she's been checking out warm-colored things lately.
translations.高嶺へのプレゼント？いきなり言われても、よくわかんないよ。: A gift for Takane？ I don't really know what to say if you ask me suddenly.
translations.彼女へのプレゼント？よくわからないけど、俺の趣味としてはかわいい系のものがいいと: A gift for my girlfriend？ I’m not sure, but I think something cute would be nice.
translations.彼女へのプレゼント？よくわからないけど、俺の趣味としては清楚系のものがいいと思う: A gift for my girlfriend？ I’m not sure, but I think something elegant would be nice.
translations.彼女へのプレゼント？よくわからないけど、俺の趣味としてはカジュアル系のものがいい: A gift for my girlfriend？ I’m not sure, but I think something casual would be nice.
translations.カノジョへのプレゼント？あんまり詳しくないけど、アタシだったらかわいい系のものを: A gift for my girlfriend？ I’m not very knowledgeable, but if it were me, I’d give something cute.
translations.カノジョへのプレゼント？あんまり詳しくないけど、アタシだったら清楚系のものをプレ: A gift for my girlfriend？ I’m not very knowledgeable, but if it were me, I’d give something elegant.
translations.カノジョへのプレゼント？あんまり詳しくないけど、アタシだったらカジュアル系のもの: A gift for my girlfriend？ I’m not very knowledgeable, but if it were me, I’d give something casual.
translations.カノジョにプレゼント？なんでアタシに聞くのかわかんないけど。しょうがないから相談: A gift for my girlfriend？ I don’t know why you’re asking me, but I’ll help you out.
translations.彼女へのプレゼント？会ったことないからわからないけど、かわいらしい感じのプレゼン: A gift for my girlfriend？ I don’t know her, but something cute might be good.
translations.彼女へのプレゼント？会ったことないからわからないけど、清楚な感じのプレゼントがい: A gift for my girlfriend？ I don’t know her, but something elegant might be good.
translations.彼女へのプレゼント？会ったことないからわからないけど、カジュアルな感じのプレゼン: A gift for my girlfriend？ I don’t know her, but something casual might be good.
translations.カノジョへのプレゼントね。そうだなあ、私のイメージだと、クールな色が似合うんじゃ: A gift for my girlfriend, huh？ Well, I think cool colors would suit her.
translations.カノジョへのプレゼントね。そうだなあ、私のイメージだと、あったかい色が似合うんじ: A gift for my girlfriend, huh？ Well, I think warm colors would suit her.
translations.カノジョへのプレゼントね。最近ちゃんとカレシらしい事をしてあげてる？やさしさを表: A gift for my girlfriend, huh？ Have you been doing boyfriend-like things lately？ How about giving her something warm to express your kindness？
translations.カノジョへのプレゼント？かわいい後輩の頼みだし、いいよ。相談に乗ってあげる。: A gift for my girlfriend？ Since it's a cute junior asking, sure. I'll help you out.
translations.アクセサリーに凝ってみようと思うんだけど、どんなアクセサリーが好き？: I’m thinking of getting into accessories. What kind of accessories do you like？
translations.帽子が好きなんだ。じゃあ、帽子をかぶるようにしてみようかな？: I like hats. So, should I try wearing a hat？
translations.メガネが好きなんだ。わたしにはどんなメガネが似合うかな？: I like glasses. What kind of glasses would suit me？
translations.指輪が好きなんだ。私に似合う指輪って、どんな感じのなんだろ。: I like rings. What kind of ring do you think would suit me？
translations.▲主人公＊▲からもらったこの指輪、右手と左手どっちにつけるのがいいと思う？: This ring I got from ▲主人公＊▲, which hand do you think I should wear it on？
translations.やっぱりそっちのほうかな。じゃあそうするね。: I guess that one would be better. Okay, I’ll do that.
translations.ねえ、この前のデートでかぶってた帽子、似合ってたかな？: Hey, did I look good in the hat I wore on our last date？
translations.やった♪それじゃデートの時は帽子をかぶるようにするね。: Yay♪ Then I’ll wear a hat on our dates.
translations.そっかあ、帽子はちょっと控えようかな: I see, maybe I should tone down the hat.
translations.こんなに何度も旅行できる◙なんて夢にも思わなかった。◙すごくうれしい。:
I never thought I could
travel this many times .
I'm really happy.
translations.これで何回目かな？◙また、たくさん思い出作りが◙できるね。:
How many times is this？ We
can make a lot of memories
again.
translations.ふふ、すごいね。◙じゃあ、そのうち海外旅行◙にもいけるのかな。:
Hehe, that's amazing. I
wonder if we can go on
an overseas trip
someday.
translations.そうだね。◙何度でも行きたいね。◙おばあちゃんになっても◙連れてってくれる？◙な:
Yeah. I want to go as
many times as
possible. Will you
take me even when I'm
a grandma？ Just
kidding.
translations.今回の旅行に持って◙いく物決めた？◙旅行準備って◙何度行ってもなれないな。:
Have you decided what to
bring on this trip？ No
matter how many times I
go, I never get used to
packing.
translations.ふふ、旅行にたくさん◙行ったからそういうのって◙自然にできちゃうよね。:
Hehe, since I've
traveled a lot, I can
do that naturally.
translations.それってどんな荷物？◙もしかして夫婦箸とか、夫婦茶碗とか……。:
What kind of luggage is that？
Maybe couple chopsticks or
couple tea bowls...？
translations.旅行当日までのワクワク感っていいよね。◙当日はもっと楽しいんだ◙と思うとさらに楽:
The excitement leading up to
the travel day is nice.
Thinking that the actual day
will be even more fun makes me
even happier.
translations.今度の旅行もきっと◙楽しい思い出がたくさん◙できるんだろうな。◙:
I'm sure this trip
will create a lot of
wonderful memories .
translations.もう。◙こんなときだけ子供◙扱いして。◙でも、この気持ちは◙いつまでたっても◙変:
Geez. Only at
times like this do
you treat me like
a kid. But this
feeling will never
change.
translations.あのね。◙箱根旅行で一番楽しみに◙してることってある？:
You know, is there
something you're
really looking forward
to on the Hakone trip？
translations.そうだよね。◙見てまわるところたくさんあるし、今から楽しみ。:
That's right. There are so
many places to see, and I'm
excited already.
translations.きれいな所がたくさん◙あるんだよね。◙素敵な思い出の◙アルバムができそうね。:
There are so many
beautiful places. It
looks like we’ll
create a wonderful
memory album.
translations.えっと……◙不束者ですが、◙よろしくお願いします。◙なんて。:
Um... I’m not very
good at this, but
please take care of
me.
translations.なんだか、新婚旅行の◙前日とか思ったら◙眠れなくなっちゃった。:
I feel like I can't
sleep thinking it's
the night before our
honeymoon.
translations.わたしが意識しすぎ◙なのかな？◙明日遅れないように◙がんばって寝るね。:
Am I being too
conscious？ I’ll
try to sleep so I
won’t be late
tomorrow.
translations.わたし達高校生なのに◙なんかおかしな気分。◙でも、いつかは……◙ううん、なんでも:
Even though we’re high
school students, it
feels kind of strange.
But someday... no,
never mind. Good
night.
translations.今日の旅行は、今までの◙中で一番楽しかったかも。◙でも、次も行ったら、今日◙以上:
Today’s trip might have
been the most fun so far.
But if we go again, I’ll
probably think it’s even
more fun than today.
translations.何度行っても◙▲主人公＊▲と一緒に◙見る景色は新鮮に見えて、◙どれも思い出深くな:
No matter how many times
I go, the scenery with
▲主人公＊▲ feels fresh, and
each one becomes a
cherished memory. I’m
really happy. Thank you
for taking me.
translations.まだまだこれから先も◙たくさん、あなたと色々な場所を旅したい。◙そうやってずっと:
I want to travel to many more
places with you in the future.
I want to keep creating
memories like that.
translations.ふたりでいると夜がすごく◙長く感じて、いつまでも◙このままでいられたらな、◙なん:
When we're together, the
nights feel so long, and
I thought how nice it
would be to stay like
this forever. Thank you
for such a happy time.
translations.ハネムーンはまだ先の◙ことかもしれないけど、◙色々な初めてをあなたと◙一緒に体験:
The honeymoon might still
be a while away, but I
want to experience various
firsts with you.
translations.もう旅行から帰って◙きちゃったんだなと思うと◙なんだかさびしい。◙もっと長く一緒:
It's kind of lonely
thinking that we've
already returned from
the trip.
translations.ねぇ。◙いつかは、一緒にご飯を◙食べて、一緒に遊んで、◙一緒に横になるっていうの:
Hey, I wonder if there
will come a day when
it feels normal to eat
together, play
together, and lie down
together.
translations.旅行のときの写真見てたら◙色々思い出して眠れなく◙なっちゃった。◙おかしいでしょ:
I couldn't sleep because
I was looking at photos
from the trip and
remembering various
things.
translations.あのね、旅行から帰ってきて◙ふたりでホームに立ったとき◙に思ったの。◙一緒のおう:
You know, when we stood
at home after returning
from the trip, I thought
about how happy it would
be to go home together.
translations.旅行楽しかったね。◙これからも▲主人公＊▲と◙色んなところに行きたいな。◙よろし:
The trip was fun. I
want to go to various
places with ▲主人公＊▲
from now on. Thank
you, husband.
translations.新しいお洋服買っちゃった。今度のデートで着ていこうな？: I bought a new outfit. Let's wear it on our next date, okay？
translations.学校のカーディガンって、どう思う？: What do you think about a school cardigan？
translations.そうだよね。イメージも変わるし、かわいいよね。: That's right. It changes the image, and it's cute.
translations.そうなんだ。わかった、それなら着ないようにしようかな。: I see. If that's the case, maybe I won't wear it.
translations.わたしの髪の長さってどう？このままがいいのかな？: How's the length of my hair？ Is it good as it is？
translations.そっか、似合ってるんだね。よかった。: I see, it suits me. I'm glad.
translations.そうなんだ。うーん、考えてみようかな。: I see. Hmm, maybe I'll think about it.
translations.ねえ、髪のイメージを変えてみようかと思うんだけど、どうかな？: Hey, I'm thinking about changing my hair image. What do you think？
translations.今より明るいイメージにするのと暗いイメージにするの、どうかな？: How about making it brighter or darker than now？
translations.そうね、じゃあ少し明るい感じにしてみる。: Okay, then I'll try to make it a bit brighter.
translations.そうね、じゃあ少し暗い感じにしてみようかな。: Alright, then I'll try to make it a bit darker.
translations.色の濃さかぁ。どんな感じが好き？: The color depth, huh？ What kind do you like？
translations.そっか、じゃあ少しだけ濃くしてみようかな？: I see, then maybe I'll try to make it a little darker？
translations.そっか、じゃあ少しだけ薄くしてみようかな？: I see, then maybe I'll try to make it a little lighter？
translations.わかった、じゃあ今のままにしておくね。: Got it, then I'll leave it as it is.
translations.イメージチェンジで髪の色を変えてみようかと考えてるんだけど、どう思う？: I'm thinking about changing my hair color for a change. What do you think？
translations.そうなんだ。じゃあそうするね。: I see. Then I'll do that.
translations.ちょっとだけね、どんな感じがいいかな？: Just a little, what kind do you think would be good？
translations.いい感じ？ふふ、どういう色がいいかなあ？: How does it feel？ Hehe, what color do you think would be nice？
translations.ちょっと試してみたい色があったの。近いうちにやってみようかな。: I had a color I wanted to try. I might do it soon.
translations.うん、じゃあ思い切って変えてみる。 どんな色がいいかなあ？: Yeah, then I'll boldly change it. What color do you think would be nice？
translations.いい感じね。雑誌とかを見て、どんなのが似合うか考えてくるわ。: Sounds good. I'll look at magazines and think about what suits me.
translations.じゃあ考えてた色があるから、その色にしてみようかな。: Then I have a color in mind, so I think I'll try that.
translations.出会ったとき？そうね、あなたと付き合い始めたころの髪に戻してみようかな。: When we first met？ I think I'll go back to the hair I had when we started dating.
translations.そうね、ちょっとくらい変えてみようかな。: Yeah, I think I'll change it a little.
translations.明日は部活あるから、一緒にがんばろうね。: We have club activities tomorrow, so let's do our best together.
translations.明日はバイトの日だったっけ？がんばってね。: Was tomorrow a work day？ Good luck.
translations.明日は委員会だったよね。: Tomorrow is the committee meeting, right？
translations.今日、部活に来なかったね、もしかして忘れてた？: You didn't come to club today. Did you forget？
translations.もしかして、今日の委員会休んだ？: Did you skip today's committee meeting？
translations.ねえ、アルバイトにちゃんと行ってる？: Hey, are you going to your part-time job properly？
translations.部活全然顔出さないね。さびしいよ。: You haven't shown up to club at all. It's lonely.
translations.最近、委員会に出てないって噂を聞いたんだけど、ちゃんと行ってる？: I heard rumors that you haven't been attending the committee lately. Are you going？
translations.しばらくアルバイトに行ってないんじゃないの？大丈夫？: Haven't you been to your part-time job for a while？ Are you okay？
translations.明日の部活にはちゃんと来てね。: Make sure to come to club tomorrow.
translations.明日はバイトの日だよ。ちゃんと遅れずに来てね。: Tomorrow is a work day. Make sure to come on time.
translations.委員会、ちゃんと出席するように。: Make sure to attend the committee.
translations.今日はどうした？休まれると困るんだから気をつけてくれ。: What's wrong today？ It would be a problem if you take a day off, so be careful.
translations.お前全然来ないな？ちょっと印象悪いぞ？: You haven't come at all, have you？ It's leaving a bad impression.
translations.今日部活だったけどどうした？: You had club today, but what happened？
translations.今日委員会なのもしかして忘れてたか？: Is today the committee meeting？ Did you forget？
translations.お前全然来ないな。ちょっと印象悪いぞ？: You haven't come at all. It's leaving a bad impression.
translations.パパが普段身に付けてる物がいいかな。少し観察してみる。: Maybe something that Dad usually wears would be good. I'll observe a bit.
translations.そうね。そういうのもありなのかな。: I see. I guess that's an option.
translations.そう？じゃあ期待しちゃおうかな。: Really？ Then I might get my hopes up.
translations.おはよう、今日よろしくね: Good morning, looking forward to today.
translations.試作品を作ったから、中庭で待ってます。: I made a prototype, so I'll be waiting in the courtyard.
translations.試作品を作ったから、教室で待ってます。: I made a prototype, so I'll be waiting in the classroom.
translations.試作品を作ったから、屋上で待ってます。: I made a prototype, so I'll be waiting on the rooftop.
translations.いつもありがとう。待ってるね。: Thank you as always. I'll be waiting.
translations.高嶺です、メールって楽しいかも。これからもメールするね。: This is Takane, emails might be fun. I'll keep emailing you.
translations.高嶺です、こんなにたくさんお話する男の子って▲主人公＊▲が初めてかもしれない。: This is Takane, I might be the first boy to talk this much with ▲主人公＊▲.
translations.わたしたち、だいぶ仲良くなれた気がするよね。: I feel like we've gotten pretty close.
translations.あのね、わたしたちってなかよしになれた、よね？そう思ってるのわたしだけじゃないと: You know, we’ve become friends, right？ I hope I'm not the only one who thinks so.
translations.そうだよ。だからこれからもよろしくね。: That's right. So let's keep it up.
translations.なんか活躍したらしいな。その調子でいけば、女の子の人気もあがるかもな。: I heard you did well. If you keep it up, you might get popular with the girls.
translations.なんか失敗したって？ まあ気にすんな。挽回すればいいだろ。: Heard you messed up？ Well, don't worry about it. You can make a comeback.
translations.けっこう活躍したらしいな。その調子でいけば、女の子の人気もぐっとあがるかもな。: I heard you did pretty well. If you keep it up, you might really get popular with the girls.
translations.失敗したって？ 気にすんな、まだ取り戻せるって。: Heard you messed up？ Don't worry, you can still recover.
translations.大活躍だったらしいな。その調子でいけば、女の子にモテモテかもな！: I heard you did great! If you keep it up, you might be a hit with the girls!
translations.大失敗したって？ まあ……そういうこともあるだろ。: Heard you had a big failure？ Well... that happens.
translations.おはよう。もう起きてた？: Good morning. Are you awake yet？
translations.おはよう。朝ごはん何食べた？: Good morning. What did you have for breakfast？
translations.おはよう。さわやかな朝だね。: Good morning. It's a refreshing morning.
translations.カノジョと仲良くしてる？: Are you getting along with your girlfriend？
translations.図書館に行こうかな。: I think I'll go to the library.
translations.最近どんな本を読んだの？: What kind of books have you read recently？
translations.オススメのＣＤある？: Do you have any recommended CDs？
translations.今日は早く寝ます。: I'm going to bed early today.
translations.そんなこと言っちゃダメだよ。: You shouldn't say things like that.
translations.下ろしてるのに決まってる: Of course I'm letting it down.
translations.つけてつけて！: Put it on, put it on!
translations.さあ、めんどくさいだろ: Come on, it's a hassle, right？
translations.ああ、できるといいな: Ah, I hope I can do it
translations.一人も悪くないって: Not a single person is bad
translations.●たちなら、大丈夫: If it's ● and the others, it's fine
translations.いいかもな、行ってみたい: That could be good, I want to try it
translations.任せとけ、バッチリ！: Leave it to me, I'll nail it!
translations.埋め合わせするから: I'll make it up to you.
translations.そう？ イメージ違うな: Really？ That's not the image I had.
translations.今のままがいい: I like it as it is
translations.濃さを変えてみたら？: What if you change the intensity？
translations.出会ったときの色がいい: The color when we met is nice.
translations.何度でも: As many times as you want.
translations.▲主人公＊▲の◙いない教室って退屈:
A classroom
without ▲主人公＊▲ is
boring.
translations.▲主人公＊▲が◙同学年だったら、◙宿題見せてもらえるのに:
If ▲主人公＊▲ was in the
same grade, I could
show you my homework.
translations.ちょっと仕事で◙ミスしちゃった。◙▲主人公＊▲が◙隣にいたら、フォロー◙してもら:
I made a mistake at
work. If ▲主人公＊▲ was
next to me, I could
get some help.
translations.秋の夕暮れってさ、◙詩的だよね。◙▲主人公＊▲には◙難しいかもしんないけど:
Autumn evenings are
poetic, but it might
be hard for ▲主人公＊▲.
translations.やっぱ◙自分の部屋が落ち着く。◙▲主人公＊▲の隣の◙次くらいには:
After all, my own room
is relaxing. Next to
▲主人公＊▲ would be nice.
translations.▲主人公＊▲！◙だ～いすき▼◙◙なんてメール送る女って、◙どうかと思うよね:
▲主人公＊▲! I love you so
much! Sending a
message like that is a
bit much, right？
translations.▲主人公＊▲が◙風邪ひいて◙▲凛▲に◙うつされたら◙たまんないからさ、◙ちゃんと:
If ▲主人公＊▲ catches a
cold from ▲凛▲, that
would be terrible, so
make sure to stay warm
and sleep well. Good
night.
translations.▲主人公＊▲って、◙休みは家で何してんの？:
What does ▲主人公＊▲ do at
home on days off？
translations.休みの日はさ、◙ぼけーーっと◙過ごすのが一番。◙ただ、▲主人公＊▲◙とのデートは:
On days off, just
relaxing is the best.
But dates with ▲主人公＊▲
are special.
translations.お父さん、今日も◙仕事だったんだよね。◙一家を養うのも大変だね、◙▲主人公＊▲は:
Dad worked again
today. Supporting the
family is tough, is
▲主人公＊▲ going to be
okay in the future？
translations.▲主人公＊▲が一人で◙部屋にいるときってさ、◙やっぱ▲凛▲の◙こと考えたりする？:
When ▲主人公＊▲ is alone
in the room, do you
think about ▲凛▲？
translations.▲主人公＊▲の◙おかげでさ、◙これでも◙▲凛▲は◙毎日幸せだよ。◙ありがと:
Thanks to ▲主人公＊▲,
▲凛▲ is happy every
day. Thank you.
translations.▲凛▲も、◙ちょうど▲主人公＊▲◙とデートしたいって◙思ってたとこ。◙わかってん:
▲凛▲ was just
thinking about
wanting to go on a
date with ▲主人公＊▲.
You understand.
translations.デートのことばっか考えて◙る自分がイヤんなる。◙▲主人公＊▲のせい:
I hate that I keep
thinking about dates.
It's because of ▲主人公＊▲.
translations.▲凛▲もさ、◙▲主人公＊▲のこと◙大好きだから、◙デートしたいと思ってる。◙そう:
▲凛▲ also loves ▲主人公＊▲,
so I want to go on a
date. That's how it
is.
translations.授業中にあてられると◙焦るよね。◙▲主人公＊▲も◙普段から準備しといたら？:
It's stressful when
called on in class.
▲主人公＊▲ should prepare
regularly.
translations.なんかさ、◙結構耳に入ってくる。◙上級生の評判って◙やつがさ。◙▲主人公＊▲も◙:
I keep hearing about
it. The reputation
of upperclassmen.
▲主人公＊▲ should be
careful.
translations.なんかよく先生に◙怒られるんだけどさ、◙▲主人公＊▲は◙そんなことない？◙気をつ:
I often get scolded
by teachers, but
doesn't that happen
to ▲主人公＊▲？ Be
careful.
translations.マッチョはイヤだけどさ。◙荷物をチョコチョコ◙運ぶような貧弱な男は◙カッコ悪いよ:
I don't like muscular
guys, but weak guys
who carry things
around are uncool. I
think ▲主人公＊▲ is fine,
though.
translations.期末テストってさ、◙空気読めてないよね。◙あれがなきゃ、◙もっと休みが◙楽しみな:
Final exams are really
out of touch. Without
them, I'd enjoy my
break more. Just do
your best casually,
▲主人公＊▲.
translations.おはよ！◙▲主人公＊▲の◙メールで◙目が覚めるのってさ、◙気分いいね:
Good morning! Waking
up to ▲主人公＊▲'s email
feels nice.
translations.おはよ。◙▲主人公＊▲も◙ずいぶん不規則な◙生活してんじゃん:
Good morning.
▲主人公＊▲ has quite
an irregular
lifestyle, huh？
translations.委員会だけど、サボって◙▲主人公＊▲と一緒に◙いれば良かった。退屈:
It's a committee, but
I wish I could skip
and be with ▲主人公＊▲.
It's boring.
translations.今のメールで起きた。◙別に責めてる◙わけじゃなくて、◙▲主人公＊▲はまだ◙寝なく:
I just woke up from
your email. I'm not
blaming you, but is
▲主人公＊▲ still okay to
be awake？
translations.今食事中だったけど、◙▲凛▲の◙部屋に来ちゃった。◙だって▲主人公＊▲◙からのメ:
I was eating, but I
ended up in ▲Rinko's▲
room. It's because
reading emails from
▲Protagonist＊▲ makes
me smile.
translations.▲凛▲は◙勉強中。◙▲主人公＊▲は◙宿題終わった？:
▲Rinko▲ is
studying. Has
▲Protagonist＊▲
finished the
homework？
translations.舞い上がってるみたいで◙恥ずかしいけどさ。◙今日のデート、◙すごくドキドキした。:
I feel embarrassed,
but I was really
excited about today's
date. I know
▲Protagonist＊▲ felt
the same.
translations.こう、一緒に楽しめた◙感じがよかったよね、◙今日のデート。◙▲主人公＊▲が◙楽し:
It felt nice to
enjoy today’s date
together. I could
tell ▲Protagonist＊▲
was having fun too.
translations.今日のデートは◙かなりアレだったけど、◙▲主人公＊▲が◙できるヤツだってのは◙わ:
Today's date was quite
something, but I know
▲Protagonist＊▲ is
capable. Looking
forward to next time.
translations.なんか、◙もう、ヤバいかも。◙▲主人公＊▲との◙キス……:
I think I might be
in trouble. A kiss
with
▲Protagonist＊▲...
translations.やっぱさ、◙▲主人公＊▲と◙一緒にいるのが一番いい。◙一番幸せ:
Being with
▲Protagonist＊▲ is the
best. It's the
happiest.
translations.わかってると思うけど、◙あんな格好見せるの、◙好きな相手にだけだから。◙▲主人公:
I think you know, but
I only show that kind
of outfit to someone I
like. I only show it
to ▲Protagonist＊▲.
translations.いっとくけど、◙あぁいう格好するのすごく◙恥ずかしいんだから。◙▲主人公＊▲は◙:
Just so you know,
wearing that kind of
outfit is really
embarrassing.
▲Protagonist＊▲ is really
lucky.
translations.▲主人公＊▲はさ、◙ずっと▲凛▲の◙隣にいてくれるよね。◙前も言ってくれたけど、:
▲Protagonist＊▲ will
always be by ▲Rinko's▲
side, right？ You said
that before, but I
want to confirm.
translations.音楽に本に、他にも色々。◙▲凛▲には◙好きなもの◙たくさんあるのに、◙最近は▲主:
Music, books, and many
other things. ▲Rinko▲
has a lot of
favorites, but lately
it's all about
▲Protagonist＊▲. I'm
surprised myself.
translations.▲主人公＊▲がいれば◙▲凛▲は◙寂しくないけど。◙逆にさ、▲主人公＊▲◙がいなか:
With ▲Protagonist＊▲
around, ▲Rinko▲
doesn't feel lonely.
But if
▲Protagonist＊▲
weren't here, I
might just cry all
the time.
translations.永遠の愛なんて◙信じてないけどさ、◙▲凛▲はずっと◙▲主人公＊▲と一緒に◙いたい:
I don't believe in
eternal love, but I
want to be with
▲Protagonist＊▲
forever. As long as I
feel that way, our
love is immortal.
translations.うん。◙ごめんね、◙ヘンなこと言って。◙▲主人公＊▲が◙いれば、泣かないからさ:
Yeah. Sorry for saying
something weird. I
won't cry if
▲Protagonist＊▲ is
here.
translations.あのさ、▲凛▲◙って▲主人公＊▲の◙カノジョだよね？◙その割にはちょっとデート◙:
So, ▲Rinko▲ is
▲Protagonist＊▲'s
girlfriend, right？ But
we haven't had many
date opportunities.
translations.あのさ。◙▲主人公＊▲のこと◙思い浮かべると◙胸が苦しいんだけど、◙なんで？:
You know, when I
think of
▲Protagonist＊▲, my
chest hurts. Why is
that？
translations.ハッピーニューイヤー！◙▲凛▲の◙メールで新年が◙迎えられる◙▲主人公＊▲は◙幸:
Happy New Year!
▲Protagonist＊▲ is
lucky to receive a New
Year's email from
▲Rinko▲.
translations.あけましておめでと。◙まだ家族にも◙挨拶してないからね、◙▲主人公＊▲が最初:
Happy New Year. I
haven't greeted my
family yet, so
you're the first,
▲Protagonist＊▲.
translations.明日ってさ、アレだよね。◙▲主人公＊▲の◙誕生日。◙確認しただけなんだけど:
Tomorrow is that day,
right？ ▲Protagonist＊▲'s
birthday. Just
confirming.
translations.▲主人公＊▲の◙好きなタイプってさ、◙なんか変わってたり◙するわけ？◙どんなの？:
Does
▲Protagonist＊▲'s
type change？ What is
it like？
translations.あのさ。◙▲主人公＊▲も◙カノジョの髪の長さには◙一家言あるクチ？:
By the way, does
▲Protagonist＊▲ have a
preference for
girlfriend's hair
length？
translations.あのさ。◙▲主人公＊▲の◙好きな色ってどんなの？:
By the way, what is
▲Protagonist＊▲'s
favorite color？
translations.スケベ。◙ま、しょうがないか。◙▲主人公＊▲もオトコだし:
Pervert. Well, I guess
that's to be expected.
▲Protagonist＊▲ is a guy
after all.
translations.▲主人公＊▲が◙くれたメガネさ、◙どうだった？◙惚れ直しちゃったり？:
How was the glasses
▲Protagonist＊▲ gave
me？ Did you fall for
me again？
translations.▲主人公＊▲はさ、◙ネット使ってデートの情報◙調べたりしてる？:
Does ▲Protagonist＊▲
look up date
information online？
translations.▲主人公＊▲ってさ、◙カレンダーって気にする？:
Does ▲Protagonist＊▲ pay
attention to the
calendar？
translations.ちゃんと返事◙してくれるんだ。◙▲主人公＊▲も◙マメだね、◙そういうの◙嫌いじゃ:
You really respond
properly.
▲Protagonist＊▲ is
diligent, and I
don't mind that.
translations.私はあの人と海へ行った。それも一夏の間に２度。すると私はあの人とともに……◙そん:
I went to the sea with that
person. Twice during the
summer. Then I dreamed of
being with that person... A
dream chaser.
translations.あの人は話した、好きな動物のことを。あの人と動物に会いに行った春の日、あの人も…:
That person talked about their
favorite animal. On a spring
day when I went to see that
person and the animal, I also
dreamed of that... A dream
chaser.
translations.夢を売る店に通うこと１０度、神の地に訪れること１度。なんと彼女が別の姿に……◙そ:
After visiting the
dream-selling shop ten times
and the land of gods once, I
dreamed of that person in
another form... A dream
chaser.
translations.あの人の幼いころの話を聞いたあと、私はあの人の……◙そんな夢を見た。夢追い人:
After hearing stories about
that person's childhood, I
dreamed of that person... A
dream chaser.
translations.夏の休みの日、あの人と木々を観に行った。すると、あの人は儚く……◙そんな夢を見た:
On a summer holiday, I went to
see the trees with that
person. Then, I dreamed of
that person fleetingly... A
dream chaser.
translations.あの人は語った、巨大な人形の話を。そして動く絵を観に行くと、あの人は世界を……◙:
That person told a story about
a giant doll. When we went to
see moving pictures, I dreamed
of that person changing the
world... A dream chaser.
translations.私はその日も学舎での職務に打ち込んだ。私は夢の中に……◙そんな夢を見た。夢追い人:
I was focused on my duties at
school that day. I dreamed of
being in a dream... A dream
chaser.
translations.秋の日、私の運動能力は低下していた。そしてあの人と何度も短い逢瀬を重ねること１０:
On an autumn day, my athletic
ability had declined. After
having many short meetings
with that person, I dreamed of
my life... A dream chaser.
translations.あの人は言った、音楽が好きと。共に激しい音楽に身を委ね、共に歌ったとき、あの人は:
That person said they liked
music. When we surrendered
ourselves to intense music and
sang together, I dreamed of
that person being out of
reach... A dream chaser.
translations.あのさ。◙リンコの髪型、◙おろしてるのと◙縛ってるの、◙どっちがいい？:
By the way, which
hairstyle do you
prefer for Rinko,
down or tied up？
translations.ふーん。◙じゃあおろすように◙しておこうかな。◙わかんないけど:
Hmm. Then I guess
I'll keep it down.
Not sure though.
translations.ふーん。◙縛ってる方がいいんだ。◙なるほどね:
Hmm. So you prefer it
tied up. Got it.
translations.あのさ。◙前にくれた、◙あの動物の耳の◙カチューシャ。◙ああいうの、◙つけてほし:
By the way, about
that animal ear
headband you gave
me before. Do you
want me to wear
something like
that？
translations.あの動物の耳の◙カチューシャさ、◙またつけて◙ほしかったりする？:
Do you want me to
wear that animal
ear headband
again？
translations.本気？◙うーん……◙あれをつけるのか……:
Are you serious？
Hmm... Do I really
have to wear that？
translations.そんなの◙持ってないっつーの。◙はい、なしなし:
I don't have
something like that.
Nope, not happening.
translations.まあ、◙▲主人公＊▲に◙見られるだけなら、◙あり……かな？:
Well, if it's just
for ▲Protagonist＊▲
to see, maybe...？
translations.あのさ。◙水着って◙どんなのがいいわけ？◙ほら、言ってみ？:
By the way, what
kind of swimsuit do
you like？ Come on,
tell me.
translations.あのさ。◙今度のデートのときさ、◙どんな水着がいい？:
By the way, what kind
of swimsuit do you
want for our next
date？
translations.まーた部活で青春？◙ご苦労さま。◙まあがんばってる◙みたいだし差し入れとか◙……:
Another club activity
for youth？ Good job.
Well, it seems like
you're doing your best
so maybe I shouldn't
bring snacks ...nah,
maybe not.
translations.委員会、お疲れ。◙ちゃんとやってる◙みたいじゃん？◙おかげでリンコも◙助かってる:
Thanks for your hard
work on the
committee. Looks
like you're doing
well, right？ Thanks
to you, Rinko is
doing better too. Do
you want snacks？
translations.バイトってやっぱ大変？◙あのさ、差し入れとか◙持って行くの、◙あり？:
Is part-time work
really tough？ Hey, is
it okay if I bring
some snacks？
translations.あっそ、じゃあいい。◙後悔しても遅いから:
Oh, I see. Then it's
fine. It's too late
to regret.
translations.やっぱそっか。◙まあ、あんまり◙期待しないで待ってて:
I guess so. Well,
don't expect too
much while you wait.
translations.へへ、やっぱり？◙じゃあさ、◙期待してていいよ？:
Hehe, really？
Then, is it okay
to expect
something？
translations.今日はさ、◙プレゼントありがと。◙また差し入れするかもね:
Thanks for the present
today. I might bring
snacks again.
translations.今日のプレゼントさ。◙ちゃんと伝わったか◙わかんないけど、◙ちゃんと◙うれしかっ:
About today's
present. I don't
know if it got
across but I was
really happy.
translations.プレゼントさ、ありがと。◙別にまたくれてもいーよ？:
Thanks for the present.
You can give me more if
you want.
translations.プレゼントありがと！◙大事にするからさ、◙そっちもまた◙期待してていいよ？:
Thanks for the
present! I'll
cherish it, so you
can expect something
back too.
translations.プチ記念日の◙プレゼントさ、◙ありがと。◙大切にする:
Thanks for the
present for our
little
anniversary. I'll
treasure it.
translations.今日さ、ありがと。◙でもプチ記念日に◙プレゼントって、◙結構マメだね？◙悪くない:
Thanks for today.
But a present for
a little
anniversary is
pretty thoughtful,
right？ I think
that's nice.
translations.リンコはそんなに◙気にしないけどさ、◙やっぱカレシとしては◙プチ記念日はおさえと:
Rinko doesn't mind too
much, but as a
boyfriend, I should
remember the little
anniversary. So, pass!
translations.プチ記念日に◙プレゼントってさ、◙やるじゃん？◙ちゃ～んと大事にする、◙へへ:
A present for a little
anniversary, huh？ Nice
job! I'll take good
care of it, hehe.
translations.うん。◙あのさ、ほんと◙うれしかったから。◙へへ:
Yeah. You know, I
was really happy.
Hehe.
translations.はいはい、◙しょうがないなあ。◙別にいいけど:
Okay, okay, I
can't help it.
It's fine.
translations.あのさ。◙パンクムーヴメントの◙後に起きた音楽って◙なんだっけ？:
Hey, what was the
music that came
after the punk
movement？
translations.あのさ。◙パンクのコード進行◙といえばなんだっけ？:
Hey, what was the
chord progression
associated with
punk？
translations.あのさ。◙パンクで使う◙ピンといえば、◙なんだっけ？:
Hey, what was the
pin used in punk？
translations.あのさ。◙イギリスの◙ミュージシャンが◙アメリカでブームに◙なる現象、◙なんてい:
Hey, what do you
call the
phenomenon where
British musicians
become popular in
America？
translations.あのさ。◙２０世紀はじめに◙起こった虚無思想、◙なんていったっけ？:
Hey, what do you
call the
nihilistic thought
that emerged in
the early 20th
century？
translations.あのさ。◙主流な文化に対抗・◙敵対する文化のこと、◙なんていったっけ？:
Hey, what do you
call a culture that
opposes or is
hostile to
mainstream culture？
translations.あのさ。◙図書の書は◙本のことだけどさ、◙図ってなんのことだっけ？:
Hey, what does 'zu'
refer to in the
context of books？
translations.あのさ。◙本の国際的基準に◙満たないページ数の◙書物のこと、◙なんていったっけ？:
Hey, what do you
call a book that
doesn't meet the
international
standards for page
count？
translations.あのさ。◙ポテチの別名って◙なんていったっけ？:
Hey, what do you
call the
alternative name
for potato chips？
translations.あのさ。◙ジャガイモの別名って◙なんていったっけ？:
Hey, what do you
call the alternative
name for potatoes？
translations.あのさ。◙ジャガイモに◙含まれる毒のこと、◙なんていったっけ？:
Hey, what do you
call the poison
found in potatoes？
translations.あのさ。◙ポテトチップスって◙いったら、◙イギリスで何の事を◙指すんだっけ？:
Hey, what do
potato chips refer
to in Britain？
translations.あのさ。◙格ゲーで動作を中断して◙次の行動を起こす◙テクニック、◙なんていったっ:
Hey, what do you call
the technique to
interrupt an action
and initiate the next
move in fighting
games？
translations.あのさ。◙格ゲーでしゃがみガード◙不可の立ち攻撃のこと、◙なんていったっけ？:
Hey, what do you call
a standing attack that
can't be blocked while
crouching in fighting
games？
translations.あのさ。◙格ゲーで奥行き方向の◙移動のこと、◙なんていったっけ？:
Hey, what do you
call movement in the
depth direction in
fighting games？
translations.あのさ。◙格ゲーでジャンプ攻撃への◙カウンターのこと、◙なんていったっけ？:
Hey, what do you call
a counter to a jumping
attack in fighting
games？
translations.あのさ。◙左右の眼の色が◙違うネコのこと、◙なんていったっけ？:
Hey, what do you
call a cat with
different colored
eyes？
translations.あのさ。◙マタタビの別名って◙なんていったっけ？:
Hey, what do you
call the
alternative name
for catnip？
translations.あのさ。◙ネコは喜んでるとき、◙しっぽを◙どうするんだっけ？:
Hey, what does a cat
do with its tail
when it's happy？
translations.あのさ。◙ネコに与えちゃいけない◙食べ物ってなんだっけ？:
Hey, what food should
you never give to a
cat？
translations.そうなんだ、◙実はリンコも。◙▲主人公＊▲のおかげで、◙リンコは今日も元気だよ:
I see, actually Rinko
too. Thanks to ▲主人公＊▲,
Rinko is doing well
today.
translations.奇遇だね、◙リンコも相当いいよ？◙気合うじゃん:
What a coincidence,
Rinko is doing
pretty well too! We
get along.
translations.そっか。◙あのさ、◙▲主人公＊▲が幸せだと、◙リンコも幸せなんだよ。◙知ってた？:
I see. You know, when
▲主人公＊▲ is happy, Rinko
is happy too. Did you
know？
translations.なんかいいこと◙あったんだ。◙じゃあさ、◙今度聞かせてよ。◙いいでしょ？:
Something good
happened, huh？
Then, tell me
about it next
time. Is that
okay？
translations.ちょっと訂正。◙気分がいいのは、◙▲主人公＊▲と◙リンコの二人。◙へへ:
Just to clarify.
The good mood is
thanks to
both▲主人公＊▲ and
Rinko. Hehe.
translations.それってさ、◙やっぱリンコも◙関係してる？◙リンコは◙▲主人公＊▲の幸せに、◙役:
So, does that mean
Rinko is involved too？
Is Rinko helping
with▲主人公＊▲'s
happiness？
translations.ふーん。◙カレシの気分がいいのは、◙カノジョとしても◙悪いことじゃないよね？:
Hmm. It's not a bad
thing for a girlfriend
if her boyfriend is in a
good mood, right？
translations.ふーん、いいことじゃん？: Hmm, that's a good thing, right？
translations.だったらさ、◙リンコの仕事◙ぜんぶ代わりに◙やっといてよ。◙なんてね:
Then, do all of
Rinko's work for
her. Just kidding.
translations.リンコもそんな◙感じだから安心かな。◙ほら、二人の機嫌に◙差があるとさ、◙上手く:
Rinko feels the same
way, so I guess I can
relax. You know, if
there's a difference
in our moods, things
might not go well.
translations.そっか。◙だったら会って◙話すのもいいかも:
I see. Then maybe
meeting up and
talking would be
good.
translations.いいんじゃない。◙よかったよかった:
Sounds good.
Glad to hear that.
translations.わざわざそんなこと◙送ってくるんだ、◙暇なの？:
You went out of
your way to send
that？ Are you
bored？
translations.まあ悪いよりは◙いい方がいいよね:
Well, it's better
to be good than
bad.
translations.こっちは最悪なんだけど: Things are the worst over here.
translations.何かあったんだ。◙悩みはリンコに言ってよ。◙なんでも解決で◙きるわけじゃないけど:
Something happened. If
you have worries, tell
Rinko. I can't solve
everything, but Rinko
is▲主人公＊▲'s girlfriend.
translations.そっか。リンコは、◙落ち込んだとき相談する◙のに相応しいカノジョって◙ことなのか:
I see. So Rinko is the
kind of girlfriend you
can talk to when you're
down. Sorry for talking
about myself. Just
thought that.
translations.そりゃいつでも絶好調って◙わけにはいかないって。◙元気出せ！◙力になるから:
You can't always be in
top shape. Cheer up!
I'll support you.
translations.うん、◙言ってくれてありがと。◙一人で悩むの、◙辛いもんね:
Yeah, thanks for
saying that. It's
tough to worry alone.
translations.リンコで力になれるかな。◙▲主人公＊▲には◙心強いカノジョが◙いるってこと、◙忘:
I wonder if Rinko can
help. Don't forget
that▲主人公＊▲ has a strong
girlfriend.
translations.そんなの、◙リンコまで◙落ち込んでくるじゃん。◙だからさ、◙早く元気になってよ。:
If Rinko gets down
too, then hurry up and
cheer up, okay？
translations.人間、◙社会生活営んでれば◙そういうこともあるって。◙そんなに悩まない！:
As a human, if you're
living in society,
things like that happen.
Don't worry too much!
translations.少し？◙じゃあがんばれ！◙なんてね、◙あんまり◙ガマンしないでよ:
A little？ Then do
your best! Just
kidding, don't
hold back too
much.
translations.▲主人公＊▲が◙落ち込んでると、◙リンコもイヤだからさ。◙元気になってよ:
When▲主人公＊▲ is down,
Rinko feels bad too.
So cheer up!
translations.そういうときも◙あるでしょ。◙いいんじゃない？◙どうせリンコが◙励ましてあげるし:
There are times
like that, right？
Isn't it okay？
Anyway, Rinko will
cheer you up.
translations.そっか、◙リンコは結構◙調子いいんだよね。◙だったらさ、◙リンコの元気、◙もらっ:
I see, Rinko is
actually doing
pretty well. Then,
can I take some of
Rinko's energy？
translations.それでリンコに◙どうしてほしい？◙なんかできること◙あるかな:
So what do you
want Rinko to do？
Is there anything
I can do？
translations.悩みあるなら、◙リンコに話せば楽になる、◙かもね:
If you have worries,
talking to Rinko might
help.
translations.そういうときも◙あるけど……。◙いつまでもウジウジ◙するのはやめてよ？:
There are times
like that, but...
Don't dwell on it
forever, okay？
translations.まあ一応カノジョだし、◙悩み聞くぐらいは◙するけど？:
Well, since I'm
technically your
girlfriend, I can
listen to your
worries, right？
translations.まあ生きてれば◙色々あるしね:
Well, if you're
alive, there are
all sorts of
things.
translations.いつでもなんでも◙上手くいくなんてこと◙ないって:
Things don't always
go well, you know.
translations.なんでもかんでも◙人に頼るなっつーの。◙リンコだって◙余裕ない……:
Don't rely on others
for everything.
Rinko doesn't have
that much leeway
either...
translations.落ち込む前に、◙自分が何したか◙考えろっつーの:
Before getting
down, think about
what you did.
translations.リンコ、元気がない◙▲主人公＊▲なんてやだ。◙これ、元気出す理由には◙ならない？:
I don't want Rinko to
see▲主人公＊▲ down. Doesn't
this give you a reason
to cheer up？
translations.いっこ教えてあげる。◙▲主人公＊▲に頼られるの◙結構嫌いじゃないよ？◙……これぐ:
I'll tell you one thing.
I don't really mind
being relied on
by▲主人公＊▲, you know？
...Is this enough to
cheer you up？
translations.がんばりすぎなんだって。◙少しは気抜いてさ、◙楽にいけばいいよ。ね？:
You're trying too hard.
Just relax a bit and
take it easy, okay？
translations.そっか、◙こういうときリンコが◙助けられると◙うれしいんだけど。◙上手くできるか:
I see, I’d be happy
if I could help
Rinko in times like
this. Can I do it
well？
translations.うん、毎日お疲れ様。◙疲れるのもわかるけど、◙応援するから。◙がんばれ！:
Yeah, thanks for your
hard work every day. I
understand it's
tiring, but I'll
support you. Do your
best!
translations.疲れてもいいけどさ、◙そんなの◙しょうがないことだし。◙思い切って◙やるしかない:
It's okay to be tired,
but that's just how it
is. You have to just
go for it.
translations.疲れたっていっても、◙色々あるけど……。◙まあ聞くぐらいは◙してあげる:
Even if you're
tired, there are
various things...
Well, I can at least
listen.
translations.まだまだ！◙▲主人公＊▲なら◙まだいけるって。◙リンコ、信じてるからさ:
Not yet! If
it's▲主人公＊▲, you can
still do it. Rinko
believes in you.
translations.リンコも付き合うからさ。◙ほら、元気だそうよ:
I'll join you too.
Come on, let's cheer up.
translations.そういうときはさ、◙休むに限るって。◙はい決定！:
In times like
that, resting is
the best. Decision
made!
translations.体の疲れ？◙ストレス？◙どっちでもいいけどさ、◙元気出せ！:
Tired body？
Stress？
Either way, cheer up!
translations.だらっと休んで、◙ぱーっと遊ぶ。◙それでいいじゃん？:
Just relax and
have fun. Isn't
that good？
translations.まだまだ。◙てきとーにがんばろ:
Not yet. Let's
just do our best
casually.
translations.とりあえず休んどけば？: For now, why not just rest？
translations.うん、まあ、◙しょうがないって:
Yeah, well, it
can't be helped.
translations.あのさ、◙それこっちの台詞。◙ていうか、◙アンタのせいだし……:
You know, that's my
line. Actually, it's
your fault...
translations.もうすぐ年末じゃん。◙やっぱ初詣とか？:
It's almost the end
of the year. Are we
doing New Year's
shrine visits？
translations.アレがあるよね、今月は。◙さすがに忘れては◙ないと思うけど:
There's that thing this
month. I don't think you
forgot about it.
translations.今月楽しみだなー。◙カノジョの期待に◙こたえてよ？:
I can't wait for
this month. Let's
meet her
expectations ,
okay？
translations.もうすぐ◙エイプリルフールじゃん。◙なん面白いことあるかな:
April Fool's Day is
coming soon. I wonder
what fun things will
happen.
translations.もうすぐ◙ゴールデンウィーク◙だけどさ、◙なんか変なおまじないが◙流行ってるらし:
Golden Week is almost
here, but I heard some
weird spells are
trending.
translations.もうすぐ学校のプール◙始まるじゃん。◙ちょっとめんどうだけど、◙ちょっと楽しみか:
The school pool is
starting soon. It's a
bit of a hassle, but I
might enjoy it.
translations.もうすぐ七夕じゃん。◙どうしよっかな:
Tanabata is coming
soon. What should I
do？
translations.もうすぐ海水浴場で◙イベントがあるってさ。◙なんだろ:
There's an event at
the beach soon. I
wonder what it is.
translations.もうすぐ体育祭か……。◙てきとーにがんばっとく？:
The sports festival is
coming soon... Should we
just do our best？
translations.もうすぐハロウィンか。◙仮装ねえ、◙やったら面白いかな:
Halloween is coming
soon. Costumes, huh？ I
wonder if it would be
fun.
translations.もうすぐ学園祭か……。◙やっぱ一緒に◙回ったりする？:
The school festival is
coming soon... Should
we go around together？
translations.もうすぐクリスマス……。◙やっぱわくわくするね:
Christmas is almost
here... I'm really
excited.
translations.あのさ。◙なんとなくネットで◙旅情報見てたんだけど、◙意外に楽しいかもね。◙▲主:
You know, I was
casually looking at
travel info online,
and it might actually
be fun. What do you
think, ▲主人公＊▲？
translations.あのさ。◙なんとなくネットで◙旅情報見てたんだけど、◙また行っても◙楽しいかもね:
You know, I was
casually looking at
travel info online,
and it might be fun to
go again. What about
you, ▲主人公＊▲？
translations.だよね、いいと思う: Right？ I think it's a good idea.
translations.お父さんが昔旅行◙ばっかしててさ、よく話◙聞かされるんだよね。◙▲主人公＊▲は旅:
My dad used to travel a
lot, so I hear his
stories often. If you
could travel, where
would you want to go,
▲主人公＊▲？
translations.海か。◙まあいいかもね、◙定番だし:
The beach, huh？
That could be
nice, it's a
classic.
translations.温泉か。◙結構しぶいじゃん。◙まあゆっくり◙できていいかも:
A hot spring, huh？
That's pretty
cool. It might be
nice to relax.
translations.お母さんが旅行◙行きたがってるんだけど、◙お父さんがあれじゃね。◙夫婦で旅行って:
My mom wants to go on
a trip, but with my
dad like that... A
couple's trip sounds
fun, though...
translations.あのさ。◙うちの両親、忙しくて新婚◙（ていうか再婚？）旅行◙にも行ってないんだよ:
You know, my parents are
busy and haven't even
gone on a honeymoon (or
should I say remarriage
trip？). They could have
gone somewhere nearby,
like Atami.
translations.あのさ。◙なんか旅行が当たる◙懸賞やってるみたい。◙ああいうのって、◙ほんとに当:
You know, it seems
like there's a
contest for a travel
prize. I wonder if
those things really
have winners.
translations.あのさ。◙前に▲主人公＊▲が◙熱海旅行当てたじゃん。◙あれ、またやるらしいよ:
You know, you won a
trip to Atami before,
▲主人公＊▲. I heard
they're doing it
again.
translations.今度の旅行さ、◙最初に旅行に行ったときと◙似た感じの髪にしようかと◙思うんだけど:
For the next trip, I was
thinking of doing my
hair similar to when we
first traveled. What do
you think？
translations.へえ。◙じゃあそうしよっかな:
Oh, really？ Then I
might go with that.
translations.ならいい。◙聞いといてよかった:
That's good. I'm
glad I asked.
translations.もうすぐ旅行だけどさ、◙やっぱわくわくするね:
The trip is coming
soon, and I'm really
excited.
translations.旅行、もうすぐだね。◙また楽しくなると◙いいけど:
The trip is almost
here. I hope it will
be fun again.
translations.それだけじゃないけどさ。◙色々と:
That's not all, though.
There's a lot.
translations.旅行の準備めんどくさい。◙そっちは？:
Preparing for the trip
is a hassle. How about
you？
translations.やれやれだね。◙一緒に買い物とか◙行くのもいいかも:
Geez, it might be
nice to go
shopping together.
translations.へえ、やるじゃん。◙じゃあリンコはそんなに◙気にしなくてもいいかな:
Wow, you're doing
well. Then Rinko
doesn't have to worry
too much.
translations.旅行、◙楽しみなんだけどさ。◙やっぱ緊張するよね……:
I'm looking forward to
the trip, but I'm
still nervous...
translations.やっぱそうだよね。◙不安、ってわけじゃ◙ないんだけど:
That's true. It's
not that I'm
anxious, but...
translations.なにそれ、強がってさ: What’s that？ You're just pretending to be tough.
translations.あのさ。◙旅行で一番◙楽しみなのって、なに？:
You know, what's the
most fun part of
traveling for you？
translations.無難な気もするけど、◙そうかも。◙きっといい思い出◙できるね:
It might sound
basic, but that
could be it. I'm
sure we'll make
great memories.
translations.旅行、もう明日だよ。◙いつになく◙目がさえちゃってる:
The trip is
tomorrow. I'm
unusually wide
awake.
translations.やっぱそう？◙なんだろ、緊張かな:
Is that so？ I
wonder if it's
nerves.
translations.今回さ、初めての◙旅行だったじゃん？◙やっぱさ……◙これ、一生◙忘れらんないかも:
This is my first
trip, right？ I
think... I might
never forget this.
translations.旅行、やっぱり◙今回も楽しかった。◙また思い出◙増えちゃったね。◙びっくりするぐ:
The trip was fun
again this time.
We made even more
memories. It's
surprising.
translations.だよね……。◙リンコ、◙人生最高の思い出かも:
Right... Rinko, this
might be the best
memory of my life.
translations.言うなっつーの……。◙そういうのは◙思い出の中だけでいい、◙大切なことだから:
Don't say that...
Those things should
stay in memories,
they're important.
translations.お風呂？◙まあ気持ち良かったけど:
The bath？
Well, it felt nice.
translations.はあ、◙お風呂がどうしたって？◙変なことばっか◙考えるなっつーの:
Sigh, what about the
bath？ Stop thinking
about weird things.
translations.旅行の約束破るって、◙普通のことじゃないよね。◙意味わかんないん◙だけど……:
Breaking a promise for a
trip isn't normal,
right？ I don't really
get it, but...
translations.なんかさ、◙まだ気持ちが◙フワフワしてる。◙旅行の余韻が◙気持ちいいんだよね:
You know, I'm
still feeling
light and airy.
The afterglow of
the trip feels
nice.
translations.あのさ、◙まだ旅行のことで◙ドキドキしてるのって◙ヘンかな。◙もうよくわかんない:
Hey, is it weird
that I'm still
nervous about the
trip？ I don't really
know.
translations.だめ、◙まだ頭切り:
No, I can't think
straight yet.
translations.部屋で電気消して◙目閉じると、◙旅行に行った日の夜を◙思い出すんだよね。◙……な:
When I turn off the
lights in my room
and close my eyes, I
remember the night
of the trip. ...It's
kind of weird.
translations.少し落ち着いて◙思い返しても、◙やっぱり旅行楽しかった。◙また行きたい、かも:
Even if I calm down and
think back, the trip was
really fun. I might want
to go again.
translations.それだけじゃ、◙何もわかんないよ……:
That's not enough, I
don't understand
anything...
translations.謝ったからって、◙そんなの◙なんにもなんない。◙わけわかんない！:
Just because you
apologized, that
doesn't change
anything. I don't
get it!
translations.そしたら許されるわけ？◙そんなわけ◙ないじゃん……:
So does that mean I'll
be forgiven？ There's
no way that's true...
translations.できない。◙そんなの無理:
I can't do it.
That's impossible.
translations.今度？◙ないよそんなの:
Next time？ There's
no way that's
happening.
translations.おはよ。◙リンコもさ、マメだよね？:
Good morning. Rinko,
you're pretty diligent,
huh？
translations.今日も一日◙いい日でありますように！◙なんてね:
I hope today is
a good day too!
Just kidding.
translations.はあ、朝ぐらいは◙元気出さないとね。◙おはよ:
Ugh, I need to
cheer up at least
in the morning.
Good morning.
translations.リンコからの◙おはようだよ？:
It's a good
morning from
Rinko, you know？
translations.朝から頭◙はたらかないっつーの:
My brain isn't
working at all this
morning.
translations.おはよ！◙なんてね、◙眠くてテンション◙低いんだけど◙「！」付けてみた:
Good morning! Just
kidding, I'm
sleepy and my
energy is low, but
I tried adding an
exclamation mark.
translations.今日はいいことあるかな。◙▲主人公＊▲もさ、◙善処してよ:
I wonder if something
good will happen today.
You should do your best
too, ▲Protagonist＊▲.
translations.調子どう？◙こっちはボチボチ:
How are you？
I'm doing okay.
translations.今日のリンコは◙なんかすごいこと◙できそうな気がする。◙気だけかもしれないけど:
I feel like Rinko can
do something amazing
today. Maybe it's just
a feeling.
translations.午後もしっかり◙やっとくこと:
Make sure to get
things done this
afternoon.
translations.思いっきりあくびすると、◙ちょっと眠気さめない？:
If you yawn really big,
doesn't it wake you up a
bit？
translations.やっ、今どんな感じ？◙わざわざ休み時間を◙割いてメールくれる◙優しいカノジョで◙:
Hey, how are you
feeling now？ It's
nice that you took
the time to message
me during your
break.
translations.やば、授業寝てた……: Oh no, I fell asleep in class...
translations.まだしばらく◙寝てたい……:
I want to sleep a
little longer...
translations.一日は長いね、どうしよ: A day feels long, what should I do？
translations.今、何が見えてる？◙とかさ、◙別に意味はないんだけど:
What do you see right
now？ Not that it means
anything.
translations.だるい、つかれた。◙なんとなく:
I'm feeling
sluggish and
tired. Just
because.
translations.早く夜になんないかな: I can't wait for night to come.
translations.リンコもさ、◙たま～には勤労精神を◙発揮するわけ:
Rinko sometimes
shows her work ethic
too.
translations.リンコ思うんだけどさ、◙家でまで勉強する人間は◙よほど無趣味なんだね。◙そう思わ:
I think people who
study at home are
really lacking in
hobbies. Don't you
think？
translations.本に囲まれる生活。◙これで授業がなければね:
Living surrounded by
books. If only there
were no classes.
translations.なんかずっと本◙読んでたかも:
I feel like I've
been reading books
all day.
translations.今ＣＭでかっこいい曲◙流れたんだけどさ、◙なにかわかんない？◙わかんないよね:
A cool song just
played in a
commercial, but do
you know what it is？
You probably don't.
translations.なんとなく◙消化不良の日って◙あるよね:
There are days
when you just feel
like you didn't
digest anything.
translations.今日何食べた？◙別になんでも◙いいんだけど:
What did you eat
today？ I don't
really care what
it is.
translations.あれ、今日って何か◙まともなことしたっけ？◙って思う日ない？◙時間盗まれたような:
Hey, did I do anything
decent today？ Don't
you ever feel like
that？ Like time was
stolen from you.
translations.たまには部屋で◙ゆっくりしたいね、◙家族にも邪魔されずにさ:
Sometimes I want to
relax in my room,
without being
disturbed by family.
translations.あのさ、宿題とかやった？◙こっちのことは◙聞かないで◙ほしいんだけど:
By the way, did you do
your homework？ I hope
you don't ask me about
mine.
translations.あと何年したらさ、◙夜も一緒に◙いられるんだろね:
How many more
years until we can
be together at
night？
translations.食欲ない。◙ポテチぐらいしか◙食べられそうにないよ:
I have no appetite.
I can only eat
chips.
translations.再婚してからは、◙やっぱりお父さんの◙帰りが早くなったよ。◙仕事大丈夫なのかな:
Since the
remarriage, Dad has
been coming home
earlier. I wonder if
work is okay.
translations.年頃の娘としてはさ、◙もっと家事の◙手伝いとかすべき？◙する気ないけど:
As a daughter of
this age, should I
help more with
housework？ Not that
I want to.
translations.おやすみ。◙明日はさ、何しよ:
Good night. What
should we do
tomorrow？
translations.今夜は珍しく眠いかも。◙まだこんな時間なのに:
I might be unusually
sleepy tonight. Even
though it's still this
early.
translations.お父さん寝ちゃった。◙我が家の夜は◙リンコのものだね:
Dad fell asleep.
Tonight at home
belongs to Rinko.
translations.リンコさ、◙夢覚えてることって◙あんまりないんだよね。◙▲主人公＊▲が◙出てても:
Rinko doesn't really
remember dreams. Even
if ▲the protagonist＊▲
appears, she might
forget. Too bad.
translations.リンコは◙今日もがんばった。◙ほんとがんばった。◙だから寝る、おやすみ！:
Rinko did her best
today. Really did her
best. So, I'm going to
sleep, good night!
translations.まだ眠くないんだけど、◙そろそろ寝ないと◙明日辛いよね。◙はあ、おやすみ:
I'm not sleepy yet,
but I should sleep
soon or tomorrow will
be tough. Sigh, good
night.
translations.おやすみのチュッ▼◙とかさ、◙ほんとにやってる人◙いんのかな:
I wonder if people
really do things
like a good night
kiss ▼.
translations.おやすみ。◙明日もてきとうに生きる！:
Good night. I'll just
live casually tomorrow!
translations.もう寝た？◙なんとなく確認:
Did you already
sleep？ Just
checking.
translations.いいから黙って◙反省してろっつーの！:
Just be quiet and
reflect on it!
translations.とりあえず◙さっきのメール、◙削除しといたから:
Anyway, I deleted
that last email.
translations.あのさ。◙リンコがしてほしいこと、◙ほんとにわかってんの:
Hey. Do you really
understand what Rinko
wants？
translations.だといいんだけど。◙ほんとのところは◙どうだかね:
I hope so. I
wonder how it
really is.
translations.今の状態、◙どうすれば◙元通りになるんだろ:
I wonder how to
get back to the
current state.
translations.あのさ。◙ケンカなんてもうやめよ。◙いいことない、◙あんなの……:
Hey. Let's stop
fighting. There's no
good in that...
translations.ケンカとか、◙ほんとにもうイヤだから。◙それは、◙ちゃんとわかって:
I really don't want to
fight anymore. You
understand that, right？
translations.一応許したけど、◙まったく怒ってない◙わけじゃないから。◙またやったら、◙ほんと:
I kind of forgave
you, but I'm not
completely not
angry. If it
happens again,
I'll really get
mad.
translations.嫌われるんじゃ◙ないかって、◙ほんとに思った。◙あんな思い◙もうしたくない。◙寂:
I really thought I
might be hated. I
don't want to feel
like that again. I
don't want to feel
lonely anymore.
translations.あのさ、◙休んだ方が◙いいんじゃないの？:
Hey, don't you
think you should
rest？
translations.携帯触んな。◙休めっつーの:
Don't touch your
phone. You need to
rest.
translations.カノジョに◙メールもいいけどさ、◙今は自分の体の方が◙大事なんじゃないの？:
It's fine to email
your girlfriend, but
isn't your health
more important right
now？
translations.無理してんじゃないの？◙そんなことより具合は？:
Aren't you pushing
yourself？ More than
that, how are you
feeling？
translations.風邪の間は、◙リンコより◙自分のこと優先。◙文句言わないからさ:
While you have a
cold, prioritize
yourself over
Rinko. I won't
complain.
translations.おはよ。◙調子は？◙今日はじっとしてなよ:
Good morning. How
are you？ Just stay
still today.
translations.ちゃんと寝た？◙体治すには◙寝るのが一番だって:
Did you sleep
well？ Sleeping is
the best way to
heal your body.
translations.食欲あるなら、◙しっかり食べなよ。◙そうしないと◙治らないからさ:
If you have an
appetite, make
sure to eat well.
Otherwise, you
won't get better.
translations.メール、あんまり◙しない方がいいかな。◙でもやっぱり◙気になるから:
Maybe you shouldn't
email too much. But
I still can't help
but worry.
translations.風邪ひいてるとき◙ぐらいは早く寝なよ？:
When you have a
cold, you should go
to bed early, okay？
translations.ちゃんと食べてる？◙食欲ないなら、◙軽いものでもいいから:
Are you eating
properly？ If you
don't have an
appetite, something
light is fine.
translations.なんか心配だし、◙メールしてみた。◙寝てたらごめん:
I'm a bit worried,
so I sent an
email. Sorry if
you were sleeping.
translations.お見舞いって迷惑◙だったりしないのかな。◙まあ元気そうなの確認◙できたからよかっ:
I hope my visit isn't
a bother. Well, I'm
glad I could confirm
you're okay.
translations.急にごめん、お見舞い。◙でも会わないで◙じっとしてるの◙いやだったから:
Sorry for the sudden
visit. But I didn't
want to just stay
away.
translations.しょうがないじゃん、◙カノジョだし:
It can't be helped,
you're my
girlfriend.
translations.ごめんとかいいから。◙自分のことだけ◙考えなって:
Stop saying sorry.
Just think about
yourself.
translations.ほんとだよ、◙リンコにこんな◙心配させるとか。◙早く治せ！:
It's true, making
Rinko worry like
this. Get better
soon!
translations.そこまで心配してない。◙少しだけだから:
I'm not that worried.
Just a little.
translations.じゃあ安心てこと？◙でも無理はしないこと:
So, does that mean
you're okay？ But
don't push yourself.
translations.会えないの、◙やっぱ少し寂しいかも。◙早くよくなんないかな:
Not being able to see
you is a bit lonely. I
hope you get better
soon.
translations.リンコいないと、◙やっぱ寂しい？◙早く治すから、◙少し待ってて:
Is it lonely
without Rinko？
I'll get better
soon, so just wait
a bit.
translations.委員の仕事よろしく。◙これぐらいの◙メリットないと、◙風邪なんて◙ひいてらんない:
Please take care of
the committee work.
Without some perks
like this, I can't
afford to catch a
cold.
translations.ヒマ……。◙早く外出たいっつーの:
I'm bored... I want
to go out soon.
translations.▲主人公＊▲のこと◙考えると元気に◙なるとかさ、◙リンコも単純だね:
Thinking about
▲主人公＊▲ makes me
feel better, huh？
Rinko is simple
like that.
translations.ありがと。◙そっちまで風邪◙ひいたりしないでよ:
Thanks. Don't
catch a cold over
there.
translations.そんなに心配してるとさ、◙老けるよ。なんてね、◙ほんとはうれしい。◙ありがと:
If you're that
worried, you'll age.
Just kidding, I'm
actually happy. Thanks.
translations.あのさ。◙なんか忙しい？◙カノジョが◙風邪ひいてるわけじゃん:
Hey. Are you busy？
Your girlfriend is
sick, you know.
translations.ひま、退屈、寂しい。◙会いたいっつーの:
Bored, lonely. I
want to see you.
translations.お見舞いありがと。◙たぶん効果あったよ:
Thanks for the
visit. It probably
helped.
translations.わざわざありがと、◙お見舞い。◙ほんとにうれしかった:
Thanks for coming to
see me. I was really
happy.
translations.お見舞い◙来てもらったからには、◙早く治さないとね:
Since you came to
visit, I need to get
better quickly.
translations.お見舞い自体は◙うれしかったんだけど、◙家族からの◙つっこみが……。◙まあいいけ:
I was happy about the
visit, but my family
had comments... Well,
it's fine.
translations.あのさ。◙風邪治ったみたい。◙心配かけたけど、◙たぶんもう大丈夫:
Hey. I think I'm
better now. Sorry
for worrying you,
but I should be
okay.
translations.あのさ。◙もうかなり◙調子よくなった。◙おかげさまでね:
Hey. I'm feeling
much better now.
Thanks to you.
translations.あのさ。◙▲主人公＊▲って◙結構優しいよね。◙おかげでリンコも◙助かってるんだけ:
Hey. ▲主人公＊▲ is
pretty kind, huh？
Thanks to you,
Rinko is doing
better.
translations.あのさ。◙▲主人公＊▲って◙結構クールじゃん？◙そういうとこも、◙嫌いじゃないけ:
Hey. ▲主人公＊▲ is
pretty cool,
right？ I don't
dislike that.
translations.あのさ。◙▲主人公＊▲って◙結構積極的？◙やっぱ年上っぽく◙リードしちゃうわけだ:
Hey. ▲主人公＊▲ is quite
proactive, huh？
Leading like an
older person.
translations.あのさ。◙▲主人公＊▲って◙結構落ち着いてるよね。◙そういうの割と好きかも:
Hey. ▲主人公＊▲ is pretty
calm, right？ I kind of
like that.
translations.謙遜しろっつーの。◙別にいいけど:
You should be
modest. It's fine
though.
translations.あっそ。◙自覚ないんだ:
Oh, I see. You
don't realize it.
translations.最近なんかいい感じ？◙いいことあったんだ:
Feeling good lately？
Did something good
happen？
translations.最近なんかいい感じ？◙リンコのプレゼントの◙おかげだね:
Feeling good lately？
It's thanks to
Rinko's gift.
translations.あのさ。◙なんとなくだけど、◙▲主人公＊▲に◙出会った頃の髪型に◙戻すのってどう:
Hey. Just a
thought, but how
about going back
to the hairstyle
you had when we
first met？
translations.なにそれ、謝ればいいわけ？◙まぁ、ちゃんと返事してくれたし、今回だけは許してあげ:
What is that, should I
apologize？ Well, you did
respond properly, so I'll let
it slide this time. No next
time.
translations.謝るんなら最初っからすっぽかすようなことすんなつーの。◙◙◙◙まったく。◙今回だ:
If you're going to
apologize, don't skip
out from the start.
Seriously. I'll let it
slide this time.
translations.ほんとに埋め合わせしてくれるわけ？言っとくけどすっぽかした代償は大きいからね。◙:
Are you really going to make
up for it？ Just so you know,
the cost of skipping out is
high. You should take me on a
trip abroad to balance it out.
Then I'll forgive you.
translations.埋め合わせしただけで許されるわけ？◙そんなわけないじゃん……◙◙どうしてほしいか:
Just making up for it doesn't
mean you're forgiven. That's
not how it works... Think
carefully about what you
should do.
translations.それを今言うわけ？◙おそいっつーの。◙今度やったらタダじゃおかないから。◙わかっ:
Are you saying that now？
It's too late. If you do
it again, there will be
consequences. Got it？
translations.今度？◙ないよそんなの。◙◙◙って◙言われたくなかったら反省するように。:
Next time？ There won't
be one. If you don't
want to hear that, you
better reflect.
translations.ドーナツ屋の話、覚えてる？◙友達が木曜日の夕方にショッピング街で見かけたってさ。:
Do you remember the donut
shop？ A friend saw it in the
shopping district on Thursday
evening.
translations.ドーナツ大好きな友達が、土曜日のお昼ごろに噴水公園で見かけたって。これは信憑性高: A friend who loves donuts saw it at the fountain park around noon on Saturday. This seems credible, right？
translations.噂のドーナツ屋さんなんだけど、お母さんがテレビで特集してるのをみたんだって。電気: It's the rumored donut shop, and my mom saw it featured on TV. It was a live broadcast from the electric town around noon on Sunday.
translations.委員会の先輩が、例のドーナツ屋さんを見かけたって。土曜日のお昼くらいに、遊園地に: A senior from the committee said they saw the donut shop. Apparently, it was at the amusement park around noon on Saturday.
translations.この前話してたドーナツ屋さんの目撃情報。日曜日のお昼ごろに植物園に出没したらしい: About the donut shop we talked about before. It seems it appeared at the botanical garden around noon on Sunday. There was a huge line, and it sold out quickly.
translations.謎のドーナツ屋最新情報。土曜日のお昼くらいにイベントホールんとこに出没するんだっ: Latest info on the mysterious donut shop. It seems to appear at the event hall around noon on Saturday.
translations.この前話してたクレープやさん、クラスでも話題になってた。この前の土曜日の昼頃に、: The crepe shop we talked about before was a topic in class. A friend said they had it at the zoo around noon last Saturday.
translations.友達がジェラート屋さんを見かけたってさ。土曜日の昼くらいに遊びにいった遊園地にい: A friend said they saw a gelato shop. Apparently, it was at the amusement park they visited on Saturday afternoon.
translations.この前話してた甘栗屋さんだけど、弟がテレビで見たってさ。動物園に来るらしいよ。曜: About the sweet chestnut shop we talked about before, my brother saw it on TV. It seems to come to the zoo. Probably on Wednesday, around evening.
translations.焼き芋屋さん目撃情報！この前の木曜夜に、友達が港の丘公園で見かけたってさ。: Sweet potato shop sighting! A friend saw it at Minato Hill Park on Thursday night.
translations.この前の十羽野城の事だけど、他にも何人か声を聞いた人がいるんだって。迷信とか信じ: About the Juuhano Castle, it seems there are others who have heard voices. I'm not superstitious, but maybe I should carry an amulet or talisman.
translations.ビッグフットってさ、意外に臆病そうじゃん。逢えるとしたら、薄暗くて静かなときじゃ: Bigfoot seems surprisingly timid. If you were to encounter it, it would probably be in a dim and quiet place. And if it exists, it would definitely be in the mountains.
translations.ＵＦＯの目撃情報って、奥十羽野に集中してるらしいよ。晴れた夜によく出るんだってさ: UFO sightings seem to be concentrated in Okujuuhano. They often appear on clear nights.
translations.湖畔の怪物、トワッシーの目撃情報って、雨の日に偏ってるんだってさ。なんかあやしい: Sightings of the lakeside monster, Towassy, seem to be biased towards rainy days. It's kind of suspicious.
translations.今度のデート▲デート場所▲とかどうかな？: How about our next date at ▲デート場所▲？
translations.雑誌で読んだんだけど、最近、▲デート場所▲は恋人たちの聖地ってよばれてるんだって: I read in a magazine that recently, ▲デート場所▲ is called a sacred place for couples. Want to check it out on our next date？
translations.まあ、人が多そうだから、また今度でいいかな。: Well, it seems like there will be a lot of people, so maybe another time.
translations.▲凛▲との約束、ちゃんと覚えてたね、やさしい彼氏といつもデートが出来て、時々これ: You remembered the promise with ▲凛▲. I'm so happy to always be able to date my kind boyfriend; sometimes I wonder if this is a dream.
translations.▲凛▲との約束、ちゃんと覚えてたね、うれしかった。さすが▲凛▲のカレシ。: You remembered the promise with ▲凛▲. I was happy. As expected of ▲凛▲'s boyfriend.
translations.ウワサの割りに、たいしたことないとこだったかな。デートもイマイチ盛り上がらなかっ: For all the hype, it wasn't that great. The date didn't really get exciting either.
translations.デート、楽しみでさ。ついメールしちゃったよ。: I'm looking forward to the date. I couldn't help but text you.
translations.忘れたりしてないよね。夢のなかまで起こしにいくから。: You haven't forgotten, right？ I'll come wake you up even in your dreams.
translations.カレンダーにマークした？でっかいハナマル付けといて。: Did you mark it on the calendar？ Make sure to put a big star on it.
translations.どんなデートになるか、ちょっとワクワクする～。: I'm a bit excited about what kind of date it will be.
translations.うーん、どの服着ていくか悩む。: Hmm, I'm struggling to decide what to wear.
translations.ちゃんと準備してさ、デートではめいっぱい遊ぼ。: Let's prepare properly and have a blast on our date.
translations.どの服着て行くか、真剣に悩み中。: I'm seriously thinking about what to wear.
translations.カレンダーに○・・・・いや☆マークを付けておくように。: Make sure to put a circle... no, a star on the calendar.
translations.やっぱりさ、▲凛▲から誘われたほうが嬉しい？: Isn't it more exciting if ▲Rinko▲ invites you？
translations.忘れたら針１千万本だから。: If you forget, it'll be a million needles.
translations.明日のデート、楽しみすぎ。はやく明日にならないかな。: I'm too excited for tomorrow's date. I can't wait for tomorrow.
translations.いよいよ明日。楽しみ。: Tomorrow is finally here. I'm looking forward to it.
translations.明日は何の日だったかな？覚えてるならいいよ。: What day is tomorrow？ It's fine if you remember.
translations.明日のデート、なんか美味しいもの食べようよ。: Let's eat something delicious on our date tomorrow.
translations.明日、雨ふらないよね。絶対晴れろとまでは言わないから、せめて曇りで。: It won't rain tomorrow, right？ I won't say it has to be sunny, but at least cloudy.
translations.▲主人公＊▲より▲凛▲のほうが絶対楽しみにしてるから。: ▲Rinko▲ is definitely looking forward to it more than ▲the protagonist＊▲.
translations.▲凛▲も楽しみ、なんかいつもより早く行っちゃいそう。: ▲Rinko▲ is excited too; she might leave earlier than usual.
translations.絶対楽しいデートにすること。: It has to be a fun date.
translations.はやくデート時間になれ。: I can't wait for the date time.
translations.もうさ、今からデートしようか……ダメか。: How about we just go on a date now... or is that not okay？
translations.わかったわかった、興奮しすぎない。: Okay, okay, I won't get too excited.
translations.今のメールは永久保存フォルダに入れといた。: I've saved the current email in the permanent folder.
translations.この携帯、落としたり忘れたりして、他人に見られたら、恥ずかしくてやばい。: If I drop or forget this phone and someone sees it, I'll be so embarrassed.
translations.今度のデート、お弁当準備しようかな。: Should I prepare a bento for our next date？
translations.そう言うと思ってたよ。: I thought you would say that.
translations.ん、じゃあまた今度作る。: Hmm, then I'll make it next time.
translations.明日は雨か……雨天決行だから。: It's going to rain tomorrow... but we're going no matter what.
translations.明日は曇りか……傘は持っていったほうがいいかも。: It's going to be cloudy tomorrow... maybe I should bring an umbrella.
translations.明日は晴れだって。: They say it's going to be sunny tomorrow.
translations.また一緒に旅行いける◙なんてラッキーだね。◙今からワクワクしてる。:
How lucky we can
travel together again
I'm already excited.
translations.今度の旅行も◙期待してるから。◙思い出作り。:
I'm looking
forward to the
next trip too
Let's make some
memories.
translations.もっと他にもあるじゃん。: There are more things to do.
translations.なに？◙枕投げなら負けないし。:
What？ I won't lose at
pillow fights.
translations.旅行の準備終わった？◙ぜんぜん終わる気が◙しないんだけど。:
Are you done
preparing for the
trip？ I don't feel
like I'm anywhere
near done.
translations.なにそれ、話に◙なんないじゃん。◙しょうがないから◙一緒に準備して◙あげてももい:
What is that？ It
doesn't even make
sense. I guess
I'll help you
prepare.
translations.リンコは保護者だから、◙そんな制限ないし。◙▲主人公＊▲は◙生徒だから３００円◙:
Rinko is the guardian,
so there are no
restrictions. ▲the
protagonist＊▲ is a
student, so if it
exceeds 300 yen, it will
be confiscated. Hehe.
translations.旅行の日まで◙待ちきれないんだけど。:
I can't wait until the
day of the trip.
translations.だよね。◙早く来ないかな旅行の日。:
Right？ I can't wait for
the day of the trip to
come.
translations.たまには良いこと◙言うじゃん。◙:
You say something
nice once in a
while.
translations.あのさ、旅行先で◙一番したいことって◙なに？:
So, what's the
number one thing
you want to do at
the travel
destination？
translations.いろいろ見て廻るのって◙楽しいよね。◙思い出もたくさん◙作れそうだし。:
Exploring different
places is fun. We can
make a lot of
memories.
translations.いやらしい写真撮るの◙禁止。◙猫の写真ならいくらでも◙撮っていいけどね。:
Taking inappropriate
photos is prohibited.
But you can take as
many cat photos as you
want.
translations.なに、告白大会でも◙開くつもり？◙いいよリンコが◙何でも聞いてあげる。:
What, are you
planning to hold a
confession contest？
It's fine, Rinko
will listen to
anything.
translations.もう寝た？◙明日旅行だから◙遅刻厳禁だからね。:
Did you already
sleep？ We have a
trip tomorrow, so
no tardiness.
translations.起きてんじゃん。◙早く寝ろっつーの。:
You're still
awake. Hurry up
and go to sleep.
translations.なんだ、リンコと同じじゃん。◙やっぱ、緊張して眠れ◙ないよね。◙寝坊したらどうし:
What？ You're the same as
Rinko. I guess I can't sleep
because I'm nervous. What if
I oversleep？
translations.今日の旅行とっても◙楽しかった。◙▲主人公＊▲と◙もっと色んなところに◙行ってみ:
Today's trip was so
much fun. I want to go
to more places with
▲the protagonist＊▲.
translations.何度行っても楽しいね。◙行った分だけ発見が◙あるっつーか。◙思い出もいっぱいだよ:
It's always fun no
matter how many times
you go. The more you
go, the more
discoveries you make.
So many memories.
translations.これから先もさ、◙リンコをいろんなところへ◙連れてってよ。◙どこにでもついて行く:
From now on, take Rinko to
various places. I'll go
anywhere with you.
translations.同じ部屋で朝を迎える◙のって夫婦みたいって◙思った。◙また同じような朝を◙迎えら:
Waking up in the same
room feels like being
a couple. I hope we
can have mornings like
this again.
translations.なんかあったっけ？◙でも大浴場は良かったかな。:
Was there something？
But the big bath was nice.
translations.ぜんぜん旅行気分が◙抜けないんだけど。◙ふとしたときに◙つい思い出したり。◙:
I still can't
shake off the
travel mood. I
find myself
remembering it at
random moments.
translations.なんかさ、朝起きたら◙隣が寂しいんだよね。◙なんだろ……。◙旅行のときの体温がさ:
You know, when I
wake up in the
morning, it feels
lonely next to me. I
wonder why... I
still can't forget
the warmth from the
trip.
translations.今、旅行の日のこと◙思い出してたんだけど。◙行ってよかったね。:
I was just remembering
the day of the trip.
I'm glad we went.
translations.あー、眠れない。◙旅行の日のことが頭を◙よぎってなんかドキドキ◙する。◙こんなの:
Ah, I can't sleep.
Thoughts of the trip
are making me feel all
fluttery. This is
weird...
translations.あのさ、◙やっぱりもう一回◙行きたいね。旅行。◙思い出もっと、もっと◙作りたいし:
You know, I really
want to go again. A
trip. I want to make
more memories.
translations.まだまだ先だなあ、楽しみ。: It's still a ways off, but I'm looking forward to it.
translations.どんなデートになるか、いろいろ妄想中。: I'm imagining what kind of date it will be.
translations.デートしてるところを夢に見たよ。楽しみにしすぎかな。: I dreamed about us on a date. Am I looking forward to it too much？
translations.カレンダーにデートの日をマークしてるんだけど、まだまだ離れてるなあ。: I'm marking the date on the calendar, but it's still far away.
translations.あーデート楽しみだなあ。ちょっと期待しすぎ？: Ah, I'm really looking forward to the date. Am I expecting too much？
translations.ちょっと相談、今度のデートで髪型変えてみようか悩んでるけど、どう思う？: I need to ask you something. I'm thinking about changing my hairstyle for our next date. What do you think？
translations.よし、どんな髪型がいいか、また相談する。: Alright, I'll consult you again about what hairstyle would be good.
translations.そっか、今の▲凛▲のことが好きなんだ？: I see, you like the current ▲Rinko▲？
translations.デートまであとちょっと。ドキドキしてきた。: Just a little more until the date. I'm getting excited.
translations.▲主人公＊▲とデートしてる夢みた。まだ何日もあるのに、こんなの毎晩見たら寝不足に: I dreamed about going on a date with ▲Protagonist＊▲. Even though it's still days away, if I keep dreaming like this, I'll be sleep-deprived.
translations.ずいぶん待った気がするけど、あとチョットだね。デート。: It feels like I've waited a long time, but it's almost here. The date.
translations.どんなデートになるか楽しみ。: I'm looking forward to what kind of date it will be.
translations.明日の約束、覚えてる？▲凛▲は楽しみにしてるよ。: Do you remember our promise for tomorrow？ ▲Rinko▲ is looking forward to it.
translations.明日の服、まだ決まってないんだけど。: I still haven't decided what to wear tomorrow.
translations.約束の場所、間違ったら蹴るよ。: If you get the meeting place wrong, I'll kick you.
translations.おはよ、デート日和だね。: Good morning, it's a perfect day for a date.
translations.今日のデートさ、いつもとちょっと違う感じになりそう……。: Today's date feels like it will be a bit different from usual...
translations.待ち合わせ、遅れないでよ。時間遅いからって油断してると、寝坊するよ。: Don't be late for the meeting. If you get too relaxed because it's late, you'll oversleep.
translations.あのさ、ちょっと本格的に料理の修業をしてみようと思ってるんだよね。: You know, I'm thinking about seriously training in cooking.
translations.外で美味しい料理を食べたとき、素材や作り方が気になるようになってきたんだよね。: When I eat delicious food outside, I start to wonder about the ingredients and how it's made.
translations.デートのときに食べた料理を参考にして、料理のレパートリーを増やそうと思ってるんだ: I'm planning to use the dishes we had on our date as references to expand my cooking repertoire.
translations.あのさ、食べてみたい料理ある？今は作れなくても、レシピ本で勉強して作れるようにな: By the way, is there a dish you'd like to try？ Even if I can't make it now, I can learn from a recipe book.
translations.▲凛▲の料理、どう？的確な感想は料理人を進歩させるらしいよ。食べたあとは感想を待: How's ▲Rinko▲'s cooking？ Accurate feedback helps a chef improve. I'll be waiting for your thoughts after you eat.
translations.調味料ってすごいよね、ほんの少しで料理の印象をガラっと変えるし、高級な味になった: Seasonings are amazing, just a little can completely change the impression of a dish and make it taste gourmet. It's a shortcut to improving cooking, but relying too much on seasonings isn't good either.
translations.料理ってレパートリーが増えるほど食べて欲しくなるもんなの。だから、これからもどん: The more I expand my cooking repertoire, the more I want you to eat it. So, I'll keep studying cooking.
translations.幼いあの人の夢を見た後、私はふたたび幼いあの人の夢を見るだろう。そこであの人と集:
After dreaming of that young
person, I will dream of them
again. In that dream, we had a
meal together... I had such a
dream. Dream Chaser.
translations.現実の時が流れる世界でひとつの季節の間の話。巨大な施設で書籍等を売買する催しにあ:
A story during one season in
the world where time flows. I
visited a large event to buy
and sell books with that
person once. Then, I visited a
shrine or a shop selling
dreams with that person twice.
Then, that person was happy...
I had such a dream. Dream
Chaser.
translations.現実の時が流れる世界で、一人城へ訪れること４度。そしてひとつの季節の間に、動きの:
In the world where time flows,
I visited a castle four times.
During one season, I watched a
dynamic video or enjoyed a
play once. That person became
a samurai... I had such a
dream. Dream Chaser.
translations.動画を作り、配信する施設を訪れること４度。食事処で食事をとること２度。あの人は職:
I visited a facility to create
and stream videos four times.
I had meals at a restaurant
twice. That person had a
job... I had such a dream.
Dream Chaser.
translations.現実の時が流れる世界でひとつの季節の間の話。あの人と、家政婦に給仕される場所を訪:
A story during one season in
the world where time flows. I
visited a place served by a
housekeeper with that person
twice, and a park with a
fountain twice. That person...
is that person？ I had such a
dream. Dream Chaser.
translations.あの人と功夫を模した遊戯に興じること３度、あの人から中華の料理をふるまわれること:
I engaged in a game resembling
kung fu with that person three
times, and was served Chinese
food by that person three
times. Then, during one season
in the world where time flows,
we had a rendezvous at an
amusement park twice. Then a
kick... I had such a dream.
Dream Chaser.
translations.現実の時が流れる世界でひとつの季節の間、猫のいる喫茶を訪れること２度、あの人と湖:
In the world where time flows,
I visited a café with cats
twice, and had a rendezvous
with that person by a lake
twice. After three
interactions by the lake, I
went meow... I had such a
dream. Dream Chaser.
translations.現実の時が流れる世界でひとつの季節の間の話。あの人と海を訪れること２度、植物を観:
A story during one season in
the world where time flows. I
visited the sea with that
person twice, and admired
plants twice. That person ate
me... I had such a dream.
Dream Chaser.
translations.■■■カメラ情報■■■◙この度は当社のカメラをご購入いただき、ありがとうございま:
■■■Camera Information■■■ Thank
you for purchasing our camera.
We will now introduce the
convenient features of the
camera. Enjoy your camera
life.
translations.■■■カメラ情報■■■◙基本的な機能についてご紹介します。◙カメラはＲボタンに構:
■■■Camera Information■■■ Let's
introduce the basic functions.
You can hold the camera with
the R button. To stop holding
the camera, press and hold the
R button. You can zoom with
the slide pad.
translations.■■■カメラ情報■■■◙高度な操作についてご紹介します。◙カメラにはフォーカスポ:
■■■Camera Information■■■ Let's
introduce advanced operations.
The camera has a focus point,
and if it moves, the photo
will blur. To prevent
blurring, you need to pause
for a moment.
translations.■■■カメラ情報■■■◙フィルター機能についてご紹介します。◙カメラには様々なフ:
■■■Camera Information■■■ Let's
introduce the filter function.
The camera can apply various
filters to your photos. If you
find a filter you like, please
purchase it at the camera
shop.
translations.■■■カメラ情報■■■◙ズーム機能についてご紹介します。◙レンズを購入頂くと、ズ:
■■■Camera Information■■■ Let's
introduce the zoom function.
By purchasing a lens, you can
increase the zoom
magnification.
translations.■■■カメラ情報■■■◙シャッター性能についてご紹介します。◙シャッター音を静音:
■■■Camera Information■■■ Let's
introduce shutter performance.
If you silence the shutter
sound, your girlfriend will be
less likely to notice that a
photo was taken. This allows
for more natural expressions.
translations.■■■カメラ情報■■■◙視線についてご紹介します。◙視線効果をカメラに適応頂くと:
■■■Camera Information■■■ Let's
talk about gaze. If you apply
gaze effects to the camera,
your girlfriend will be less
aware of the camera's
presence.
translations.■■■カメラ情報■■■◙音声認識についてご紹介します。◙撮影のアドバイスですが、:
■■■Camera Information■■■ Let's
introduce voice recognition.
For shooting advice, when in a
scene where you can call your
girlfriend, make sure to call
her. Start with her name or
some relaxing words.
translations.ゲーセンはよく行くけど、実は格ゲー以外はそこまで遊ばないんだよね、カレシと一緒に: I often go to the arcade, but I actually don't play much besides fighting games. If I go to the arcade with my boyfriend, the games I play might change.
translations.あのさ、またゲーセンいかない？一緒にいかないんだったら、▲凛▲１人で遊びに行くけ: Hey, want to go to the arcade again？ If you're not going with me, I'll go alone, you know, ▲Rinko▲.
translations.最近ゲーセンいってないんだよね。もしよかったら、こんど付き合ってくんない？: I haven't been to the arcade lately. If you're free, want to hang out next time？
translations.なんかムシャクシャした気分だからさ、ゲーセン行こうよ。んで、対戦ゲームで▲主人公: I'm feeling a bit restless, so let's go to the arcade. I'll totally wipe the floor with ▲主人公＊▲ in a fighting game.
translations.ジャックポット凄かった！メダルゲームにハマる人が多いの、理解できたよ。: The jackpot was amazing! I can see why so many people get hooked on medal games.
translations.■■■■ＷＥＢ情報■■■■◙ＷＥＢサイト、ＴＯＷＡＮＯ．ＮＥＴです。今後、お得な:
■■■■WEB Info■■■■ This is the
website, TOWANO.NET. We'll be
sharing great deals in the
future.
translations.■■■■ＷＥＢ情報■■■■◙ＴＯＷＡＮＯ．ＮＥＴです。スポット情報をご紹介！今話:
■■■■WEB Info■■■■ This is
TOWANO.NET. Check out the
latest date spot info! Updated
hot date spots.
translations.■■■■ＷＥＢ情報■■■■◙ＴＯＷＡＮＯ．ＮＥＴです。イベント情報をご紹介！デー:
■■■■WEB Info■■■■ This is
TOWANO.NET. Event info is
here! Updated events at date
spots.
translations.普段▲凛▲のこと、人にどんな風に紹介してるの？ヘンなこと言ってない？: How do you usually introduce ▲凛▲ to others？ I hope you’re not saying anything weird.
translations.紹介される時、ちょっと緊張しちゃったよ。▲凛▲へんな顔してなかった？: I got a bit nervous when I was introduced. Was ▲凛▲ making a weird face？
translations.たくさんの人に紹介してもらったね。もう１０００人くらい？覚えきれないよ。: You've been introduced to a lot of people, huh？ About 1000 already？ I can't remember them all.
translations.いろんな人を紹介されたけど……やっぱり▲凛▲が一番好きなのは、▲主人公＊▲だよ。: I've met a lot of people, but my favorite is still ▲凛▲, of course.
translations.▲主人公＊▲のこと、いろいろバラしといたから。女子トークは怖いよぉ。: I spilled a lot of details about ▲主人公＊▲. Girl talk is scary!
translations.名刺交換してたよね？どんな人？おもしろい人だったら▲凛▲にも紹介してよ。: You exchanged business cards, right？ What kind of person are they？ If they're interesting, introduce them to ▲凛▲.
translations.対戦ゲームはやっぱり燃えるね。２人で練習してさ、ぱずるだまの頂点を極めようよ。: Fighting games are really intense. Let's practice together and master the puzzle ball!
translations.友達と遊びに行ってきたからさ、そのときの写メ。▲ＨＮ＊＊＊＊▲のカノジョとツーシ: I went out with friends, and here’s a photo. A two-shot with ▲ＨＮ＊＊＊＊▲'s girlfriend.
translations.また写真撮ったから送信。すっかり仲良くなった、▲ＨＮ＊＊＊＊▲さんのカノジョ。ど: I took another photo, sending it over. I’ve really gotten close with ▲ＨＮ＊＊＊＊▲'s girlfriend. Who's cuter？
translations.▲ＨＮ＊＊＊＊▲さんのカノジョと料理について話してて盛り上がったからさ、一緒に作: I got excited talking about cooking with ▲ＨＮ＊＊＊＊▲'s girlfriend, so we decided to make something together. Learned a lot.
translations.気が向いたから朝の散歩。ちょっと撮ってみた。: I felt like going for a morning walk, so I took a few pictures.
translations.約束もないし、１人でぶらぶら中。: I have no plans, just wandering around by myself.
translations.デートの予定がなかったから、たまには１人で街を散策中: Since I had no date plans, I'm exploring the city alone for a change.
translations.ちょっとショッピング中。: Just doing a bit of shopping.
translations.こんな髪型どうかな？意見聞かせて。: How about this hairstyle？ Let me know what you think.
translations.お、好評だった。じゃあこの髪型にしようかな。: Oh, it got a good response. Maybe I'll go with this hairstyle.
translations.じゃあこの髪型にしよっかな。服のイメージも合わせてみよっと。: Then I might go with this hairstyle. I'll match it with the outfit too.
translations.▲凛▲もそう思ってた。じゃあ髪型は変えない。: ▲凛▲ thinks so too. Then I won't change my hairstyle.
translations.オッケー。じゃあデートまでに考えとく。: Okay. I'll think about it before our date.
translations.ショップで試着中。買おうかどうか悩んでるんだけど、似合ってる？: Trying on clothes at the shop. I'm debating whether to buy it, does it suit me？
translations.じゃあ買っちゃおうかな。次のデートで着ていくかもしれないから、よろしく。: Then I might just buy it. I might wear it on our next date, so please.
translations.そうなんだ。わざわざ感想くれてありがと。: I see. Thanks for taking the time to give me your thoughts.
translations.記念日、ちゃんと覚えてる？夕方、必ず空けといて。: Do you remember the anniversary？ Keep your evening free.
translations.今日はサンキュ。▲主人公＊▲は楽しかった？: Thanks for today. Did you have fun, ▲主人公＊▲？
translations.誕生日の夜は▲凛▲と一緒だから。わかった？: I'll be with ▲凛▲ on my birthday night. Got it？
translations.メールでも言っとく。誕生日おめでと。: I'll mention it in an email too. Happy birthday!
translations.▲凛▲の誕生日、こんなに楽しかったのって久しぶり……。もしかしたら初めてかも。: It's been a while since ▲凛▲'s birthday was this much fun... maybe it's the first time.
translations.今日って七夕。覚えてる？: Today is Tanabata. Do you remember？
translations.願い事、叶うかな？: I wonder if my wish will come true？
translations.織姫と彦星も、▲凛▲達みたいに幸せかな？: Are Orihime and Hikoboshi as happy as ▲凛▲ and I？
translations.週末は十羽野祭りだね、一緒に行かない？: The Juuhano Festival is this weekend, want to go together？
translations.お祭り、けっこう楽しみ。週末じゃんね。: I'm really looking forward to the festival. It's this weekend.
translations.▲凛▲の浴衣姿、子供っぽくない？: Doesn't ▲凛▲'s yukata look a bit childish？
translations.十羽野祭り、終わるとやっぱ、寂しい。: After the Juuhano Festival, it feels a bit lonely.
translations.明日は花火大会。絶対いいとこで見たいから、遅れないこと。: Tomorrow is the fireworks festival. I want to see it from a good spot, so don't be late.
translations.花火、超キレイだった！サイコー！: The fireworks were super beautiful! Amazing!
translations.どこにいる？今日体育祭なんだけど。: Where are you？ It's the sports festival today.
translations.はー疲れた。でも、楽しかったかな。: Ah, I'm tired. But I think it was fun.
translations.ハロウィンパーティか、目立ちすぎないようにしよ。: Halloween party, I should try not to stand out too much.
translations.ハロウィン覚えてる？パーティもあるんだから、ちゃんと遅れずに来るように。: Remember Halloween？ There’s a party, so make sure to come on time.
translations.ハロウィン思ったより楽しかった。▲主人公＊▲は？: Halloween was more fun than I expected. What about you, ▲主人公＊▲？
translations.いよいよ文化祭か、みんな盛り上がるだろうな。▲凛▲たちも負けてらんないね: Finally, it's the cultural festival. Everyone will be excited. ▲凛▲ and the others can't fall behind.
translations.今日は文化祭。休みじゃないから。: Today is the cultural festival. It's not a day off.
translations.文化祭終わった……なんかちょっと寂しいかも。: The cultural festival is over... I feel a bit lonely.
translations.なんか商店街が一気にクリスマス気分になってた。もうそんな時期か。: The shopping district suddenly feels like Christmas. Is it that time already？
translations.家に帰ったら弟がクリスマスツリーに変な飾りしてた。お菓子を飾るんじゃないっつーの: When I got home, my brother had put weird decorations on the Christmas tree. Not candy!
translations.クリスマスイブ……街はカップルだらけなんだろうね。ま、▲凛▲達もだけど。: Christmas Eve... the streets must be full of couples. Well, ▲凛▲ and the others too.
translations.今日がクリスマスイブってこと覚えてる？: Do you remember today is Christmas Eve？
translations.クリスマスデート、すごく楽しかった。クリスマスなめてた。: The Christmas date was really fun. I underestimated Christmas.
