translations.あのさ、渡したいもの、あるんだけど。: Hey, I have something I want to give you.
translations.あけましておめでと。今から初詣に行くんだけど、一緒にいかない？: Happy New Year! I'm going to the first shrine visit now, want to join？
translations.何度も言うのも変だけど、今年もよろしくおねがいします。: It feels weird to say it again, but I look forward to this year too.
translations.遠足って、学年違っても一緒にいられる時間、あるかな？: On the field trip, will there be time to be together even if we're in different grades？
translations.おはよ。今日は遠足なんだから、遅刻とか厳禁。じゃ、学校で。: Good morning. It's the field trip today, so no tardiness allowed. See you at school.
translations.はー歩きすぎて疲れた。でも、結構楽しかったかな。: Phew, I walked too much and I'm tired. But it was pretty fun.
translations.プール開きか、授業いっしょだっけ？: Is today the pool opening？ Are we in the same class？
translations.今日はプール開き。合同授業だから、男子は別の意味で盛り上がってるんじゃない？: Today is the pool opening. It's a joint class, so the boys are probably excited for different reasons.
translations.なんか半分だまされた気分。でもせっかく新しい水着買ったんだし、どっか遊びに連れて: I feel a bit tricked. But since I bought a new swimsuit, take me somewhere fun.
translations.まあ、ちゃんと準備しといたから、期待してていいよ。: Well, I prepared properly, so you can look forward to it.
translations.もう食べた？いろいろあったけど、ちゃんと愛情込めてるから。心して食すように。: Have you eaten yet？ There were various things, but I made them with love. Enjoy.
translations.用意してるからさ、渡したいんだけど……どっかで会える？: I have something prepared, so I want to give it to you... Can we meet somewhere？
translations.今日の▲主人公＊▲、思い出したら、なんか笑えてきた、でもまあ、プレゼントありがと: Thinking about today’s ▲主人公＊▲ made me laugh, but thanks for the gift.
translations.今日の嘘のことは忘れるから。そして来年は▲凛▲が▲主人公＊▲をだますから。: I'll forget about today's lie. And next year, ▲凛▲ will trick ▲主人公＊▲.
translations.それじゃ、期待しとく。: Well then, I'll be looking forward to it.
translations.覚えてたんならいいや。じゃあ後で。: If you remembered, that's good. See you later.
translations.やっぱりね。予定に書いといてよね。: I knew it. Write it down in your schedule.
translations.そだね、これからもたくさん思い出作っていこーよ。: Yeah, let's make lots of memories from now on.
translations.へへ、なんか照れてきた。: Hehe, I'm getting a bit shy.
translations.推薦図書。依頼を受けちゃったからには、ちゃんと責任もってやらないとね。: Recommended reading. Since I accepted the request, I have to take responsibility.
translations.読書で▲主人公＊▲に負けるなんて……。寝る前にちょっと読んどこっと。: Losing to ▲主人公＊▲ in reading... I’ll read a bit before bed.
translations.推薦図書の件、ちゃんと読んでる？もし間に合わなかったら、委員会で何言われるかわか: About the recommended reading, are you actually reading it？ If you don't finish in time, who knows what the committee will say.
translations.推薦図書の件。そろそろ読み終わらないとヤバい気がするんだけど、どうなってる？: About the recommended reading. I feel like I need to finish soon, what's going on？
translations.推薦図書、思ったより大変だったけど、面白かった。みんなもあの書評を読んで、「ぼく: The recommended reading was tougher than I thought, but it was interesting. I hope everyone reads that review and gets interested in 'My Major Spoon'.
translations.次はさ、▲主人公＊▲が読んでみたい本を選んでよ。推薦図書とか関係なくね。: Next, choose a book that ▲主人公＊▲ wants to read. It doesn't have to be related to the recommended reading.
translations.これからもどんどん料理作るよ。作ったら絶対食べるように！: I'll keep cooking more and more. Make sure to eat what I make!
translations.今のマイブームは和食かな。: My current trend is Japanese food.
translations.今のマイブームは中華かな。: My current trend is Chinese food.
translations.今のマイブームは洋食かな。: My current trend is Western food.
translations.今は思いついた料理を作ってる感じかな。: Right now, I'm just making whatever dishes come to mind.
translations.今はどんなものでも積極的に作りたい気分。: Right now, I feel like making anything actively.
translations.最近は和食が苦手かな。この前大失敗しちゃったから。: Recently, I'm not good at Japanese food. I had a big failure the other day.
translations.最近は中華が苦手かな。この前大失敗しちゃったから。: Recently, I'm not good at Chinese food. I had a big failure the other day.
translations.最近は洋食が苦手かな。この前大失敗しちゃったから。: I've been struggling with Western food lately. I had a big failure the other day.
translations.うーん、最近は料理スランプ気味。何作ってもイマイチ。: Hmm, I've been in a cooking slump lately. Everything I make turns out mediocre.
translations.最近はスイーツ系が苦手かな。この前大失敗しちゃったから。: I've been struggling with sweets lately. I had a big failure the other day.
translations.プレゼントのリサーチ？んーかわいい系のものだったら嬉しいかな。: Researching gifts？ Hmm, I'd be happy with something cute.
translations.プレゼントのリサーチ？んー清楚系のものだったら嬉しいかな。: Researching gifts？ Hmm, I'd be happy with something elegant.
translations.プレゼントのリサーチ？んーカジュアル系のものだったら嬉しいかな。: Researching gifts？ Hmm, I'd be happy with something casual.
translations.そういう事は本人に聞くもんじゃないって。: You shouldn't ask the person directly about that.
translations.▲凛▲が欲しいと思うもの、わかんない？いつも一緒にいるんだから、わかるよね？: Don't you know what ▲Rinko▲ would want？ Since we're always together, you should know.
translations.小早川へのプレゼント？クールな色のものがいいと思うぜ、俺の情報によると。: Gift for Kobayakawa？ I think something in cool colors would be good, according to my info.
translations.小早川へのプレゼント？暖色系のものがいいと思うぜ、俺の情報によると。: Gift for Kobayakawa？ I think something in warm colors would be good, according to my info.
translations.小早川へのプレゼント？んーちょっと今データ不足なんだよ。悪いな。: Gift for Kobayakawa？ Hmm, I'm a bit short on data right now. Sorry.
translations.カノジョへのプレゼント？あの子だったら寒色が似合うと思うけど。: Gift for my girlfriend？ I think cool colors would suit her.
translations.カノジョへのプレゼント？あの子だったら暖色が似合うと思うけど。: Gift for my girlfriend？ I think warm colors would suit her.
translations.カノジョへのプレゼント？あの子だったら……よくわかんないや。: Gift for my girlfriend？ I'm not really sure about that...
translations.カノジョさんへのプレゼント？そうね……やっぱりかわいい感じのプレゼントがいいと思: Gift for my girlfriend？ Well... I think something cute would be nice.
translations.カノジョさんへのプレゼント？そうね……やっぱり清楚な感じのプレゼントがいいと思う: Gift for my girlfriend？ Well... I think something elegant would be nice.
translations.カノジョさんへのプレゼント？そうね……やっぱりカジュアルな感じのプレゼントがいい: Gift for my girlfriend？ Well... I think something casual would be nice.
translations.カノジョさんへのプレゼント？せっかく相談してくれたのに、ごめんなさい。すぐにはい: Gift for my girlfriend？ Sorry for not being able to give good advice right away. But I'm here to help.
translations.今度のデートでさ、▲主人公＊▲が気に入ってくれるようなアクセをつけて行こうと思う: For our next date, I'm thinking of wearing an accessory that ▲Protagonist▲ would like. What do you think？
translations.ふーん、帽子ね。オッケー、それじゃどんな帽子をコーディネートするか考えてみるよ。: Hmm, a hat, huh？ Okay, I'll think about what kind of hat to coordinate.
translations.ふーん、メガネね。オッケー、それじゃどんなメガネをコーディネートするか考えてみる: Hmm, glasses, huh？ Okay, I'll think about what kind of glasses to coordinate.
translations.ふーん、指輪ね。オッケー、それじゃどんな指輪をコーディネートするか考えてみるよ。: Hmm, a ring, huh？ Okay, I'll think about what kind of ring to coordinate.
translations.あのさ、指輪ってどっちの手にはめるのが正解だっけ？: By the way, which hand is the right one for wearing a ring？
translations.左ね、わかった◙◙って……さすがに意味くらいわかるっつーの。別にいいけど。:
Left, got it. Of
course I know what
that means. It's fine, though.
translations.あのさ、この前のデートでかぶってた帽子、似合ってた？: By the way, did I look good in the hat I wore on our last date？
translations.へへ、次のデートもかぶっていこっと。: Hehe, I'll wear it again on our next date.
translations.そっかー。帽子はやめとこう。: I see. Maybe I should skip the hat.
translations.また旅行にいけるんだ。◙なんか幸せすぎて◙バチあたりそう。:
I can go on another
trip. I'm so happy it
feels like I'm
tempting fate.
translations.旅行、何回目だっけ？◙今回も期待してるし。:
How many trips is
this now？ I'm
looking forward to
this one too.
translations.なにそれ。◙じゃあ、どんどん◙連れて行ってくれるって◙ことだね。ラッキー。:
What’s that？ So you’ll
keep taking me along？
Lucky me.
translations.へへ、じゃあさ、◙おばあちゃんになって◙からもよろしく。:
Hehe, then please
keep taking me even
when I'm an old
lady.
translations.旅行の準備慣れないし。◙もう荷物つめた？:
I'm not used to
preparing for trips.
Have you packed your
bags yet？
translations.まじ、そんな準備でき◙てんの？◙じゃあさ、リンコの準備も◙手伝ってよね。:
Seriously, are you
really ready？ Then
help Rinko with her
preparations too.
translations.なにそれ？◙もしかしてペアルックのパジャマとか？:
What’s that？ Are you talking
about matching pajamas？
translations.旅行ってさ、当日を◙待ってる間も楽しいよね。:
Traveling is fun even
while waiting for the
day to arrive.
translations.別に子供でもいいし。◙楽しいのは事実だし。:
It's fine even if
it's with kids. The
fun is what matters.
translations.あのさ。◙箱根旅行で一番◙楽しみなのって、なに？:
By the way, what's the
most exciting thing
about the Hakone trip？
translations.無難だね。◙でも、楽しいよね。◙今からワクワクだよ。:
That's a safe
choice. But it will
be fun. I'm already
excited.
translations.もちろんリンコを◙きれいに撮ってく◙れるんだよね。:
Of course, you'll
be able to take
beautiful pictures
of Rinko.
translations.な、◙あくまでごっこだかんね。◙その……、よろしく……。:
Well, it's just a
role-play, okay？ So...
please...
translations.ハネムーンってテーマ◙やっぱり意識しちゃう。◙なんだか眠れない。:
I can't help but think
about the honeymoon
theme. I can't seem to
sleep.
translations.わかってるっつーの。◙意識してたリンコが◙バカみたいじゃん。:
I know, right？ It
makes Rinko look
silly for being
conscious of it.
translations.本当のハネムーンじゃないんだから、別にいいんだけど。◙でもやっぱ、緊張する。◙あ:
It's not a real
honeymoon, so it's
fine. But still, I'm
nervous. Um... I'll
skip it. Good night.
translations.今回の旅行、ちょっと◙特別だったかも。◙▲主人公＊▲と◙一緒にいて、ほんとに◙新:
This trip felt a bit
special. Being with
▲Protagonist▲ really
made me feel like a
newlywed.
translations.思い出がさ、どんどん◙増えていくのが幸せ。◙▲主人公＊▲となら◙どこに行っても楽:
I'm happy that memories
are piling up. I really
think it's fun to go
anywhere with
▲Protagonist▲.
translations.だよね……。◙これからもリンコと一緒に◙色んな思い出つくろうよ。:
Right... Let's keep
making various memories
together with Rinko.
translations.夜に一緒にいられるのって◙特別なことだよね。◙いつか、当たり前のことに◙なるのか:
Being together at
night is something
special. Will it ever
become a normal thing？
translations.いつかは本当の◙ハネムーンにいけるのかな。◙:
Will I ever be able to
go on a real honeymoon
someday？
translations.なんかさ、◙▲主人公＊▲が◙隣にいないのが違和感。◙旅行中ずっと一緒だった◙から:
It feels strange that
the protagonist isn't
next to me. Maybe it's
because we were
together the whole
trip.
translations.旅行のときみたいに、◙一日中一緒にいられるのが◙当たり前になる日って◙来るのかな:
I wonder if there will
be a day when it's
normal to be together
all day like during the
trip.
translations.今、旅行のときに撮った◙写真見てた。◙なんかにやける。:
I was just looking at
the photos we took
during the trip. They
make me smile.
translations.旅行帰りからの気分が◙抜けない。◙一緒のおうちに◙帰れたらいいのに。:
I can't shake off
the feeling from
returning from the
trip. I wish we
could go home
together.
translations.やっぱり旅行楽しかった。◙また行きたい、かも。◙もちろん連れてって◙くれるよね。:
The trip was really
fun. I might want to
go again. Of course,
you'll take me, right？
Rinko's husband...
heh.
translations.新しい服買ったよ。今度のデートで着ていこうかな。: I bought new clothes. I think I'll wear them on our next date.
translations.あのさ、学校指定のカーディガンって、どう思う？: So, what do you think about the school-designated cardigan？
translations.ふーん、そうなんだ。ちょっと肩が冷えると思ってたとこなんだよね。: Hmm, I see. I was just thinking my shoulders felt a bit cold.
translations.▲凛▲の髪ってどう思う？主に長さについてなんだけど。: What do you think about Rinko's hair？ Mainly about the length.
translations.ふーん、こんな感じでいいんだ。じゃあ今のままでいいや。: Hmm, so this length is fine. Then I'll keep it as it is.
translations.変えてもいいってことか、そっか。: So it's okay to change it, got it.
translations.あのさ、髪の色を変えてみようと思うんだけど、どうかな？: Hey, I'm thinking of changing my hair color. What do you think？
translations.明るさか……今より明るいのと暗いの、どっちがいい？: Brightness... do you prefer lighter or darker than now？
translations.じゃあ、ちょっと明るめにしてみよっかな。: Then, I think I'll go a bit lighter.
translations.じゃあ暗めにしてみよっかな。: Then, I think I'll go a bit darker.
translations.色の濃さ……どういうイメージ？: Color intensity... what kind of image do you have？
translations.じゃあ、ちょっと濃い感じにしてみようかな。: Then, I think I'll go for a slightly darker look.
translations.じゃあ、ちょっと薄い感じにしてみようかな。: Then, I think I'll go for a slightly lighter look.
translations.へえ、そうかな？じゃあ、今のままでいいや。: Oh, really？ Then I'll keep it as it is.
translations.あのさ、髪の色を変えてみようかと考えてるんだけど、どう思う？: Hey, I'm thinking about changing my hair color. What do you think？
translations.じゃあ少しだけ変えるとしてさ、どんな感じがいい？: If I change it a little, what kind of look would you like？
translations.いい感じって……わかった、やってみる。: A good look... got it, I'll try it.
translations.お任せか……わかった、やってみる。: Leave it to me... got it, I'll try it.
translations.そう来たか。いいよ、やってみる。◙で、どういうイメージ？:
So that's how it is. Okay,
I'll try it. So, what kind of
image？
translations.それも逆に新鮮でいいかもね。わかった。: That might actually be refreshing. Got it.
translations.たしかにそうかも、少しは変えてみるよ。: That might be true, I'll change it a bit.
translations.明日は部活？サボらないように。: Do you have club activities tomorrow？ Don't skip.
translations.明日ってバイトの日だっけ。: Is tomorrow a part-time job day？
translations.明日は委員会。遅刻しないこと。: Tomorrow is the committee. Don't be late.
translations.部活に行かなかったらしいじゃん、なんかあった？: I heard you didn't go to club activities. Did something happen？
translations.今日の委員会、なんで来なかったの？: Why didn't you come to today's committee？
translations.アルバイト、ちゃんと行ってる？: Are you going to your part-time job properly？
translations.最近部活に行ってないらしいね、なんかあった？: I heard you haven't been going to club activities lately. Did something happen？
translations.最近、委員会にぜんぜん来ないけど、なんかあった？▲凛▲肩身が狭いんだけど。: You haven't been coming to the committee at all lately. Did something happen？ Rinko feels out of place.
translations.あのさ、しばらくアルバイトに行ってないって噂を聞いたんだけど、どうかした？: Hey, I heard a rumor that you haven't been going to your part-time job. Is something wrong？
translations.明日は部活？: Do you have club activities tomorrow？
translations.明日はバイト？: Do you have a part-time job tomorrow？
translations.委員会にはちゃんと出席するように。: Make sure to attend the committee.
translations.ありがと。起きれたみたい。: Thanks. Looks like I managed to wake up.
translations.夜、噴水公園で待ってる。: I'll be waiting at the fountain park tonight.
translations.夜、ゲーセンで待ってる。: I'll be waiting at the arcade tonight.
translations.夜、駅前で待ってる。: I'll be waiting in front of the station tonight.
translations.夜、いつもありがと。待ってるから。: Thanks as always for tonight. I'll be waiting.
translations.夜に一人で待っとけって？別にいいけど。: You want me to wait alone at night？ That's fine.
translations.男子とメールってのも、意外と悪くはないかも。これからもたまにメールする、たぶん。: Emailing a guy isn't so bad after all. I'll probably email you sometimes.
translations.こんなにメールしたの、男子じゃアンタが初めて。: You're the first guy I've emailed this much.
translations.なんかいい感じだよね、アタシたち。そう思わない？: We seem to have a good vibe, don't you think？
translations.うん、だからこれからもよろしく。: Yeah, so let's keep this up.
translations.オススメの本があれば教えて。: Let me know if you have any book recommendations.
translations.面白いニュースないかな。: I wonder if there's any interesting news.
translations.オススメＣＤあったら教えて。: Let me know if you have any CD recommendations.
translations.今度つげ口しとく。: I'll keep that in mind next time.
translations.縛ってる方がいい！: It's better to be tied up!
translations.おはよ。◙今日は起きるの◙大変だったなぁ。◙▲主人公＊▲はどう？:
Good morning.
Today was
tough to wake up.
How about ▲主人公＊▲？
translations.クラスに寝ぐせ◙付いてる男の子がいる。◙▲主人公＊▲は◙大丈夫だよね？:
Good morning. There's
a boy in class with
bedhead. You're okay,
right ▲主人公＊▲？
translations.おはよ。◙ほんとは◙▲主人公＊▲のキスで◙目覚めたかったな▼:
Good morning. I
really wanted to
wake up with a kiss
from ▲主人公＊▲▼
translations.おはよ。◙今日も▲主人公＊▲に◙会いたいな▼:
Good morning. I want
to see ▲主人公＊▲ today
too▼
translations.▲主人公＊▲の◙顔が見たいなぁ、◙なぁんてね:
I want to see
▲主人公＊▲'s face,
just saying.
translations.おはよ。◙ねむいけど、◙がんばって起きる。◙▲主人公＊▲も◙いつまでも寝てたら◙:
Good morning. I'm
sleepy, but I'll
do my best to wake
up. Don't sleep in
too long, ▲主人公＊▲!
translations.クラスの友達と恋バナ中。◙▲主人公＊▲のこと◙たくさん白状◙させられちゃった▼:
I'm talking about love
with friends in class. I
ended up confessing a
lot about ▲主人公＊▲▼
translations.クラスの男の子たちが◙ハシャぎ回ってる。◙▲主人公＊▲の方が◙よっぽど大人よね:
The boys in class
are having fun.
▲Protagonist＊▲ is
much more mature,
right？
translations.女心と秋の空。◙ほんとそうかもね、◙私も▲主人公＊▲に◙振り回されてばっかり。◙:
The heart of a woman
is like the autumn
sky. That might be
true, I'm always being
tossed around by
▲Protagonist＊▲. But
I'm happy▼
translations.今日も寒いね。◙▲主人公＊▲の隣で◙あったまりたいな:
It's cold today. I
want to warm up
next to
▲Protagonist＊▲.
translations.今日のお客さんは◙小さい子供が多いなぁ。◙子供もカワイイけど、◙やっぱり▲主人公:
There are a lot of
little kids among
today's customers.
Kids are cute, but
▲Protagonist＊▲ is
still the best▼.
translations.夏はドリンクバーの中身が◙すぐなくなっちゃうから、◙▲主人公＊▲も◙気を付けてお:
In summer, the drink bar
runs out of stuff
quickly, so make sure to
watch out,
▲Protagonist＊▲.
translations.宿題終わり！◙▲主人公＊▲はどう？◙忘れちゃダメだよ:
Homework is done!
How about you,
▲Protagonist＊▲？
Don't forget, okay？
translations.今日のお料理、◙上手くいったかも。◙▲主人公＊▲は◙料理の上手な女の子の方が◙好:
I think today's cooking
went well. Do you prefer
girls who are good at
cooking, ▲Protagonist＊▲？
translations.今日は何食べた？◙▲主人公＊▲の◙好みは常に◙把握しておかないとね♪:
What did you eat
today？ I need to
always know
▲Protagonist＊▲'s
preferences♪
translations.部屋で一人になると、◙どうしても◙▲主人公＊▲のこと◙考えちゃうな:
When I'm alone in my
room, I can't help
but think about
▲Protagonist＊▲.
translations.そういえば最近、◙友達からよく◙「前よりキレイになった」◙って言われるんだけど…:
By the way, recently,
friends often tell me,
'You look prettier than
before.' Is it because
of ▲Protagonist＊▲？
translations.今ドラマに出てる俳優、◙▲主人公＊▲に◙ちょっと似てるかも。◙▲主人公＊▲の方が:
The actor in the drama
right now looks a bit
like ▲Protagonist＊▲.
But ▲Protagonist＊▲ is
cooler▼.
translations.読書の秋。◙▲主人公＊▲は今◙何か読んでる？:
Autumn is for
reading. Are you
reading anything
right now,
▲Protagonist＊▲？
translations.私は寝るね、おやすみ。◙▲主人公＊▲も◙あんまり◙夜更かししないでね:
I'm going to sleep
now, good night. Don't
stay up too late,
▲Protagonist＊▲.
translations.おやすみ。◙明日は▲主人公＊▲に◙会えるかな？:
Good night. I wonder
if I'll see
▲Protagonist＊▲
tomorrow？
translations.今ね、クラスの友達と◙電話してたの。◙▲主人公＊▲のこと◙ノロケちゃった▼:
I was just on the
phone with my
classmates. I
bragged about
▲Protagonist＊▲▼.
translations.▲主人公＊▲は◙お風呂好き？◙私はかなり長く◙入っちゃうんだよね:
Do you like baths,
▲Protagonist＊▲？ I
tend to stay in
for quite a while.
translations.おやすみ。◙▲主人公＊▲は◙防寒対策どうしてるのかな:
Good night. I wonder how
▲Protagonist＊▲ is
keeping warm.
translations.おやすみ。◙寒いなぁ、◙▲主人公＊▲を◙抱きしめながら眠れば◙きっとあったかいん:
Good night. It's so
cold, if I could sleep
while hugging
▲Protagonist＊▲, it would
definitely be warm.
translations.今日の▲主人公＊▲は◙何するのかな？:
I wonder what
▲Protagonist＊▲ will
do today？
translations.たまには◙お昼寝もいいかなー。◙▲主人公＊▲が隣に◙いたらもっといいんだけど:
Sometimes a nap sounds
nice. It would be even
better if ▲Protagonist＊▲
was next to me.
translations.今はお部屋で◙ティータイム。◙▲主人公＊▲って◙コーヒー派？紅茶派？◙それとも日:
Right now, I'm
having tea time in
my room. Are you a
coffee person,
▲Protagonist＊▲？ Tea？
Or Japanese tea？
translations.シャツのボタンが◙取れちゃったから◙直してたの。◙▲主人公＊▲も◙何かあったら言:
I was fixing a button
on my shirt that came
off. If you need
anything, just let me
know, ▲Protagonist＊▲？
I'll help you out.
translations.んー、ヒマだなぁ。◙ヒマになると◙▲主人公＊▲のこと◙ばかり考えちゃうから、◙ち:
Hmm, I'm bored. When
I'm bored, I can't
help but think about
▲Protagonist＊▲, which
is a bit frustrating.
translations.休みにやり残したことは◙もうない、かな。◙▲主人公＊▲は◙何か忘れてない？:
I don't think there's
anything left to do
during the break. Did
you forget anything,
▲Protagonist＊▲？
translations.アイロンがけって◙結構好きだな。◙そのうち▲主人公＊▲◙のワイシャツも……◙なん:
I actually like
ironing. Maybe I'll
iron
▲Protagonist＊▲'s
dress shirt
someday... just
kidding.
translations.▲主人公＊▲に◙会いたいな……。◙ごめん、◙困らせちゃうよね:
I want to see
▲Protagonist＊▲...
Sorry, I know that
must be annoying.
translations.おやすみ。◙今日も１日◙▲主人公＊▲のことが◙大好きでした▼◙なんてね:
Good night. I loved
▲Protagonist＊▲ all
day today▼. Just
kidding.
translations.▲主人公＊▲▼◙特に用事はないの、◙ごめんね▼:
I don't have
anything in
particular to say
to ▲Protagonist＊▲,
sorry▼.
translations.私、▲主人公＊▲に◙何かあったんじゃ◙ないかって。◙もうこんな心配、◙させないで:
I was worried that
something happened
to ▲Protagonist＊▲.
Please don't make
me worry like this
anymore.
translations.▲主人公＊▲が◙私のこと無視するんなら、◙私も仕返しすること、◙考えるからね:
If ▲Protagonist＊▲
ignores me, I'll think
about getting back at
you.
translations.▲主人公＊▲から◙誘ってくれて、◙すごく嬉しかったの。◙ありがとう:
I was really happy
that you invited me,
▲Protagonist＊▲.
Thank you.
translations.今、▲主人公＊▲の◙ことばかり考えてた。◙明日もまた会えるのに、◙ヘンかな:
I was just thinking
about ▲Protagonist＊▲.
Is it weird that I can
see you tomorrow？
translations.ねぇ、▲主人公＊▲も◙明日のデート、◙待ち遠しい？:
Hey, are you looking
forward to our date
tomorrow,
▲Protagonist＊▲？
translations.▲主人公＊▲が◙体育の授業してるとこ、◙たまに見えるのよね。◙運動もがんばってね:
I can sometimes see
▲Protagonist＊▲ during
gym class. Keep up the
good work!
translations.▲主人公＊▲の学年、◙もうすぐ◙体力テストだって。◙怪我しないように、◙がんばっ:
I heard your grade
is having a physical
fitness test soon.
Be careful not to
get injured, and do
your best!
translations.音楽の実技テストが◙あるみたいだけど、◙▲主人公＊▲は◙大丈夫？:
I heard there's a
music practical
test coming up.
Are you okay,
▲Protagonist＊▲？
translations.３年の女子はね、◙けっこう◙下級生の男の子の評判◙チェックしてるんだよ。◙▲主人:
The third-year girls are
checking the reputation
of the younger boys. So
be careful,
▲Protagonist＊▲, you
might get checked too.
translations.クラスに、◙よく先生から注意される◙男の子がいるんだけど。◙ちょっとみっともない:
There's a boy in class
who often gets scolded
by the teacher. It's a
bit embarrassing, so be
careful, ▲Protagonist＊▲.
translations.一度にお皿をたくさん運ぶ◙姿って、結構カッコいいと◙思うのよね。◙いかにもウェイ:
I think carrying a lot
of plates at once looks
pretty cool. It really
feels like a waiter.
Keep it up,
▲Protagonist＊▲.
translations.店長が新メニュー◙考えてるみたい。◙▲主人公＊▲にも◙味見のお願いが◙いくかもよ:
The manager seems
to be thinking of
a new menu. You
might get asked to
taste it,
▲Protagonist＊▲？
translations.おはよ。◙▲主人公＊▲の◙メールで起きちゃった。◙私にとっては◙最高の目覚めかな:
Good morning. I woke
up to your email,
▲Protagonist＊▲. It's
the best way to wake
up for me.
translations.今は授業中だけど、◙▲主人公＊▲のせいで◙先生の話なんて◙聞けなくなっちゃった▼:
I'm in class right
now, but I can't focus
on the teacher's talk
because of
▲Protagonist＊▲.
translations.今は授業中だよ。◙▲主人公＊▲も◙でしょ？:
I'm in class right
now. You are too,
right,
▲Protagonist＊▲？
translations.今はちょうど休憩中。◙▲主人公＊▲からの◙メール読んだら、◙仕事の疲れも◙消えち:
I'm on break right
now. Reading your
email makes all the
work fatigue
disappear♪
translations.もちろんデキシーズ。◙でも▲主人公＊▲が◙いないと◙やっぱつまらないな:
Of course, it's
Dexies. But it’s
just not as fun
without
▲Protagonist＊▲.
translations.▲主人公＊▲は◙なにしてるのかなぁ、◙って思ってた。◙ほんとだよ？◙シンクロニシ:
I was wondering what
▲Protagonist＊▲ is
doing. It's true!
It's synchronicity.
translations.うん、食事中。◙でもやっぱり◙▲主人公＊▲と一緒に◙食べるご飯が一番かな:
Yeah, I'm eating.
But I think eating
with ▲Protagonist＊▲
is the best.
translations.食事中だよ、◙▲主人公＊▲は◙もう食べたのかな:
I'm eating now.
Have you eaten
yet,
▲Protagonist＊▲？
translations.勉強中だよ、◙▲主人公＊▲は◙宿題ない？:
I'm studying now.
Don't you have any
homework,
▲Protagonist＊▲？
translations.今日のデートのあと、◙▲主人公＊▲と◙離れるの辛かったな。◙いつもそうだけど、◙:
After today's date,
it was tough to part
from ▲Protagonist＊▲.
It's always like
that, but today was
especially so.
translations.今日のデートの◙▲主人公＊▲、◙すごくカッコよかったよ。◙いつもより◙ドキドキし:
Today's date with %s
was really cool. I was
more excited than
usual.
translations.今日みたいな日に◙▲主人公＊▲と◙デートできて嬉しかった。◙やっぱり恋人同士◙だ:
I'm so happy I could
date %s on a day like
today. After all,
we're lovers, right？♪
translations.もうだめ。◙家に帰ってからもずっと◙▲主人公＊▲のこと◙考えちゃってる。◙好き、:
I can't help it. Even
after going home, I
keep thinking about
%s. I like you, I
really like you.
translations.▲主人公＊▲って、◙カッコ良すぎ。◙デートから帰ってきても、◙まだドキドキ止まん:
%s is just too cool.
Even after coming back
from the date, my
heart is still racing.
translations.今日の▲主人公＊▲も◙ステキだったよ。◙またデートしたいね:
Today's %s was
wonderful too. I
want to go on
another date.
translations.今日、▲主人公＊▲が◙くれたプレゼント、◙大事にするから。◙だって、▲主人公＊▲:
I'll cherish the
gift %s gave me
today. Because it's
%s's feelings, after
all.
translations.やっぱり▲主人公＊▲◙とのキスって、大好き。◙もっとしたいな:
I really love kissing
%s. I want to do it
more.
translations.▲主人公＊▲は◙やっぱり、◙キス好きなの？◙今日、そんな風に感じたな:
%s, do you really like
kissing？ I felt that
way today.
translations.会えて嬉しいのは、◙私だけじゃないよね。◙▲主人公＊▲も◙同じように思って◙くれ:
I'm not the only one
happy to see you,
right？ I feel like
%s feels the same.
translations.▲主人公＊▲って、◙結構今日みたいに一人で◙出かけたりするのかな:
Does %s often go out
alone like today？
translations.今日の格好、◙すごく恥ずかしかった。◙▲主人公＊▲以外の◙人にあんなの見られたら:
I was really
embarrassed by today's
outfit. If anyone
other than %s saw it,
I'd die of
embarrassment.
translations.私、◙▲主人公＊▲のこと◙もっともっと知りたいな:
I want to know more
and more about %s.
translations.ねぇ、私ってやっぱり。◙このままどんどん◙▲主人公＊▲のこと◙大好きになっちゃい:
Hey, I think I'm going
to keep falling more
in love with %s.
translations.▲主人公＊▲には、◙ずっと私の隣に◙いて欲しいな。◙こういうの、迷惑かな？:
I want %s to always be
by my side. Is that a
bother？
translations.今誰かに◙私の頭の中のぞかれたら、◙きっと▲主人公＊▲の◙ことばっかり◙出てきち:
If someone peeked into
my head right now, it
would be all about %s.
translations.たまにだけど、◙▲主人公＊▲のこと◙考えると一人で◙泣いちゃうの。◙幸せだから、:
Sometimes, I cry
alone when I think
about %s. Maybe it's
because I'm happy.
translations.もう私、きっと一生◙▲主人公＊▲から◙離れられないと思う。◙こんな私でも、◙傍に:
I think I can never
be apart from %s for
the rest of my life.
Even someone like me
wants to be by your
side.
translations.最近何かあった？◙なかなかデート◙できないから、◙▲主人公＊▲のこと◙よくわから:
Has something
happened recently？
I don't know much
about %s since we
can't date
often...
translations.▲主人公＊▲の◙誕生日、◙終わっちゃったね。◙残念……:
%s's birthday has
passed, huh？ What
a shame...
translations.ねぇねぇ。◙なんで私、◙▲主人公＊▲のこと◙こんなに好きなのかな？:
Hey, hey. Why do I
like %s this much？
translations.これからも◙たまにメールするね。◙▲主人公＊▲からも◙送ってくれると、◙嬉しいな:
I'll keep texting
you from now on. I'd
be happy if %s could
send me messages
too.
translations.明日、◙あまり無理はしないでね。◙私は、▲主人公＊▲の◙気持ちがもらえたら、◙そ:
Tomorrow, don't push
yourself too hard. I'm
just happy to receive
%s's feelings.
translations.ホワイトデー、◙▲主人公＊▲は何を◙用意してくれてるのかな？◙明日びっくりしたい:
What does %s have
prepared for White
Day？ I want to be
surprised tomorrow, so
keep it a secret, okay？
translations.明日のクリスマスイヴ、◙学校で◙パーティーがあるね。◙もちろん、◙▲主人公＊▲も:
Tomorrow is Christmas
Eve, and there's a
party at school. Of
course, %s will go,
right？
translations.もう明日は◙▲主人公＊▲の◙誕生日だね。◙大事な日を一緒に◙お祝いできるのって、:
Tomorrow is %s's
birthday. I'm so
happy to celebrate
such an important
day together.
translations.明日、▲主人公＊▲の◙誕生日だね。◙私より先に、◙誰かにお祝い言われたら◙許さな:
Tomorrow is %s's
birthday. If someone
wishes you before me,
I won't forgive them,
okay？ Just kidding♪
translations.明日、◙私はちゃーんと◙覚えてるからね？◙▲主人公＊▲が◙嫌がっても、◙私は無理:
Tomorrow, I will
definitely remember,
okay？ Even if %s
doesn't want it, I'm
going to celebrate.
translations.ねぇねぇ。◙今の▲主人公＊▲の◙好みのタイプって◙どんな感じ？:
Hey, hey. What
kind of type does
%s like right now？
translations.ねぇねぇ。◙今の私、▲主人公＊▲◙の好みのタイプに◙近いのかな？:
Hey, hey. Am I close
to %s's type right
now？
translations.ねぇねぇ。◙私の髪型って、どう？◙▲主人公＊▲は好き？:
Hey, hey. How do you
like my hairstyle？
Do you like it, %s？
translations.ねぇねぇ。◙▲主人公＊▲って、◙カノジョの髪の長さが◙気になったりする？:
Hey, hey. Does %s
care about the
length of a
girlfriend's hair？
translations.ねぇねぇ。◙▲主人公＊▲の好きな◙色ってあるんだっけ？:
Hey, hey. Does %s
have a favorite
color？
translations.メガネかけた私って◙どうだったかな？◙▲主人公＊▲が◙くれたの、◙試してみたんだ:
How did I look
with glasses？ I
tried the ones %s
gave me.
translations.やった、うれしい。◙ちょっと恥ずかしいけど、◙▲主人公＊▲のために◙続けてみるね:
Yay, I'm happy. It's a
bit embarrassing, but
I'll keep wearing them
for %s.
translations.ねぇねぇ。◙私、このままメガネ◙かけてた方がいいかな？◙▲主人公＊▲の意見、◙聞:
Hey, hey. Should I
keep wearing glasses
like this？ I want to
hear %s's opinion.
translations.▲主人公＊▲は◙インターネットって◙よく使う？◙デート情報が◙すごく充実してるん:
Does %s use the
internet often？
There's a lot of great
date info.
translations.デートスポットの◙情報って、◙インターネットで簡単に◙わかっちゃうんだね。◙▲主:
You can easily find
date spot info on the
internet. Is %s
checking it out？
translations.私ね、◙インターネットの◙週刊おまじないが◙好きなんだ。◙▲主人公＊▲は◙見てる:
I really like the
weekly fortune on
the internet. Is
%s watching it？
translations.私ね、◙インターネットの占いって◙毎日欠かさず◙チェックしちゃうんだ。◙▲主人公:
I check daily
horoscopes on the
internet without fail.
Is %s not that
interested？
translations.▲主人公＊▲って、◙カレンダー気にしちゃう？◙たまには見ないと、◙大事なこと◙見:
Does %s pay attention to
the calendar？ If you
don't check sometimes,
you might miss something
important.
translations.▲主人公＊▲って、◙スケジュールは◙活用してる？◙チェックすると、◙いいことある:
Does %s make use of
a schedule？ Checking
it might bring good
things.
translations.▲主人公＊▲の◙返信ってすごく丁寧だね。◙こうやってちゃんと◙反応してくれるの、:
%s's replies are
really polite. It's
great that you respond
like this.
translations.そうなの？◙▲主人公＊▲が◙そう言うなら、◙しょうがないね:
Is that so？ If %s
says that, then I
guess it can't be
helped.
translations.だってそれは◙▲主人公＊▲が。◙ううん、なんでもない。◙じゃあね:
Because that's %s. No,
never mind. See you.
translations.私はあの人と海へ行った。それも一夏の間に２度。そして私はあの人の着ているものを…:
I went to the sea with that
person. Twice during the
summer. And I saw what that
person was wearing... I had
such a dream. Dream Chaser.
translations.あの人は好きな動物のことを語った。そして秋の日、あの人と動物と戯れる。すると尻尾:
That person talked about their
favorite animal. And on an
autumn day, I played with that
person and the animal. Then
the tail... I had such a
dream. Dream Chaser.
translations.あの人から勉学を教えられること３度。あの人がついに教鞭を……◙そんな夢を見た。夢:
I learned from that person
three times. That person
finally took the teaching
position... I had such a
dream. Dream Chaser.
translations.あの人は幼いころのことを語った。その意外な過去に驚く私の前に、大将が……◙そんな:
That person talked about their
childhood. I was surprised by
their unexpected past, and
then the general appeared... I
had such a dream. Dream
Chaser.
translations.あの人は語った、温泉のことを。そしてある夏の日、あの人は湯上がりに……◙そんな夢:
That person talked about hot
springs. And on a summer day,
that person after the bath...
I had such a dream. Dream
Chaser.
translations.あの人と恐怖の動画を観た。そしてあの人は豹変を遂げる……◙そんな夢を見た。夢追い:
I watched a scary video with
that person. And that person
transformed... I had such a
dream. Dream Chaser.
translations.私はその日も職務に打ち込んだ。あの人は職場にて意外な失態を……◙そんな夢を見た。:
I was focused on my duties
that day. That person had an
unexpected blunder at work...
I had such a dream. Dream
chaser
translations.春の日、あの人と短い逢瀬を重ねること３度、あの人は遂に私から……◙そんな夢を見た:
On a spring day, after three
brief meetings with that
person, they finally... I had
such a dream. Dream chaser
translations.あの人の部屋に訪れたのち、寒所での逢引を重ねること２度。あの人は体を……◙そんな:
After visiting that person's
room, we met twice in a cold
place. That person... I had
such a dream. Dream chaser
translations.ねぇねぇ。私の髪型ね、下ろしてるのと結ってるの、▲主人公＊▲はどっちが好き？: Hey, hey. About my hairstyle, do you prefer it down or tied up, ▲主人公＊▲？
translations.そうなんだ。じゃあ期待にこたえて下ろすようにしよっかな？: I see. Then maybe I'll let it down to meet your expectations？
translations.そうなんだ。じゃあ期待にこたえて結うようにしよっかな。: I see. Then maybe I'll tie it up to meet your expectations.
translations.そう、興味ないんだ。もういい。: Yeah, I'm not interested. It's fine.
translations.ねぇねぇ。前に▲主人公＊▲がくれた動物の耳のカチューシャあるじゃない？あれ、つけ: Hey, hey. Remember the animal ear headband ▲主人公＊▲ gave me？ Do you want me to wear it？
translations.あの動物の耳のカチューシャ、前につけてみたでしょ。またつけてほしい？: You remember the animal ear headband I wore before, right？ Do you want me to wear it again？
translations.そうだよね。うん、いいの。冗談で聞いてみただけ。: That's right. Yeah, it's fine. I was just joking.
translations.本気で？あれを私がつけるんだ……。: Seriously？ You want me to wear that...？
translations.それ、持ってないよ？じゃあやっぱりやめておくね。: I don't have that. Then I guess I'll skip it.
translations.うーん、▲主人公＊▲に見せるだけなら、それもいいかな？: Hmm, if it's just to show ▲主人公＊▲, maybe that's okay？
translations.ねぇねぇ。▲主人公＊▲は、私にどんな水着を着て欲しいのかな？: Hey, hey. What kind of swimsuit do you want me to wear？
translations.ねぇねぇ。デートの約束してるでしょ？私がどんな水着着ると、うれしい？: Hey, hey. We have a date planned, right？ What kind of swimsuit would make you happy？
translations.そっか、そういうのがいいんだ。でも聞いてみただけ。かもね？: I see, so that's what you like. But I was just asking. Maybe？
translations.もう、こういうの聞くの、結構勇気いるのに。: Ugh, asking about this takes quite a bit of courage.
translations.部活、いつも大変だね。私が差し入れ持って行ったら、迷惑かな？: Club activities are always tough, huh？ Would it be a bother if I brought you a snack？
translations.図書委員、いつも大変だね。私が差し入れ持って行ったら、迷惑かな？: Library committee work is always tough, huh？ Would it be a bother if I brought you a snack？
translations.いつもバイトお疲れさま。がんばってる▲主人公＊▲へのご褒美に、差し入れしちゃおっ: Thanks for your hard work at your part-time job. Should I bring you a snack as a reward for your efforts, ▲主人公＊▲？
translations.そっか。やっぱりそういうの迷惑だよね、ごめんね。: I see. I guess that kind of thing is a bother, sorry.
translations.ずっとがんばってたら、持って行ってあげる。なまけちゃダメだよ？: If you keep working hard, I'll bring you something. Don't slack off, okay？
translations.じゃあほんとに差し入れしちゃおっと♪楽しみにしててね？: Then I'll really bring you a snack♪ Look forward to it, okay？
translations.今日のプレゼントのお礼に、今度また差し入れするね？: Thanks for today's gift. I'll bring you a snack next time, okay？
translations.今日はありがとう。プレゼントしてくれて。差し入れ迷惑じゃなかったら、また持って行: Thank you for today. For the gift. If the snack wasn't a bother, I'll bring it again.
translations.プレゼントありがとう。物もそうだけど、贈ってくれる気持ちがうれしかったな。カレシ: Thank you for the gift. The item is nice, but I was really happy about the thought behind it. Boyfriend pass▼
translations.今日はプレゼントありがとう♪差し入れ続ければ、またもらえるかな？なんて冗談▼: Thanks for the gift today♪ If I keep bringing snacks, will I get more gifts？ Just kidding▼
translations.プチ記念日のプレゼントって、すてき。絶対大切にするね。: A gift for our mini anniversary is wonderful. I'll definitely cherish it.
translations.プチ記念日、覚えててくれてありがとう。プレゼントまでもらえて、ほんとにうれしいよ: Thank you for remembering our mini anniversary. I'm really happy to receive a gift.
translations.今日はありがとう。こういう些細な記念日をちゃ～んと覚えてるのが、ポイント高いよ？: Thanks for today. Remembering these little anniversaries is a big plus, okay？ And of course, the gift too？
translations.プチ記念日ね、実はお祝いしたいと思ってたの。思ってた通りになってうれしい♪: About the mini anniversary, I actually wanted to celebrate it. I'm glad it turned out as I hoped♪
translations.いつもごめんね。やっぱり、大好き。: I'm always sorry. I really do love you.
translations.はーい。これからも続けられたらいいな。: Okay. I hope we can keep this going.
translations.ねぇねぇ。映画のことってモーション……なんていうんだっけ？: Hey, hey. What's the term for movie motion... what do you call it？
translations.ねぇねぇ。映画館のこと、別の言い方でなんていうんだっけ？: Hey, hey. What's another way to say movie theater？
translations.ねぇねぇ。映画の撮影に使う、拍子木とボードがくっついてるの、なんていうんだっけ？: Hey, hey. What's the term for the clapperboard used in movie filming？
translations.ねぇねぇ。映画の撮影の開始のこと、なんていうんだっけ？: Hey, hey. What's the term for the start of movie filming？
translations.ねぇねぇ。タヌキ寝入りのこと、英語だとなんの動物にたとえられるんだっけ？: Hey, hey. What animal is used to describe 'playing dead' in English？
translations.ねぇねぇ。タヌキってなんの鉱物の精霊なんだっけ？: Hey, hey. What mineral spirit is the tanuki associated with？
translations.ねぇねぇ。タヌキとアナグマのことを混同した呼び方、なんていったっけ？: Hey, hey. What do you call the mixed-up names for tanuki and badger？
translations.ねぇねぇ。タヌキの食ってどうなんだっけ？: Hey, hey. What do tanukis eat？
translations.ねぇねぇ。ファミレスにあるような大量な調理をする施設、なんていうんだっけ？: Hey, hey. What's the term for a facility that does large-scale cooking like a family restaurant？
translations.ねぇねぇ。ドリンクバーの弊害って、何かな？: Hey, hey. What are the downsides of a drink bar？
translations.ねぇねぇ。ファミレスとファストフードの中間の外食業って、なんていうんだっけ？: Hey, hey. What's the term for the dining industry that falls between family restaurants and fast food？
translations.ねぇねぇ。アルバイト、って何語なんだっけ？: Hey, hey. What language is 'part-time job' from？
translations.ねぇねぇ。独特な香りのフィンランドの飴、なんていうんだっけ？: Hey, hey. What's the name of the uniquely flavored Finnish candy？
translations.ねぇねぇ。ペロペロキャンディのこと、アメリカではなんていうんだっけ？: Hey, hey. What do they call lollipops in America？
translations.ねぇねぇ。のど飴に入ってることがあるバラ科の果実、なんていったっけ？: Hey, hey. What is the rose family fruit that sometimes appears in throat lozenges？
translations.ねぇねぇ。メントールのこと、漢字でどうやって書くんだっけ？: Hey, hey. How do you write 'menthol' in kanji？
translations.ねぇねぇ。現代の日本のホラーのこと、なんて表記するんだっけ？: Hey, hey. How do you write modern Japanese horror？
translations.ねぇねぇ。ホラー映画って、日本では昔なんて呼ばれてたんだっけ？: Hey, hey. What were horror movies called in Japan back in the day？
translations.ねぇねぇ。ゾンビを作るために使うもの、なんていうんだっけ？: Hey, hey. What do you call the stuff used to create zombies？
translations.ねぇねぇ。アラビアの吸血鬼、なんていうんだっけ？: Hey, hey. What do you call the vampire from Arabia？
translations.そうなの？私もね、いいことあったんだ。おそろいだね？: Is that so？ I had something good happen too. We're matching, right？
translations.じゃあ今は、二人そろって幸せなんだね。ずっとこうだといいな♪: So right now, we're both happy together. I hope it stays like this forever♪
translations.じゃあ、ついでに私のお願いきいてくれちゃう？ごめん、冗談だよ。: So, can you do me a favor while we're at it？ Just kidding.
translations.それで私にメールしたくなっちゃったの？もう、カワイイ▼: So you wanted to email me？ You're so cute▼
translations.ステキな彼女もいるし？な～んてね、冗談。: You have a wonderful girlfriend too, right？ Just kidding.
translations.なら私と一緒だ。やっぱり恋人同士って、気持ちも繋がっちゃうんだね。: Then I'm the same. Lovers really do connect emotionally.
translations.私もね、▲主人公＊▲のこと考えると、そういう気持ちになれるよ。: When I think about ▲主人公＊▲, I can feel that way too.
translations.うんうん、それが一番。その調子でね。: Yeah, yeah, that's the best. Keep it up.
translations.じゃあ、私も▲主人公＊▲から元気もらっちゃおうかな。いいでしょ？: Then I guess I'll get some energy from ▲主人公＊▲ too. Is that okay？
translations.うん、そのままそのまま。いい感じだね。: Yeah, just like that. It feels good.
translations.うんうん。そのまま、がんばろ？: Yeah, yeah. Let's keep it up, okay？
translations.そっか、何があったのか聞きたいな。: I see. I want to know what happened.
translations.そうなんだ。何かいいことあったんだね？: I see. Something good happened, right？
translations.そっか、いいね。教えて教えて？: I see, that's nice. Tell me, tell me？
translations.▲主人公＊▲がそうだと、私もうれしいな。: If ▲主人公＊▲ feels that way, I'm happy too.
translations.それで私にメールしてくれたんだ。うれしいよ。: So you emailed me because of that. I'm happy.
translations.私はよくないな。どうしてかは、自分で気付いてほしいんだけど。: I'm not doing well. I hope you realize why.
translations.そう。私にはこんな思いさせて、自分だけ……。: Right. You made me feel this way, while you...
translations.私、▲主人公＊▲に何かしてあげたい。辛いことはなんでも言ってね。: I want to do something for ▲主人公＊▲. Please tell me if you're struggling.
translations.言ってくれてありがとう。▲主人公＊▲の役に立ちたいから、: Thanks for telling me. I want to help ▲主人公＊▲,
translations.私も力になるから、あまり気にし過ぎないでね。たまには、気分が落ち込んじゃうときだ: I'll support you too, so don't worry too much. Sometimes it's okay to feel down.
translations.相談してくれてありがとう。そんなときぐらい、お姉さんに頼ってもいいんだからね？: Thanks for consulting me. It's okay to rely on your big sister sometimes, you know？
translations.大丈夫、私がいつでも助けてあげるから。このことだけは、覚えておいてね？: It's okay, I'll always help you. Just remember that, okay？
translations.そっか。でもいつまでも落ち込んでたら、周りに見放されちゃうよ？私だけは、絶対にし: I see. But if you stay down forever, people around you might leave you, you know？ I won't, though.
translations.そういう気分になることもあるから、しょうがないよ。でも一人で抱え込むのだけはだめ: It's normal to feel that way sometimes, but don't keep it all to yourself.
translations.少しだけならいいけど。本当に落ち込んじゃうまでがまんはしないでね。: A little is fine, but don't hold back until you're really down.
translations.そうなんだ。▲主人公＊▲のために私もがんばるから。元気出して？: I see. I'll do my best for ▲主人公＊▲ too. Cheer up!
translations.少しの間なら、落ち込んでてもいいよ。じきに上手くいから、ね？: It's okay to feel down for a little while. Things will get better soon, okay？
translations.そっか。私がぎゅってしてあげたら、少しは元気になるかな。: I see. If I hug you, will you feel a little better？
translations.どうしたら元気出るかな。私がしてあげられること何があるかな……。: What can I do to cheer you up？ What can I do for you...？
translations.話すだけでも楽になるかもしれないから、遠慮はしないでね。: Just talking might help, so don't hold back.
translations.何かあったんだ。早くいいこともあるといいね。: Something happened. I hope something good comes soon.
translations.そういうこともあるよ。早く立ち直って、楽しいことしよう？: That happens sometimes. Let's bounce back quickly and have fun, okay？
translations.私でも力になれること、きっとあると思うから。ね？: I think there are things I can help with too. Right？
translations.辛いこと、あるもんね。わかるよ。: There are tough times, I understand.
translations.調子が出ないこともあるよね。今はたまたまそうなだけ、ね？: Sometimes you just can't get into it. It's just a phase, right？
translations.それ、今の私に言うんだ。: You're saying that to me right now.
translations.そうだね、私もそう。カレシのことで落ち込んでる。じゃあね。: That's right, I'm the same. I'm feeling down about my boyfriend. See you.
translations.そっか……でも私は元気な▲主人公＊▲も好きかな。だからがんばって！: I see... but I like the energetic ▲主人公＊▲ too. So do your best!
translations.そう。遠慮されるのいやだから、助けて欲しかったら言ってね？頼っていいから。: Right. I don't like being held back, so if you need help, just say it, okay？ It's okay to rely on me.
translations.ずっとがんばるだけじゃ、疲れちゃうよね。休むときは休んで、ゆっくりやろ？: If you just keep trying, you'll get tired. Take breaks when you need to and go slow.
translations.私がいつも、▲主人公＊▲の力になりたいって思ってること、知ってる？弱音、吐いても: Do you know that I always want to be a support for ▲主人公＊▲？ It's okay to vent.
translations.いつも大変だもんね。がんばれ！いつもちゃ～んと見てるから。: It's always tough, isn't it？ Hang in there! I'm always watching over you.
translations.それはね、あなたが毎日がんばってる証拠だよ。私もサポートするから、ね▼: That's proof that you're doing your best every day. I'll support you too, okay？
translations.何があったのかな。力になれること、あるといいけど。: I wonder what happened. I hope there's something I can do to help.
translations.大変かもしれないけど、▲主人公＊▲ならきっと大丈夫。▲主人公＊▲ならもっとがんば: It might be tough, but if it's ▲主人公＊▲, you'll be fine. You can do even better.
translations.それもわかるな。でももう少しだけがんばろ。ね？: I get that. But let's try a little harder, okay？
translations.それじゃあ休もっか。いいんだよ、考え過ぎなくて。: Then let's take a break. It's okay not to overthink it.
translations.うん、そっか。がんばってるからだね。いい子いい子。: Yeah, I see. It's because you're working hard. Good job.
translations.疲れたまってる？なにか解消できるいい方法あるといいな。: Are you feeling tired？ I hope there's a good way to relieve it.
translations.いつも大変な仕事こなしてるんだもん。▲主人公＊▲ならがんばれるって信じてるよ。: You're always handling tough work. I believe in you, ▲主人公＊▲.
translations.そっか。疲れをとる方法も色々あるけど……まずは休むのが一番だよ？: I see. There are various ways to relieve fatigue, but... resting is the best first step, right？
translations.うん、なら無理せず休むのが一番。そうしよ？: Yeah, then it's best to rest without pushing yourself. Let's do that？
translations.じゃあたまにはゆ～っくりしよ？決まり。: Then let's take it easy sometimes, okay？ It's settled.
translations.そんなに疲れることがあったの？心配だから、いつもそうやって教えてくれるとうれしい: Did something tire you out that much？ I'm worried, so I'd be happy if you always let me know like this.
translations.一緒に元気だしていこ。ねっ！: Let's cheer each other up together, okay？
translations.私も疲れてるかな。体が、ってことじゃないけど。: I might be tired too. Not physically, but still.
translations.私ももう疲れたよ。誰のせいか、わかるでしょ。: I'm tired too. You know whose fault it is, right？
translations.もうじき今年も終わりだね。初詣は一緒に行けるといいな。: This year is almost over. I hope we can go to the first shrine visit together.
translations.私たちにとっても大切なイベント、もうすぐだね。期待しちゃってる？: It's an important event for us too, and it's coming soon. Are you looking forward to it？
translations.ねぇねぇ。１４日、待っててもいいのかな？忘れたりしてないよね。: Hey, hey. Is it okay to wait for the 14th？ You haven't forgotten, right？
translations.もうじきエイプリルフールだね。何か楽しいこと、あるかな。: April Fool's Day is coming soon. I wonder if there will be something fun.
translations.もうじきゴールデンウィークだね。なんでもその時期にまつわるおまじないがあるんだっ: Golden Week is coming soon. I heard there are charms related to that time.
translations.もうじき学校のプール授業が始まるね。楽しくなるといいな♪: School swimming classes are starting soon. I hope it will be fun♪
translations.もうじき七夕だね。色々考えて準備するの、結構好きなの。: Tanabata is coming soon. I actually enjoy preparing for it.
translations.もうじき海水浴場でなにかイベントがあるんだって。なんだろうね？: I heard there will be an event at the beach soon. I wonder what it will be？
translations.もうじき体育祭だね。一緒に何かできるといいな。: Sports day is coming soon. I hope we can do something together.
translations.もうじきハロウィン。仮装するのって、結構面白そうだね？: Halloween is coming soon. Dressing up seems pretty fun, right？
translations.もうじき学園祭だね。二人で一緒に回ったりできるかな？: The school festival is coming soon. I wonder if we can go around together？
translations.もうじきクリスマス。恋人たちの大切な思い出にしたい。二人で一緒に過ごしたいよね。: Christmas is coming soon. I want to make it a special memory for lovers. I want to spend it together.
translations.そっか、ごめんね。私だけはしゃいじゃって。: I see, I'm sorry. I got too excited.
translations.ねぇねぇ。いつも読んでる雑誌で旅行特集が載ってたの。▲主人公＊▲は旅行したい？: Hey, hey. I saw a travel feature in the magazine I always read. Do you want to travel, ▲主人公＊▲？
translations.ねぇねぇ。いつも読んでる雑誌で旅行特集やってたんだよ。▲主人公＊▲はまた旅行に行: Hey, hey. There was a travel feature in the magazine I always read. Do you want to travel again, ▲主人公＊▲？
translations.ごめんね、いいの。深い意味はないから。: I'm sorry, it's fine. There's no deep meaning.
translations.疲れてるときは旅行なんていいかもね。もし行くとしたら、▲主人公＊▲はどこがいい？: Traveling might be nice when you're tired. If you could go, where would you want to go, ▲主人公＊▲？
translations.海なの？そっか……それもいいね。遊んでも楽しいし、きっとロマンチックだし。: To the beach？ I see... that sounds nice. It's fun to play, and it must be romantic.
translations.温泉なの？そっか……それもいいな。ゆったりの～んびりできるもんね。: To a hot spring？ I see... that sounds nice too. You can relax and take it easy.
translations.ねぇねぇ。クラスの友達が言ってたの。その子、彼氏と旅行に行ったんだって！: Hey, hey. A friend in class said that. That person went on a trip with her boyfriend!
translations.ねぇねぇ。今ね、お隣さんが旅行中なの。恋人と行くっていうから、きっと素敵な旅にな: Hey, hey. The neighbor is traveling right now. Since they're going with their partner, it must be a wonderful trip.
translations.ねぇねぇ。旅行が当たる懸賞やってるんだって。当たったらすごいよね。: Hey, hey. I heard there's a contest for a travel prize. It would be amazing if you won.
translations.ねぇねぇ。▲主人公＊▲、前に熱海旅行当てたじゃない？また同じ懸賞やるみたいだけど: Hey, hey. ▲主人公＊▲, you won the Atami trip before, right？ It seems they're doing the same contest again, and it would be amazing if you won again.
translations.ねぇねぇ。今度行く旅行、最初の旅行のときみたいな髪型にするのってどうなのかな？: Hey, hey. For the next trip, how about changing your hairstyle to something like the first trip？
translations.へえ、そうなんだ？それじゃあ、変えてみてもいいかな。: Oh, really？ Then, is it okay to change it？
translations.そっか、余計なこと言ってごめんね。: I see, I'm sorry for saying unnecessary things.
translations.旅行、これから一緒に行っちゃうんだね。もうずっとドキドキしてる……。: We're going on a trip together soon. I've been so excited...
translations.また旅行に行けて、よかったね。きっと今度も、楽しい旅行になるよね。: I'm glad we can go on another trip. I'm sure it will be a fun trip again.
translations.うん、色々行きたいところあるの。早く当日にならないかな、絶対いい思い出にしようね: Yeah, there are so many places I want to go. I can't wait for the day to come; let's make great memories♪
translations.ねぇ、旅行の準備ちゃんとやってる？やっぱり結構大変だね。: Hey, are you preparing for the trip properly？ It seems pretty tough.
translations.そうじゃないかと思った。手伝ってあげてもいいよ、一緒に買い物行くのもいいな。: I thought so. I can help you if you want; going shopping together would be nice.
translations.あ、頼もしいんだ？じゃあお姉さんの助けは必要ないかな。: Oh, are you reliable？ Then maybe I don't need your sister's help.
translations.楽しみだね、旅行。でも楽しいだけじゃなくて、緊張も大きい、かな。今からドキドキし: I'm looking forward to the trip. But it's not just fun, there's a lot of nervousness too. I'm already feeling excited.
translations.そうだよね。緊張するよね。この旅行までのドキドキも、楽しみのひとつなのかな。: That's true. It's nerve-wracking. The excitement leading up to the trip is part of the fun, right？
translations.もう、強がっちゃって。頼りにしてますからね？: Come on, don't act tough. I'm counting on you, okay？
translations.ねぇねぇ。旅行で一番楽しみなことって、なんなの？: Hey, hey. What's the thing you're most looking forward to on the trip？
translations.うん、色々見て回りたいもん。ちゃ～んと準備していこうね。: Yeah, I want to see a lot of things. Let's make sure to prepare properly.
translations.うんうん、いいね。何回入っちゃおっかな♪: Yeah, sounds good. How many times should we go in？ ♪
translations.それは、うん。ずっと一緒で、色んなこと話せるもんね？そういう意味だよね？: That's right. We'll be together and can talk about all sorts of things, right？ That's what you mean？
translations.いよいよ明日が旅行だね。ちゃんと眠れるかな、緊張で目がさえちゃうかも。: Finally, tomorrow is the trip. I wonder if I'll be able to sleep, I might be too nervous.
translations.それはこっちの台詞だよ。待たせたら、メ！だからね？: That's my line. If you keep me waiting, I'll be mad, okay？
translations.やっぱりそうなんだ、無理ないよね。でも寝坊しないように、早く寝ないとね。: I guess that's true, it's understandable. But I need to sleep early so I don't oversleep.
translations.終わっちゃったね、初めての旅行。いつでもずっと一緒にいられて、うれしかった。最高: It's over, our first trip. I'm so happy we could be together all the time. It became the best memory.
translations.思い出また増えちゃった。今度の旅行でも、色んなことができたね。やっぱり行ってよか: We've made more memories. We were able to do so many things on this trip too. I'm really glad we went...
translations.そうだとうれしい。こうやってこの先も、二人で色んな体験できるといいね。: I hope that's true. It would be nice if we could have various experiences together like this in the future.
translations.こーら。そういうこと言わないの。: Hey, don't say things like that.
translations.今思い出しても、恥ずかしい……。今の私、たぶん顔真っ赤だよ。: Even now, it's embarrassing to remember... I probably have a bright red face right now.
translations.それ、へんなこと考えてる？もう、そんなのばっかり。: Are you thinking something weird？ Come on, it's always like that.
translations.待ち合わせ来なかったね。私、何かした？旅行の約束破られるような、そんなひどいこと: You didn't come to our meeting. Did I do something？ Did I do something terrible to break our travel promise？
translations.不思議な気持ち。終わっちゃったはずの旅行が、まだ頭の中をぐるぐるしてるの。しばら: It's a strange feeling. The trip that should be over is still swirling in my mind. I wonder if it will feel like this for a while.
translations.旅行のあとって、一人でいるのがちょっと寂しい。あんなに長い間一緒にいたんだから、: After a trip, being alone feels a bit lonely. It's only natural since we were together for so long.
translations.▲主人公＊▲も、まだ旅行のこと思い出したりするのかな。私はよく、思い出すよ。: I wonder if ▲主人公＊▲ still thinks about the trip. I often remember it.
translations.まだ旅行の感覚、抜けてないみたい。さすがに変かな……。: It seems like I still haven't shaken off the feeling of the trip. Is that strange...？
translations.旅行、行ったばかりなのに。また行きたいなって考えてる。それぐらい、ステキだったか: Even though we just went on a trip, I'm already thinking about wanting to go again. It was that wonderful.
translations.謝られても、あなたが何考えてるのかわからないよ。: Even if you apologize, I still don't understand what you're thinking.
translations.謝るんだ。悪いことだって、わかってるんだ。じゃあなんで。: You're apologizing. You know it's wrong. So why？
translations.埋め合わせすれば、約束破ってもいいの？いいわけないよね。: Is it okay to break a promise if you make up for it？ That can't be right.
translations.できないよ、そんなこと。取り返しなんてつかない。: I can't do that. There's no way to take it back.
translations.ひどい。そんなこと言われても、納得できない。: That's terrible. Even if you say that, I can't accept it.
translations.おはよう、起きた？: Good morning, did you wake up？
translations.おはよう。カノジョからのおはようメールってやっぱりうれしいのかな？私は▲主人公＊: Good morning. I wonder if getting a good morning message from my girlfriend makes me happy？ I feel happy when I get one from ▲主人公＊▲.
translations.おはよう！今日はステキな日になりそうだよ。今日も、かな？: Good morning! It seems like today will be a wonderful day. Right？
translations.いい朝だね、気持ちいい。今日もはりきって、ね？: It's a nice morning, feels good. Let's be enthusiastic today, okay？
translations.おはよう。ほんとは直接、近くでおはようって言いたいな▼: Good morning. I really want to say good morning up close in person.
translations.朝、辛くない？たまにど～しても起きられないことって、あるよね。: Mornings can be tough, right？ Sometimes it's just impossible to get up.
translations.おはよ。今日も一日笑顔でね？: Good morning. Let's smile all day today, okay？
translations.おはよう。今朝はちゃんと起きられた？: Good morning. Were you able to wake up properly this morning？
translations.おはよう。本日初メール、次はいつにしよっかな♪: Good morning. For the first email of the day, when should I send the next one？ ♪
translations.おはよう。▲主人公＊▲と一緒に過ごせれば、きっと今日も幸せ▼: Good morning. If I can spend the day with ▲主人公＊▲, I'm sure I'll be happy today too.
translations.私って、一日に何回「▲主人公＊▲は今何してるかな」って考えてるんだろう。気にし過: I wonder how many times a day I think, "What is ▲主人公＊▲ doing now？" Am I worrying too much？
translations.な～んとなくいいことありそうだなって思うと、ほんとにいいこと起きたりするの。すご: When I think something good might happen, it really does happen. Isn't that amazing？
translations.午前中お疲れ様。午後もがんばって。: Thanks for your hard work this morning. Keep it up this afternoon.
translations.やっほー♪ちょっとテンション高めのネネでした▼: Hey there! It's a bit of a high-energy Nene today.
translations.たまには運動した方がいいのかな、って思うけど。難しいね、色々と。: I sometimes think I should exercise, but it's difficult in many ways.
translations.▲主人公＊▲にメール打ってると、みんなよくのぞいてくるの。もちろん見せないよ？: When I'm typing an email to ▲主人公＊▲, everyone often peeks at me. Of course, I won't show them, okay？
translations.私ね、ノートとるのは得意なんだけど、テストは思ったほどできないんだよね。どうして: I'm good at taking notes, but I don't do as well on tests as I thought I would. I wonder why.
translations.午後もこのままの～んびりいこう？: Shall we just take it easy this afternoon？
translations.▲主人公＊▲、ヒマしてない？ぼーっとする時間も大切だけど、ずっとそうだともったい: ▲主人公＊▲, are you bored？ It's important to have time to zone out, but if you do it all the time, it's a waste.
translations.たまに口がさびしくなっちゃうの。やっぱり飴持ってると、便利だよ？: Sometimes my mouth feels lonely. Having candy is really convenient, right？
translations.あのね、メールで送る内容わすれちゃった。きっとたいしたことじゃないと思うんだけど: You know, I forgot what I was going to send in the email. I don't think it's a big deal.
translations.毎日が楽しいと、１日がすぐ終わっちゃうのが寂しいな。: When every day is fun, it’s sad how quickly the day ends.
translations.今日は珍しく店長に怒られちゃった。ちょっとショック。: Today, unusually, I got scolded by the manager. A bit shocking.
translations.今日はお客様にたくさんほめられちゃった。ときどきこうやって色んなことが上手くはま: Today, I received a lot of compliments from customers. Sometimes, there are days when everything just falls into place.
translations.授業でわからないところがあったんだけど、とりあえずそのままにしちゃった。ほんとは: There were parts I didn't understand in class, but I just left them as they were. I know that's not good.
translations.例えばバイトも宿題もない日って、今日はなんでもできる！って気になるんだけど、なぜ: For example, on days when I have no part-time job or homework, I feel like I can do anything! But somehow, time passes by without me noticing, it's strange.
translations.デキシーズの掃除、ついついやりすぎちゃった。一度気になると、もうやらずにはいられ: I ended up cleaning the Dixies too much. Once I get concerned, I can't help but keep going.
translations.バイトがない日って、あー楽だなーって思うんだけど。いざ暇だと落ち着かなかったり、: On days without part-time work, I think, 'Ah, this is nice,' but when I actually have free time, I can't settle down, and I have trouble sleeping at night. It doesn't go well.
translations.退屈してない？私はちょっとだけ。: Aren't you bored？ I'm a little.
translations.テレビのドキュメンタリーでね、勤労少女の特集だって。私もそうなのかなあ？: I saw a documentary on TV about working girls. I wonder if I'm like that？
translations.洗濯物がきれいにたためると、ちょっと達: When I can fold the laundry neatly, I feel a bit accomplished.
translations.今日作ったご飯、自信作！あーあ、▲主人公＊▲にも食べさせたかったな。: The meal I made today is my pride! Ah, I wish I could have let ▲主人公＊▲ try it too.
translations.今日はいつになく、人のフォローばかりしてた気がする。でもそんなにイヤじゃないの、: Today, I feel like I was mostly following others. But it’s not so bad, maybe because ▲主人公＊▲ is here.
translations.なんだか眠いんだけど、今寝ちゃうと、中途半端だよね。: I feel a bit sleepy, but if I sleep now, it would be half-hearted.
translations.あーん、宿題おわんなーい！: Ah, I can't finish my homework!
translations.夜だから▲主人公＊▲に会えないのって、ちょっと理不尽だと思わない？: Don't you think it's a bit unreasonable that I can't meet ▲主人公＊▲ at night？
translations.ちょっと食欲ないな、お菓子食べ過ぎちゃったのかも……。: I don't have much of an appetite; maybe I ate too many snacks...
translations.今夜の洋画、チェックしてる？: Are you checking out tonight's Western movie？
translations.今日は家事、たくさんがんばった！えらい？: I worked hard on housework today! Am I great？
translations.おやすみ。明日はどんな一日になるかな。: Good night. I wonder what kind of day tomorrow will be.
translations.ねむいよー、でも今やってる映画が面白くて眠れないよー。: I'm so sleepy, but the movie I'm watching is interesting, so I can't sleep.
translations.まだ起きてる？今テレビにとわの市が出てるよ？: Are you still awake？ Towano City is on TV right now!
translations.んー！今日はなんだか▲主人公＊▲の夢が見られる気がする！: Hmm! I feel like I might dream about ▲主人公＊▲ today!
translations.今日も一日お疲れさまです。ゆっくり休んでね、あ・な・た▼: Thank you for today. Take a good rest, a・n・d▼.
translations.お布団の中から送信！おやすみ。: Sending from under the blanket! Good night.
translations.おやすみ。明日からまたがんばろ。もちろん二人でね？: Good night. Let's do our best again starting tomorrow, together, okay？
translations.おやすみ。もう寝ま～す♪: Good night. I'm going to sleep now♪
translations.私が本当にしてほしいこと、わかって。: Understand what I really want you to do.
translations.ケンカ、もうしたくないよね？もう、やめようね。: You don't want to fight anymore, right？ Let's stop.
translations.やっぱり私、▲主人公＊▲がいないとダメ。だからもうケンカはやめよう？: I really can't do without ▲主人公＊▲, so let's stop fighting, okay？
translations.▲主人公＊▲とは、仲良くしてる方がずっと好き。もうケンカなんてしたくない。: I much prefer getting along with ▲主人公＊▲. I don't want to fight anymore.
translations.私、結局許しちゃうんだなあ。もうしちゃダメよ？: I end up forgiving you anyway. Don't do it again, okay？
translations.だーめ、ちゃんと休みなさい？: No, you need to rest properly, okay？
translations.休むのが先。メールは治ってからでもできるよ？: Rest comes first. You can email me after you feel better, okay？
translations.私のこと気にしてくれてるの？でも今は自分の体の方を心配してね？: Are you worried about me？ But right now, focus on your own health, okay？
translations.無理してない？風邪は大丈夫？: Aren't you pushing yourself？ Are you okay with your cold？
translations.病気のときぐらい、自分のこと一番に考えなさい？ね？: At least when you're sick, think of yourself first, okay？ Right？
translations.おはよ。気分はどう？体調悪い間は無理して起きなくていいよ？: Good morning. How are you feeling？ You don't have to force yourself to get up if you're not well, okay？
translations.ぐっすり眠れた？もし調子がよくても、すぐに無理しちゃダメだよ？: Did you sleep well？ Even if you're feeling better, don't push yourself too hard, okay？
translations.食欲ある？辛かったら、寝てるんだよ？: Do you have an appetite？ If it's tough, just rest, okay？
translations.ちゃんといい子にしてる？お姉さんのいうこと、守ってね？: Are you being a good girl？ Please listen to what your big sister says, okay？
translations.体調悪いのにメールしてごめんね。私はずっと▲主人公＊▲のこと気にしてるから、心細: I'm sorry for messaging you while you're unwell. I've been worried about ▲主人公＊▲, so don't feel lonely, okay？
translations.今日は、体どうだった？夜更かしせずに、あったかくして寝てね？: How are you feeling today？ Make sure to sleep warm and don't stay up late, okay？
translations.栄養ちゃんととった？病気のときの食事は、ちゃんとしなきゃね？: Are you getting enough nutrition？ You need to eat well when you're sick, okay？
translations.起こしちゃったらごめん。辛くない？早くよくなってね。: Sorry if I woke you up. Are you okay？ I hope you get better soon.
translations.お見舞いごめんね。元気そうな顔見て安心したから、あとはゆっくり休んで？: Sorry for visiting. Seeing your healthy face makes me feel relieved, so just take it easy, okay？
translations.押しかけちゃってごめんね、悪くならないといいけど。しっかり休んで、早く元気になっ: Sorry for barging in, I hope you don't get worse. Rest well and get better soon, okay？
translations.私は▲主人公＊▲の彼女なの。だから心配するのはやめないよ？: I'm ▲主人公＊▲'s girlfriend. So I won't stop worrying about you, okay？
translations.そんなこと気にしないで。心配したいんだもん。: Don't worry about that. I just want to be concerned.
translations.謝ることなんてないよ。だって、早く元気になってほしいんだもん。: There's no need to apologize. I just want you to get better soon.
translations.こーら、強がらないの。変な気はつかわないで、自分のことだけ考えて？: Hey, don't pretend to be strong. Don't worry about anything weird, just think about yourself, okay？
translations.もう、強がってない？無理するのだけは、絶対許さないよ？: Come on, are you not pretending to be strong anymore？ I absolutely won't allow you to push yourself, okay？
translations.すぐによくなるから。そんなに心配しないで？: You'll get better soon. So don't worry too much, okay？
translations.▲主人公＊▲に会えないのは寂しいけど。治るまではがまんするから。: I miss seeing ▲主人公＊▲, but I'll hold on until you get better.
translations.私に会えなくても、忘れたりしちゃやだ。早く治すから。: Even if you can't see me, please don't forget me. I'll make sure to get better soon.
translations.バイト、迷惑かけちゃうね。ごめんね。: I'm sorry for causing trouble with my part-time job.
translations.会いたいな……。だから早く治すの、がんばるから。: I want to see you... So I'll do my best to get better soon.
translations.メールうれしい。元気もらったから、きっとすぐよくなるよ。: I'm happy to receive your message. It gave me strength, so I'll surely get better soon.
translations.うん、しっかり治す。▲主人公＊▲は風邪なんてひかないでね？: Yeah, I'll make sure to get better. ▲主人公＊▲, don't catch a cold, okay？
translations.大丈夫。無理はしてないよ。だから心配しすぎないでね？: It's okay. I'm not pushing myself. So please don't worry too much, okay？
translations.寂しいな。やっぱり▲主人公＊▲に会えないのが、一番辛いよ……。: It's lonely. Not being able to see ▲主人公＊▲ is the hardest part...
translations.お見舞い、ほんとにありがとう。たくさん元気もらっちゃった、ほんとだよ。: Thank you so much for visiting. I really got a lot of strength from it.
translations.お見舞いうれしかった。でも▲主人公＊▲にうつしたくないから、ちゃんと気をつけてね: I was happy to see you. But I don't want to pass anything to ▲主人公＊▲, so please take care, okay？
translations.ありがとう。お見舞い、すごくうれしい。▲主人公＊▲のためにも、早くよくなるね。: Thank you. I was really happy to visit. I'll get better soon for ▲主人公＊▲'s sake.
translations.お見舞いありがとう。ごめんね、何もおかまいできなくて。治ったら、たくさんかまって: Thank you for visiting. I'm sorry I couldn't do anything for you. Once I'm better, I'll spoil you a lot.
translations.体よくなったみたい。きっとお見舞いのおかげ。やっぱり▲主人公＊▲に会うと元気にな: I think I'm feeling better. It's definitely thanks to your visit. It seems I get energized when I see ▲主人公＊▲.
translations.風邪、もうだいぶよくなったよ。ほんとにありがとう、▲主人公＊▲がお見舞いにきてく: My cold is getting much better. Thank you so much, it's because ▲主人公＊▲ came to visit, right？
translations.ねぇねぇ。▲主人公＊▲って優しいね。やっぱりそこが、好き。: Hey, hey. ▲主人公＊▲ is so kind. That's what I like about you.
translations.ねぇねぇ。▲主人公＊▲ってクールなとこもあるよね。かっこいいな。: Hey, hey. ▲主人公＊▲ has a cool side too. So handsome.
translations.ねぇねぇ。▲主人公＊▲って積極的だよね。年上の私が、リードされちゃったりするんだ: Hey, hey. ▲主人公＊▲ is quite proactive. Sometimes I feel led by you, even though I'm older.
translations.ねぇねぇ。▲主人公＊▲って落ち着いてるね。そこが結構可愛かったりするんだけど。: Hey, hey. ▲主人公＊▲ is calm. That's actually pretty cute.
translations.あ、自覚あるんだ。私の目に狂いはないもん。: Oh, you realize that. My eyes don't deceive me.
translations.えー、そうかなあ。間違ってないと思うんだけど。: Really？ I don't think I'm wrong.
translations.▲主人公＊▲。最近調子いい？きっと何かいいことあったんだね。: ▲主人公＊▲. Are you feeling good lately？ You must have had something good happen.
translations.▲主人公＊▲。最近調子いい？私のプレゼントのおかげだと、うれしいかなって。: ▲主人公＊▲. Are you feeling good lately？ I hope it's thanks to my gift.
translations.旅行のことなら十羽野ツーリストにお任せ！今回は旅に役立つ情報を５回にわたって紹介: For travel, trust Towano Tourist! This time, we'll introduce useful travel information in five parts. Stay tuned!
translations.またまた登場、十羽野ツーリスト！前回お送りした全５回のお役立ち情報を再度送信しま: Here comes Towano Tourist again! We're resending all five parts of useful information we sent last time. Don't forget to check!
translations.この季節、恋人と旅行にでも行こうと思っているあなたは要注意！旅行先で必要なのは、: If you're thinking of traveling with your partner this season, be careful! What you need at your destination is your foundational strength. The basics are important for travel!
translations.恋人との旅行。それは二人がずっと同じ時間を過ごすということ。瞬間瞬間が大切な思い: Traveling with your partner means spending time together. Every moment is a precious memory, so don't take your eyes off it!
translations.旅が素敵なものになるかどうか。それは旅行に行く前のやり取りも影響します。それを忘: Whether the trip will be wonderful or not depends on the interactions before you go. Don't forget that.
translations.二人きりの旅行、一緒に過ごす甘い夜……。一瞬たりとも目が離せない、のんきに寝てる: A trip for just the two of you, sweet nights together... You can't afford to be carefree and sleep!
translations.旅情報も今回で最後。とにかく旅行には万全の準備を！恋人との思い出作りに妥協はなし: This is the last travel information. Make sure to prepare thoroughly for your trip! No compromises in creating memories with your partner! So please support Towano Tourist.
translations.十羽野ツーリスト緊急企画！メール応募で熱海旅行に男女カップル２名さまをご招待！当: Towano Tourist emergency project! Apply via email for a chance to win a trip for two to Atami! Winning is up to luck？ Apply now!
translations.おめでとうございます！熱海旅行１泊２日に当選されました。チケットは後日お送りいた: Congratulations! You've won a one-night, two-day trip to Atami. Tickets will be sent later.
translations.十羽野ツーリスト緊急企画にご応募ありがとうございました。今回はまことに残念ながら: Thank you for applying to the Towano Tourist emergency project. Unfortunately, you were not selected this time. We hope for your continued support.
translations.ねぇねぇ。ちょっと思ったの。私が▲主人公＊▲に出会ったときの髪型ってどうだった？: Hey, hey. I was just thinking. What did my hair look like when I met ▲主人公＊▲？ How about going back to that style？
translations.よーし。じゃあ、そうしてみよっかな♪: Alright. Then, I guess I'll do that♪
translations.うん。それなら、それでいいの。ごめんね。: Yeah. If that's the case, then it's fine. Sorry.
translations.ごめんじゃなくて、ごめんなさいでしょ。◙もうしょうがないんだから。◙今回だけ特別:
It's not just 'sorry', it's
'I'm sorry'. It can't be
helped. I'll let you off this
time as a special exception.
But next time, it's absolutely
not okay.
translations.謝られても、あなたが何考えてるのかわからないよ。◙◙◙◙って◙言われてもしょうが:
Even if you apologize, I still
don't know what you're
thinking. If you say that,
it's no use. Seriously, I
guess I'll forgive you this
time.
translations.もう、すぐにそうやってごまかそうとするんだから。◙でも、アナタから言い出したんだ:
You always try to brush it off
like that. But since you
brought it up, you absolutely
have to make it up to me. Got
it？
translations.埋め合わせすれば、約束破ってもいいの？いいわけないよね。◙◙どうすればいいかは自:
If you make it up, can you
break promises？ That's
definitely not okay. Think for
yourself about what to do.
translations.前もって言ってくれればいいのに。◙伝えることって大事なことなんだからね。◙今度は:
You should have told me in
advance. Communication is
important, you know. Don't
forget next time.
translations.それで許してもらえると思ったのかな……◙◙◙しょうがないなぁ。◙許してあげるのは:
Did you think that would make
me forgive you...？ It can't be
helped. I'm only forgiving you
this time.
translations.この前話したドーナツ屋さん、友達が見かけたんだって。木曜日のショッピング街に居た: About that donut shop we talked about, a friend saw it. It seems they were in the shopping district on Thursday. They saw it after school, so it was in the evening.
translations.ドーナツ屋さんの目撃情報よ。土曜日のお昼ごろに噴水公園で見かけたんだって。◙今度:
Here's a sighting report for
the donut shop. They were seen
at Fountain Park around noon
on Saturday. Let's go together
next time.
translations.噂のドーナツ屋さんなんだけど、テレビで特集してるのを見たの。電気街からの生中継で: It's the rumored donut shop, and I saw a feature on it on TV. It was a live broadcast from Electric Town around noon on Sunday.
translations.デキシーズで聞いたんだけど、土曜のお昼に遊園地で噂のドーナツ屋さんを見かけたんだ: I heard at Dixie's that the rumored donut shop was seen at the amusement park around noon on Saturday. I can't wait to eat it~.
translations.この前話してたドーナツ屋さんだけど、日曜日のお昼に植物園に来るらしいよ。あっとい: About that donut shop we talked about, it seems they'll be at the botanical garden on Sunday around noon. It's so popular that it sells out quickly.
translations.土曜日のお昼くらいに、イベントホールで例のドーナツ屋さんを見かけたって聞いたよ。: I heard they spotted the donut shop at the event hall around noon on Saturday. Let's check it out.
translations.この前話してた美味しいクレープ屋さんのこと、店長が知ってたよ。土曜日のお昼くらい: The delicious crepe shop we talked about, the manager knows about it. They seem to operate at the zoo around noon on Saturday.
translations.ジェラート屋さんの目撃情報だよ。土曜日のお昼に遊園地で見かけた人がいるって、バイ: Here's a sighting report for the gelato shop. Someone saw it at the amusement park around noon on Saturday; it came up during a break at work.
translations.この前話してた甘栗屋さんだけど、友達がテレビで特集してるのを見たんだって。水曜日: About that sweet chestnut shop we talked about, a friend saw a feature on it on TV. They seem to set up shop at the zoo around Wednesday evening.
translations.焼き芋屋さんの目撃情報ね。この前の木曜の夜に友達が港の丘公園で見かけたんだって。: Here's a sighting report for the baked sweet potato shop. A friend saw it at Port Hill Park on Thursday night. I want to try it soon.
translations.この前の十羽野城の事、いろいろ聞いたよ。他にも声を聞いた人が何人もいるんだって。: I heard a lot about the Juhano Castle from before. It seems there are several people who have heard voices too. It's kind of exciting; maybe I should keep an amulet or talisman.
translations.ちょっと考えてみたんだけど、ビッグフットに逢えるとしたら、薄暗くて静かなときじゃ: I thought about it a bit, but if I were to meet Bigfoot, it would probably be in a dim and quiet time. I don't think it would come down from the mountain, so it's definitely in the mountains.
translations.ＵＦＯの目撃情報って、奥十羽野に集中してるみたい。晴れた夜によく出るんだって。: It seems UFO sightings are concentrated in Oku Juhano. They often appear on clear nights.
translations.湖畔に出没するトワッシーの目撃情報って、雨の日に偏ってるって知ってる？雨が好きな: Did you know that sightings of Towashi by the lakeside tend to happen on rainy days？ I wonder if it likes the rain.
translations.次のデートで行きたい場所があるの。▲デート場所▲だけど、どうかな？: I have a place I want to go on our next date.▲Date location▲, what do you think？
translations.他の場所のほうがいい？じゃあどこがいいかなあ？: Would you prefer another place？ Then where would you like to go？
translations.私の行きたかった場所、やっぱり覚えててくれたんだね、すごくうれしかった。将来いい: I'm so glad you remembered the place I wanted to go. You'll definitely be a great husband in the future.
translations.この前の約束、覚えててくれてありがとう。これからも連れて行ってね。: Thanks for remembering our promise from before. Please keep taking me along.
translations.せっかく私からお願いした場所でデートしたのに、あんまり楽しくなかったかな？今度は: Even though we went on a date at the place I asked for, did you not have much fun？ Next time, let's go where you want, okay？
translations.早くデートの日にならないかな♪: I can't wait for the date day to come♪
translations.遅刻は厳禁よ！早く到着してから、たーくさん遊ぶんだから♪: No tardiness allowed! You have to arrive early so we can have lots of fun♪
translations.カレンダーに、ま～る♪: Mark it on the calendar, round♪
translations.どんなデートになるか、ちょっと楽しみ。: I'm a little excited about what kind of date it will be.
translations.デートのとき、どんな服着ればいいかなぁ。: What kind of clothes should I wear on the date？
translations.デート、今からドキドキしてきちゃった。ちゃんと寝られるかな。: I'm getting nervous about the date already. I hope I can sleep well.
translations.デートに着ていく服を選ばなきゃ……まだ気が早いかな？: I have to choose what to wear on the date... Is it too early？
translations.もう書いた？カレンダーに○: Have you written it down yet？ Mark it with a circle on the calendar.
translations.やっぱりたまには私の方から誘われるのも嬉しい？: I guess it's nice to be invited by me sometimes, right？
translations.もしデートすっぽかしたら、針センボン飲ませちゃうからね: If you stand me up on the date, I'll make you drink a needle-filled drink.
translations.明日、デートだよ。もちろん忘れてないよね▼: Tomorrow is the date. You haven't forgotten, right▼？
translations.ねぇねぇ、明日は何の日だったか、覚えてる？: Hey, hey, do you remember what day it is tomorrow？
translations.明日のデート、なにか美味しいもの食べようね。: For tomorrow's date, let's eat something delicious.
translations.明日、雨降らないよね。もし降ったらアイアイ傘で行こうね♪: It won't rain tomorrow, right？ If it does, let's use a pair umbrella♪
translations.きっと▲主人公＊▲よりも、私のほうが楽しみにしてるよ。今度のデート。: I'm definitely looking forward to the next date more than ▲the protagonist＊▲.
translations.うん、私も楽しみ。待ち合わせ場所に早く行っちゃいそう。: Yeah, I'm looking forward to it too. I might go to the meeting place early.
translations.早くデートの時間になっちゃえばいいのに。: I wish the date time would come soon.
translations.今から会いに行っちゃ……ごめん、ワガママ。: I want to go see you now... Sorry, I'm being selfish.
translations.さっきのメールは永久保存しちゃいます▼: I'll permanently save that last email▼.
translations.ふふ、アルバイトのみんなにこのメール見せたら、なんて言うかな。なんて、ウソウソ: Hehe, I wonder what everyone at work would say if I showed them this email. Just kidding!
translations.ねぇねぇ、明日のデートにお弁当作っていったほうがいいかな？: Hey, should I make a bento for our date tomorrow？
translations.うん、がんばって作っていくね。: Yeah, I'll do my best to make it.
translations.そう、またの機会にするね。: Okay, I'll save it for another time.
translations.あーあ、明日は雨かあ……残念。: Ah, it's going to rain tomorrow... what a shame.
translations.天気予報だと明日は曇りだって。一応傘もっていこうかな: The weather forecast says it will be cloudy tomorrow. Should I bring an umbrella just in case？
translations.天気予報だと明日は晴れるらしいよ。やったね▼: The weather forecast says it will be sunny tomorrow. Yay! ▼
translations.また旅行にいけるなんて◙夢みたい。◙もう今からドキドキが◙とまらないよ。:
I can't believe we can
go on a trip again It
feels like a dream.
I'm already so excited
I can't stop.
translations.旅行楽しみだな。◙また、たくさん思い出◙作ろうね。:
I'm looking forward
to the trip. Let's
make a lot of
memories again.
translations.そうそう。◙いろんなとこ見てまわら◙なくっちゃ。◙その分だけ思い出が◙作れるよ。:
That's right. We have
to explore various
places. The more we
do, the more memories
we can create.
translations.なに？◙何か気の利いた予定でも◙考えてくれるのかな？◙期待しちゃうよ？:
What？ Are you planning
something clever？ I'm
looking forward to it!
translations.▲主人公＊▲は◙もちろん旅行の準備◙終わってるよね？:
▲Protagonist＊▲
has, of course,
finished preparing
for the trip,
right？
translations.そんなのだめです。◙やっぱりわたしが◙一緒に準備してあげなくちゃ◙だめかな。:
That's not good. I guess I
have to help you prepare.
translations.わたしは先生だから◙制限ないの。◙特別にバナナだけは◙許してあげる。◙◙なんて、:
I'm a teacher, so
I have no
restrictions. I'll
make an exception
for bananas. Just
kidding.
translations.ねえ、旅行まであと何日だったかな。◙どうしよう待ちきれない。:
Hey, how many days until the
trip？ I can't wait.
translations.やっぱりそうだよね。◙期待と緊張で胸が◙張り裂けちゃいそう。:
That's right. I'm so
excited and nervous,
I feel like my heart
might burst.
translations.そっか、そうだよね。◙うん、わたしももっと◙楽しまなくっちゃね。:
I see, that's true.
Yeah, I need to
enjoy it more.
translations.ねぇ、今度の旅行で◙なにを一番したい？:
Hey, what do you
want to do the
most on our trip？
translations.そうだね。◙いろいろ下調べしていったら◙もっと楽しめるかも。:
That's true. If I do some
research, I might enjoy it
even more.
translations.なにを撮るのかな？◙お姉さんに言ってごらん。:
What are you going to
take pictures of？ Tell
your big sister.
translations.あ、もしかして肝試しとか？◙でもそういうのは旅行の◙ときじゃなくてもいいよね。:
Oh, maybe a test of
courage？ But we don't have
to do that during the
trip.
translations.いよいよ明日だね。◙もう寝ちゃったかな？:
It's finally
tomorrow. Have you
already gone to bed？
translations.もう、うそばっかり。◙明日は遅れないでね。◙おやすみなさい。◙:
Come on, stop
joking. Don't be
late tomorrow. Good
night.
translations.あ、まだ起きてた。◙わたしも眠れなかったん◙だけどね。◙お互い早く寝ようね。:
Oh, you're still
awake. I couldn't
sleep either. Let's
both try to sleep
early.
translations.旅行終わっちゃったね。◙今回の旅行でも色んな◙思い出ができたね。◙あーあ、もっと:
The trip is over. We
made a lot of memories
this time too. Ah, I
wish we could have
spent more time
together.
translations.今度の旅行もとっても◙楽しかった。◙こうやって思い出って◙増えていくんだよね。:
The next trip was
really fun. This is
how memories keep
piling up.
translations.うん。◙あなたと同じ思い出が◙共有できてるってことが◙とってもうれしい。◙◙:
Yeah. I'm really happy
that we can share the
same memories.
translations.朝、目が覚めて、隣に◙あなたがいるってことが◙どれほど特別なことなん◙だろうって:
In the morning, I woke
up and thought about
how special it is to
have you next to me.
It makes me so happy.
translations.ふふ、おじいさんみたい。◙温泉気持ちよかったもんね。:
Hehe, you sound like an
old man. The hot spring
felt so good.
translations.なんだかまだ旅行から◙帰ってこれてない気分。◙時々ぼんやりしちゃうの。◙:
I still feel like I
haven't returned from
the trip. Sometimes I
zone out.
translations.朝起きたときに、何で◙▲主人公＊▲が◙隣にいないんだろうって◙思っちゃった。◙お:
When I woke up in the
morning, I wondered
why ▲Protagonist＊▲
wasn't next to me.
It's strange, right？
translations.また旅行の日のこと◙思い出しちゃった。◙ぜんぜん気分が◙抜けてないみたい。:
I remembered the
day of the trip
again. It feels
like I'm still in
that mood.
translations.なんだか最近、夜になると◙少しさびしくなるの。◙この間の旅行の夜の◙こと思い出し:
Lately, I feel a bit lonely
at night. Maybe it's because
I remember the nights from
our last trip.
translations.旅行、また行こうね。◙それで、もーっと◙たくさん思い出作るの。◙素敵でしょ。:
Let's go on another
trip. And make even
more memories. Sounds
wonderful.
translations.デートはまだまだ先かあ～。楽しみだね。: The date is still a while away~. I'm looking forward to it.
translations.どんなデートにしようか、タウン情報誌をチェック中です。: I'm checking the town information magazine to decide what kind of date we should have.
translations.▲主人公＊▲とデートしてる夢みちゃった。あ～もう、早く約束の日にならないかな～。: I had a dream about dating ▲Protagonist＊▲. Ah, I can't wait for the promised day!
translations.カレンダーでデートの日を何回も確認しちゃうね。まだまだ先だな～。: I keep checking the calendar for the date. It's still a while away.
translations.今度のデートすごく楽しみ。今から気合入っちゃう。: I'm really looking forward to the next date. I'm getting pumped up already.
translations.まだ１週間以上あるね、ふう、待ち遠しいなあ。: There's still over a week left. Phew, I can't wait.
translations.ねぇねぇ、今度のデートまでに髪型変えてみようかと思うんだけど、どうかな？: Hey, hey, I'm thinking of changing my hairstyle before the next date. What do you think？
translations.よーし！じゃあイメージチェンジするよ。: Alright! Then I'll go for a makeover.
translations.そっかそっか。じゃあこのままにしとくね。: I see, I see. Then I'll keep it as it is.
translations.あともうちょっとだね、ちょっとドキドキしてきちゃった。: It's almost time, I'm starting to get a little nervous.
translations.▲主人公＊▲とデートしてる夢を見ちゃった。まだ何日もあるのに、毎晩夢に出てきたら: I had a dream about dating ▲Protagonist＊▲. Even though it's still days away, if I keep dreaming about it, I'll be sleep-deprived.
translations.ずいぶん待った気がするけど、あと少しだね、デート▼: It feels like I've waited a long time, but it's almost time for the date ▼
translations.どんなデートになるか、すごく楽しみだよね。: I'm really looking forward to what kind of date it will be.
translations.明日の約束、忘れてないよね。すっごく楽しみにしてるんだから。: You haven't forgotten about our promise for tomorrow, right？ I'm really looking forward to it.
translations.約束の場所、ちゃんと覚えてる？遅刻しちゃダメよ。: Do you remember the promised place？ You can't be late.
translations.おはよう！今日はデート日和だよ♪: Good morning! It's a perfect day for a date♪
translations.今日のデート、待ち遠しい？私は……どうでしょう？: Are you looking forward to today's date？ I'm... not sure.
translations.約束の時間までまだあるけど……慌てて準備したりしてない？ 大丈夫？: There's still time until our meeting, but... are you rushing to get ready？ Are you okay？
translations.ねぇねぇ、私、料理を本格的に始めてみようと思うの。美味しく作るから、意見を聞かせ: Hey, I'm thinking of seriously starting to cook. I'll make it delicious, so let me know what you think▼
translations.いろんなお店で食事をすると、料理の勉強になるよね。味だけじゃなくて、素材の処理や: Eating at various restaurants helps me learn about cooking. It's not just about taste, but also about handling ingredients and presentation.
translations.デートのときに食べた料理を参考に、レパートリーを増やして行こうと思うの。いろんな: I want to increase my repertoire by referencing the dishes we eat on our dates. I want to try various cuisines.
translations.どんな料理が好き？レシピ本があれば、その料理を勉強して食べさせてあげるよ。: What kind of dishes do you like？ If you have a recipe book, I can study those dishes and cook for you.
translations.料理が上達するには、ただ作るだけじゃなくて食べた人の意見や感想も重要なんだって。: To improve my cooking, it's important not just to cook, but also to hear opinions and feedback from those who eat it. So, I want to hear a lot from ▲主人公＊▲.
translations.調味料って大事だよね。使い方を間違わなければ、料理の味を格段に良くしてくれるの。: Seasonings are important. If used correctly, they can greatly enhance the flavor of the dish. But if misused or relied on too much, it can make you worse.
translations.料理のレパートリーが増えるほど、食べてもらいたくなるね。だから、私の手料理を食べ: The more my cooking repertoire grows, the more I want you to try it. So, why not come and taste my cooking？
translations.幼いあの人の夢を見た後、私はふたたび幼いあの人の夢を見るだろう。あの人は子供であ:
After dreaming of that person
as a child, I will dream of
that person as a child again.
That person is both a child
and not a child... I had such
a dream. Dream Chaser
translations.あの人に和の料理をふるまわれること３度、食事処で食事をすること２度。そして現実の:
Three times I served that
person Japanese cuisine, and
twice we dined together. In a
world where time flows, we
watch videos of love or fear
together. Then, that person
and I... I had such a dream.
Dream Chaser
translations.現実の時が流れる世界でひとつの季節の間の話。あの人と温泉で逢引すること２度。そし:
In a world where time flows,
during one season, we met
twice at a hot spring. And
once we watched a love video
or a play together. Then that
person... I had such a dream.
Dream Chaser
translations.現実の時が流れる世界でひとつの季節の間の話。山で逢引すること２度、美術館で逢引す:
In a world where time flows,
during one season, we met
twice in the mountains and
twice at an art museum. Then
that person... I had such a
dream. Dream Chaser
translations.あの人と落ちる玉を消す遊戯に興じること３度。現実の時が流れる世界でひとつの季節の:
Engaging in a game of erasing
falling balls three times with
that person. In a world where
time flows, during one season,
we visited a shrine twice and
a church twice. Then our sweet
time together... I had such a
dream. Dream Chaser
translations.あの人とひとつの傘を共有して帰宅すること２度。ある雨の日、あの人は天候を……◙そ:
Sharing one umbrella with that
person while going home twice.
On a rainy day, that person...
I had such a dream. Dream
Chaser
translations.現実の時が流れる世界でひとつの季節の間の話。山での逢引を２度、高: In a world where time flows, during one season, we met twice in the mountains.
translations.あの人に朝食をふるまわれること３度。高級な喫茶で食事をとること２度。現実の時が流:
Three times I was served
breakfast by that person.
Twice we dined at a fancy
café. In a world where time
flows, during one season, we
visited a place served by a
housekeeper twice. We
finally... I had such a dream.
Dream Chaser
translations.あの人の部屋を訪れること５度。現実の時が流れる世界でひとつの季節の間、美容に関わ:
I visited that person's room
five times. In a world where
time flows, during one season,
we visited a store dealing
with beauty products three
times. I was at their mercy...
I had such a dream. Dream
Chaser
translations.現実の時が流れる世界でひとつの季節の間の話。あの人と海を訪れること２度、植物を観:
In a world where time flows,
during one season, we visited
the sea twice and admired
plants twice. We became just
the two of us... I had such a
dream. Dream Chaser
translations.ゲームセンターってにぎやかで好きよ。みんな笑顔だし、大きい声出しても平気だもんね: I love arcades; they're lively. Everyone's smiling, and it's okay to be loud. Let's go play again♪
translations.この前デートで行ったゲームセンター、楽しかったね。また行こうよ。: The arcade we went to on our last date was fun. Let's go again.
translations.ゲームセンター、また遊びにいきたいな～。１人じゃ寂しいから、▲主人公＊▲と一緒が: I want to go to the arcade again~. It's lonely alone, so I'd like to go with ▲主人公＊▲.
translations.ゲームセンターに遊びにいかない？たまには行こうよ。ね？: How about we go to the arcade？ Let's go sometimes, okay？
translations.この前のゲームセンターで、メダルがじゃらじゃらーって出るの、すごかったね♪ジャッ: The medals pouring out at the arcade last time were amazing♪ Was it a jackpot？
translations.もっと▲主人公＊▲に、私のこと紹介してほしいな。私の知らないあなたの一面がたくさ: I want you to introduce me more to yourself. I can see many sides of you that I don't know.
translations.カノジョとして紹介されるの、ちょっと緊張しちゃう。私らしくないかな？: Being introduced as a girlfriend makes me a bit nervous. Is that not like me？
translations.▲主人公＊▲ってたくさんの人に囲まれてるね。私も見習って、あなたのこと友達に紹介: ▲主人公＊▲ is surrounded by many people. I might follow your lead and introduce you to my friends.
translations.いろんな人に紹介されて思うのは、やっぱり私は▲主人公＊▲が一番ってこと！: Being introduced to various people makes me realize that ▲主人公＊▲ is the best!
translations.ふふ、いろんなこと話しちゃったよ。私たちが女子トークしてる間、あなた達も男子トー: Hehe, I've talked about a lot of things. While we were having girl talk, you guys were having boy talk, right？
translations.名刺交換したの？どんな人と？今度私にも見せてね。: Did you exchange business cards？ With whom？ Show me next time.
translations.ぱずるだまって対戦で遊ぶととっても楽しいよね。もっと練習して、いっぱい連鎖できる: Playing puzzle balls in competition is really fun. I need to practice more to create lots of combos.
translations.写真を撮りました！いっしょに写ってるのは▲ＨＮ＊＊＊＊▲さんのカノジョだよ♪: I took a photo! The one in it is ▲ＨＮ＊＊＊＊▲'s girlfriend♪
translations.▲ＨＮ＊＊＊＊▲さんのカノジョと一緒に撮った写真だよ。もうすっかり仲良し♪: This is a photo taken with ▲ＨＮ＊＊＊＊▲'s girlfriend. We're already good friends♪
translations.今日は▲ＨＮ＊＊＊＊▲さんのカノジョと料理の研究会。デキシーズのメニューとは一味: Today is a cooking study session with ▲ＨＮ＊＊＊＊▲'s girlfriend. It's a Western menu different from Dixie's.
translations.朝のお散歩中です。１枚パシャリ: I'm out for a morning walk. Snap!
translations.夕方の街を散策中。そろそろ帰ろうかな: Strolling through the evening city. Should I head back soon？
translations.今日の私を１枚撮影したよ▼: I took a photo of myself today▼
translations.イメージチェンジの実験中。こんな髪型どう？: Experimenting with a change of image. How does this hairstyle look？
translations.私もいいなーって思ってたんだ。この髪型にしてみようかな。: I was thinking that looks nice too. Maybe I'll try this hairstyle.
translations.ねぇねぇ。じゃあこういうのはどう？: Hey, how about something like this？
translations.そっかそっか、この髪型かぁ～。うん、この髪型にしてみようかな。: I see, this hairstyle, huh~. Yeah, I might try this hairstyle.
translations.私もそっちの方がお気に入りかな。じゃあそっちにする。: I think I prefer that one too. Then I'll go with that.
translations.どんな感じがいいかな～。もう少し考えてみるね。: What kind of look would be good~？ I'll think about it a bit more.
translations.新しい服を買おうと思って試着中。ねぇねぇ、こういう服どう？: I'm trying on new clothes because I want to buy some. Hey, how about this kind of outfit？
translations.よし、決定！買っちゃうぞ♪今度のデートに着ていこっかな。: Alright, decided! I'm buying it♪ Maybe I'll wear it on our next date.
translations.そっか……感想ありがとう。: I see... Thank you for your feedback.
translations.今日は早く寝ようかな。: I think I'll go to bed early today.
translations.今の▲姉ヶ崎＊▲の長さがいい: The current length of ▲Anesaki＊▲ is nice.
