translations.メールだよ、喜んでくれるかな: It's mail, I wonder if you'll be happy.
translations.お願い……読んでほしいな: Please... I want you to read it.
translations.このメール、あなたに読まれたがってるみたい……なんて: This email seems to want you to read it... or so it seems.
translations.メールです。正確に言えば、電子メール、electronic mailです: It's an email. To be precise, it's electronic mail.
translations.このメールに込めた想い、伝わるかな？: I wonder if the feelings in this email will reach you？
translations.メールが届きました、返信はお早めにお願い致します: You've received an email, please reply soon.
translations.高嶺愛花より、メール着信のお知らせです: This is a notification of an email from Takane Aika.
translations.メール、読まずに捨てたら小キック: If you throw away the email without reading it, a little kick!
translations.別に読まなくてもいいんだけど: You don't have to read it, though.
translations.リンコちゃんからメールです: You've got an email from Rinko-chan.
translations.つーかほら、メール: By the way, look, it's an email.
translations.なんじゃこりゃあ！……メールだ！: What the heck is this! ...It's an email!
translations.メール、返信は３秒ルールでよろしく: For the email, please follow the 3-second rule for replies.
translations.メール届いたよ、読んであげよっか？ なんてね: You've got an email, should I read it for you？ Just kidding.
translations.お姉さんからメールだよ？: You've got an email from your big sister!
translations.心を込めたメールよ、読んでみて？: It's a heartfelt email, why not give it a read？
translations.起きてるみたいね。良かった。: Looks like you're awake. That's good.
translations.おはよう。今日もよろしくね。: Good morning. Let's have a great day again.
translations.特訓だよ。和風のものでお店にあるのは何？◙ヒントは切っても切れない関係って感じ？:
It's a special training. What
Japanese item is in the shop？
Hint: It feels like an
inseparable relationship？
translations.ん、よくわかりました。正解です。: Hmm, I got it. That's correct.
translations.そんなの置いてないよ？: We don't have that, you know？
translations.今回は洋風メニューに挑戦。何があったかな？◙ヒントは、“日本生まれ”だよ。:
This time, we're trying
Western dishes. What could it
be？ Hint: It's 'made in
Japan'.
translations.今回は中華メニューだよ。コレはさすがにわかるよね。◙日本生まれのメニューだよ。:
This time, it's a Chinese
menu. You can guess this one,
right？ It's a menu 'made in
Japan'.
translations.そうそう。正解です。 夏に食べるのが最高なのよね。: That's right. Correct. It's best enjoyed in summer.
translations.次の特訓。お店においてある軽食は？◙人の名前が語源のメニューだよ。:
Next special training. What
snacks are in the shop？ It's a
menu named after a person.
translations.今日の特訓。女の子が大好きなスイーツ。何があったか覚えてる？◙ヒントは、完璧なデ:
Today's special training.
Sweets that girls love. Do you
remember what they are？ Hint:
It means something like a
perfect dessert.
translations.宿題、ちゃんとしたかな？: Did you do your homework properly？
translations.宿題忘れてない？: You didn't forget your homework, did you？
translations.ねぇ、忘れてることない？宿題するんだよ。: Hey, is there something you forgot？ You need to do your homework.
translations.どっちつかずな返事だけど大丈夫？: Is that a vague answer？ Is that okay？
translations.もう、今からするんだよ。: Come on, I'm doing it right now.
translations.うん、きっといい夢が見れると思う。: Yeah, I think I'll have sweet dreams.
translations.羊が３匹、羊が４匹……ふふ、おやすみなさい。: Three sheep, four sheep... Hehe, good night.
translations.メールって、楽しいね。なんだかそんな風に思っちゃった。これからもメールするよ。: Emails are fun. I kind of feel that way. I'll keep emailing you.
translations.こんなにたくさんメールした男の子って、▲主人公＊▲が初めてだよ。これからもよろし: You're the first boy I've emailed this much, ▲主人公＊▲. Let's keep it up.
translations.仲良しになれたよね、私たち。私はそう思ってるんだけど。: We've become close, haven't we？ I think so.
translations.私たちって……周りからどう見えてるのかな。: I wonder how we look to others.
translations.うん、そうなの。だからこれからもよろしくね。: Yeah, that's right. So let's keep it up.
translations.そっか……勘違いか。: I see... It was a misunderstanding.
translations.ねえ。朝ごはん何食べた？: Hey. What did you have for breakfast？
translations.ねえ、もうお昼ご飯は食べた？: Hey, have you had lunch yet？
translations.カノジョと仲良くしてるかな？: Are you getting along with your girlfriend？
translations.夜更かしのせいかな？眠い……。: Maybe it's because I stayed up late？ I'm sleepy...
translations.テニス上手くなった？: Have you gotten better at tennis？
translations.オススメの本ってある？: Do you have any recommended books？
translations.オススメのＣＤある？教えて欲しいな。: Do you have any recommended CDs？ I'd like to know.
translations.旅行からの帰りのこと◙思い出してたの。◙あの後一緒のおうちに◙帰れてたら素敵だろ:
I was thinking about coming
back from the trip. It would
be nice if we could have
gone home together after
that.
translations.旅行楽しかったね。◙▲主人公＊▲と一緒ならいつでもステキな旅になるから。◙またつ:
The trip was fun. With
▲Protagonist＊▲, every trip is
wonderful. Will you take me
again？ You♪
translations.新しい服買っちゃった。今度のデートで着ていこっかな？: I bought new clothes. Should I wear them on our next date？
translations.ねぇねぇ、学校のカーディガンって、どう思う？: Hey, what do you think about the school cardigan？
translations.うんうん。イメージも変わるし、かわいいよね。: Yeah, it changes the image and it's cute.
translations.ふーん、そうなんだ。わかった、着ないようにするね。: Hmm, I see. Okay, I won't wear it then.
translations.ねぇねぇ、髪の長さを変えるのって、どうかな？: Hey, what do you think about changing my hair length？
translations.そっかそっか、じゃあしばらくはこの長さにしておくね。: Got it, I'll keep it this length for a while.
translations.うーん、それもありか……うん、わかった。: Hmm, that's an option... okay, understood.
translations.ねぇねぇ、今の髪色の感じを少し変えてみようと思うんだけどどんな感じがいいかな？: Hey, I'm thinking of changing my hair color a bit. What do you think would look good？
translations.明るさかぁ……じゃあ明るいのと暗いの、どっちがいいかな？: Brightness, huh... so which is better, bright or dark？
translations.じゃあ少し明るめにしてみようかな。: Then maybe I'll try a bit brighter.
translations.じゃあ少し暗めにしてみようかな。: Then maybe I'll try a bit darker.
translations.色の濃さかあ……じゃあどんな感じがいいと思う？: Color intensity, huh... what do you think would look good？
translations.じゃあ少しだけ濃くしてみようかな。: Then maybe I'll try making it a bit darker.
translations.じゃあ少しだけ薄くしてみようかな。: Then maybe I'll try making it a bit lighter.
translations.そっかぁ……じゃあそのままにしておくね。: I see... then I'll leave it as it is.
translations.ねぇねぇ、イメージチェンジで髪の色を変えてみようかと考えてるんだけど、どうかな？: Hey, I'm thinking of changing my hair color for a change. What do you think？
translations.ちょっと？どんな感じがいいかな？: A little？ What do you think would look good？
translations.いい感じ？そうね、やってみようかな。: Does it look good？ Yeah, I think I'll give it a try.
translations.お任せ？そうね、ちょっと考えてみるね。: Leave it to me？ Yeah, I'll think about it.
translations.よしっ！思い切って変えてみる。 どういう雰囲気が良いと思う？: Alright! I'll boldly change it. What kind of vibe do you think would be good？
translations.いい感じ？そうね、どういう感じが良いか考えてみよっと。: Does it look good？ Yeah, I'll think about what kind of look would be nice.
translations.お任せかぁ～。じゃあ考えてた色があるから、その色にしてみよっと。: Leave it to me, huh？ I have a color in mind, so I'll go with that.
translations.出会ったとき？そうね、▲主人公＊▲と付き合い始めたころの髪に戻してみようかな。: When we first met？ Yeah, I think I'll go back to the hair I had when I started dating ▲Protagonist＊▲.
translations.そうだね、ちょっとくらい変えてみよっと。: Yeah, I think I'll change it a little.
translations.明日はバイトの日だよ。時間に余裕をもって出勤してね: Tomorrow is a work day. Make sure to arrive on time.
translations.明日は委員会だったよね？: Tomorrow is the committee meeting, right？
translations.今日、部活を休んだって聞いたけど、体調でも悪かったの？: I heard you skipped club today. Were you feeling unwell？
translations.委員会を休んだってきいたけど、何かあったの？: I heard you missed the committee meeting. Did something happen？
translations.今日、アルバイト休んだでしょ。ダメだよ勝手に休んだりしちゃ。: You skipped work today, right？ You can't just take off without notice.
translations.最近、部活動に行ってないんだって？何かあった？: I heard you haven't been going to club activities lately. Did something happen？
translations.しばらく委員会に出てないってきいたけど、ダメだよ。ちゃんとしないと。: I heard you haven't been attending the committee for a while. You need to take it seriously.
translations.ねぇ……アルバイトを休みがちだけど、何かあったの？無断で休んだりしちゃダメだよ。: Hey... you've been skipping work a lot. Did something happen？ You can't just take off without notice.
translations.一日の始まりだよ。: It's the start of the day.
translations.渡したいものがあるんだけど、会えるかな？: I have something I want to give you, can we meet？
translations.私のほうから言うのはおかしいかもしれないけど、覚えてたらごめんね。明日はほら、ホ: It might be strange for me to say this, but if you remember, I'm sorry. Tomorrow is White Day, after all.
translations.今日はステキなホワイトデーでした。ありがとう。: Today was a wonderful White Day. Thank you.
translations.今日はおもしろかったね。来年は私も何か考えてみようかな？: Today was fun, wasn't it？ Maybe I'll think of something for next year too？
translations.うん、楽しみ！: Yeah, I'm looking forward to it!
translations.ふふ、なんか待ちきれない。また後でね。: Hehe, I can't wait. See you later.
translations.もう、ちゃんと予定に入れておくように。: Make sure to put it in your schedule properly.
translations.おつかれさまでした。: Thank you for your hard work.
translations.私も同じこと考えてたの。: I was thinking the same thing.
translations.同じ本をいっしょに読むの、こんなに楽しいんだね。: Reading the same book together is so much fun.
translations.読書。私も負けてられないね。これから少し、あなたと同じところまで読もっと。: Reading. I can't fall behind. I'll read a bit more to catch up with you.
translations.最近一緒に読書してないよね、私続きが気になるんだけど……。: We haven't read together in a while, and I'm curious about the continuation...
translations.もう締め切りまであまり日がないよ。大丈夫？ちゃんと推薦図書読んでる？: There isn't much time left until the deadline. Are you okay？ Are you reading the recommended books？
translations.面白い本だったね♪学校のみんなも、あの書評を読んで「魍魎の匣」に興味持ってくれる: That was an interesting book♪ I hope everyone at school gets interested in "The Box of Goblins" after reading that review.
translations.今度は▲主人公＊▲がオススメの本を読んでみたいな。: Next, I want to read a book recommended by ▲the protagonist＊▲.
translations.お料理美味しかった？味付けが気に入らなかったら遠慮なく言ってね。これからもいろん: Did you enjoy the cooking？ If you didn't like the seasoning, feel free to tell me. I'll be making various dishes from now on.
translations.今は和食がマイブームなの。: Right now, Japanese cuisine is my current obsession.
translations.今は中華がマイブームかな。: Right now, Chinese cuisine is my current obsession.
translations.今は洋食がマイブームなの。: Right now, Western cuisine is my current obsession.
translations.今はいろいろなジャンルの料理にチャレンジ中なの。: Right now, I'm trying out various types of cuisine.
translations.今はお菓子作りがマイブームかな。: Right now, baking is my current obsession.
translations.いろいろお勉強したから何でもできるよ。任せといて。: I've studied a lot, so I can do anything. Leave it to me.
translations.和食がダメ……失敗しちゃったの、はあ……。: Japanese cuisine didn't go well... I messed up, sigh...
translations.中華がダメ……失敗しちゃったの、はあ……。: Chinese cuisine didn't go well... I messed up, sigh...
translations.洋食がダメ……失敗しちゃったの、はあ……。: Western cuisine didn't go well... I messed up, sigh...
translations.最近ちょっとスランプ気味かも。お料理の話ね。: I might be in a bit of a slump lately. Talking about cooking.
translations.お菓子作りがダメ……失敗しちゃったの、はあ……。: Baking didn't go well... I messed up, sigh...
translations.プレゼントのリサーチ？そうだなあ……かわいい感じのものがいいな。: Researching gifts？ Hmm... I want something cute.
translations.プレゼントのリサーチ？そうだなあ……清楚な感じのものがいいな。: Researching gifts？ Hmm... I want something elegant.
translations.プレゼントのリサーチ？そうだなあ……カジュアルな感じのものがいいな。: Researching gifts？ Hmm... I want something casual.
translations.プレゼントのリサーチ？そうねぇ……そういうのは自分で考えた方が心がこもってると思: Researching gifts？ Well... I think it's more heartfelt if I come up with it myself.
translations.どんなのがいいかなあ……やっぱり秘密！私が欲しいと思うもの、当ててみて。: What would be good... it's a secret! Try to guess what I want.
translations.姉ヶ崎先輩の趣味……そうだな、最近は寒色系のものをチェックしてるみたいだぞ。: Anegasaki-senpai's hobby... well, it seems she's been checking out cool colors lately.
translations.姉ヶ崎先輩の趣味……そうだな、最近は暖色系のものをチェックしてるみたいだぞ。: Anegasaki-senpai's hobby... well, it seems she's been checking out warm colors lately.
translations.姉ヶ崎先輩へのプレゼント？んーちょっと今データ不足なんだよ。悪いな。: A gift for Anegasaki-senpai？ Hmm, I'm a bit short on data right now. Sorry.
translations.カノジョへのプレゼント？あの人だったら寒色が似合うと思うけど。: A gift for my girlfriend？ I think cool colors would suit her.
translations.記念日、ちゃんと覚えてるよね？夕方はぜっったいに空けておいてね！: You remember our anniversary, right？ Keep your evening free for me!
translations.今日は楽しかったね。▲主人公＊▲はどうだった？: Today was fun, wasn't it？ How was ▲Protagonist＊▲？
translations.誕生日の夜は、他の予定入れてないよね？お祝いさせてね。: You didn't make any other plans for your birthday night, right？ Let me celebrate with you.
translations.ねぇねぇ、七夕の短冊、どんなの書くの？ちゃんと考えてる？: Hey, what are you writing on your Tanabata wish strip？ Have you thought it through？
translations.願い事、叶うといいな。: I hope your wishes come true.
translations.今頃、織姫と彦星もいっしょにいるんだろうね。: I bet Orihime and Hikoboshi are together right now.
translations.週末は十羽野祭り。一緒に行くでしょ？: This weekend is the Jubano Festival. You're coming with me, right？
translations.楽しみだね♪ 週末、お祭りでしょ。: I'm looking forward to it♪ It's a festival this weekend.
translations.今日着ていく浴衣の写真なんだけど……どう、似合ってる？: Here's a picture of the yukata I'm wearing today... How do I look？
translations.いよいよ花火だね、楽しみ♪: It's finally fireworks time, I'm excited♪
translations.ねえ、今日は花火大会だよ。: Hey, it's the fireworks festival today.
translations.体育祭、怪我しないようにがんばろうね。: Let's do our best at the sports festival and avoid injuries.
translations.ねえ、忘れてない？今日は体育祭だよ。: Hey, you haven't forgotten, right？ It's the sports festival today.
translations.今日は疲れたなあ。でも楽しかった。: I'm tired today. But it was fun.
translations.楽しみだね。ハロウィンパーティ！: I'm looking forward to it. Halloween party!
translations.パーティに遅れちゃダメだよ。準備も忘れずにね: Don't be late for the party. Don't forget to prepare!
translations.楽しかったね、ハロウィン。こういうイベントも良いかも。: Halloween was fun. Events like this are nice.
translations.いよいよ文化祭だね。私たちもがんばらなきゃ。: It's finally the cultural festival. We have to do our best too.
translations.おはよう。文化祭日和。じゃあ学校でね。: Good morning. Perfect weather for the cultural festival. See you at school.
translations.今日は楽しかった。祭の後って悲しいけど。: Today was fun. It's sad after the festival, though.
translations.街がクリスマスムードだね。雪は降るかなあ。: The town is in a Christmas mood. I wonder if it will snow.
translations.街路樹のイルミネーションがとってもキレイ。もうすぐだね、クリスマス。: The street tree illuminations are so beautiful. Christmas is coming soon.
translations.クリスマスイブ！楽しみだね。: It's Christmas Eve! I'm looking forward to it.
translations.クリスマスはやっぱり好きな人と過ごさないとね。ありがとう。: Christmas should be spent with someone you love. Thank you.
translations.クリスマス、過ぎちゃった。渡したいものがあるんだけどな。: Christmas has passed. I have something I want to give you.
translations.あけましておめでとうございます。今年もよろしくおねがいします。さっそくだけど、初: Happy New Year! I look forward to this year too. By the way, want to go to Hatsumode？
translations.今年もよろしくおねがいします。メールでも、一応ね。: I look forward to this year too. Just sending a message, you know.
translations.遠足だね。学年は違うけど、一緒にお弁当食べようね。: It's the field trip. We're in different grades, but let's eat lunch together.
translations.今日は遠足、じゃあ学校でね。: It's the field trip today, see you at school.
translations.遠足、楽しかったね。同じ学年なら、もっと楽しかったかもしれないけど。しょうがない: The field trip was fun. It might have been more fun if we were in the same grade, but it can't be helped.
translations.今日はありがと。せっかく水着買ったんだし、海やプールにも行きたいな。: Thanks for today. Since I bought a swimsuit, I want to go to the beach or pool.
translations.バレンタインは期待してていいからね？: You can expect something for Valentine's, okay？
translations.もう食べた？お味の方はいかがでしょう？なんちゃってー。: Have you eaten yet？ How does it taste？ Just kidding!
translations.カノジョへのプレゼント？あの人だったら暖色が似合うと思うけど。: A gift for my girlfriend？ I think warm colors would suit her.
translations.カノジョへのプレゼント？あの人だったら……よくわかんないや。: A gift for my girlfriend？ I'm not really sure what she'd like...
translations.姉ヶ崎さんへのプレゼント？うーん、かわいらしい感じのプレゼントがいいんじゃない？: A gift for Anesaki-san？ Hmm, something cute would be nice, right？
translations.姉ヶ崎さんへのプレゼント？うーん、清楚な感じのプレゼントがいいんじゃない？: A gift for Anesaki-san？ Hmm, something elegant would be nice, right？
translations.姉ヶ崎さんへのプレゼント？うーん、カジュアルな感じのプレゼントがいいんじゃない？: A gift for Anesaki-san？ Hmm, something casual would be nice, right？
translations.ねぇねぇ、アクセサリーに凝ってみようと思うんだけど、どんなアクセサリーが好き？: Hey, I'm thinking of getting into accessories. What kind do you like？
translations.そっか、帽子が好きなんだ。じゃあ、帽子をかぶるようにしてみようかな？: Oh, you like hats. Should I try wearing a hat then？
translations.そっか、メガネが好きなんだ。私にはどんなメガネが似合うかなあ。: Oh, you like glasses. I wonder what kind would suit me.
translations.そっかそっか、指輪が好きなんだ。私に似合う指輪って、どんな感じのだろ。: Oh, you like rings. I wonder what kind of ring would look good on me.
translations.ねぇねぇ、▲主人公＊▲からもらったこの指輪、どっちにつけるのが良いと思う？: Hey, hey, which hand should I wear this ring I got from ▲Protagonist＊▲？
translations.そっか……やっぱり普通そうよね。じゃあそうするね: I see... that seems normal. I'll go with that.
translations.分かって言ってるでしょ▼なんか婚約指輪みたいだね。: You know what you're saying, right？▼ It looks like an engagement ring.
translations.ねぇねぇ、この前のデートでかぶってた帽子、似合ってたと思う？: Hey, hey, do you think I looked good in the hat I wore on our last date？
translations.わーい♪それじゃあデートの時は帽子をかぶるようにしよっかな。: Yay♪ Then I'll wear a hat on our dates.
translations.そっか……帽子はイマイチ、と。: I see... so hats aren't really it.
translations.また旅行にいけるなんて、◙わたしたち幸せ者ね。◙今度の旅行、ちょっと特別な物にな:
We can go on another trip,
we're so lucky. This next trip
seems a bit special.
translations.旅行何回目か覚えてる？◙また楽しい旅行できると◙いいな。:
Do you remember how
many trips we've
taken？ I hope we can
have fun again this
time.
translations.そうなの？◙じゃあ海外旅行も◙夢じゃないね。◙ふふ:
Really？ Then going
abroad isn't just
a dream. Hehe.
translations.じゃあ、おばあちゃんに◙なっても連れて行ってね。◙:
Then, even when I'm a
grandma, take me
along, okay？
translations.旅行の荷物はもうつめた？やっぱり慣れないよね。: Have you packed for the trip？ It still feels unfamiliar, huh？
translations.もしかして旅上手になってる◙のかな？◙お姉さんにも教えてほしいな。:
Maybe I'm becoming good at
traveling ？ I want to learn
from you too.
translations.新婚グッズ？◙何だろう新婚さんに必要そうな物って？◙指輪……とかかな。:
Newlywed goods？ I wonder what
newlyweds might need？ Rings...
maybe？
translations.楽しみだね、旅行。◙でも待ってる間の◙ワクワクも楽しいよね。:
I'm looking forward to
the trip. But the
excitement while
waiting is fun too.
translations.そうそう。◙これも旅行の醍醐味の◙ひとつだと思うの。:
That's right. I
think that's one of
the joys of
traveling.
translations.▲主人公＊▲は◙大人だな。◙でもね、楽しいときは◙誰でも子供の気持ちに◙なるんだ:
▲Protagonist＊▲ is so
mature. But you
know, when it's fun,
anyone can feel like
a kid.
translations.ねぇねぇ。◙箱根旅行で一番楽しみな◙ことって、なんなの？:
Hey, hey. What's the
thing you're most
looking forward to on
the Hakone trip？
translations.いいね。◙色々見てまわろね。◙そうだ、色々下調べも◙していかなくちゃ。:
Sounds good. Let's
explore various
places. Right, we
should do some
research too.
translations.思い出のアルバムが◙どんどん増えてくね。◙いっぱい思い出残そうね。:
Our memory album is
growing more and more.
Let's make lots of
memories.
translations.もう、◙そんなにはっきり言われる◙と恥ずかしいじゃない。◙でも、せっかくだから、:
Geez, when you say it so
clearly, it's
embarrassing. But since
we're at it, please take
care of me. A-na-ta.
translations.いよいよ明日だね。◙ちゃんと眠れるかな、◙ハネムーンとか意識◙しちゃったら緊張で:
It's finally
tomorrow. I wonder
if I can sleep well.
If I think about the
honeymoon, I might
get too nervous.
translations.もう、いじわる。◙意識してるわたしが◙おかしいみたいじゃない。◙▲主人公＊▲こそ:
Geez, that's mean. It
makes me seem weird for
being conscious of it.
You better not
oversleep,
▲Protagonist＊▲.
translations.そうだよね。緊張するよね。◙でも、ほら今回はごっこだし。◙いつかは本当にいける日:
That's right. It's
nerve-wracking. But, you
know, this time it's just
pretend. I hope the day we
can really go comes soon.
Good night.
translations.旅行終わっちゃったね。◙今日の旅行はすごく特別な◙思い出になったかな。◙たくさん:
The trip is over. I
wonder if today’s trip
became a really special
memory. Because I spent
so much time with
▲Protagonist＊▲.
translations.忘れられない思い出◙増えちゃった。◙▲主人公＊▲と一緒なら、◙本当に何処に行って:
Unforgettable memories
have increased. With
▲Protagonist＊▲, anywhere
is fun and a happy time.
translations.きっとこうやって、思い出を◙積み重ねていくことで◙お互いの距離がどんどん◙近づい:
I'm sure by stacking up
memories like this, our
distance will keep getting
closer. Let's make more
and more memories.
translations.今、一緒にいられないのが◙不思議なくらい、一緒に◙すごした夜がとても自然で◙かけ:
It's strange not being
together now. The night we
spent together felt so
natural and was an
irreplaceable time.
translations.本当のハネムーンはいつ◙行けるかな？◙それまでの間もたくさん◙かわいがってね。:
I wonder when we can
go on a real
honeymoon？ Until then,
please take care of me
a lot.
translations.旅行中、ずっと一緒にいた◙からかな。◙今ちょっとさびしい気分。◙早く一緒のおうち:
Maybe it's because we were
together the whole trip.
I'm feeling a bit lonely
now. I wish we could go
home together soon.
translations.毎日一緒にいられる生活って◙どんな感じなのかな？◙毎日が旅行のときみたい◙だった:
What would it be like to
live together every day？ I
wish every day felt like a
trip.
translations.旅行のときの写真見て◙たんだけど、見返すことが◙できる思い出もいいね。:
I was looking at the
photos from the trip.
It's nice to have
memories we can look
back on.
translations.あなたのカノジョがメールの到着をお知らせします: Your girlfriend is notifying you of a new email.
translations.あなたにメール、はいどうぞ。返信は１００通まで受け付けます: Here's your email. You can receive up to 100 replies.
translations.ピローン♪問題です、誰からのメールでしょう？: Ding! Here's a question, who is this email from？
translations.メールだよ、あなたの心に届くかな？: You've got mail. I wonder if it reaches your heart？
translations.お姉さんがメールを持ってきてあげたよ？: The sister brought you an email, you know？
translations.メール届いたよ。読めない字があったら読んであげましょうか？: You've got mail. If there are any unread characters, should I read them for you？
translations.ご機嫌いかが？なんて、かしこまってみました: How are you？ Just trying to be formal.
translations.メールしたくなっちゃった: I felt like sending you an email.
translations.今日もマナカが一緒だよ？なんて: Mana is with you again today, you know？
translations.また明日もがんばろ？: Let's do our best again tomorrow？
translations.あとでメールちょうだいね: Send me an email later, okay？
translations.今日は早めにお風呂入っちゃおっと: I'll take a bath early today.
translations.お休みだけど、早く起きるのもいいよね: It's a day off, but waking up early is nice too.
translations.[一人称]からのモーニングメールだよ: Here's a morning email from [first-person pronoun].
translations.今日の▲主人公＊▲の運勢はどうかな？わたしはいい感じなの: How's the fortune for today, ▲Protagonist＊▲？ I'm feeling good.
translations.遅刻しないように、時間にはゆとりをもってね: Make sure to have some time so you won't be late.
translations.眠いときは、少し体を動かすといいよ？: When you're sleepy, it's good to move around a bit, you know？
translations.なんだかポカポカしてて、また眠っちゃいそう: It feels so warm, I might fall asleep again.
translations.窓をあけたら、お花のいい香りがしてきたよ: When I opened the window, a nice flower scent came in.
translations.気持ちよく汗をかくには、水分補給をしっかりね: To sweat comfortably, make sure to hydrate well.
translations.昨日は寝苦しかったな、▲主人公＊▲は大丈夫だった？: It was hard to sleep last night. Were you okay, ▲主人公＊▲？
translations.眠りやすくなってきたから、うっかり眠りすぎちゃいそう: I've been sleeping better, so I might accidentally oversleep.
translations.もう寒くなってきたから、[病気]には気をつけてね: It's getting cold, so be careful of [illness].
translations.こんなにも寒いときは、…ううん、なんでもないっ！: When it's this cold, ... um, never mind!
translations.今日はちょっと眠たいな。昨日の夜▲主人公＊▲のこと考えてたから: I'm a bit sleepy today. I was thinking about ▲主人公＊▲ last night.
translations.わたしが今日起きて、一番最初に何したかわかる？このメール送ったんだよ: Do you know what I did first when I woke up today？ I sent this email.
translations.気持ちがいい朝だね、いいことがありそうだよ？: It's a nice morning, feels like something good will happen.
translations.朝ご飯食べてきた？お勉強がはかどるよ。集中、集中: Did you have breakfast？ It helps with studying. Focus, focus.
translations.体育って好き？わたしは部活以外で体を動かすのも楽しくて好きだな: Do you like PE？ I enjoy moving around outside of club activities.
translations.今日は体育の授業があるから、気合入れちゃおっと: I have PE class today, so I’ll get pumped up!
translations.ちゃんと朝ご飯食べないと、４時間目でお腹が鳴らないかドキドキしちゃうね: If I don't eat breakfast properly, I'll be nervous about my stomach growling in 4th period.
translations.[女子]に、ファッション雑誌見せてもらったの。やっぱりお勉強しなくちゃね？: I saw a fashion magazine from [girls]. I really need to study, right？
translations.[女子]にスキンケア教えてもらっちゃった。▲主人公＊▲も、教えてほしい？: I got skincare tips from [girls]. Do you want me to share, ▲主人公＊▲？
translations.今日はなんだか、お勉強がはかどるなぁ。昨日良く眠れたからかな？: Today, I feel like studying is going well. Maybe because I slept well last night？
translations.なんだかみんなソワソワしてる。[季節]だもんね。しかたないよね。: Everyone seems restless. It's [season], after all. Can't be helped.
translations.鼻がムズムズする。[病気]かな？それとも▲主人公＊▲が噂してるのかな？: My nose is itchy. Is it [illness]？ Or is ▲主人公＊▲ talking about me？
translations.教室で[男子]がシャツ脱いじゃった。恥ずかしいなぁ: A [boy] took off his shirt in class. How embarrassing!
translations.今日は家に帰ったらすぐシャワー浴びよ。▲主人公＊▲も汗かいたままにしちゃダメだよ: I’ll take a shower as soon as I get home today. Don't stay sweaty, ▲主人公＊▲!
translations.芸術の[季節]だし、美術の授業がんばっちゃお？: It's the [season] for arts, so let's do our best in art class!
translations.食欲の[季節]だし、家庭科の授業でお菓子作りたいな: It's the [season] for appetite, so I want to make sweets in home economics class.
translations.教室でもコート脱がない人が結構いるみたい。寒いもんね: It seems like quite a few people don't take off their coats in class. It's cold.
translations.今日の体育はマラソンだよ。怪我しないように、ちゃんと準備運動しないとね: Today's PE is a marathon. I need to warm up properly to avoid injury.
translations.ねぇ、好きだよ▼学校ではこんなこと、口に出して言えないもんね？: Hey, I like you. You can't say things like this at school, right？
translations.[女子]たちが、カレシの話題で盛り上がってるの。わたしも参加しちゃおうかな、なん: The [girls] are excitedly talking about their boyfriends. Should I join in？
translations.[男子]たちが、好きなアイドルの話してる。▲主人公＊▲もそういうの、好きなのかな: The [boys] are talking about their favorite idols. I wonder if ▲主人公＊▲ likes that too.
translations.[男子]たちが、理想のタイプの話で盛り上がってるみたい。▲主人公＊▲も、そういう: The [boys] seem to be discussing their ideal types. Are you interested in that too, ▲主人公＊▲？
translations.ねぇ、授業中にマンガ読んでる人がいる。[人,学校]に見つかっちゃわないかな: Hey, someone is reading manga during class. I hope [person, school] doesn't catch them.
translations.授業中にメールするのってドキドキしちゃう。ほんとはいけないよね: Texting during class is nerve-wracking. I know I shouldn't.
translations.午前中の授業って特に集中できるよね。でも▲主人公＊▲にメールしてたら説得力ないか: Morning classes are especially easy to focus on. But texting ▲主人公＊▲ might ruin that.
translations.新しいノートに書くのって気持ちいいよね: Writing in a new notebook feels nice.
translations.復習だけでもしておくの、おすすめだよ: I recommend at least reviewing the material.
translations.犯人はあなたです！なんて。急でビックリした？: You are the culprit! Surprised by that sudden reveal？
translations.お勉強がんばれば、その分放課後が楽しくなるよ。: If you study hard, your after-school time will be more enjoyable.
translations.今日はあったかくて気持ちいいね。学校抜け出して遊びに行きたいぐらい、なんて: It's warm and nice today. I feel like skipping school to go play.
translations.今、ぼーっとしちゃってた。いけないいけない、集中しなくちゃ、ね？: I was just zoning out. I need to focus, right？
translations.もう寝なきゃね。: I should go to bed now.
translations.ふふ、お布団ぽっかぽか。: Hehe, the futon is so warm.
translations.お腹出して寝ちゃダメだよ？: Don't sleep with your belly exposed, okay？
translations.まだ、セミの鳴き声がするけど……: I can still hear the cicadas, though...
translations.読書してたら、もうこんな時間になっちゃった。: I lost track of time while reading.
translations.鈴虫の鳴き声いい感じ……: The sound of the crickets is nice...
translations.お布団入ったら冷たい。けど……: The futon feels cold when I get in. But...
translations.ふふ、お布団あったかーい。: Hehe, the futon is so warm.
translations.授業中にしょうがないなぁ、もう[●]: I guess I can't help it during class, huh[●]？
translations.英単語を覚えないと。: I need to memorize English words.
translations.こんなときにメールする悪い子はおしおきだよ？: Bad kids who email at times like this get punished, you know？
translations.春の陽気に負けないでね。: Don't let the spring weather get to you.
translations.あついね？わたしはまだまだ大丈夫。: It's hot, right？ I'm still okay.
translations.夏の暑さに負けないでね。: Don't let the summer heat get to you.
translations.お芋のことなんて、考えてないよ？: I'm not thinking about sweet potatoes, okay？
translations.さむいね？指が冷えちゃってペンが握れないよぅ。: It's cold, right？ My fingers are freezing and I can't hold the pen.
translations.冬の寒さに負けちゃダメなんだから。: You can't let the winter cold get to you.
translations.授業に集中しなきゃなのに、▲主人公＊▲ったら[●]: I need to focus on class, but ▲the protagonist＊▲ is distracting me[●].
translations.▲主人公＊▲とメールしたいって思ってたマナカも悪い子かも？: Maybe wanting to email ▲the protagonist＊▲ is bad too？
translations.先生に見つからないようにね[●]: Make sure you don't get caught by the teacher[●].
translations.お風呂から上がったところ[●]: Just got out of the bath[●].
translations.この季節、練習の後はすごくお腹空いちゃう。今日も食べすぎちゃうかも♪: I'm really hungry after practice this season. I might eat too much today♪
translations.秋って、練習には一番いい季節かもしれないね: Autumn might be the best season for practice.
translations.ラケット握る手がかじかんじゃうね。はぁーはぁー: My hands are getting cold holding the racket. Hah-hah.
translations.練習で汗かいたらちゃんとタオルで拭かなきゃ、だよ？拭いてほしい？なんて: After practice, I have to wipe off the sweat with a towel, okay？ Want me to wipe it for you？
translations.練習のあとは、マッサージしてほしいな、なんて: After practice, I'd like a massage, you know？
translations.[女子,部活]のみんなから、▲主人公＊▲とのこと色々聞かれちゃった。みんなそうい: Everyone from the girls' club asked me about ▲主人公＊▲. They all love that kind of talk.
translations.今日の練習はキツくって、みんな大変そう: Today's practice was tough, everyone seems to be struggling.
translations.[女子,部活]のみんなが、自分たちのカレシの話してる。わたしが混ざるのは、ちょっ: The girls in the club are talking about their boyfriends. I feel a bit shy to join in.
translations.おはよう[●]ステキな朝ね。: Good morning[●], it's a lovely morning.
translations.[一人称]からのモーニングメールだよ♪: This is a morning email from [first person]♪
translations.[季節]って感じの朝だね♪: It's a morning that feels like [season]♪
translations.わたしはこれから朝のティータイムだよ♪: I'm having my morning tea time now♪
translations.▲主人公＊▲がメールくれたから、今日はいい日になりそう: Since ▲主人公＊▲ sent me an email, today seems like a good day.
translations.お休みだからって、お昼寝ばかりしてちゃダメだよ？: Just because it's a day off, you can't just take naps all day, okay？
translations.もう何するか決めた？: Have you decided what to do yet？
translations.今朝はトーストにしよっかな。: I think I'll have toast this morning.
translations.外で小鳥さんの歌声が聴こえるよ。: I can hear the little birds singing outside.
translations.この季節は目覚めがとっても気持ちいいの。: Waking up in this season feels really nice.
translations.暑くても▲主人公＊▲は元気だね♪: Even if it's hot, ▲主人公＊▲ is energetic♪
translations.シャワーあびてこよっと♪: I'm going to take a shower♪
translations.朝起きるのが少しつらくなってきたね。: It's getting a bit tough to wake up in the morning.
translations.起きてすぐ暖房つけちゃった。: I turned on the heater right after waking up.
translations.今日もがんばろ？: Let's do our best today, okay？
translations.今日も一日お疲れ様でした。: Thanks for today, you worked hard.
translations.今日は夢、見られるかな。: I wonder if I'll have a dream today.
translations.でももうダメ、眠さの限界……: But it's no good anymore, I'm at my limit of sleepiness...
translations.これだけ[気温]と、外で思いっきり汗かくのも気持ちいいかも？: With this [temperature], it might feel nice to sweat outside？
translations.みんな朝からグッタリしてる。[気温]もんね: Everyone looks exhausted this morning. It's the [temperature], right？
translations.もうお腹空いてきちゃった。でもこれ、食欲の[季節]のせいだからね？: I'm getting hungry. But it's just the [season] making me feel this way, okay？
translations.[季節]って、一番お勉強がはかどる季節だと思わない？: Don't you think [season] is the best time for studying？
translations.今日も[気温]ね、うう、お勉強に集中できるかな: It's [temperature] today, ugh, I wonder if I can concentrate on studying.
translations.[病気]が流行ってるね。▲主人公＊▲も[病気]には気を付けてね？: There's a [sickness] going around. ▲Protagonist＊▲, be careful of [sickness], okay？
translations.▲主人公＊▲が隣の席なら、教科書忘れましたって、さりげなく近寄れるのにな。なんて: If ▲Protagonist＊▲ were sitting next to me, I could casually get close and say I forgot my textbook.
translations.今ね、あてられた問題解いたら[人,学校]に褒められちゃった。▲主人公＊▲にも褒め: Just now, I solved a question and got praised by [person, school]. I want ▲Protagonist＊▲ to praise me too.
translations.こっちの教室、居眠りしてる人がたくさんいるの。そろそろ[人,学校]が起こす頃かな: In this classroom, a lot of people are dozing off. I wonder if [person, school] will wake them up soon.
translations.今はのんびり……。午後もこんな感じかな: Right now, it's so relaxed... I wonder if the afternoon will be like this too.
translations.次の授業はマラソン。教室からわたしのこと見えるかな？: The next class is a marathon. I wonder if you can see me from the classroom？
translations.ふぅ、ほんのちょっと息抜き。▲主人公＊▲は何してる？: Phew, just a little break. What is ▲Protagonist＊▲ doing？
translations.さっきの授業の公式、ちょっと難しかったな。帰ってから復習、復習: The formula from the last class was a bit difficult. I need to review it when I get home.
translations.教室でカレシと仲良さそうにしてる子がいる。うらやましくなんて、ないよ？: There's a girl in class looking cozy with her boyfriend. I'm not jealous or anything, okay？
translations.今日は家に帰ったらお菓子作ろうかな。お腹空いたからじゃ、ないよ？: I think I'll make some snacks when I get home today. It's not just because I'm hungry, okay？
translations.女の子同士で手紙のやり取りをしてるんだけど、▲主人公＊▲も欲しい？: Girls are exchanging letters, but do you want one too, ▲Protagonist＊▲？
translations.さっき廊下で▲主人公＊▲のこと、見てたんだけど、気づいた？: I was just watching ▲Protagonist＊▲ in the hallway. Did you notice？
translations.今日、通学のとき、道路にタンポポが咲いてたのを見かけたんだけど、応援したくなっち: Today, on my way to school, I saw dandelions blooming on the road, and I wanted to cheer them on.
translations.やっぱり教室にはクーラーが欲しいよね。[人,学校]にお願いしてみようかな: I really want an air conditioner in the classroom. Should I ask [person, school]？
translations.水道の水がお湯になってる。太陽ってすごいね: The tap water is warm. The sun is amazing.
translations.窓の外に枯葉が舞ってる、あの葉っぱでおイモ焼いたら美味しいかな？: There are dried leaves dancing outside the window. I wonder if they would taste good roasted？
translations.恋愛小説を買ってみました。本当は推理小説が良かったんだけど、こういうのもいいよね: I bought a romance novel. I actually wanted a mystery novel, but this is nice too.
translations.教室にストーブがあるのはいいけど、休み時間には換気もしないとね。そっちの教室は大: It's nice that there's a heater in the classroom, but we need to ventilate during breaks. Is your classroom okay？
translations.今日も寒そう。練習のとき大変かな: It looks cold today. I wonder if practice will be tough.
translations.今のうちに宿題終わらせれば、放課後は▲主人公＊▲と遊べる、かな: If I finish my homework now, maybe I can play with ▲Protagonist＊▲ after school.
translations.休み時間にメールばかりしてたら、ヘンかな。▲主人公＊▲に送ってるの、わかっちゃう: Is it weird if I keep texting during breaks？ I wonder if ▲Protagonist＊▲ can tell I'm texting them.
translations.休み時間になると、男の子って元気になるよね。▲主人公＊▲もかな？: Boys get energetic during breaks, don't they？ Does ▲Protagonist＊▲ too？
translations.授業のノート、取り逃しちゃった。今度見せてね？: I missed some notes in class. Can you show me next time？
translations.今やってるテレビにウサギさんが出てる。カワイイ▼: There's a bunny on the TV I'm watching now. So cute ▼.
translations.ずっとピアノ弾いてたらママに怒られちゃった。つい時間忘れちゃったの、ご近所迷惑だ: I got scolded by mom for playing the piano for too long. I lost track of time, it must have bothered the neighbors.
translations.今パパがいないから、ママと二人でご飯食べながらテレビ観ちゃった。お行儀悪いけど、: Since dad isn't home, I watched TV with mom while eating. It was bad manners, but it was exciting and fun♪.
translations.パパとママと３人でクイズ番組観てるんだけど、わたしが一番: I'm watching a quiz show with dad and mom, and I'm the best at it.
translations.[季節]のお料理って、なにが思い付く？季節のお料理、作ってみたいな: What dishes come to mind for [season]？ I want to try making seasonal dishes.
translations.今日テレビでやってたテニスの試合、観た？すごかったね、わたしも練習しなきゃ！: Did you watch the tennis match on TV today？ It was amazing, I need to practice too!
translations.お休みの日に家でお勉強するのって、おかしいのかな？: Is it strange to study at home on a day off？
translations.今日は患者さんのお孫さんが家に遊びに来たから、お医者さんごっこしたよ。▲主人公＊: Today, the grandchild of a patient came to play, so we played doctor. Do you want to try it too, ▲Protagonist＊▲？
translations.[季節]だからって、寝坊しちゃダメだよ？: Just because it's [season], you can't oversleep, okay？
translations.あったかくなったけど、窓開けて寝ちゃダメだよ？: It's gotten warmer, but you can't sleep with the window open, okay？
translations.今、お風呂上りで……その……: I'm just out of the bath... um...
translations.お風呂上り、だ・よ[●]: Just out of the bath, you know[●]
translations.髪乾かさなきゃ[●]: I need to dry my hair[●]
translations.▲主人公＊▲はもうお風呂入ったのかな？: I wonder if ▲主人公＊▲ has already taken a bath？
translations.▲主人公＊▲はお風呂これから？: Is ▲主人公＊▲ going to take a bath now？
translations.部活の疲れもシャワーでスッキリ♪: A shower really refreshes me after club activities♪
translations.やっぱり部活のあとはシャワーだね[●]: After club activities, a shower is a must[●]
translations.▲主人公＊▲もお風呂でサッパリとね？: ▲主人公＊▲, you feel refreshed after your bath too, right？
translations.▲主人公＊▲もお風呂でサッパリ出来た？: Did ▲主人公＊▲ feel refreshed after the bath？
translations.ラベンダーの入浴剤の香りで、癒されちゃった♪: The scent of lavender bath salts is so soothing♪
translations.次はどんな入浴剤にしよっか迷っちゃうなぁ。: I'm torn on what bath salts to use next.
translations.本日２度目の、お風呂ね[●]: This is my second bath today[●]
translations.暑いから、ちょっとからだを冷ましてます[●]: It's hot, so I'm cooling off a bit[●]
translations.入浴中に本を読むのって、おかしいかな？: Is it weird to read a book while in the bath？
translations.つい、本を最後まで読んじゃった。: I ended up reading the whole book.
translations.湯冷めしないようにね。ちょこっと足にお水かけるといいよ？: Make sure you don't get cold. It's good to splash a little water on your feet, okay？
translations.長湯しちゃった。今日は早めに寝よっと。: I stayed in too long. I should go to bed early tonight.
translations.とりあえず、パジャマ着てきます[●]またね[●]: For now, I'll put on my pajamas[●] See you later[●]
translations.よろしければ、お背中流しましょうか？なんて[●]: If you don't mind, shall I wash your back？ Just saying[●]
translations.パパに隠れてこっそりお返事メール。: I'm secretly replying to your email while hiding from Dad.
translations.パパにメールしていることバレませんように……: I hope Dad doesn't find out I'm emailing...
translations.▲主人公＊▲はもうご飯食べたのかな: I wonder if ▲主人公＊▲ has already eaten.
translations.お食事中なのにメールなんて、お行儀悪くて、ごめんね。: I'm sorry for emailing while I'm eating, it's rude.
translations.今日のご飯は、わたしの自信作です[●]: Today's meal is my pride and joy[●]
translations.▲主人公＊▲も一緒にご飯食べたい？: Does ▲主人公＊▲ want to eat together？
translations.春はお野菜が甘くておいしいよ♪: Spring vegetables are sweet and delicious♪
translations.夏は花火を見ながら、スイカを食べたいな。: In summer, I want to eat watermelon while watching fireworks.
translations.食後のアイス食べてるよ、ぱくり♪: I'm having ice cream for dessert, yum♪
translations.食べ過ぎないように気をつけなきゃ。: I have to be careful not to overeat.
translations.今日は暑いね、寝汗かいちゃうかな……: It's hot today, I might sweat in my sleep...
translations.この季節、虫の鳴き声を聞いてるとすぐ眠れちゃうの: In this season, listening to the insects makes me fall asleep quickly.
translations.秋の夜長っていうけど、わたしには満喫できないかも: They say autumn nights are long, but I might not enjoy them.
translations.寒いから、あまり夜更かしすると風邪ひいちゃうよ: It's cold, so if you stay up too late, you'll catch a cold.
translations.あったかくして、早めに寝てね？: Stay warm and go to bed early, okay？
translations.今夜は▲主人公＊▲の夢にお邪魔できないかな？なんて: I wonder if I can visit ▲Protagonist＊▲'s dream tonight？
translations.おやすみのキスしちゃう、ほんとは直接あげたいんだけどな。チュ▼: I'll give you a goodnight kiss, but I really want to give it in person. Mwah▼
translations.たくさん練習するとご飯も美味しいし、お風呂も気持ちいいし、ぐっすり眠れるよね: Practicing a lot makes meals taste good, baths feel nice, and helps you sleep well.
translations.今日もたくさんがんばった？そんなところも、大好きよ？明日は一緒にがんばりたいな？: Did you work hard today？ I love that about you？ I want to work hard together tomorrow？
translations.なんだか今日は寝付けないの、こんなことあまりないんだけど: I can't seem to fall asleep today, which is unusual.
translations.今日はね、まだ眠くないよ。まだしばらく起きてよっと、ふふ♪: I'm not sleepy yet. I'll stay up a little longer, heh♪
translations.まだ起きてる？特に用事はないんだけど、メールしたくなっちゃった: Are you still awake？ I don't have anything special to say, but I wanted to text you.
translations.今日は楽しい一日だった？明日からもがんばろうね: Did you have a fun day today？ Let's keep doing our best from tomorrow.
translations.珍しく遅くまで起きてたら、ママからもう寝なさいって言われちゃった。: I stayed up late for a change, and Mom told me to go to bed.
translations.[季節]だからって、寝坊しちゃダメだよ？▲主人公＊▲は、わたしを起こしてくれる王: Just because it's [season], you can't sleep in, okay？ ▲Protagonist＊▲ is my prince who wakes me up.
translations.▲主人公＊▲はまだ起きてるの？夢の中で待ってるね▼: Is ▲Protagonist＊▲ still awake？ I'll be waiting in your dreams▼
translations.毎日暑いけど、恋人なんだからぴったりくっついて寝たいな。なんて、ちょっと大胆？: It's hot every day, but since we're lovers, I want to sleep close together. Is that a bit bold？
translations.暑いからって、あまり薄着して寝ると風邪ひいちゃうからね？でも、風邪ひいちゃったら: Just because it's hot, don't sleep in too little clothing, okay？ But if you catch a cold, I can take care of you.
translations.恋愛小説を読んでたら遅くなっちゃった。続きは夢で▲主人公＊▲と……かな？: I lost track of time reading a romance novel. Maybe I'll continue it in a dream with ▲Protagonist＊▲...？
translations.たまにならお夜食もいいよね？本当は良くないんだけど……、ナイショね▼: Having a late-night snack once in a while is okay, right？ It's not really good for you, though... it's a secret▼
translations.毎日寒いよね。こんなときはカレシにあっためてもらいたいな。なんて: It's cold every day. I want to be warmed up by my boyfriend during times like this.
translations.▲主人公＊▲ー？マナカは寒くてふるえてますよー？ふふ♪: ▲Protagonist＊▲？ Manaka is shivering from the cold! Hehe♪
translations.早く夜でもお互い会えるようになればいいのにね、なんて: I wish we could meet each other at night soon.
translations.あのね、だいすき▼: You know, I really like you▼
translations.▲主人公＊▲は今何考えてるのかな……。正解したらご褒美くれる？なんて: I wonder what ▲Protagonist＊▲ is thinking right now... If I guess right, will I get a reward？
translations.毎日一生懸命だと疲れるけど……それも楽しいね。一番は、▲主人公＊▲がいてくれるお: It's tiring to work hard every day, but... it's also fun. The best part is having ▲Protagonist＊▲ with me.
translations.▲主人公＊▲とダブルスしたいな。わたしの方は、いつでも準備できてるからね: I want to play doubles with ▲Protagonist＊▲. I'm always ready on my side.
translations.▲主人公＊▲が練習のお相手してくれるの、うれしいの: I'm happy that ▲Protagonist＊▲ practices with me.
translations.今日の練習は大変だったから、ぐっすり眠れそうだよ: Today's practice was tough, so I think I'll sleep well.
translations.やっぱり男子の球を打ち返すのは難しい。わたし、もっとカウンターの練習した方がいい: Hitting the boys' balls back is difficult. Should I practice countering more？
translations.▲主人公＊▲は、どのくらいの強さでガット張ってる？わたしは硬いほうが好きかな: ▲Protagonist＊▲, how strong is your string tension？ I prefer it to be stiffer.
translations.練習の後のシャワーは気持ちいいから、自主練しちゃいました♪: The shower after practice feels great, so I did some extra practice♪
translations.パパとママに、新しいラケット買ってもらっちゃった♪お手伝いがんばろ？: Dad and Mom bought me a new racket♪ Let's work hard to help out, okay？
translations.練習中に居眠りしてた１年生がいたの。[季節]だからって、よく立ったまま寝られるよ: There was a first-year who fell asleep during practice. It's [season], so it's easy to doze off standing.
translations.サーブに失敗して、花壇にボール入れちゃった……お花、大丈夫だったかな: I messed up my serve and hit the ball into the flower bed... I hope the flowers are okay.
translations.今日練習中に倒れちゃった子、大丈夫かな？わたしたちも体調管理しっかりね？: I wonder if the kid who collapsed during practice is okay？ Let's make sure to take care of our health too.
translations.今日は暑かったけど、スポーツ飲料飲んで気持ちよく汗かいちゃった。▲主人公＊▲にも: It was hot today, but I enjoyed sweating while drinking sports drinks. Should I share some with ▲Protagonist＊▲？
translations.寒いときに食べるアイスも、オススメだよ♪: Ice cream is also recommended for cold days♪
translations.今日は[女子]に誘われて、学食にいるの。: I'm at the cafeteria today, invited by [a girl].
translations.ドキドキしたけど、購買部にチャレンジしてみたの。焼きそばのパンが買えたよ♪: I was nervous, but I tried the shop. I got a yakisoba bun♪
translations.▲主人公＊▲は何を食べてるのかな？: I wonder what ▲主人公＊▲ is eating？
translations.パンを焼いてみました。お紅茶と一緒にね[●]: I tried baking bread. With some black tea [●].
translations.パパに見つかると怒られちゃうから、またあとでね。: I have to go before Dad finds out. See you later.
translations.午後もがんばろ？: Let's do our best this afternoon, okay？
translations.とりあえず、ごちそうさましなきゃ。またね。: For now, I should say thank you. See you.
translations.明日の予習もいいけど、メールもね。: Reviewing for tomorrow is good, but so is emailing.
translations.▲主人公＊▲もお勉強中かな？: I wonder if ▲主人公＊▲ is studying too？
translations.今回は宿題多くて大変。: This time, there's a lot of homework.
translations.お料理も、お勉強でいいよね？: Cooking is good for studying too, right？
translations.▲主人公＊▲は何をお勉強してるのかな？: I wonder what ▲主人公＊▲ is studying？
translations.つい、眠くなっちゃうけど、そんなときこそ集中、集中♪: I tend to get sleepy, but that's when I need to focus, focus♪
translations.遊ぶのは宿題やってからだよ？: Playing comes after finishing homework, okay？
translations.わたし、次の問題が解けたらアイスを食べるんだ♪: If I solve the next problem, I'll eat ice cream♪
translations.暑さも忘れるくらい、集中出来ちゃった。: I was so focused I forgot about the heat.
translations.お夜食は、ほどほどに、だよ？: Late-night snacks should be moderate, okay？
translations.コタツでぽかぽかしてると、眠くなっちゃいそう。: Sitting in the kotatsu makes me feel sleepy.
translations.ちゃんちゃんこって古いかな？▲主人公＊▲には見せられないけど。結構好きなの。: Is a 'chan-chan-ko' old-fashioned？ I can't show it to ▲主人公＊▲, but I like it.
translations.わたしのことも解いてみる？なんて。: Want to try solving me？ Just saying.
translations.▲主人公＊▲と一緒にお勉強したいな[●]: I want to study with ▲主人公＊▲ [●].
translations.わからないところがあったら、何でも聞いてね。: If you have any questions, feel free to ask.
translations.あくびなんかしてないよ？: I'm not yawning or anything, okay？
translations.暑いからってあっさりしたものばかり食べてると、体によくないからね。気を付けて: Eating only light foods because it's hot isn't good for your body. Be careful.
translations.最近、[病気]の患者さんが増えてるから、▲主人公＊▲も気をつけてね: Recently, there have been more patients with [disease], so ▲protagonist＊▲ should be careful too.
translations.もう寒くなってきたから、風邪には気を付けてね: It's getting cold, so be careful not to catch a cold.
translations.食欲の秋だね、食べすぎないようにしなきゃ。でも、たまには、ね？: It's the season for appetite, so I have to be careful not to overeat. But sometimes, right？
translations.このところ、[病気]の患者さんが増えてきてるみたい。手洗いうがいは、しっかりね？: It seems like there are more patients with [disease] lately. Make sure to wash your hands and gargle, okay？
translations.[季節]は、街のイルミネーションがきれいだよー。わたしもいつか見に行きたいな: In [season], the city's illuminations are beautiful. I want to see them someday.
translations.ママったらね、よく▲主人公＊▲のこと聞いてくるの。恥ずかしくて、全部は話せないよ: Mom often asks about ▲protagonist＊▲. It's embarrassing, so I can't tell her everything.
translations.▲主人公＊▲に会いたいな。ねぇ、▲主人公＊▲はわたしに会いたくない？: I want to see ▲protagonist＊▲. Hey, don't you want to see me？
translations.あのね、昨日パパが書斎でお勉強してる隙にこっそりバラエティ番組観ちゃった♪: You know, yesterday while Dad was studying in his study, I secretly watched a variety show♪
translations.今日のお夕飯は、わたしが作るの。腕によりをかけてがんばっちゃう: I'll make dinner today. I'll do my best!
translations.おっ洗濯ー♪おっせんたくー♪なんて: Oh, laundry♪ Oh, laundry♪ What a thing.
translations.お菓子焼いたんだけど、作りすぎちゃった。▲主人公＊▲食べてくれる？なんて: I baked some sweets, but I made too much. Will you eat some, ▲protagonist＊▲？
translations.ママはなんでもできてすごいな、わたしも追いつかなくっちゃ: Mom can do anything, it's amazing. I have to catch up.
translations.ママと一緒に庭のお手入れ。毎日お水をあげてたお花につぼみが出来たの。嬉しいな: I'm taking care of the garden with Mom. The flowers I've been watering every day have buds now. I'm so happy.
translations.これから家のお掃除するの。▲主人公＊▲のお部屋はちゃんとキレイにしてる？: I'm going to clean the house now. Is ▲protagonist＊▲ keeping your room clean？
translations.良く晴れたときに、パーっとお洗濯物を干せると気持ちいいよね。雨の時は、お部屋がモ: It feels nice to hang out laundry on a sunny day. When it rains, the room gets stuffy.
translations.[季節]は、スミレのお花がきれいなの。お庭のスミレもそろそろ咲きだしてるよ: In [season], the violets are beautiful. The violets in the garden are starting to bloom soon.
translations.お菓子作り、失敗しちゃった。[季節]の陽気のせい？気をつけなくちゃ: I messed up making sweets. Is it because of the weather in [season]？ I have to be careful.
translations.お庭のお池にスイレンが咲いたよ。ぷっくりしていて可愛らしいの: The water lilies bloomed in the garden pond. They're plump and cute.
translations.お庭にヒマワリが咲きました。まーっすぐ何を見つめてるんだろう、ね？: Sunflowers bloomed in the garden. I wonder what they're staring at straight ahead？
translations.[季節]は、やっぱりコスモスがきれいだなぁ。お庭いっぱいに咲かせる計画中だよ: In [season], cosmos are beautiful. I'm planning to make them bloom all over the garden.
translations.食べ物がおいしい季節だね。今日は何を作ろうかな: It's a season when food is delicious. What should I make today？
translations.ケーキを作ってみたよ。雪をイメージしてマシュマロ乗せてみたけど、食べにくい…かも: I tried making a cake. I put marshmallows on it to resemble snow, but it might be hard to eat...
translations.何か創作レシピに挑戦したいな、良いアイデアがあったら教えてね、一緒につくろ？: I want to try a creative recipe. If you have good ideas, let me know, and let's make it together？
translations.今日もママのお手伝い。パパとママ、褒めてくれるかな？でも▲主人公＊▲に、いい子い: I'm helping Mom again today. I wonder if Dad and Mom will praise me？ But I'd be happier if ▲protagonist＊▲ praised me.
translations.今日のお夕飯、わたしが作ったんだけど、とっても美味しくできたの。▲主人公＊▲もカ: I made dinner today, and it turned out really delicious. ▲protagonist＊▲ would be happy if his girlfriend is good at cooking, right？
translations.今日のお夕飯、わたしが作ったんだけど……失敗しちゃった。パパとママは美味しいって: I made dinner today, but... I messed up. Dad and Mom said it was delicious, but they must have been lying...
translations.今日はわたしがお掃除当番。いつもがんばってるママを助けないとね: Today, I'm on cleaning duty. I have to help Mom who always works hard.
translations.マナカは今日も▲主人公＊▲のおかげで幸せでした。なんて♪: Thanks to ▲protagonist＊▲, Manaka was happy today too.
translations.夜も……▲主人公＊▲がそばにいてくれたらいいのにな: I wish ▲protagonist＊▲ could be by my side tonight.
translations.今日ね、星が良く見えるよ？それだけ、▲主人公＊▲に伝えたかったの: Today, the stars are really visible, you know？ That's all I wanted to tell you, ▲protagonist＊▲.
translations.マナカはもう寝ます: Manaka is going to sleep now.
translations.今日もわたしの一日は▲主人公＊▲とのメールで終わり: My day ends with an email from ▲protagonist＊▲.
translations.▲主人公＊▲もあんまり夜更かししないでね？: Don't stay up too late, okay ▲protagonist＊▲？
translations.宿題が難しくて、こんな時間になっちゃった。▲主人公＊▲は大丈夫だった？: Homework was difficult, and now it's this late. Were you okay, ▲protagonist＊▲？
translations.わたしもうね、半分眠っちゃってるみたい……: I feel like I'm already half asleep...
translations.[季節]のお布団って気持ちよくなっちゃうよね: The bedding in [season] feels so nice.
translations.寝苦しい季節だけど、体は冷やさないようにね？: It's a stuffy season, but be careful not to cool your body too much, okay？
translations.メールうれしいな[●]: I'm happy to get an email[●]
translations.メールうれしいよ[●]: I'm really happy to get an email[●]
translations.ようやく、今日の一日も終わりだね。: Finally, today is coming to an end.
translations.一日の終わりって、お休みの日だと、より寂しく感じるよね。: The end of the day feels lonelier on days off.
translations.あ……あのウサギさん、かわいいな。: Ah... that bunny is so cute.
translations.ふと気づくと、テニスで頭がいっぱいなときってない？: Don't you sometimes find your head full of tennis？
translations.あまり関係ないかもしれないけど、わたしの作った料理食べて？なんて。: It might not be related, but would you try my cooking？
translations.少し早く目がさめたから、今日は朝のお散歩。気持ちいいよ。: I woke up a bit early, so I'm going for a morning walk. It feels nice.
translations.あれ？今は部活中だよ[●]: Huh？ I'm in club activities right now[●]
translations.次は練習来てね？: Make sure to come to practice next time, okay？
translations.[男子,部活]は、今日お休みなの？: Is the boys' club taking a break today？
translations.今日の練習は、基礎練がメインみたい。: Today's practice seems to focus on basics.
translations.今日の練習、ちょっと物足りないかも。: Today's practice might be a bit lacking.
translations.▲主人公＊▲と、どこか行けばよかったかな、なんて[●]: I wonder if I should have gone somewhere with ▲主人公＊▲[●]
translations.もし、練習でおかしなところがあったら、教えてね。: If there's anything odd during practice, let me know.
translations.自主練しちゃおっかなって。: I might just practice on my own.
translations.素振りだって、積み重ねが大事だよね。: Even swinging the racket requires accumulation.
translations.女の子が、筋力トレーニングって幻滅しちゃう？: Do girls get disappointed with strength training？
translations.でも、その前にラケットのメンテナンスしよ。: But first, let's maintain the racket.
translations.春はみんな、のんびりだなぁ。: Everyone is so relaxed in spring.
translations.ちゃんとお水飲むんだよ？: Make sure to drink water, okay？
translations.いっぱい動くと、その分お腹が空いちゃうから、困っちゃう。: Moving a lot makes me hungrier, which is a problem.
translations.冬はいつもよりストレッチを長めにね。: In winter, stretch a bit longer than usual.
translations.みんな寒さで、あまりからだ動かない……かも？: Everyone might not move much due to the cold...
translations.練習中でも、メールのお返事は書いちゃうの[●]: Even during practice, I'll write replies to emails[●]
translations.そんなこと言われたら、ついつい▲主人公＊▲のこと考えちゃうよ。: If you say that, I can't help but think about ▲主人公＊▲.
translations.好きって言ったら何してくれる？なんて。: What will you do if I say I love you？
translations.嫌いなわけないじゃない。: There's no way I hate you.
translations.もう、恥ずかしいよ。でもすごく嬉しい。: I'm so embarrassed. But I'm really happy.
translations.何だか恥ずかしいね。でもおかしくないよね？: It's a bit embarrassing, isn't it？ But it's not weird, right？
translations.直接言ってもらえた方が…ううん、やっぱり恥ずかしい。: It would be better if you said it directly... no, it's still embarrassing.
translations.▲主人公＊▲と一緒で、とっても幸せだよ[●]: I'm so happy being with ▲主人公＊▲[●].
translations.わたしも……: I want to see you too...
translations.マナカも会いたい[●]: Manaka wants to see you too[●].
translations.今そんな気分じゃないの。: I'm not really in the mood right now.
translations.ごめんね。今、体調が良くないの。: I'm sorry. I'm not feeling well right now.
translations.それも悪くないかもね？: That might not be so bad, right？
translations.気晴らしになるかなぁ？: Will it be a good distraction？
translations.そうだね、時間が合えばいいけど。: Yeah, I hope the timing works out.
translations.会いたくない、なんて。ウソ。会いたい。: I don't want to see you, just kidding. I want to see you.
translations.会いたいって思ったときにすぐ会えるのが、恋人のいいところ、かな。: The good thing about being in a relationship is being able to see each other right when you want to.
translations.善は急げ？間に合わなくなってもしらないよ？なんて。: Good things come to those who wait？ I won't know if we run out of time, right？
translations.▲主人公＊▲のことばっかり、考えてた……: I've been thinking about ▲主人公＊▲ all this time...
translations.▲主人公＊▲もマナカのことで、頭いっぱいなんだね、おんなじだ[●]: ▲主人公＊▲ is also thinking about Manaka, just like me[●].
translations.すぐ会えるよね[●]: We can see each other soon, right？[●]
translations.ね、会いたいの[●]: Hey, I want to see you[●].
translations.練習中も、わたしをもっと見てね[●]: During practice, look at me more, okay？[●]
translations.んー……調子よくないかも……: Hmm... I might not be feeling great...
translations.良くも悪くもないかな？なんて。: Not good or bad, I guess？ Something like that.
translations.こんなときは、いつもと違うことして気分を変えよう、かな？: In times like this, should I do something different to change my mood？
translations.落ち込んでばかりじゃ、ダメよね。: I can't just stay down, right？
translations.ごめんね。こんなお返事で。: Sorry for this kind of reply.
translations.気分転換にメール、かな？: Maybe I should send an email to change my mood？
translations.楽しいことをしなくちゃ、ね？: I need to do something fun, right？
translations.▲主人公＊▲と会えたら、元気になれそう？: If I could meet ▲主人公＊▲, I might feel better？
translations.たまには、息抜きしないとね。: Sometimes, I need to take a break.
translations.息抜きしたいなー、なんて。: I want to take a break, you know？
translations.▲主人公＊▲は元気かな？: I wonder how ▲主人公＊▲ is doing？
translations.▲主人公＊▲とメールしてたら、もっと元気になれそう？なんて。: If I email ▲主人公＊▲, I might feel even better？ Something like that.
translations.元気なのは、▲主人公＊▲のおかげ、かな？: Feeling good is thanks to ▲主人公＊▲, right？
translations.元気の源は▲主人公＊▲……だよ。: The source of my energy is ▲主人公＊▲... you know.
translations.メールありがとう。更に元気になっちゃった。: Thanks for the email. I feel even better now.
translations.もっと元気にしてほしいな、なんて。: I want you to make me feel even better, you know？
translations.▲主人公＊▲からメールも貰えたし…[●]: I got an email from ▲主人公＊▲ too...[●]
translations.マナカの元気、わけてほしい？なんて[●]: Do you want some of Manaka's energy？ Something like that[●]
translations.今なら、何でも出来ちゃうかも[●]: Right now, I might be able to do anything[●]
translations.今日もマナカは、▲主人公＊▲のおかげで元気いっぱい、なのでした[●]テヘ♪: Today, thanks to ▲主人公＊▲, Manaka is full of energy[●] Tehe♪
translations.やっぱり、好きって言われると安心するね。: After all, it feels reassuring to be told you’re loved.
translations.急にどうしたの？でも嬉しいよ。: What’s with the sudden change？ But I'm happy.
translations.でも、まだ足りないよ。もっと、もっと言って。: But it's still not enough. Say it more, more.
translations.わたしもっと幸せになりたいな。: I want to be even happier.
translations.マッサージしてあげよっか？なんて[●]: Want me to give you a massage？ Just kidding[●]
translations.おはよ▼あ～、ハートとかつけちゃったよ: Good morning▼Ah, I added a heart and stuff
translations.▲凛▲からのおはようだよ？: It's a good morning from ▲Rin▲, you know？
translations.▲主人公＊▲！だ～いすき▼なんてメール送る女って、どうかと思うよね: ▲Protagonist＊▲! Sending a message saying I love you▼ is kind of weird, right？
translations.今日もてきとーにがんばる: I'll do my best casually today too
translations.▲凛▲、今日もがんばる: ▲Rin▲, I'll do my best today too
translations.今日もてきとーにがんばってこ: Let's do our best casually today too
translations.体調管理、しっかりね？: Take care of your health, okay？
translations.わたしも何かしよっかな。: Maybe I should do something too.
translations.急がないでゆっくり行動、しよ？: Don't rush, take your time, okay？
translations.周りをよく見て行動、だからね？: Be aware of your surroundings, okay？
translations.▲主人公＊▲のがんばる姿、見たいな？: I want to see ▲protagonist＊▲ doing their best, okay？
translations.からだはこわさないようにね、応援してるから。: Don't hurt yourself, I'm cheering for you.
translations.でも、そんなときでもメールくれるなんて、うれしいな。: But I'm happy you still message me even then.
translations.忙しいってことは、マナカと会える時間が少なくなっちゃう。: Being busy means less time to meet Manaka.
translations.でも、またすぐ会えるって、マナカ待ってるね[●]: But we'll meet again soon, I'm waiting for you, Manaka[●]
translations.でも、マナカにメールしてくれて、ありがとう[●]: But thank you for messaging me, Manaka[●]
translations.そのぶん、マナカはヒマですよー。なんて[●]: That means I'm free, you know？ Just saying[●]
translations.そんなときはね、うーん。思いつかない。: In times like this, um... I can't think of anything.
translations.からだを動かすといいよ？: It's good to move your body, okay？
translations.わたしは今ね、本を読んでるの。▲主人公＊▲も読みたい？: I'm reading a book right now. Do you want to read too, ▲protagonist＊▲？
translations.お散歩するとか？: How about going for a walk？
translations.素振りをすると、気がまぎれるかも？: Practicing might help you feel better？
translations.オススメの本があるけど、一緒に読もっか？なんて。: I have a recommended book, want to read it together？ Just saying.
translations.教科はちがうかもしれないけど、これから一緒に宿題する？: The subjects might be different, but want to do homework together？
translations.もっとわたしにメールしても、いいよ？: You can email me more, okay？
translations.▲主人公＊▲に会えないからかも？: Maybe it's because I can't see ▲protagonist＊▲？
translations.メールありがとう。わたしがお相手してあげるね。: Thanks for the email. I'll be your partner.
translations.▲主人公＊▲からメールもらったから、少し退屈じゃなくなりそうかな？: I got an email from ▲主人公＊▲, so maybe it won't be so boring？
translations.▲主人公＊▲からのメール待ってたの[●]: I've been waiting for an email from ▲主人公＊▲[●]
translations.ふふ、こういうの、少し恥ずかしいね[●]: Hehe, this is a bit embarrassing[●]
translations.マナカの隣は空いてますよー、なんて[●]: The seat next to Manaka is open, you know[●]
translations.ちょっと失敗続きで、やになっちゃう。: I've been having a few failures, it's frustrating.
translations.元気ちょうだい？: Can you give me some energy？
translations.わたしにもわけて？: Can you share some with me？
translations.どうすれば気分よくなるかな？: What can I do to feel better？
translations.ちょっとスランプなの。: I'm in a bit of a slump.
translations.この前ね、部長に負けちゃった。: The other day, I lost to the club president.
translations.今日はちょっと眠いの。シャキっとしないとね。: I'm a bit sleepy today. I need to perk up.
translations.さては、かわいいウサギさんでも見つけたのかな？: Did you find a cute bunny or something？
translations.練習試合に勝ったの？: Did you win a practice match？
translations.わたしもこの前ね、男子部の部長に勝てたの！: I also won against the boys' club president the other day!
translations.わたしもうれしくなってきちゃった。: I'm starting to feel happy too.
translations.最近、サービスエースいっぱい決めちゃった、わたしも調子いいみたい。: Recently, I've been scoring a lot of service aces, I seem to be in good form.
translations.わたしも最近、気分がいいかも♪: I've been feeling good lately too♪
translations.マナカも▲主人公＊▲と出会えてから、ずっとかもしれない[●]: Since meeting ▲主人公＊▲, Manaka might have been like this all along[●]
translations.そんなことでメールするなんて、もう[●]: To email about something like that, come on[●]
translations.落ち込むこともあるけど……: There are times when I feel down, but...
translations.平気？わたしに出来ることある？: Are you okay？ Is there anything I can do？
translations.このままじゃいけないよね。: I can't just leave it like this.
translations.▲主人公＊▲がそばに居てくれたら、安心なんだけどな。: If only ▲主人公＊▲ were here, I'd feel safe.
translations.落ち込まないように、気分変えよう？: Let's change our mood so we don't feel down？
translations.後ろ向きにばかり考えちゃ、ダメよ？: It's not good to only think negatively, okay？
translations.一緒にがんばろ？: Let's do our best together, okay？
translations.わたしは、力になれるかな？: I wonder if I can be of help？
translations.やっぱり、元気が一番だよね。: After all, being cheerful is the best.
translations.楽しいことを、考えよう？: Let's think of fun things, okay？
translations.わたしは、▲主人公＊▲のいいところ、いっぱい知ってるよ？: I know a lot of good things about ▲主人公＊▲, you know？
translations.何かあったらわたしに言ってね。: If anything happens, just tell me.
translations.もっとそばに居れたらいいのにな。: I wish I could be closer.
translations.▲主人公＊▲が幸せでいられますように……: I hope ▲主人公＊▲ can be happy...
translations.ポジティブに、だよ？ネガティブなままじゃ前に進めないから、ね[●]: Be positive, okay？ You can't move forward if you're negative, you know[●]
translations.マナカが、いい子いい子って、なぐさめてあげる[●]: Manaka will comfort you, saying you're a good kid[●]
translations.目に見えるものが全てじゃないよ？マナカがそばにいるよ[●]: Not everything visible is all there is, you know？ Manaka is here with you[●]
translations.前を見て、ほら、マナカが見える？なんて[●]: Look ahead, see？ You can see Manaka, right？[●]
translations.お・つ・か・れ・さ・ま[●]: Thank you for your hard work[●]
translations.いつも以上に、はりきっちゃった？: Did you get a bit too excited today？
translations.元気だして、いこ？: Let's cheer up and go, okay？
translations.無理してない？: Are you not pushing yourself too hard？
translations.はやめに休んで、疲れをとろう？: Rest early and recover your energy, okay？
translations.栄養のあるもの食べてね。: Make sure to eat nutritious food.
translations.疲れたら、休んでもいいんだよ？: If you're tired, it's okay to take a break, you know？
translations.無理は、からだに良くないから、ね？: Overdoing it isn't good for your body, okay？
translations.今日もおつかれさま。: Thanks for your hard work today.
translations.今日もいっぱい、がんばった？: Did you work hard today too？
translations.きっと精一杯がんばったんだよね。: You must have done your best for sure.
translations.わたし、応援してるからね。: I'm cheering for you, you know.
translations.わたしが力になれることがあったら、言ってね。: If there's anything I can help with, just let me know.
translations.疲れてるのにメールありがとう。そういうマメなところ、マナカは好きだよ[●]: Thanks for the email even though you're tired. I like that diligent side of you, Manaka[●]
translations.そんなときでも▲主人公＊▲はやさしいね。ゆっくり休んでね[●]: Even at times like this, ▲主人公＊▲ is so kind. Please take a good rest[●]
translations.お風呂いってくる: I'm going to take a bath.
translations.▲凛▲は、これからお風呂。想像しないこと: ▲Rinko▲ is going to take a bath now. Don't imagine it.
translations.休みなのに早く目がさめた。損した: I woke up early even though it's a day off. What a waste.
translations.今日学校休みになんないかな。: I wish school would be canceled today.
translations.▲凛▲低血圧だから、朝辛い……: ▲Rinko▲ has low blood pressure, so mornings are tough...
translations.あ～学校行きたくない！: Ugh, I don't want to go to school!
translations.まだしばらく寝てたい……。: I want to sleep a little longer...
translations.また寝るね。ポカポカしてるし。ダメ？: I'm going to sleep again. It's so cozy. Is that bad？
translations.眠いのに、暑くて寝てらんないよ: I'm sleepy, but it's too hot to sleep.
translations.お腹痛い。昨日アイス２本食べたからかな: My stomach hurts. Maybe because I ate two ice creams yesterday.
translations.芸術の秋の目覚めはパンクに限るね: Autumn's awakening of art is all about punk.
translations.だんだん布団から出るのが辛くなってくるね: It's getting harder to get out of bed.
translations.寒くて布団から出らんないよ～: It's cold, I can't get out of bed~.
translations.カノジョのメールで起きられるなんてさ、いい身分だよね、▲主人公＊▲も: Being woken up by my girlfriend's email is a nice privilege for ▲Protagonist＊▲ too.
translations.今日はいいことあるかな。▲主人公＊▲もさ、善処してよ: I wonder if something good will happen today. Do your best too, ▲Protagonist＊▲.
translations.今日は外で鳴いてたネコの声で目がさめた。最高の目覚ましだね: I woke up to the sound of a cat meowing outside today. Best alarm ever.
translations.今日の▲凛▲はなんかすごいことできそうな気がする。気だけかもしれないけど: I feel like ▲Rinko▲ can do something amazing today. Maybe it's just a feeling.
translations.朝から頭はたらかないっつーの。: My brain isn't working this morning.
translations.朝から体育とか、ほんとカンベンしてほしい: Having gym class in the morning is really asking for too much.
translations.全校朝礼ってさ、ビデオ放送でよくない？: Isn't it better to have the morning assembly broadcasted on video？
translations.思いっきりあくびすると、ちょっと眠気さめない？: If you yawn really big, doesn't it wake you up a bit？
translations.調子どう？こっちはボチボチ。: How's it going？ I'm doing okay.
translations.今から、▲凛▲は羊を数えてみようと思う: From now on, ▲Rinko▲ is going to try counting sheep.
translations.[季節]ってさ、なんでこんな眠いの: Why is it so sleepy in [season]？
translations.[季節]はのどかだね。これで授業さえなければ: [Season] is peaceful. If only there were no classes.
translations.もうだめ。この暑さの中、学校来るだけで１日の体力使いきったし: I can't take it anymore. Just coming to school in this heat drained all my energy.
translations.▲凛▲が偉くなったらさ、まず最初に全学校の全教室にクーラーを入れる法律を作るね: When ▲Rinko▲ becomes important, I'll make a law to install air conditioning in every classroom in every school.
translations.食欲の[季節]とか陳腐なこと言いたくないけど、お腹空いた。図書室にポテチ常備した: I don't want to say something cliché like 'appetite of [season]', but I'm hungry. Would I get in trouble for keeping chips in the library？
translations.芸術の[季節]だからね、▲凛▲のロック魂に火がついてるよ: It's the [season] of art, so ▲Rinko▲'s rock spirit is ignited.
translations.学校来るときに枯れ葉で肌切っちゃった、最悪: I cut my skin on dry leaves coming to school, worst.
translations.今日の体育、球技って……。やだ、スキーがいい！: Today's gym class is ball games... No way, I want skiing!
translations.あのさ、宿題とかやった？こっちのことは聞かないでほしいんだけど: So, did you do your homework？ I don't want to hear about your stuff.
translations.年頃の娘としてはさ、もっと家事の手伝いとかすべき？する気ないけど: As a girl of my age, should I help out more with chores？ Not that I want to.
translations.▲主人公＊▲のおかげでさ、これでも▲凛▲は毎日幸せだよ。ありがと: Thanks to ▲主人公＊▲, ▲凛▲ is happy every day. Thank you.
translations.布団の中から▲主人公＊▲に送信: Sending from under the futon to ▲主人公＊▲.
translations.今日も▲凛▲の一日は▲主人公＊▲とのメールで終わり！: Today, ▲凛▲'s day ends with an email to ▲主人公＊▲!
translations.▲主人公＊▲もあんまり夜更かししないでよ: ▲主人公＊▲, don't stay up too late.
translations.きっと明日は早起きするから。たぶん: I'm sure I'll wake up early tomorrow. Probably.
translations.まだ眠くないんだけど、そろそろ寝ないと明日辛いよね。: I'm not sleepy yet, but I should sleep soon or tomorrow will be tough.
translations.これだけ布団が気持ちいと、寝坊しない自信はないかも: With this comfy futon, I might not be able to avoid oversleeping.
translations.至福の時間の始まりだよ: It's the beginning of blissful time.
translations.今日は弟が一緒に寝ようってさ。嬉しいんだけど、今の季節は暑いのがね……: Today, my little brother wants to sleep with me. I'm happy, but it's hot this season...
translations.でもこれだけ暑いと、すぐには寝られないかも: But with it being this hot, I might not be able to sleep right away.
translations.虫がうーるーさーいーーーーー: The bugs are so noisyーーーーー.
translations.まだあんま眠くないけど、寒いからもう寝る: I'm not that sleepy yet, but it's cold, so I'm going to sleep.
translations.いまから▲凛▲は冬眠に入りまーす: From now on, ▲凛▲ is going into hibernation.
translations.▲主人公＊▲が風邪ひいて▲凛▲にうつされたらたまんないからさ、ちゃんとあったかく: I don't want to catch a cold from ▲主人公＊▲, so make sure to sleep warm.
translations.隣に▲主人公＊▲が居てくれたらなー、なんてね: I wish ▲主人公＊▲ was here next to me.
translations.おやすみのチュッ▼とかさ、ほんとにやってる人いんのかな: I wonder if anyone really does goodnight kisses▼.
translations.▲凛▲さ、夢覚えてることってあんまりないんだよね。▲主人公＊▲が出てても忘れてる: ▲凛▲ doesn't remember dreams much. Even if ▲主人公＊▲ is in them, I might forget. Too bad.
translations.▲凛▲は今日もがんばった。ほんとがんばった。だから寝る: ▲凛▲ did her best today. Really did. So I'm going to sleep.
translations.なんかそんな気分だから言っとくけど。▲凛▲、▲主人公＊▲のこと好きだよ。: Just saying this because I feel like it. ▲凛▲ likes ▲主人公＊▲.
translations.▲凛▲なかなか寝付けないよ、▲主人公＊▲: ▲凛▲ can't fall asleep easily, ▲主人公＊▲.
translations.お父さん寝ちゃった。我が家の夜は▲凛▲のものだね。: Dad fell asleep. The night at home belongs to ▲凛▲.
translations.弟の部屋まで寝顔見に行っちゃった。天使みたいにカワイイよ: I went to see my little brother's sleeping face. He's cute like an angel.
translations.アイタイ。ん……やっぱいいや: I want to see you. Hmm... never mind.
translations.まだ起きてる？特に用事はないんだけど、メールに付き合ってよ: Are you still awake？ I don't have anything special, but chat with me.
translations.今日の休みはどうだった？充実してた？: How was your day off？ Was it fulfilling？
translations.今日中に読みたい本があったんだけど、ちょっと厳しそう。明日に持ち越すか: I wanted to read a book today, but it seems tough. Maybe I'll carry it over to tomorrow.
translations.▲凛▲寝坊したら、▲主人公＊▲起こしにきていいよ: If ▲凛▲ oversleeps, feel free to wake me up, ▲主人公＊▲.
translations.深夜ラジオさ、たまにレアな曲が流れるから面白いよね。聞きながら眠っちゃったりもす: Late-night radio is interesting because they sometimes play rare songs. I sometimes fall asleep while listening.
translations.▲主人公＊▲もさ、こんなに暑いけど、▲凛▲とくっついて寝たい？そんなまさかね: Even though it's this hot, do you want to cuddle and sleep with ▲凛▲？ No way, right？
translations.コンビニ行きたいんだけど、さすがにこの時間じゃ怒られるか。子供は損だね、ほんと: I want to go to the convenience store, but I might get in trouble at this hour. Kids really lose out.
translations.やっぱり夜食はポテチに限るね。うずしお味ならモアベター: Late-night snacks are definitely chips. If they're spiral flavor, even better.
translations.別にお願いじゃないんだけどさ、寒いときは、あっためてほしいんだよ: It's not really a request, but when it's cold, I want you to warm me up.
translations.さむいー。▲主人公＊▲なんとかして: It's coldー. ▲主人公＊▲, do something.
translations.▲主人公＊▲も一人で部屋にいるときってさ、やっぱ▲凛▲のこと考えたりする？: When you're alone in your room, do you think about ▲凛▲？
translations.▲主人公＊▲の夢に出てあげよっか？: Should I appear in your dreams？
translations.……やっぱりもう1回寝ようかな……。: ...I think I'll sleep one more time...
translations.もう寝る？: Are you going to sleep now？
translations.▲凛▲もそろそろ寝ようかな。: ▲Rinko▲ is thinking about sleeping soon too.
translations.ちょうど1冊読み終わったところだったしね。: I just finished reading a book.
translations.ちょうど▲主人公＊▲にメール書きかけてたとこだった。: I was just about to write an email to ▲Protagonist＊▲.
translations.今日に点数を付けるとしたら何点くらい？: If I were to rate today, what score would I give？
translations.次の休みは一緒にあそぼ。: Let's hang out on the next day off.
translations.今朝はたっぷり寝たから朝まで起きてても……でも眠いわ。: I slept a lot this morning, so I could stay up until morning... but I'm sleepy.
translations.今日は快と遊んで、なんか疲れた。: I played with Kai today and I'm kind of tired.
translations.布団てさ、見るだけで眠くなるよね。: Just looking at the futon makes me sleepy.
translations.夜になると結構涼しくて助かる。: It's quite cool at night, which is nice.
translations.夏は夜が短いから、そろそろ寝ようかな。: Nights are short in summer, so I think I'll sleep soon.
translations.急に寒くなる夜もあるからさ、お腹出して寝ないように。: Some nights get suddenly cold, so don't sleep with your belly exposed.
translations.秋は眠いよねえ、年中眠いけどさ。: Autumn makes me sleepy, but I'm sleepy all year round.
translations.ちょっとウトウトしてた。さぶっ？: I was dozing off a bit. Cold？
translations.ああ～布団の暖かさがたまんない。: Ah~ the warmth of the futon is irresistible.
translations.今夜は▲主人公＊▲の夢、見れるかな？: I wonder if I can dream of ▲Protagonist＊▲ tonight？
translations.授業中のメールはほどほどに。: Emails during class should be moderate.
translations.ちょっと居眠りしてたかも。: I might have dozed off a bit.
translations.そっち、今なんの授業？: What class are you in now？
translations.あーはやく学校終わって遊びに行きたいよ。: Ah, I want school to end quickly so I can go play.
translations.今？▲主人公＊▲にメール書いてる。: Now？ I'm writing an email to ▲Protagonist＊▲.
translations.授業中。こういうのって社会に出て役立つのかねぇ？: In class. I wonder if this kind of thing is useful in society？
translations.▲主人公＊▲のいない教室って退屈。: A classroom without the protagonist is boring.
translations.やっぱ▲凛▲のメールってさ、そっけないのかな。でも、どう書けばいいかわかんないし: I guess Rinko's emails are kind of curt. But I don't know how to write back.
translations.▲凛▲のメールってさ、やっぱそっけないのかな。でも妙にハシャいだ文章書くのも無理: Rinko's emails are definitely curt. But I can't write something overly cheerful, so this will have to do.
translations.教室でヒットチャートの話するのは別にいいんだけどさ。ロック聴く人間が一人もいない: Talking about hit charts in class is fine, but how is it that no one listens to rock？
translations.午前中の授業ってさ、集中できないんだよね。頭が完全に起きてなくてさ: Morning classes are hard to focus in. My brain isn't fully awake.
translations.最悪、今日の先生機嫌悪い。居眠りしたら怒られるかな: The worst, the teacher is in a bad mood today. I wonder if I'll get in trouble for dozing off.
translations.連続であてられた、しかも数学と化学。わかるわけないっつーの: I got called on back-to-back, and it was math and chemistry. There's no way I could know that.
translations.一日は長いね、どうしよ。: A day feels long, what should I do？
translations.午後の授業ってさ、集中できないんだよね。昼食べたら眠くなるじゃん: Afternoon classes are hard to focus in too. I get sleepy after lunch.
translations.なんとなく消化不良の日ってあるよね: There are days when you just feel a bit off.
translations.寝過ぎるとさ、頭痛くなるよね。だから、てきとーに寝ることにしたよ: If I sleep too much, I get a headache. So I decided to sleep just enough.
translations.春だねぇ。周りも結構寝てるし、そこに▲凛▲が一人加わったところで問題ないじゃんね: It's spring. Everyone around is sleeping, and adding Rinko to the mix isn't a problem. So, good night.
translations.春はさ、授業サボって屋上で寝るのが一番気持ちいいんだよね: Spring is the best time to skip class and nap on the rooftop.
translations.これからプール、それだけ: Heading to the pool, that's all.
translations.あつい！あつい！あつい！男は服の上から水を掛けてる……▲凛▲もやりたい！: It's hot! Hot! Hot! Guys are splashing water over their clothes... Rinko wants to do it too!
translations.外に枯葉が舞ってる。ジャジィだね: Leaves are swirling outside. It's jazzy.
translations.芸術の秋だから美術の補習だってさ、冗談じゃないっつーの。至高の芸術は音楽でしょ？: It's autumn for art, so there's art remedial class. No way! The highest form of art is music, right？
translations.▲凛▲は暑いの苦手だけど、だからって寒いのが平気ってわけでもないし。もう外に出た: Rinko doesn't like the heat, but that doesn't mean she's okay with the cold. I don't want to go outside anymore...
translations.寒いから、ぜんっぜん集中出来ない。もともと集中してたかは、あやしいけどさ: It's cold, so I can't concentrate at all. Whether I was concentrating before is questionable.
translations.授業中だけどメールしてみる。▲凛▲からのメールうれしい？: I'm in class, but I'll try texting. Are you happy to get an email from Rinko？
translations.▲主人公＊▲が同学年だったら、宿題見せてもらえるのに。あ、ノート渡せばやってくれ: If the protagonist was in my grade, I could ask to see their homework. Oh, if I give them my notes, will they do it？
translations.教科書がネコの写真集になればいいのににゃ: I wish the textbook was a cat photo book.
translations.やば、授業寝てた……。: Oh no, I was sleeping in class...
translations.休み時間になるとハシャぎ出すのってなんなの？: Why do people get so excited when break time comes？
translations.たまに眺めるんだよね、ネコの写真集。でも生のネコ見たいな: Sometimes I look at cat photo books. But I want to see real cats.
translations.今、何が見えてる？とかさ、別に意味はないんだけど。: What do you see right now？ Not that it really means anything.
translations.今日の帰りはどこ寄ろうかな: Where should I stop by on the way home？
translations.クラスの女子はカレシと好きな男の話ばっか。: The girls in class only talk about their boyfriends and crushes.
translations.さっき廊下で▲主人公＊▲のこと、見かけたよ。何してたの？: I just saw the protagonist in the hallway. What were they doing？
translations.暑くもなく寒くもなく、一番いい季節だね。だからって勉強する気はおきないけど: It's neither hot nor cold, the best season. But that doesn't make me want to study.
translations.春って過ごしやすいのはいいんだけど、いまいちロックじゃないよね。のどかでさ: Spring is nice and easy to spend time in, but it's not really rock, you know？ It's so peaceful.
translations.どうしよ、暑くてやる気でない。もともと勉強する気はなかったけど: What should I do？ It's too hot to feel motivated. I wasn't planning to study anyway.
translations.帰り道の暑さを想像すると……はぁ: Thinking about the heat on the way home... sigh.
translations.秋は物悲しい季節、なんて陳腐な表現だよね: Autumn is a melancholic season, what a cliché expression.
translations.読書の秋とかいうけど、冬の方が部屋にこもって本読むイメージじゃんね。なんとなく: They say it's the season for reading, but winter feels more like the time to stay in and read books.
translations.暖房ついた教室で寝るなっていう方が無理じゃん？: Isn't it unreasonable to say not to sleep in a classroom with the heater on？
translations.わざわざ休み時間を割いてメールくれる優しいカノジョでよかったね。: You're lucky to have a sweet girlfriend who takes the time to email you during break.
translations.あのさ、教室でイチャつく人間ってどう思う？別に▲凛▲はそんなことしたくないんだけ: What do you think about people being lovey-dovey in class？ Rinko doesn't want to do that. After all, she's not even in class.
translations.冷蔵庫に高いアイスが1個だけある。今から奪い合いだ。: There's only one expensive ice cream in the fridge. It's a battle for it now.
translations.今日の料理は▲凛▲も手伝った。チョットだけどね。: Today's dish was helped by ▲Rinko▲. Just a little though.
translations.メールしてたらお父さんに怒られたよ。: I got scolded by Dad while I was texting.
translations.▲主人公＊▲も一緒に食べたい？: Do you want to eat with ▲Protagonist＊▲ too？
translations.ところでアスパラって好き？: By the way, do you like asparagus？
translations.暑いとあんまり食欲わかないなあ。: I don't feel very hungry when it's hot.
translations.秋といえば[食べ物]だね。: When you think of autumn, it's [food].
translations.冬といえば、[食べ物]。: When you think of winter, it's [food].
translations.今日は寄せ鍋だった。▲主人公＊▲は何鍋が好き？: Today was hot pot. What kind of pot does ▲Protagonist＊▲ like？
translations.めずらしく学食でカレー食べてる。: I'm unusually eating curry at the cafeteria.
translations.今日のお昼は購買部で買ったメロンパンと牛乳。: Today's lunch is melon bread and milk bought from the store.
translations.今日は手抜きでカップめん。: Today I'm taking it easy with cup noodles.
translations.おなか一杯になると眠くなるんだよね。: When I'm full, I get sleepy.
translations.食べ終わったらちゃんと歯を磨くこと。: Make sure to brush your teeth after eating.
translations.宿題が出てるんで、さっさと片付けてるとこ。: I have homework, so I'm quickly getting it done.
translations.ふう、ちょっと休憩すっかな。: Phew, maybe I'll take a little break.
translations.学生の本分だからねえ、ちゃんとやるよ……たまには。: It's a student's duty, so I'll do it properly... sometimes.
translations.さっさと終わらせて、読みかけの本を読むよ。: I'll finish quickly and read the book I'm halfway through.
translations.今日はなんか、めんどくさい宿題だなあ。: Today, this homework is kind of annoying.
translations.▲主人公＊▲上級生なんだから、家庭教師してよ。: ▲Protagonist＊▲, you're a senior, so tutor me.
translations.あーもう眠いわ。一回寝てからやろうかな。: Ugh, I'm so sleepy. Maybe I'll sleep first.
translations.ゲームやりたいけど、とりあえずもーちょっとがんばる。: I want to play games, but for now, I'll try a bit harder.
translations.1問解くたびにクッキー1枚食べる……とかにしたら太るかな。: If I eat one cookie for each question I solve... will I gain weight？
translations.集中するためにエアコンつけてるよ。: I'm turning on the air conditioning to focus.
translations.脳を働かせるには、糖分がいいんだよね。: To get the brain working, sugar is good.
translations.ラジオ聴きながら[必須科目]の宿題中。: Doing homework for [required subject] while listening to the radio.
translations.コタツで勉強してると、いつの間にか寝てるよね。: When studying in the kotatsu, I end up sleeping without realizing it.
translations.寒いんで服を7枚着てみた。▲凛▲ぬいぐるみみたいだよ。: It's cold, so I tried wearing seven layers of clothes. I look like a ▲Rinko▲ plushie.
translations.教室暑い～、うちわがほしいよ。: It's hot in the classroom~ I want a fan.
translations.あー、プールの授業まだかなあ……: Ah, I wonder when the pool class will start...
translations.さむさむ～！なんかあったまる方法ないかな？: So cold~! Is there a way to warm up？
translations.そういう▲主人公＊▲はどうなのさ、授業に集中してる？: How about you, ▲protagonist＊▲？ Are you focused in class？
translations.眠気覚ましに、たまにメールしてよね。: Send me a message sometimes to wake me up.
translations.他にもメールしてる子いるねえ。: Looks like there are other kids messaging too.
translations.おっと！先生が横を通過！ヤバかった～: Whoa! The teacher just walked by! That was close~
translations.何って、お風呂入ってたんだよ。: What？ I was taking a bath.
translations.女を磨いてたトコ。お風呂でね。: I was pampering myself. In the bath.
translations.今お風呂中。ケータイ壊れないかちょっと心配。: I'm in the bath now. I'm a bit worried my phone will break.
translations.快が乱入しようとしたんで、撃退してやった。: Kai tried to barge in, so I chased him off.
translations.▲主人公＊▲はもうお風呂入った？: Have you taken a bath yet, ▲protagonist＊▲？
translations.風呂はいいよね～1人でのんびり出来るし。: Baths are nice~ You can relax alone.
translations.今日はシャワーでさっさと済ませたよ: I just took a quick shower today.
translations.今日は湯船にゆっくりつかったよ。: I took a long soak in the tub today.
translations.▲凛▲のお風呂想像して、コーフンする？: Do you get excited imagining ▲Rin▲ in the bath？
translations.今日は湯船につかったまま寝ちゃった。: I ended up falling asleep in the bath today.
translations.汗をかいたら、やっぱりお風呂かな。: After sweating, a bath is definitely the way to go.
translations.今日は暑かったんで水風呂にしてみた。: It was hot today, so I tried a cold bath.
translations.お風呂で読んでた本が面白くて、思わず長風呂。: The book I was reading in the bath was so interesting, I ended up soaking longer.
translations.お風呂で歌うと、上手くなった気がするのは何でだろ？: Why do I feel like I sing better in the bath？
translations.▲凛▲が最後かと思ってお湯を抜いたら、まだお母さんが入ってなかったよ。: I thought ▲Rin▲ was the last, so I drained the water, but my mom hadn't bathed yet.
translations.湯船にいきおいよく入ったら、お湯が超熱かった！煮えるとこだったよ。: When I jumped into the tub, the water was super hot! I almost boiled!
translations.こんど一緒にお風呂……って言ったら、エロいこと想像する？: If I say we should take a bath together... do you imagine something naughty？
translations.そんなわけで、今日はもう寝る。: So, I'm going to sleep now.
translations.昼だから、昼ごはんを食べてる。: It's lunchtime, so I'm having lunch.
translations.ごはん食べながらのメールは打ちにくいな。: It's hard to type messages while eating.
translations.コンビニと▲主人公＊▲が居ればいい。と思う: I wish there was a convenience store and ▲主人公＊▲ around.
translations.▲凛▲のカード、貸出冊数の上限きちゃったから、勝手に▲主人公＊▲のカード使わせて: Since I hit the limit for borrowing ▲凛▲'s cards, I'll just use ▲主人公＊▲'s card. Thanks!
translations.図書室でおしゃべりしてる女子の集団を注意しに行ったらさ、やっぱりホレたハレたの話: When I went to scold the group of girls chatting in the library, they were talking about love and crushes.
translations.そういや図書室から借りてまだ読んでない本があったんだよね、片付けないと: Speaking of which, I still have a book I borrowed from the library that I haven't read yet. I need to tidy up.
translations.また図書室のアンケートＢＯＸにゴミ入れてるやつがいるし: Someone is putting trash in the library's survey box again.
translations.たまには部屋でゆっくり本読みたいね、家族にも邪魔されずにさ。▲主人公＊▲ならいい: Sometimes I just want to relax and read a book in my room, without being disturbed by my family. ▲主人公＊▲ would be fine though.
translations.休みの日はさ、ぼけーーっと過ごすのが一番。ただ、▲主人公＊▲とのデートは特別だけ: On my days off, I just want to chill. But a date with ▲主人公＊▲ is special.
translations.そういや図書委員の仕事持ち帰ってたんだけど、やっぱめんどくさいから学校でやればい: By the way, I brought home some library committee work, but it's a hassle, so I might as well do it at school.
translations.休みの日には１冊ぐらい本読んでおきたいよね: On my days off, I want to read at least one book.
translations.先生が秋だけじゃなくて「春の読書週間」も作ろうってさ。結局いつでもいいわけだ: The teacher wants to create a 'Spring Reading Week' in addition to the fall one. I guess anytime works.
translations.図書室に寝に来てるやつってなんなの？家帰って寝ろっつーの: What’s up with people coming to sleep in the library？ Go home and sleep.
translations.図書室に涼みに来てる連中が多くてヤになる。喫茶店じゃないっつーの: There are so many people just hanging out in the library. It's not a café.
translations.外では運動部が汗流してるね……。この暑いのに、よくやる: The sports clubs are sweating outside... I can't believe they're doing this in this heat.
translations.本がたくさんあって、音楽が聴けて、あとはこれでポテチがあれば完璧なんだけど。図書: If only there were lots of books, music, and some chips, it would be perfect. But eating and drinking is banned in the library.
translations.ウチの図書室って、秋の間ずっと「秋の読書週間」やってるよね。もう週間じゃないじゃ: Our library has been doing 'Autumn Reading Week' all fall. It's not even a week anymore.
translations.図書室にコタツ欲しい、▲凛▲専用のやつ。一応、▲主人公＊▲にも使わせてあげるけど: I want a kotatsu in the library, just for ▲凛▲. I'll let ▲主人公＊▲ use it too, though.
translations.今月の推薦図書、珍しく面白かった。どうせヒマだろうから、読んでみたら？: This month's recommended books were surprisingly interesting. Since you’re probably bored, why not give them a read？
translations.▲凛▲もさ、もっと可愛くすべきだと思うの。別におかしな本読んだからじゃないよ: I think ▲凛▲ should be cuter. It's not because she read some weird book.
translations.▲凛▲もさ、たま～には勤労精神を発揮するわけ。えらいっしょ: Sometimes ▲凛▲ shows her work ethic. Isn't that impressive？
translations.本に囲まれる生活。これで授業がなければね。: Living surrounded by books. If only there were no classes.
translations.おはよ[●]珍しくスッキリ起きた。: Good morning [●]. I woke up feeling surprisingly refreshed.
translations.あ～頭ボサボサ。直さないと。: Ah, my hair is a mess. I need to fix it.
translations.あー[季節]って感じの朝だね。: Ah, it feels like a [season] morning.
translations.とりあえず今日は……読みかけの本を読む。: For now, today... I'll read the book I started.
translations.朝ごはんは、ポテチでいいや。春限定のやつ。: For breakfast, I'll just have chips. The spring limited ones.
translations.はあ～▲主人公＊▲は朝から元気だねえ。: Ah, ▲主人公＊▲ is so energetic this morning.
translations.シャワーあびて目を覚まそう。: I'll take a shower to wake myself up.
translations.めずらしくスパっと起きた。おはよ。: I woke up surprisingly quickly today. Good morning.
translations.布団から出られない……とりあえずオハヨ。: I can't get out of bed... Anyway, good morning.
translations.さむさむさむ！▲主人公＊▲暖めに来て。: It's so cold! ▲主人公＊▲, come warm me up.
translations.なんかクラスメートに雑誌読まされた。「カレを誘惑する１０の小悪魔テクニック」だっ: My classmate made me read a magazine. It's called "10 Devilish Techniques to Tempt Your Boyfriend."
