translations.あれ、今日って何かまともなことしたっけ？って思う日ない？時間盗まれたような感覚。: Isn't there a day when you think, did I do anything productive today？ It feels like time was stolen.
translations.テレビ点けてみ、面白いのやってる: Turn on the TV, there's something interesting on.
translations.そういや宿題あったんだよね。別にやんなくてもいっか: Oh right, I had homework. I guess I don't really need to do it.
translations.夜はスピーカーで音楽聴けないけどさ、ヘッドフォンも結構好きなんだよね。音の分離が: I can't listen to music on the speakers at night, but I actually like headphones too. The sound separation is great.
translations.今読み始めた本が面白いからさ、今夜中に読破してやるんだ: The book I just started is interesting, so I'm going to finish it tonight.
translations.ずっとパジャマ着てたらお母さんに怒られた。このままが楽なのに: I got scolded by my mom for wearing pajamas all day. It's just so comfortable.
translations.なんかお父さんがさ、学校であったこととかよく聞いてくるようになったんだよね。前は: My dad has been asking me a lot about what happened at school lately. He didn't used to do that.
translations.弟と遊ぼうと思ったのに、外に遊びに行っちゃった。子供は元気だね: I wanted to play with my little brother, but he went out to play. Kids have so much energy.
translations.▲主人公＊▲って、休みは家で何してんの？: What does ▲主人公＊▲ do at home on days off？
translations.今やってるバラエティのジングルにデスジャビの曲が使われてた。たまにこういうのがあ: The jingle for the variety show is using a Death Jabi song. It's fun when things like this happen.
translations.春限定ポテチの、さくらんぼ味がさ。ゲテモノかと思いきや妙にクセになるんだよね。甘: The spring limited potato chips, cherry flavor. I thought it would be weird, but it's oddly addictive. The sweet and salty taste lingers.
translations.今頃、夏フェスの番組やってる。行きたいけど、面倒じゃんね: They're airing a summer festival program now. I want to go, but it's such a hassle.
translations.お腹痛い。今日アイス２本食べたからかな: My stomach hurts. Maybe it's because I ate two ice creams today.
translations.虫の鳴き声がうるさい……: The sound of insects is so loud...
translations.最近たまに寒いけどさ、風邪なんてひかないでよ。: It's been a bit cold lately, but don't catch a cold.
translations.テレビでスキーの特集やってる。寒いのはヤだけど、滑りたいな: They're featuring skiing on TV. I don't like the cold, but I want to ski.
translations.今日は寒いから弟と一緒に寝ようかな。一緒に布団入るとさ、あったかいんだよね: It's cold today, so maybe I'll sleep with my little brother. It's warm when we share a blanket.
translations.ヒマ～。ま、ヒマなのはいいことだ。▲主人公＊▲のことでも考えてよ: I'm so bored. Well, being bored is a good thing. Think about ▲主人公＊▲ for a bit.
translations.やっぱ自分の部屋が落ち着く。▲主人公＊▲の隣の次くらいには: My own room is the most relaxing. It's right after ▲主人公＊▲'s.
translations.外からネコの鳴き声が聞こえる。見に行こっかな: I can hear a cat meowing outside. Should I go check？
translations.つまんない番組ばっか。なんか面白いことない？: All the shows are so boring. Isn't there anything interesting？
translations.年頃の娘としてはさ、家事とか手伝った方がいいのかな: As a girl my age, should I help with housework？
translations.お母さんがさ、晩御飯の準備手伝えって。上手くできるかな……: My mom told me to help prepare dinner. I wonder if I can do it well...
translations.弟がお母さんに怒られて泣いちゃってさ、▲凛▲がフォロー中。こうやって頼られるの、: My little brother got scolded by mom and started crying, and ▲凛▲ is comforting him. It's nice to be relied on as an older sister.
translations.たまには、晩御飯の準備手伝ってこよっかな: Maybe I'll help with dinner preparation once in a while.
translations.昼間に家にいるとさ、爆音で音楽聴けるからいいよね。アイロンがけ手伝わされたけど: It's nice to be home during the day because I can blast music. I got roped into helping with ironing though.
translations.洗濯機がこわれた。こわしたんじゃないよ、こわれたんだよ: The washing machine broke. I didn't break it, it just broke.
translations.お母さんがドラマ見て興奮してる。掃除の途中なのに: Mom is excited watching a drama. Even though she's in the middle of cleaning.
translations.眠い。弟と昼寝しよ。掃除の途中だけど: I'm sleepy. I'll take a nap with my little brother. Even though I'm in the middle of cleaning.
translations.今日のご飯なんだろ。あんまり嫌いなものないといいけど: I wonder what today's dinner will be. I hope there's nothing I really dislike.
translations.暑い…何か食べよ。サラダくらい簡単に作れるつーの: It's hot... I should eat something. I can at least make a salad easily.
translations.近所のゴミ収集所が凄い事になってた。あれはロックだね: The neighborhood garbage collection site was a mess. That's rock.
translations.秋の夕暮れってさ、詩的だよね。▲主人公＊▲には難しいかもしんないけど: Autumn evenings are poetic, aren't they？ It might be difficult for ▲主人公＊▲ though.
translations.本を読みながらコロコロとゴミ取りしてたら、▲凛▲の周りだけキレイになったよ: While I was reading a book and picking up trash, only ▲凛▲'s area got clean.
translations.暑いときには熱いものを食べるのがいいとか言うけど、逆はないよね。なんでだろ: They say eating hot food is good when it's hot, but there's no reverse for that. I wonder why.
translations.宿題やるの忘れてた。まぁいっか: I forgot to do my homework. Oh well.
translations.弟をお風呂に入れてきたよ。次は▲主人公＊▲の番かな？なんてね、冗談だけど: I gave my little brother a bath. I wonder if it's ▲主人公＊▲'s turn next？ Just kidding.
translations.あと何年したらさ、夜も一緒にいられるんだろね。: How many years until we can be together at night？
translations.▲主人公＊▲と一緒に勉強できれば楽しいのにな[●]: It would be fun to study with ▲主人公＊▲[●].
translations.もーちょっとだからガンバるか……。: Just a little more, I’ll do my best...
translations.ふぁ～！今日何回目のあくびだろう。: Yawn! I wonder how many times I've yawned today.
translations.低血圧に朝はしんどいよ。: Low blood pressure makes mornings tough.
translations.石を蹴りながら歩くのって時間かかるな。: Kicking stones while walking takes time.
translations.今日は快にたたき起こされた。: I was suddenly woken up today.
translations.今日も半分終わりか。: Half the day is already over.
translations.今日の学校もだいたい終わり: School is mostly over for today.
translations.ふう、やっと目がさめてきた。そろそろ本気出そうかな。: Phew, I'm finally waking up. Maybe it's time to get serious.
translations.いつのまにか夜だよ。: It's night before I know it.
translations.さて、今日は何しよっかな。: So, what should I do today？
translations.せっかくの休みの日がもうすぐ終わるなあ。毎日休みならいいのに。: My precious day off is almost over. I wish every day was a holiday.
translations.▲凛▲さ、猫飼いたい。10匹くらい。: ▲凛▲, I want to have a cat. About 10 of them.
translations.あ！CD落としたらケースにヒビが入った！: Oh! I dropped the CD and cracked the case!
translations.今、なんかいいメロディが浮かんだ。作曲ってどうやるんだろう。: Just now, a nice melody came to mind. I wonder how to compose.
translations.レシピに縛られるのもいやだから、こんど自由に作ってみようかな。創作料理ってやつ？: I don't want to be tied to a recipe, so maybe I'll try cooking freely next time. Is that creative cooking？
translations.何って、今日は図書委員会。: What？ Today is the library committee.
translations.委員会の打ち合わせ。▲主人公＊▲なんで来てないの？: Committee meeting. Why isn't ▲主人公＊▲ here？
translations.図書委員会中。: In the middle of the library committee.
translations.今日の議題は図書の電子化について。なんかハイテクだね。: Today's topic is about digitizing books. Sounds high-tech.
translations.議論が白熱……は、してないなあ。: The discussion is heated... not really.
translations.今日は古い書籍の寄付についてのミーティング中: Today, we're having a meeting about donating old books.
translations.今日は読書エリアのレイアウトについてミーティング。: Today, we're meeting about the layout of the reading area.
translations.夏休みの長期貸し出しルールについてミーティング中。: We're in a meeting about long-term lending rules for summer vacation.
translations.暑いなあ。はやく終わらないかな。: It's hot. I hope it ends soon.
translations.図書館の利用マナーについてミーティング中。: We're in a meeting about library usage etiquette.
translations.最近、本の貸し出しが減ってるみたい。嘆かわしいなあ。: It seems like book lending has decreased recently. That's unfortunate.
translations.新学期向けの図書購入について打ち合わせ中。: We're discussing book purchases for the new semester.
translations.来年度はブルーレイディスクも増やすみたい。もっと米文学とか入れて欲しいのにな。: It seems like they will increase Blu-ray discs next year. I wish they would add more American literature.
translations.じゃあさ、▲凛▲の好きなトコ、１０個言ってみてよ[●]: So, tell me 10 things you like about ▲Rinko▲[●]
translations.あーあ、はやく次のデートの日になればいいのに～。: I wish the next date would come soon.
translations.なんかニヤけてる▲主人公＊▲の顔が目に浮かぶ。: I can picture the smirk on ▲protagonist＊▲'s face.
translations.あー▲凛▲もあやかりたいよ。: Ah, I want to share that feeling with ▲Rinko▲.
translations.今度会った時に聞いてあげるから、落ち着きなさい。: I'll ask you when we meet next, so calm down.
translations.かわいいネコでも見つけた？: Did you find a cute cat？
translations.▲主人公＊▲が楽しそうだと、▲凛▲もなんとなく気分いいよ。: When ▲protagonist＊▲ is having fun, ▲Rinko▲ feels good too.
translations.ゲームでレアアイテムでも拾った？: Did you find a rare item in a game？
translations.アイスでアタリでも出た？: Did you win something with ice cream？
translations.何を隠そう、▲凛▲も気分がいい: To be honest, ▲Rinko▲ is feeling good too.
translations.いいなあ、▲凛▲も気分よくなりたい。: I wish I could feel good too, ▲Rinko▲.
translations.そんなときは▲凛▲におまかせ。: In times like that, leave it to ▲Rinko▲.
translations.まあそんな時もあるよ。元気だせ。: There are days like that. Cheer up.
translations.▲凛▲がアドバイスしてあげようか？: Do you want me to give you advice, ▲Rinko▲？
translations.「少し」ならいいじゃん。「ものすごく」になったら相談にのるよ。: If it's just a little, that's fine. If it becomes a lot, I'll help.
translations.困った時は▲凛▲の事を思い出せばダイジョブ。: When you're in trouble, just think of ▲Rinko▲ and you'll be fine.
translations.そんな日もあるよ。気にしないことだね。: There are days like that. Don't worry about it.
translations.そういう時はネコ！いいネコスポットがあるから、今度教えるよ。: In times like that, think of cats! I know a great cat spot, I'll tell you next time.
translations.人生は長いんだしさ、落ち込むこともあるよ。: Life is long, so it's normal to feel down sometimes.
translations.心配だなあ。▲凛▲で力になれることある？: I'm worried. Is there anything I can do to help, ▲Rinko▲？
translations.きっと▲凛▲も同じくらい▲主人公＊▲のことがスキ。: I'm sure ▲Rinko▲ likes ▲the protagonist＊▲ just as much.
translations.▲凛▲はそれほどでも……なんて言うと思った？うそうそ、大好き[●]: Did you think ▲Rinko▲ would say it's not that much...？ Just kidding, I love you [●].
translations.メールが来るような気がしてたんだよね。LOVEメールがさ[●]: I had a feeling a message would come. A LOVE message [●].
translations.あなたの声で聴きたいな、そのセリフ[●]: I want to hear that line in your voice [●].
translations.油断してたから、ちょっと顔がにやけちゃったよ。誰かに見られてないかな？: I let my guard down, and I couldn't help but smile. I hope no one saw me.
translations.そんな事言うから会いたくなったよ。会えるかな？: You said that, and now I want to see you. Can we meet？
translations.キス……したいな。今すぐ[●]: I want to kiss... right now [●].
translations.キス……しようよ。いますぐに会いたいな[●]: Let's kiss... I want to see you right now [●].
translations.チョット都合悪いかも……。: It might be a bit inconvenient...
translations.会いたいかも。: I might want to see you.
translations.▲主人公＊▲に会えば元気でるかな？: I wonder if seeing ▲the protagonist＊▲ will cheer me up？
translations.会いたいか会いたくないかで言えば、会いたいかな？: If I had to say whether I want to see you or not, I guess I want to.
translations.時間あるなら、どっかで会う？: If you have time, should we meet somewhere？
translations.▲凛▲はそうでもない……ウソウソ[●]: ▲Rinko▲ doesn't feel that way... Just kidding [●].
translations.いつでも会えるってわかってるのにね。: I know I can meet you anytime.
translations.今からダッシュで行けば、何分くらいで会えるかなあ？: If I dash over now, how many minutes until we meet？
translations.じゃあさ、今すぐに会いたい！: Then, I want to see you right now!
translations.▲凛▲もちょうど▲主人公＊▲の事考えてたよ。: ▲Rinko▲ was just thinking about ▲the protagonist＊▲ too.
translations.それは▲凛▲から言おうと思ってたのにぃ[●]: I was going to say that from ▲Rinko▲ [●].
translations.ホント？今すぐ会えるかな？: Really？ Can we meet right now？
translations.今すぐ会いたい[●]: I want to see you right now [●].
translations.会ってさ……その……キスしたいな[●]: Let's meet and... um... I want to kiss [●].
translations.忙しいなら仕方ないね。: If you're busy, I guess that's that.
translations.まあ、連絡なしで無視されるよりいいけどさ。: Well, it's better than being ignored without any contact.
translations.とりあえず待ってる。メールはいいんだよね。: I'll just wait for now. Email is fine, right？
translations.じゃあデートは出来ない？: So, we can't go on a date？
translations.▲凛▲も暇なわけじゃないから、いいけど。: ▲Rinko▲ isn't free either, but that's okay.
translations.何で忙しいのかは聞かないけどさ、無理しないようにね。: I won't ask why you're busy, but don't overdo it.
translations.そんなこと言わないでさ、なんとか時間作って遊ぼうよ。: Don't say that, let's find some time to hang out.
translations.メールくらいは出来る？: Can you at least email me？
translations.時間が出来たらデートできる？: Can we go on a date when you have time？
translations.会えないんだったら、その間何かやること考えよっと。: If we can't meet, I'll think of something to do in the meantime.
translations.じゃあ、しばらく会えない？そんなに忙しい？: So, we can't meet for a while？ Are you that busy？
translations.睡眠はしっかりとったほうがいいらしいよ。無理すんな。: It's said that getting enough sleep is important. Don't push yourself.
translations.じゃあ、いつでもいいから時間ができたらデート。ね[●]: So, whenever you have time, let's go on a date. Okay[●]？
translations.早く会えるように努力してね、▲凛▲応援してるから。: Work hard to meet me soon, I'm cheering for you, ▲Rinko▲.
translations.電話やメールはいいよね？: Phone calls and emails are fine, right？
translations.忙しくなくなるのはいつ？▲凛▲待ってるから: When will you not be busy anymore？ ▲Rinko▲ is waiting.
translations.▲凛▲はそんなに忙しくもないから、いつでも声かけていいよ。: ▲Rinko▲ isn't that busy, so feel free to reach out anytime.
translations.じゃあさ、1回のデートを濃密な感じにしようよ。だったら▲凛▲も我慢できるから。: Then, let's make our date really special. That way, ▲Rinko▲ can manage.
translations.ちゃんとメールをくれただけで嬉しいよ。: I'm just happy you sent me an email.
translations.ヒマなときじゃないとメールしないとかだったら、カレシとして最悪。: If you only email when you're free, that's the worst as a boyfriend.
translations.若いんだから、なんかポジティブに動こうよ。▲凛▲はめんどうだけど。: You're young, so let's do something positive. ▲Rinko▲ is a hassle, though.
translations.▲凛▲だったら本を読むね。: If it were ▲Rinko▲, I'd read a book.
translations.散歩でもしてくれば？: How about going for a walk？
translations.全力で町内１周走ってくるといい。: You should run around the neighborhood with all your might.
translations.オススメのCDあるけど、貸そうか？: I have a recommended CD, want to borrow it？
translations.青春の無駄遣いな気もするけど、そんな日もあっていいと思う。: It feels like a waste of youth, but I think it's okay to have days like that.
translations.デートにいく場所でも考えようよ。: Let's think of places to go on a date.
translations.一緒にゲームでもする？: Want to play a game together？
translations.▲主人公＊▲と会ってない時はヒマだね。: It's boring when I'm not with ▲Protagonist＊▲.
translations.よし、メールでいいなら付き合うよ。: Alright, if email works, I'm in.
translations.そういうときはさ、デートのプランを考えればいいんじゃない？: In times like that, shouldn't we think of a date plan？
translations.だから、いっぱいメールすればいいよ。▲凛▲に。: So, just email a lot. To ▲Rinko▲.
translations.もっとデートの約束をたくさんしておけばよかったね。: I should have made more date plans.
translations.今日はもう終わるみたい。: Looks like today is almost over.
translations.今日は休んでる委員が多いな。: There are a lot of committee members taking a break today.
translations.あーなんか、体だるい。: Ah, I feel kind of sluggish.
translations.良いか悪いかでいうと、悪い方。: If I had to say if it's good or bad, it's on the bad side.
translations.良いか悪いかでいうと、良い方。: If I had to say if it's good or bad, it's on the good side.
translations.学校休もうかなあ。どうしよ。: Maybe I should skip school. What should I do？
translations.もーちょっとしたら元気出るかも: I might feel better in a little while.
translations.熱は無いみたいだけど。: I don't seem to have a fever, though.
translations.メール打つのもちょっとしんどい。: Even typing emails is a bit tough.
translations.▲主人公＊▲に会ったら元気になるかな？: I wonder if meeting ▲主人公＊▲ would cheer me up？
translations.なんか美味しいもの食べたら、もっと元気になるかも。: Eating something delicious might make me feel better.
translations.なんかいい曲聴いたら、もっと元気になるかも。: Listening to a good song might lift my spirits.
translations.▲主人公＊▲のメールでちょっと元気出たかも。: I might have felt a bit better from ▲主人公＊▲'s email.
translations.テレビで見た占いもわりと良かったしね。: The fortune I saw on TV was pretty good too.
translations.▲主人公＊▲からたくさんメール貰えれば、もっと元気になるかもね[●]: If I get a lot of emails from ▲主人公＊▲, I might feel even better[●].
translations.格ゲーの勝率も最近いいんだよね。: My win rate in fighting games has been good lately.
translations.偶然みつけた小説がおもしろくてさ。今度貸してあげる。: I found an interesting novel by chance. I'll lend it to you next time.
translations.そういう▲主人公＊▲はハッピー？: Is that kind of ▲主人公＊▲ happy？
translations.朝ごはんもいっぱい食べたし、パワー全開かも[●]: I ate a lot for breakfast, so I might be full of energy[●].
translations.朝から猫をたくさん撫でたしね。: I petted a lot of cats this morning.
translations.いまなら[食事]三杯食べられそう。: Right now, I feel like I could eat three bowls of [food].
translations.どした？▲凛▲が怒ってるとか思った？: What's wrong？ Did you think ▲凛▲ was angry？
translations.こういうメール、時々はいいけど、しつこいのは減点だから。: Emails like this are nice sometimes, but being persistent is a minus.
translations.まあ、悪い気はしないよ。▲凛▲も▲主人公＊▲のことスキ。: Well, I don't feel bad about it. ▲凛▲ likes ▲主人公＊▲ too.
translations.次は直接、▲主人公＊▲の口で言って。: Next time, say it directly with your mouth, ▲主人公＊▲.
translations.ちょうど気分がふさいでたんだけど、▲主人公＊▲のメールでちょっと元気出た。: I was feeling down, but ▲主人公＊▲'s email cheered me up a bit.
translations.メール見たら、なんか会いたくなってきた。: Seeing the email made me want to meet you.
translations.アンタがそういうこと言うから、▲凛▲もちょっと落ち込みそう。: Because you said that, ▲Rinko▲ might feel a bit down.
translations.元気出そうよ。ほらほら！: Cheer up! Come on, come on!
translations.そういう時は、美味しいモノを食べれば元気でるよ。: At times like this, eating something delicious will lift your spirits.
translations.いっしょにネコを撫でにいこうか？絶対に元気出るからさ。: Shall we go pet some cats together？ It'll definitely cheer you up.
translations.▲凛▲を撫でさせてあげるよ。ニャーニャー[●]: I'll let you pet ▲Rinko▲. Meow meow [●]
translations.▲凛▲と初めてキスした時のことを思い出して……ほら、元気出てきた？: Remember the first time we kissed, ▲Rinko▲... See, feeling better？
translations.元気が出る呪文、はぴかむりんくる～♪元気で～ろでろ[●]: Here's a cheer-up spell, hapikamurinkuru~♪ Be happy~ [●]
translations.元気出して行こうよ。: Let's cheer up and move forward.
translations.弱音はいてもしょーがないっしょ。ガンバレ！: There's no point in complaining. Hang in there!
translations.何に疲れた？まさか▲凛▲？: What are you tired from？ Could it be ▲Rinko▲？
translations.愚痴ですか、じゃあなぐさめてあげよう。よちよち。: Is it a complaint？ Then let me comfort you. There, there.
translations.なんか無理してる？: Are you pushing yourself too hard？
translations.そんなときはドーピング。栄養ドリンクをガブ飲みしてみ。: At times like that, it's time for some doping. Try chugging an energy drink.
translations.寝るしかないよ。寝る子は元気！: You just need to sleep. Sleepy kids are healthy!
translations.メールはいいから、お風呂入って寝ちゃいなさい！: Forget the emails, just take a bath and go to sleep!
translations.たまにはのんびりするのも大事。寝ちゃえ！: Sometimes it's important to relax. Just sleep!
translations.疲れてるだけなら大丈夫。すぐ回復するって。: If you're just tired, it's okay. You'll recover soon.
translations.▲凛▲も疲れてるけど、▲主人公＊▲のメールでちょっと元気出たよ。: ▲Rinko▲ is tired too, but your email cheered her up a bit.
translations.疲れるのは良いことだよ。……たぶん。: Being tired is a good thing. ...Probably.
translations.疲れはガンバった証拠だからね。: Fatigue is proof that you worked hard.
translations.デートまでにはパワー全開にして、遊びまくろうよ[●]: By the date, let's be fully energized and have a blast [●]
translations.元気があれば何でも出来る！って、偉い人が言ってた。: If you have energy, you can do anything! That's what wise people say.
translations.なんか手伝うことある？マッサージしてあげよっか？: Is there anything I can help with？ Want a massage？
translations.疲れてるのにメールありがと[●]元気になったら▲凛▲とデートしようよ[●]: Thanks for the email even though you're tired [●] Let's go on a date with ▲Rinko▲ when you're feeling better [●]
translations.▲凛▲が肩もんであげようか？: Shall I give you a shoulder massage, ▲Rinko▲？
translations.若いんだから、疲れなんて一晩寝れば吹き飛ぶよ。そしたらデートしよ[●]: You're young, so just one night of sleep will make you feel better. Then let's go on a date [●]
translations.回復魔法をかけてあげよう。はぴかむりんくる～♪ひーりんぐしゃわ～～～[●]: I'll cast a recovery spell on you. hapikamurinkuru~♪ healing shower~~ [●]
translations.コラ！居眠りしちゃダメだぞ。ふふ: Hey! No sleeping on the job. Hehe.
translations.今日もはりきって、ね？: Let's do our best today, okay？
translations.今日もネネが一緒なのだ: Nene is with me today too.
translations.今日も一日笑顔でね？: Stay smiling all day today, okay？
translations.明日もまたがんばろー！: Let's do our best again tomorrow!
translations.あとでメールちょうだいね？: Send me a message later, okay？
translations.お風呂入ってこよっと: I'm going to take a bath.
translations.休みだからって、お寝坊さんはダメよ？: Just because it's a day off, don't sleep in, okay？
translations.休みでも、昼まで寝てるなんて許さないからね？: Even on a day off, I won't allow you to sleep until noon, okay？
translations.休みの日なのに、いつも通り早く起きちゃうことってない？私はたまにあるんだよね: Isn't it weird how you wake up early even on a day off？ I sometimes do.
translations.ちゃんと時間通りに起きられた？: Did you wake up on time？
translations.今朝はちゃんと起きられた？: Did you manage to get up this morning？
translations.遅刻なんてしたら、私が許しませんからね？: If you're late, I won't forgive you, okay？
translations.寝ぼけた顔で外に出ちゃ、ダメよ？: Don't go outside with a sleepy face, okay？
translations.春は起きるの辛いね、がんばって起きて！: Spring makes it hard to wake up, so do your best!
translations.ねむいけど、がんばって起きる: I'm sleepy, but I'll do my best to wake up.
translations.▲主人公＊▲もいつまでも寝てたらダメよ？: ▲Protagonist＊▲, you can't just sleep in forever, okay？
translations.いつまでも薄着で寝てると風邪ひいちゃうよ？: If you keep sleeping in light clothes, you'll catch a cold, okay？
translations.布団から出るの辛いけど、早く支度しないと遅刻しちゃうからね？: It's tough to get out of bed, but if you don't get ready soon, you'll be late, okay？
translations.寒いけど、ちゃんとすぐ起きられたら褒めてあげるから。ね？: It's cold, but if you can get up right away, I'll praise you, okay？
translations.カノジョからのおはようメールってやっぱりうれしいのかな？私は▲主人公＊▲からもら: Isn't it nice to get a good morning message from your girlfriend？ I feel happy when I get one from ▲Protagonist＊▲.
translations.ほんとは▲主人公＊▲のキスで目覚めたかったな▼: Honestly, I wanted to wake up with a kiss from ▲Protagonist＊▲▼
translations.今日は起きるの大変だったなぁ。▲主人公＊▲はどう？: It was hard to get up today. How about you, ▲Protagonist＊▲？
translations.たまにど～しても起きられないことって、あるよね。でも、二度寝はダメよ？: Sometimes you just can't get up, right？ But don't hit snooze!
translations.▲主人公＊▲のクラスって、宿題多い？こっちは結構大変かも: Does your class have a lot of homework？ Mine is pretty tough.
translations.今ね、窓の外に飛行機雲が出てるよ。そっちからも見える？: Right now, there's a contrail outside the window. Can you see it from there？
translations.今クラスの友達と一緒に雑誌読んでたの。「カレを誘惑する１０の小悪魔テクニック」だ: I was reading a magazine with friends in class. It's about '10 Devilish Techniques to Tempt Your Boyfriend.' Should I try it？
translations.たまに口がさびしくなっちゃうの。学校じゃパクパクは食べにくいし、やっぱり飴持って: Sometimes my mouth gets bored. It's hard to eat snacks at school, so having candy is really convenient!
translations.同じクラスにカップルがいるんだけど、休み時間になると教室でイチャイチャし始めるの: There's a couple in my class, and they start getting all lovey-dovey during breaks. How nice!
translations.クラスに寝ぐせ付いてる男の子がいる。▲主人公＊▲は大丈夫だよね？: There's a boy in class with bedhead. You're okay, right ▲Protagonist＊▲？
translations.こんな季節は、授業を抜け出して屋上でお昼寝でもしたら気持ちいいかな。そんな悪いこ: In this season, wouldn't it feel nice to sneak out of class and take a nap on the rooftop？ But I can't do something bad like that.
translations.今日は寝てる人多いなぁ。そっちも似たような感じかな: There are a lot of people sleeping today. Is it similar over there？
translations.はぁ、あつい。暑くても、男の子は気楽に服が脱げていいなぁ: Ugh, it's hot. Even if it's hot, boys can easily take off their clothes.
translations.あつーい……デキシーズだったら常に空調きいてるけど、学校だとそうはいかないもんね: It's so hot... If I were at Dexies, the AC would be on all the time, but not at school.
translations.秋の通学路って、好きだな。風景が素敵だし、気候も気持ちいいしね: I love the autumn school route. The scenery is beautiful and the weather feels nice.
translations.読書の秋。▲主人公＊▲は何か読んでる？: Autumn is for reading. Is ▲主人公＊▲ reading something？
translations.今日は帰りも寒そうだね。急いで帰ろっと: It looks like it will be cold on the way home too. I should hurry back.
translations.これだけ寒いと、デキシーズにもあまりお客さん来ないかな: With it being this cold, I guess not many customers will come to Dexies.
translations.そういえば最近、友達からよく「前よりキレイになった」って言われるんだけど……▲主: By the way, recently friends have been saying I look 'prettier than before'... Is it because of ▲主人公＊▲？
translations.そういえば最近、友達から「前より色っぽくなった」って言われるんだけど、ほんとかな: Speaking of which, friends have been saying I look 'more attractive than before' lately. Is that true？
translations.クラスの男の子たちが、下級生の女の子で誰が可愛いかって話してる。あの子たちは年下: The boys in class are talking about which younger girls are cute. Do they like younger ones？
translations.午前中の授業って、私は好きかな。お昼は眠くなっちゃうもん: I think I like morning classes. I get sleepy during lunch.
translations.抜き打ちの小テストで１００点取っちゃった♪: I got a perfect score on the surprise quiz♪
translations.危ない。携帯触ってたら、先生に見つかりそうになっちゃった: That was close. I almost got caught by the teacher for using my phone.
translations.今日は新しいシャーペンなんだ♪: Today I have a new mechanical pencil♪
translations.ふふ、ノートを新しくしてみました♪: Hehe, I got a new notebook♪
translations.自習になっちゃった。ヒマだなぁ: It's self-study time. I'm so bored.
translations.勉強きちんとすれば、それだけ放課後が楽しくなるよ。: If you study properly, you'll have more fun after school.
translations.なんだか春って授業に身が入らないのよね。これってただの言い訳かな: I feel like I can't focus in class during spring. Is this just an excuse？
translations.眠いなぁ。春のせいにしちゃお: I'm so sleepy. I'll blame it on spring.
translations.暑い日こそ、だらけずにシャキっとしよ？: On hot days, let's stay sharp and not slack off, okay？
translations.汗で体冷やさないようにね: Be careful not to cool down your body with sweat.
translations.秋だからかな、お腹空いちゃった。授業終わったら、隠してたお菓子食べちゃお♪: Maybe it's because it's autumn, but I'm feeling hungry. After class, I'll eat the snacks I hid♪
translations.教室の窓から見る秋の風景って、なんだか切ないね。: The autumn scenery from the classroom window feels a bit sad.
translations.この寒い日に外で体育、やだよぉ: I don't want to have gym class outside on such a cold day.
translations.[病気]が流行ってるみたいだから、▲主人公＊▲も気を付けてね: It seems like [illness] is spreading, so be careful, ▲主人公＊▲.
translations.ねえねえ、褒めて？なんでかは秘密！: Hey, hey, praise me？ The reason is a secret!
translations.こっちはみんな居眠り中、そろそろ先生に怒られちゃうかも: Everyone here is dozing off; we might get scolded by the teacher soon.
translations.次体育だぁ。なんとかがんばる: Next is gym class. I'll do my best somehow.
translations.クラスの男の子たちがハシャぎ回ってる。▲主人公＊▲の方がよっぽど大人よね: The boys in class are being rowdy. ▲主人公＊▲ is way more mature.
translations.▲主人公＊▲と同じクラスだったら、休み時間も楽しいのになぁ: If I were in the same class as ▲主人公＊▲, break time would be so much fun.
translations.女の子同士の手紙、気になる？: Are you curious about letters between girls？
translations.さっき▲主人公＊▲のこと、見かけたよ。そっちはわかった？: I just saw ▲主人公＊▲ a while ago. Did you notice？
translations.教室にはクーラーが絶対必要よね。: We definitely need air conditioning in the classroom.
translations.夏ってやっぱりくっつかれると、うっとうしい？私は、そんなことないんだけど: In summer, is it annoying to be close to someone？ I don't feel that way, though.
translations.葉っぱが舞ってる……そっちでも見えるかな: The leaves are dancing... Can you see them over there？
translations.教室の空気が悪いなあ、換気しなきゃ: The classroom air is bad, I need to ventilate.
translations.今日もさむ～い。お客様少ないかも: It's cold again today. There might be fewer customers.
translations.クラスの友達と恋バナ中。▲主人公＊▲のことたくさん白状させられちゃった▼: I'm talking about love with my classmates. I ended up confessing a lot about ▲主人公＊▲.
translations.クラスの友達と一緒にオシャレの研究中。女の子は大変なんだから♪: I'm researching fashion with my classmates. It's tough being a girl♪
translations.クラスには映画の話が通じる友達がいないのよね。それがちょっと不満かなぁ: I don't have any friends in class who understand movies. That's a bit frustrating.
translations.テレビにタヌキが出てる。かわいー▼: There's a raccoon on TV. So cute▼.
translations.テレビの音が大きいって怒られちゃった。はあ: I got scolded for the TV being too loud. Sigh.
translations.ご飯食べながらテレビ観るのはお行儀悪いよね。気を付けてはいるんだけど……: It's bad manners to eat while watching TV, right？ I'm trying to be careful...
translations.クイズ番組観てるけど、私けっこうこういうの得意なんだよ？: I'm watching a quiz show, but I'm actually pretty good at this kind of thing, you know？
translations.[季節]の料理って、なにが定番かな。献立考えてて: What are the standard dishes for [season]？ I'm thinking about the menu.
translations.今日は深夜に面白い映画やるよ、もし起きてたら観てみて？: There's an interesting movie on late tonight, watch it if you're awake？
translations.休みの日に家で勉強するのって、無理よね……: Studying at home on a day off is impossible...
translations.近所の小さな男の子と一緒に遊んだよ。嫉妬しちゃう？: I played with a little boy from the neighborhood. Are you jealous？
translations.[季節]だからって、寝坊はダメ！: Just because it's [season], you can't sleep in!
translations.あったかくなったけど、窓開けて寝ないようにね？: It's getting warmer, but don't forget to close the window when you sleep, okay？
translations.暑くてもしっかり食べなきゃダメよ？: Even if it's hot, you have to eat properly, okay？
translations.最近、[病気]が流行ってるみたいだから、気を付けてね？: It seems like [illness] is going around lately, so be careful, okay？
translations.寒いね、お互い風邪には気をつけようね: It's cold, let's both be careful not to catch a cold.
translations.食欲の秋、はあユーウツ: Autumn is the season of appetite, sigh.
translations.さむーい。▲主人公＊▲は外出るとき気を付けてね？: It's so cold. Be careful when you go out, ▲主人公＊▲.
translations.[季節]は、街のイルミネーションがきれいよね。一緒に観たいな: The illuminations in the city during [season] are beautiful. I want to see them together.
translations.友達にあなたのことよく聞かれるけど……私、そういうとき隠せないのよね～: My friends often ask about you, but... I can't hide it in those moments~.
translations.▲主人公＊▲に会いたいな……。ごめん、困らせちゃうよね: I want to see ▲主人公＊▲... Sorry, I must be bothering you.
translations.今日はずーっとテレビ観てようかな……: I think I'll just watch TV all day today...
translations.今日の晩御飯は気合入れよっと♪: Let's put some effort into tonight's dinner♪.
translations.洗濯しなきゃ……楽しんでやればすぐ済むかな: I need to do laundry... If I enjoy it, maybe it will go quickly.
translations.おかず作り過ぎちゃった。隣に住んでれば、すぐに持っていけるのに: I made too much side dish. If you lived next door, I could bring it right over.
translations.尊敬してる人っている？私は……うーん、誰だろう: Is there someone you respect？ For me... hmm, who could it be？
translations.なにしてる？私はベランダの掃除しようかなって: What are you doing？ I'm thinking of cleaning the balcony.
translations.大量に洗濯できると気持ちいいよね。逆に雨のときはユーウツ: It's nice to do a lot of laundry. But rainy days are a drag.
translations.[季節]は、なにか部屋に花が欲しくなるよね: During [season], I want to have flowers in my room.
translations.料理、失敗しちゃった。[季節]だから眠くて……は言い訳か: I messed up cooking. Blaming it on being sleepy because it's [season] is just an excuse.
translations.花瓶の水かえるの忘れてダメにしちゃった……はあ: I forgot to change the water in the vase and ruined it... sigh.
translations.これだけ暑いと食欲も落ちちゃうなぁ。でもちゃんと食べないと体に悪いもんね、工夫し: It's so hot that my appetite is decreasing. But I have to eat properly for my health, so I'll find a way.
translations.将来は広い庭のある家に住めたらいいよね、やっぱり: I hope to live in a house with a big garden in the future, after all.
translations.あーん、やっぱりご飯食べ過ぎちゃった！これからはダイエットの秋！: Ah, I definitely ate too much! From now on, it's diet season!
translations.子供もカワイイけど、やっぱり▲主人公＊▲が一番よね▼: Kids are cute, but ▲the protagonist＊▲ is the best, right？
translations.ふふ、ちゃんと授業も聞きます: Hehe, I’ll listen to the class properly.
translations.おはよう[●]気持ちの良い朝だね。: Good morning[●] It's a nice morning.
translations.モーニングコールされちゃった。おはよ[●]: I got a morning call. Good morning[●]
translations.今日も1日、楽しいといいな♪: I hope today will be fun too♪
translations.ちょっとお散歩してこようかな♪: I think I'll take a little walk♪
translations.お休みだって、ちゃんと計画的に行動しないとね。: Even on a day off, I need to act with a plan.
translations.テレビに出てきたワンちゃんかわいい♪: The puppy on TV is so cute♪
translations.朝はやっぱり白いご飯とお味噌汁よね。: In the morning, it's definitely white rice and miso soup.
translations.お散歩すると春のいぶきを感じるよ。: Walking makes me feel the breath of spring.
translations.実はまだちょっと眠いんだ。この季節はいくらでも寝られるよね。: Actually, I'm still a bit sleepy. You can sleep as much as you want this season.
translations.寝汗かいてるんじゃない？シャワーでスッキリしようね。: Aren't you sweating in your sleep？ Let's refresh with a shower.
translations.暑いからってエアコンばっかり使っちゃダメだよ。: Don't just use the air conditioner because it's hot.
translations.この時期って、朝ごはんも美味しいんだよね。: Breakfast is delicious this time of year.
translations.なんだか、すっごく寝ちゃったな。: I feel like I really overslept.
translations.つい2度寝しそうになっちゃうけど、ふふ[●]: I almost fell back asleep, hehe[●]
translations.新聞とりに外に出たら、息が白かったよ: When I went outside to get the newspaper, my breath was white.
translations.うん、今日もがんばろっと！: Yeah, I'll do my best today too!
translations.今日もがんばろうね。: Let's do our best today too.
translations.もうこんな時間かぁ[●]: Wow, is it already this time[●]？
translations.うん、もう寝ないとね[●]: Yeah, I need to sleep now[●]
translations.いい夢が見られるといいな。: I hope I can have good dreams.
translations.実はもう眠さの限界だったの。: Actually, I was already at my limit of sleepiness.
translations.寝坊しないようにしなきゃね。: I have to make sure I don't oversleep.
translations.この時期、布団の種類に悩むよね。: This time of year, I struggle with what kind of bedding to use.
translations.しっかり干したから、お布団から太陽の香りがするよ。: I dried it well, so my bedding smells like the sun.
translations.エアコンつけたまま寝ると、夏風邪ひいちゃうから気をつけてね。: Be careful not to catch a summer cold if you sleep with the air conditioner on.
translations.勉強してたらいつのまにかこんな時間かぁ。: I didn't realize it was this late while studying.
translations.鈴虫がやさしく鳴いてるね。: The bell crickets are chirping gently.
translations.お布団冷たいのイヤだから、布団乾燥機使っちゃおっと。: I don't like cold bedding, so I'll use the bedding dryer.
translations.あのね……だいすきだよ♪: You know... I really like you♪
translations.▲主人公＊▲が今考えてること当てます……ネネちゃん大好き！どう？: I'll guess what ▲主人公＊▲ is thinking... I love Nene-chan! How about that？
translations.今日も一日がんばった。うん、充実してる感じする: I worked hard today. Yeah, I feel fulfilled.
translations.今日はお客さん少なくて助かるなぁ。いつもこうだと、退屈だけどね: There are fewer customers today, which is a relief. If it were always like this, it would be boring though.
translations.今日はお客さん多くて忙しいよぉ。デキシーズって結構客入りの波が激しいよね、大丈夫: It's busy today with lots of customers. The flow of customers at Dixie's is pretty intense, I wonder if it's okay.
translations.今日の店長、すごく機嫌良さそう。何があったんだろ？: The manager seems really happy today. I wonder what happened？
translations.今日の店長、すごく機嫌悪そう。みんな近づかないようにしてるよ: The manager seems really grumpy today. Everyone is keeping their distance.
translations.スタッフの子たちが休憩室にファッション雑誌置いてくれるから、助かっちゃうな♪女子: The staff leave fashion magazines in the break room, which is really helpful♪ It's a secret to boosting my girl power.
translations.外掃除終わり！汗かいちゃったけど、着: Finished cleaning outside! I worked up a sweat, but I'm done.
translations.春は限定デザートが多くて、仕事中でも気になっちゃうな。男の子はそうでもないのかな: Spring has a lot of limited desserts, and I can't help but think about them even while working. I wonder if boys feel the same？
translations.春はね、よくデキシーズに行くとき遠回りするの。だってお散歩したい季節じゃない？: In spring, I often take a detour when going to Dixie's. It's the season for walks, right？
translations.夏はドリンクバーの中身がすぐなくなっちゃうから、▲主人公＊▲も気を付けておいてね: In summer, the drink bar runs out quickly, so ▲主人公＊▲ should be careful too.
translations.近くでお祭りがあるときはお店が大変なことになるからね、覚悟しておいて？: When there's a festival nearby, the store gets really hectic, so be prepared？
translations.さっき落ち葉で滑って転びそうになっちゃった。恥ずかしかったよー: I almost slipped and fell on some fallen leaves earlier. It was so embarrassing!
translations.秋は季節限定メニューが多くて大変。結構間違える子が多いからフォローしないと: Autumn has a lot of seasonal limited menus, which is tough. Many people make mistakes, so I have to help out.
translations.冬の限定メニューは調理が大変。オーダー重なると辛いけど、気を付けてね: Winter's limited menu is hard to prepare. It gets tough when orders pile up, so be careful.
translations.今日は外の掃除なんだけど、きっと寒いよね……: I'm cleaning outside today, but it's probably going to be cold...
translations.私のバイトの制服姿、すき？: Do you like my part-time job uniform？
translations.恋人同士で一緒のバイト先って、なんだかうれしい、ね▼: It's kind of nice to work at the same place as my partner, right▼
translations.▲主人公＊▲のバイトの制服姿、かっこいいよ▼: ▲主人公＊▲ looks cool in their part-time job uniform▼
translations.今日はシフト組みのミスで、スタッフ入れ過ぎちゃったみたい。店長は悔しがってたけど: Today, it seems there was a mistake in the shift schedule, and too many staff were scheduled. The manager was upset, but it might make work easier.
translations.今日、スタッフが２人も病欠だって。きっと修羅場が起きるよ？: Today, two staff members are sick. It's going to be chaotic, for sure？
translations.今日の店長、すごく落ち込んでるみたい。本部から何か言われたのかな？: The manager seems really down today. I wonder if they were told something from headquarters？
translations.今日は珍しく店長に怒られちゃった。: I got scolded by the manager today, which is rare.
translations.今日はお客様にたくさんほめられちゃった。: I received a lot of compliments from customers today.
translations.明日はどんな一日になるかな。: I wonder what tomorrow will be like.
translations.今テレビにとわの市が出てるよ？: Towano City is on TV right now, you know？
translations.今日も一日お疲れさまです。: Thank you for your hard work today.
translations.ゆっくり休んでね、あ・な・た▼: Take your time to rest, you▼
translations.お布団の中から送信！: Sending this from under the covers!
translations.明日からまたがんばろ。もちろん二人でね？: Let's work hard again starting tomorrow. Of course, together, right？
translations.今日は入浴剤入れちゃおっと♪: I'm going to add bath salts today♪
translations.私はかなり長く入っちゃうんだよね: I tend to stay in for quite a while.
translations.人間、こういう凡ミスってなくならないよね: Humans just can't avoid these silly mistakes, can they？
translations.これって、この仕事のやりがいのひとつだよね: This is one of the rewarding aspects of this job.
translations.風邪はひいて欲しくないけど、もしものときは看病してあげるからね▼: I don't want you to catch a cold, but if you do, I'll take care of you▼
translations.冬になると、気づくと毎日鍋料理作っちゃう。豆乳にキムチにおでんに……色々あるもん: In winter, I find myself making hot pot dishes every day. Soy milk, kimchi, oden... there are so many options.
translations.今日は家事をがんばる日！って決めたの: Today is the day I decided to tackle housework!
translations.今日の晩御飯は自信作！カレシとしても鼻が高くなるできだよ？: Today's dinner is my pride! It's something to be proud of as your girlfriend, you know？
translations.あー、今日の晩御飯は失敗……はあ: Ah, today's dinner was a failure... sigh.
translations.今日は掃除をがんばる日。キレイにしちゃうぞ～: Today is the day I clean. I'm going to make it shine~
translations.今日も▲主人公＊▲がいるから私はハッピー♪: I'm happy today too because ▲Protagonist＊▲ is here♪
translations.▲主人公＊▲、あまり夜更かししないでね？: ▲Protagonist＊▲, don't stay up too late, okay？
translations.宿題終わらなくてこんな時間……ねむいよ～: It's this late and I still haven't finished my homework... I'm so sleepy~
translations.今ね、もうほとんど眠りかけてたのにガバッ！って起きちゃった: I was almost asleep, but I suddenly woke up!
translations.あったかくなったね。でも窓開けて寝たらダメだよ: It's getting warm. But don't sleep with the window open.
translations.[季節]のお布団ってきもちいい～: The bedding for [season] feels so nice~
translations.寝苦しい季節、体調には気を付けてね: It's a stuffy season, so take care of your health.
translations.今日は暑いね……すぐ汗かいちゃう: It's hot today... I'm sweating already.
translations.虫の鳴き声って、なんだか眠くなるかも: The sound of insects makes me feel sleepy.
translations.秋の夜長……夜更かししていいってことじゃないよね: Autumn nights... that doesn't mean I can stay up late.
translations.寒いね。風邪ひかないようにね？: It's cold. Don't catch a cold, okay？
translations.今日はあったかくして、早めに寝よ？私もそうするから: Let's stay warm today and go to bed early, okay？ I'll do the same.
translations.今日も１日▲主人公＊▲のことが大好きでした▼なんてね: I loved you all day today, ▲Protagonist＊▲▼ just kidding.
translations.おやすみのキス。ほんとは直接したいのにな: Goodnight kiss. I really wish I could do it in person.
translations.たくさん働くと気持ちよく眠れるよね？: Working hard makes it easier to sleep, right？
translations.私はもう寝るね。ばいば～い: I'm going to sleep now. Bye-bye.
translations.明日も一緒にがんばろ～: Let's do our best together tomorrow~
translations.寝付けないなあ、最近多いかも: I can't seem to fall asleep, it’s been happening a lot lately.
translations.宿題難しいなあ、そっちの学年はどうなのかな: Homework is tough. I wonder how it is for your grade.
translations.今日はまだしばらく起きてよっかな: I think I'll stay up for a while longer today.
translations.会いたい……会いたいな▼: I miss you... I really miss you▼
translations.特に用事はないんだけど、メールでーす: I don't have anything special to say, but here's an email.
translations.今日は楽しい一日でした。明日もそうなるようがんばる: Today was a fun day. I'll do my best to make tomorrow the same.
translations.珍しく早く寝ようとしたけど……やっぱり目が覚めてダメでした: I tried to go to bed early for a change, but... I ended up waking up.
translations.寝坊しちゃダメだよ？▲主人公＊▲は、私を起こしてくれなきゃ: Don't oversleep, okay？ ▲Protagonist＊▲ has to wake me up.
translations.▲主人公＊▲、まだ起きてる？先に夢の世界で待ってまーす: ▲Protagonist＊▲, are you still awake？ I'll be waiting in the dream world.
translations.暑いね、だからってくっついちゃダメっていうことはないでしょ？: It's hot, but that doesn't mean we can't cuddle, right？
translations.あまり薄着して寝ると風邪ひいちゃうから気を付けてね: Be careful not to sleep in too little clothing, or you might catch a cold.
translations.テレビで映画観てたらこんな時間。そろそろ寝ようかな……: I was watching a movie on TV and now it's this late. Maybe I should go to bed...
translations.夜食食べちゃった……うーん、どうしよう: I had a late-night snack... hmm, what should I do？
translations.毎日寒いね。こんなときはやっぱりあなたに会いたいな: It's cold every day. In times like this, I really want to see you.
translations.夜は嫌いじゃないけど、あなたに会えないのはイヤ: I don't hate the night, but I hate not being able to see you.
translations.授業中にいけないんだ[●]: You can't do that during class[●]
translations.実はちょっと眠かったんだ。: Actually, I was a bit sleepy.
translations.他にも隠れてメールしてる人、いるけどね。: There are others secretly texting too, you know.
translations.休憩時間まで待てないの？ワガママねぇ。: Can't you wait until break？ You're so selfish.
translations.たまにはいいけど、何度もメールしちゃダメだよ？: It's okay sometimes, but don't text too much, okay？
translations.実は▲主人公＊▲へのメールを打ってたの。びっくりしちゃった。: Actually, I was texting ▲主人公＊▲. I was surprised.
translations.先生の言うこと、ちゃんと聞いてる？: Are you really listening to what the teacher says？
translations.今日の授業は試験に出そうね。しっかりチェックしなきゃ！: Today's class seems like it will be on the exam. I need to pay attention!
translations.あったかいからウトウトしてたんじゃない？: It's warm, so maybe you were dozing off？
translations.春の陽気で、ぼーっとしてる人が多いかも。そっちはどう？: With the spring weather, a lot of people might be zoning out. How about you？
translations.早く夏休みになればいいのにね[●]: I wish summer vacation would come soon[●]
translations.あついよぉ～。プールの授業まだかな？: It's so hot~. I wonder when pool class will start？
translations.この季節は集中できるよね。: This season makes it easy to concentrate.
translations.頭をフル回転させると、お腹すかない？: When you think hard, don't you get hungry？
translations.手が冷たいよ。袖の中にいれちゃおっと[●]: My hands are cold. I'll put them in my sleeves[●]
translations.コート着たまま授業受けちゃダメなのかなあ？: Is it not okay to attend class wearing a coat？
translations.授業中のメールはほどほどにね[●]: Keep texting during class to a minimum[●]
translations.あ、先生コッチきた！じゃあね[●]: Oh, the teacher is coming this way! See you[●]
translations.あ、返事遅れた？お風呂に入ってたの。: Oh, did I reply late？ I was in the bath.
translations.もう少し起きてるつもり。: I plan to stay up a bit longer.
translations.お肌の手入れをしないとね[●]: I need to take care of my skin[●]
translations.隠れた部分もしっかり洗わないとね。: I need to wash all the hidden parts properly.
translations.▲主人公＊▲はどんなシャンプー使ってるの？: What kind of shampoo does ▲主人公＊▲ use？
translations.▲主人公＊▲ってリンスやコンディショナーは使うの？: Does ▲主人公＊▲ use conditioner or rinse？
translations.ついつい長湯しちゃったな。: I ended up soaking for a long time.
translations.今日は若葉の香りの入浴剤。季節感あるよね。: Today I used a bath additive with a fresh leaf scent. It feels seasonal.
translations.入浴剤の代わりにお庭で摘んだお花を浮かべてみました[●]: Instead of bath additives, I floated flowers I picked from the garden[●]
translations.あえてものすごく熱いお湯に入ってみたよ。ちょっとしたサウナ気分[●]: I intentionally tried really hot water. It felt a bit like a sauna[●]
translations.水風呂にしてみました。なんか逆に体がぽかぽかするかも。: I tried a cold bath. It actually makes my body feel warm.
translations.今日は半身浴で1時間くらい入ってたんだ。: Today I was in a half bath for about an hour.
translations.▲主人公＊▲って、お風呂で本を読む？: Does ▲主人公＊▲ read books in the bath？
translations.洗い場の水が冷たいよぉ！: The water at the washing area is cold!
translations.今日はバイト休んだ子がいて大忙しだよ。: Today, some part-timers are off, so it's super busy.
translations.仕事中はメール見れないからね。: I can't check emails while working.
translations.あ、▲主人公＊▲、次いつだっけ？: Oh, ▲主人公＊▲, when's the next time？
translations.ふう、じゃあお仕事再開っと[●]: Phew, time to get back to work[●].
translations.そうねえ、今日は疲れてるかも。: Well, I might be a bit tired today.
translations.元気！とは言えないかもね。: I can't say I'm full of energy.
translations.何か気分転換できるような事、ないかなあ？: I wonder if there's something to refresh my mood？
translations.少し休めば元気になると思うから、心配しないでね。: I think I'll feel better after a little break, so don't worry.
translations.人間だもの、そんな日もあるよね。: We're human, so there are days like that.
translations.ちょうど気分転換になったよ。ありがと[●]: That was just the refresh I needed. Thanks[●].
translations.楽しいことを考えなくちゃね。: I need to think of something fun.
translations.そういう▲主人公＊▲は元気かな？: I wonder if that ▲主人公＊▲ is doing well？
translations.元気もりもり！ってちょっとオバさんぽいかな？: Super energetic! Does that sound a bit old-fashioned？
translations.▲主人公＊▲と一緒なら、私はいつだって元気だよ[●]: I'm always energetic when I'm with ▲主人公＊▲[●].
translations.気を使ってくれたの？ありがと[●]: Did you think of me？ Thanks[●].
translations.わざわざこんなメールを出すって事は、もしかして元気ないの？: Sending this email means you might not be feeling well？
translations.▲主人公＊▲のやさしさをみんなにわけてあげたいな[●]: I want to share ▲主人公＊▲'s kindness with everyone[●].
translations.私の元気、▲主人公＊▲にも差し入れしてあげよっか？: Should I send some of my energy to ▲主人公＊▲？
translations.なんだか絶好調！って感じよ。ふふっ[●]: I feel like I'm in great shape! Hehe[●].
translations.早く▲主人公＊▲に会いたいよ[●]: I want to see ▲主人公＊▲ soon[●].
translations.でも、ありがと。うれしいよ。: But thanks. That makes me happy.
translations.嬉しいけど、ちょっと驚いたな。: I'm happy, but a bit surprised.
translations.ふふ、たまにはこんなメールも嬉しいな。: Hehe, I like getting emails like this sometimes.
translations.▲主人公＊▲はちゃんと授業理解してる？今が大事な時だよ？: Is the protagonist understanding the lessons properly？ This is an important time, right？
translations.頭が疲れたら、甘いものが良いんだよ。だからアイスを食べます！: When your head gets tired, sweets are good. So I'm going to eat ice cream!
translations.アイスレモンティーを飲んで、ちょっとリフレッシュ[●]: Drinking iced lemon tea to refresh a bit[●]
translations.さっき晩御飯たべたのに、お腹へってきちゃった。: I just had dinner, but I'm getting hungry.
translations.あったかくしすぎると眠くなるし、寒いと効率落ちるのよね。: If you get too warm, you get sleepy, and if it's cold, your efficiency drops.
translations.▲主人公＊▲も風邪引かないように、あったかいカッコで勉強しようね。: Let's study in warm clothes so the protagonist doesn't catch a cold.
translations.ちょっと難問に悩んでます。参考書の答えみようかなあ……。: I'm struggling with a tough problem. Should I check the reference book answers...？
translations.今度一緒に勉強会しよっか？わからないところは教えてあげるから[●]: How about we have a study session together next time？ I'll help with anything you don't understand[●]
translations.あと一息、がんばるぞー♪: Just a little more, let's do our best♪
translations.あっ消しゴムわすれちゃった！: Oh no, I forgot my eraser!
translations.教室の外が騒がしいな。なんだろう？: It's noisy outside the classroom. I wonder what's going on？
translations.お母さんが食器割っちゃったみたい。ちょっと手伝ってくるね。: It seems my mom broke some dishes. I'll go help her.
translations.あくびしてるとこ、男子にみられちゃった。恥かしい！: I was yawning and a boy saw me. So embarrassing!
translations.やだっもう夕方？早いなぁ。: Oh no, it's already evening？ That was fast.
translations.あ、メールだ。今日はお掃除してたよ[●]: Oh, an email. I was cleaning today[●]
translations.今日は家族みんなのんびりしてます。: Everyone in the family is relaxing today.
translations.爪を切ろうかな。: I think I'll cut my nails.
translations.あれ？今日は何してたんだっけ？: Huh？ What was I doing today？
translations.夜になっちゃった。今日は1日過ぎるの早かったなあ。: It's night already. Today went by really fast.
translations.テレビでネイチャー番組やってたから、ずっと見てた。かわいい動物がたくさんだよ[●: I was watching a nature program on TV. There were so many cute animals[●]
translations.テレビでやってたダイエット体操をやってみてるところ。結構キツいなあ。: I'm trying the diet exercises that were on TV. They're pretty tough.
translations.▲主人公＊▲のコト考えてたよ[●]: I was thinking about the protagonist[●]
translations.料理の新しい味付けについて、いろいろ考えてたの。: I was thinking about new seasonings for cooking.
translations.アルバイトの日だよ。今は休憩タイム。: It's part-time job day. I'm on break now.
translations.今日はバイト。ちょうど休憩時間になったとこだよ。: I'm working today. I just got to my break time.
translations.ふう、ちょっと一息。今日はアルバイトだよ。: Phew, taking a breather. I'm working part-time today.
translations.あ、ちょっと忙しいから、少しだけね。: Oh, I'm a bit busy, just for a little while.
translations.店長は新しいアルバイトの面接中みたい。: The manager seems to be interviewing a new part-timer.
translations.お子様連れのお客様が多くて、お店の中を走り回ってるよ。: There are a lot of customers with kids, and they're running around the store.
translations.新メニューで厨房がちょっと大変みたい。: The new menu seems to be causing a bit of a stir in the kitchen.
translations.今日はイチゴパフェが大人気みたいね。: The strawberry parfait seems to be really popular today.
translations.エアコンの調子が悪いのかな、フロアがちょっと暑いよ。: I wonder if the air conditioning is broken; the floor feels a bit hot.
translations.今日は女子グループがたくさんで、とっても華やかだよ。: There are a lot of girls' groups today, it's very lively.
translations.秋の炊き込みごはんメニューが人気ね。: The autumn mixed rice menu is popular.
translations.お客様に配膳するとき、お腹が鳴ると恥かしいよね、ふふっ。: It's embarrassing when your stomach growls while serving customers, heh.
translations.ちょうど私も、▲主人公＊▲のこと考えてたんだよ。: I was just thinking about you, ▲主人公＊▲.
translations.だから、私からも言うね。スキ[●]: So, I'll say it too. I like you[●]
translations.だから、早く会いたいな。: So, I want to see you soon.
translations.ううん、私のほうがきっと、▲主人公＊▲のこと 大好きだよ[●]: No, I definitely love you more, ▲主人公＊▲[●]
translations.でも、それだけじゃ足りないな。もっと言ってみて[●]: But that's not enough. Say more[●]
translations.永久保存のフォルダにコピーしときました[●]: I've copied it to my permanent folder[●]
translations.言葉にしなくても解ってることだけど、言葉にするともっと嬉しいね[●]: I know it without words, but saying it makes me even happier[●]
translations.そんなこと言うから、すぐに会いたくなっちゃったよ[●]: You said that, so now I really want to see you[●]
translations.……言葉だけじゃない証拠が欲しいな。わかってるでしょ？ふふふっ[●]: ...I want proof that's not just words. You understand, right？ Hehe[●]
translations.▲主人公＊▲のこと、知れば知るほど好きになっていくみたい[●]: The more I know about ▲主人公＊▲, the more I seem to like you[●]
translations.私も会いたい[●]: I want to see you too[●]
translations.今は……ちょっと無理かな？: Right now... it might be a bit difficult？
translations.急に言われると……ちょっと困るな。: If you say it suddenly... it makes me a bit troubled.
translations.今すぐに？いいけど……どこで会おうか？: Right now？ Sure... but where should we meet？
translations.なにか話したい事あるのかな？: Is there something you want to talk about？
translations.そうね、時間が合えばいいけど。: Well, I hope the timing works out.
translations.会えるんだったら、いつでも会いたいもの。: If we can meet, I want to see you anytime.
translations.うふふっ、甘えていいかな？: Hehe, can I be a little spoiled？
translations.学校もアルバイトも一緒なんだもん、会おうと思えばすぐに会えるよね。: Since we have school and part-time jobs together, we can meet anytime if we want.
translations.そんな事言うから、私もその気になってきちゃった。いつ会えるかなあ？: You said that, so now I'm feeling the same way. When can we meet？
translations.善は急げっていうよね。すぐに会いたいな[●]: They say haste makes waste. I want to see you soon[●]
translations.メールって凄いよね。いつでもお互いの気持ちを確かめあえるんだもん。でも、やっぱり: Email is amazing. We can check each other's feelings anytime. But still, I want to talk in person.
translations.ちょうど▲主人公＊▲の事考えてたんだもん[●]: I was just thinking about ▲主人公＊▲[●]
translations.▲主人公＊▲も私のことで、胸がいっぱいなんだね、私も同じだよ[●]: ▲主人公＊▲ is also full of thoughts about me, right？ I'm the same[●]
translations.今すぐ会いたいの[●]: I want to see you right now[●]
translations.じゃあしばらく会えないのかな？: So, does that mean we can't meet for a while？
translations.睡眠と食事はしっかりとろうね。: Make sure to get enough sleep and eat well.
translations.忙しいんじゃ会えなくてもしょうがないか。: If you're busy, I guess we can't meet.
translations.何に忙しいんだろう？きいちゃダメ？: I wonder what you're busy with？ Is it okay to ask？
translations.１つ１つ丁寧に対処すれば、きっと大丈夫だよ。: If you handle things one by one, you'll be fine.
translations.忙しいってことは、私とのデートは後回し？: Being busy means our date is on hold？
translations.忙しいのは良いことだと思うよ。がんばって！: I think being busy is a good thing. Keep it up!
translations.私も何かをがんばっちゃおうかな。: Maybe I'll try hard at something too.
translations.えらいぞー！さすがネネちゃんのカレシだね[●]: You're doing great! As expected of Nene's boyfriend [●]
translations.ケガだけには気をつけてね。: Just be careful not to get hurt.
translations.でも、あんまり会えなくなるのかなあ？寂しいよ。: But, will we not be able to meet much？ I feel lonely.
translations.なにか私に手伝えることあるかなあ？何でも言ってね。: Is there anything I can help you with？ Just let me know.
translations.忙しくなくなったら、たくさんデートしようね。私それまで我慢する！: When you’re not busy anymore, let’s go on lots of dates. I’ll wait until then!
translations.……でも、やっぱり会えなくなるのはさみしいから、時々でいいからデートしようね[●: ...But still, it’s lonely not being able to meet, so let’s date sometimes, okay？ [●]
translations.そんなときはね……寝ちゃお！ふふっ: In that case... let’s sleep! Hehe.
translations.宿題はもうやったの？: Have you done your homework yet？
translations.お掃除なんかどうかな？めんどくさい？: How about cleaning？ Is it a hassle？
translations.そんな時はスポーツなんてどうかしら？: How about doing some sports during such times？
translations.たまにはダラダラするのも良いと思うよ。: I think it's good to relax sometimes.
translations.本棚の整理なんてどうかな？いい時間つぶしになるよ。: How about organizing your bookshelf？ It’s a good way to pass the time.
translations.▲主人公＊▲もたまにはお料理作ってみるなんて、どうかな？: ▲主人公＊▲ should try cooking sometimes, what do you think？
translations.でも、そんな時だからこそ、自分のことを見つめなおせるかも……って、偉そうなこと言: But maybe it’s during times like these that you can reflect on yourself... I sound so wise saying that♪
translations.そうねえ、一人で出来る遊び……何があるかなあ？: Hmm, what are some games you can play alone？
translations.だったら私にたくさんメールしてね[●]: Then send me lots of emails, okay？ [●]
translations.お互いに時間あるんだから、デートしたいな～[●]: Since we both have time, I want to go on a date~ [●]
translations.ヒマな時は▲主人公＊▲の事考えてるよ。あなたは？: When I’m free, I think about ▲主人公＊▲. How about you？
translations.▲主人公＊▲のメールでちょっとヒマじゃなくなったかも。ふふっ[●]: ▲主人公＊▲'s emails might have made me a little less bored. Hehe [●]
translations.こんなことまで相性がいいんだね、私たち[●]: We really have good chemistry, even in things like this [●]
translations.私のどこが好きか、１０個言ってみて[●]: Tell me 10 things you like about me [●]
translations.10秒間で何回「スキ」って言えるか試してみて。なんちゃって[●]: Try saying "I like you" as many times as you can in 10 seconds. Just kidding [●]
translations.今からテレパシーを送るから、なんて言ったか当ててみて[●]: I’m going to send you a telepathy now, try to guess what I said [●]
translations.私にも分けて欲しいな。: I want you to share it with me too.
translations.ちょっと童心に返って、浴槽に潜ってみたの。子供っぽいかな？: I just went back to my childhood and dove into the bathtub. Is that childish？
translations.ふう、マッサージして欲しいな。なんちゃって[●]: Phew, I wish I could get a massage. Just kidding[●]
translations.食事中のメールはマナー違反だからね。食べ終わってからメールしたの。: It's bad manners to check emails while eating. I emailed after I finished.
translations.食べてる途中にメールを見ると、集中できなくて消化に悪そうだよね。: Looking at emails while eating makes it hard to concentrate and probably bad for digestion.
translations.▲主人公＊▲はどうしてるの？もうご飯食べた？: How's ▲主人公＊▲ doing？ Have you eaten yet？
translations.いつか▲主人公＊▲を我が家のディナーに招待したいな[●]: I want to invite ▲主人公＊▲ to dinner at my house someday[●]
translations.春にしか食べられないお野菜がたくさんあるんだよ。: There are a lot of vegetables that can only be eaten in spring.
translations.サラダに春野菜をたくさん使ってみました♪: I used a lot of spring vegetables in the salad♪
translations.夏は食欲無くなるって言うけど、私は食べちゃうんだよね。ダイエットしなきゃ！: They say you lose your appetite in summer, but I still eat. I need to diet!
translations.夏といえばそうめんよね。そういえば、流しそうめんてやったことある？: Speaking of summer, it's somen, right？ By the way, have you ever done nagashi somen？
translations.秋はなんでも美味しくて、つい食べ過ぎちゃうよね。ガマンガマン！: Everything is delicious in autumn, and I end up overeating. Gotta hold back!
translations.鍋の美味しい季節だよね♪: It's the season for delicious hot pot♪
translations.今日はクラスのみんなでお弁当の交換会。私のお弁当、評判よかったよ: Today, everyone in class is exchanging bento. My bento was well-received.
translations.今日はお弁当じゃないから、学食でおそば食べたよ。: Since it's not a bento today, I had soba at the school cafeteria.
translations.そういえば、▲主人公＊▲って料理作れるの？: By the way, can ▲主人公＊▲ cook？
translations.デザートは何にしよっかな～♪: What should I have for dessert~♪
translations.午後もがんばろっと: I'll do my best this afternoon.
translations.ごちそうさま[●]洗い物しなきゃ！: Thank you for the meal[●] I need to do the dishes!
translations.勉強中です。1人だと寂しいな[●]: I'm studying. It's lonely doing it alone[●]
translations.ふう、一息つこうかな。: Phew, maybe I should take a break.
translations.▲主人公＊▲はもう宿題終わったの？: Has ▲主人公＊▲ finished your homework yet？
translations.ちょうど休憩しようかと思ってたの、良いタイミングのメールだったわ[●]: I was just thinking of taking a break, so your email came at a good time[●]
translations.宿題以外にもちゃんと勉強しないとね。私3年生だし。: I need to study properly, not just homework. I'm in 3rd year.
translations.お休みでも、勉強は大切だよ。: Even on breaks, studying is important.
translations.宿題は出てないんだけど、ちょっとわかりにくかった授業の復習をしてるの。: I don't have homework, but I'm reviewing a class that was a bit hard to understand.
translations.苦手な教科はある？おねえさんが個人授業してあげよっか[●]: Do you have any subjects you're not good at？ I can give you private lessons[●]
translations.▲主人公＊▲は勉強してる？遊んでばっかじゃダメだよ？: Are you studying, ▲主人公＊▲？ You can't just play all the time, you know？
translations.ちょっと疲れたから、お散歩してこようかな。: I'm a bit tired, so I think I'll go for a walk.
translations.何があったんだろ、今度聞かせてね。: I wonder what happened, tell me next time.
translations.なんか嫉妬しちゃうな。あ……こういう時って嫉妬で合ってるのかな？: I feel a bit jealous. Um... is it jealousy in times like this？
translations.私はちょっと気になることあって、スッキリしないんだよね。: I have something on my mind, and it's bothering me.
translations.私にその元気を注入して欲しいな。: I want you to inject that energy into me.
translations.なになに？何か美味しいもの食べたの？: What is it？ Did you eat something delicious？
translations.私はもう、今日は寝ちゃおうかな……。: I think I might just go to bed today...
translations.なんだろ？教えてよ、テストで良い点とったとか？: What is it？ Tell me, did you get a good score on a test？
translations.私だって……えーと……今日はそうでもなかったかな？: Well, I... um... maybe today wasn't that great？
translations.▲主人公＊▲が楽しそうだから、私もだんだん元気になってきたよ。: ▲Protagonist＊▲ looks like they're having fun, so I'm starting to feel better too.
translations.焼肉かな～？お寿司かな～？: Is it grilled meat？ Or sushi？
translations.私もいいことあったんだ。アルバイトで店長に褒められたの♪: I had something good happen too. I got praised by my boss at my part-time job♪
translations.私まで楽しくなってきちゃったよ。: I'm starting to feel happy too.
translations.あら、自慢？私だって気分いいことあったもん！: Oh, are you bragging？ I had something good happen too!
translations.ふふ、子供っぽい[●]でもそんな所も好き[●]: Hehe, childish [●] but I like that about you [●].
translations.うふふ、だって▲主人公＊▲からメール来たもん[●]: Hehe, because I got a message from ▲Protagonist＊▲ [●].
translations.今度のデートでそのお話しようね[●]: Let's talk about that on our next date [●].
translations.私もちょうど今そんな気分なの。奇遇ね[●]: I'm feeling that way too right now. What a coincidence [●].
translations.▲主人公＊▲がそういう事いうと、私までちょっとブルーになるな。: When ▲Protagonist＊▲ says things like that, I start to feel a bit blue too.
translations.そんな時は気分転換！河: In times like that, it's time for a change of pace!
translations.あなたが落ち込んでると、私までそんな気分になってきちゃうよ。: When you're feeling down, I start to feel that way too.
translations.……って言われると、逆に元気でなくなるって聞いたことあるな。頑張らないで！: ...I've heard that when you say that, it can make you feel less energetic. Don't push yourself!
translations.Heaven helps those who help themselves.だ: Heaven helps those who help themselves!
translations.元気があれば何でも出来る！ってテレビで誰かが言ってたよ。: Someone on TV said that if you have energy, you can do anything!
translations.何か栄養のあるもの食べれば元気でるよ。私が作ってあげようか？: If you eat something nutritious, you'll feel better. Should I make something for you？
translations.キスしたら元気になるよね[●]: A kiss will make you feel better [●].
translations.今近くにいれば、すぐ会いに行くのに。: If I were nearby, I'd come see you right away.
translations.私がいつでも一緒にいられるように、ぬいぐるみネネちゃんを作ろうかな[●]: I think I'll make a stuffed Nene-chan so I can always be with you [●].
translations.今からテレパシーで送るね。▼▼▼▼▼▼▼▼▼▼▼▼▼▼▼▼届いた？: I'll send it via telepathy now. ▼▼▼▼▼▼▼▼▼▼▼▼▼▼▼▼ Did it arrive？
translations.屋敷のドラキュラ伝説: The Dracula legend of the mansion.
translations.十羽野市のイーアルカンフーマスター: Jubano City's E. R. Kung Fu master.
translations.目指せ学年一位！: Aim for the top of the grade!
translations.学年100位内に入りたい: Want to be in the top 100 of the grade.
translations.写真コンテストで入賞: Win a prize in the photo contest.
translations.夜桜ライトアップイベントチケット: Night cherry blossom illumination event ticket.
translations.ボーリング１ゲームペア無料券: Free pair ticket for one game of bowling.
translations.カップルデーチラシ（リンコ：格ゲー大会チラシ）: Couple day flyer (Rinko: fighting game tournament flyer).
translations.室内プールカップル入場無料: Free couple entry to indoor pool.
translations.ナイトアクアリウムペア入場無料券: Free pair entry ticket for night aquarium.
translations.ストリートミュージシャン(女）の曲作りの手伝い: Help a female street musician create songs.
translations.携帯の使い方、教えます: I'll teach you how to use your phone
translations.道具手入れは選手の務め: Taking care of tools is a player's duty
translations.練習メニューを考えよう: Let's think of a practice menu
translations.早起きは３リッチの得: Waking up early is worth 3 rich
translations.夜の公園ですること？: What to do in the park at night？
translations.どんな曲を聴いてる？: What songs are you listening to？
translations.校舎裏の美人さん: Beautiful person behind the school building
translations.校舎裏の花壇: Flower bed behind the school building
translations.消えた消しゴムはタヌキ: The missing eraser is a raccoon
translations.学校で彼女とキスができればいいことがあるかも？: Kissing my girlfriend at school might bring good things？
translations.地元の公園で彼女とキスができればいいことがあるかも？: Kissing my girlfriend at the local park might bring good things？
translations.教会で彼女とキスができればいいことがあるかも？: Kissing my girlfriend at church might bring good things？
translations.・ムードのある場所で彼女とキスができればハッピー。: ・Happy to kiss my girlfriend in a romantic place.
translations.・彼女とたくさん触れ合うのが幸せの秘訣！？: ・The secret to happiness is to be close with my girlfriend!？
translations.・彼女とたくさんメールできればハッピー。: ・Happy to exchange lots of messages with my girlfriend.
translations.・彼女にたくさん会いに行けばいいことあるかも。: ・Visiting my girlfriend often might bring good things.
translations.体を動かして健康的な1週間にしよう: Let's move our bodies for a healthy week
translations.・行動に余裕を持って過ごすとハッピー。: ・Being relaxed in my actions brings happiness.
translations.・全力で行動していくとハッピー。: ・Going all out in my actions brings happiness.
translations.深夜のテレビで新しい発見があるかも？: There might be new discoveries on late-night TV？
translations.・たくさん勉強して、ちょっとインテリな自分をアピール。: ・Study hard to show off my intellectual side.
translations.・感性を磨いて彼女にアピール。: ・Refine my sensibility to impress my girlfriend.
translations.・部活三昧で青春まっしぐら。: ・Dive into club activities for a vibrant youth.
translations.・委員会活動で学校での評判アップ。: ・Boost my reputation at school through committee activities.
translations.平日デートでカノジョの気分も急上昇: Weekday dates will lift my girlfriend's spirits.
translations.特別なデートでカノジョのハートをわしづかみ: A special date will capture my girlfriend's heart.
translations.一人でお出かけすれば何か発見があるかも？: Going out alone might lead to discoveries？
translations.1日1回のキスでカノジョもめろめろ: A kiss once a day will make my girlfriend swoon.
translations.1日1回のふれあいでカノジョもご機嫌: Daily affection will keep my girlfriend in a good mood.
translations.カノジョの手料理を食べて最高の1週間に: Eating my girlfriend's home-cooked meal will make for a great week.
translations.カノジョといっしょに食事をすれば今週も安泰: Dining with my girlfriend will ensure a stable week.
translations.彼女にプレゼントして日ごろの感謝をしめそう: Giving my girlfriend a gift to show my daily appreciation.
translations.若いんだから、困難には全力で立ち向かわないとね！: You're young, so you have to face challenges head-on!
translations.くじけそうになったら、私が励ましてあげるから、もっとガンバろ[●]: If you feel like giving up, I'll cheer you on, so keep going! [●]
translations.私もちょっとイヤな事あったけど、そんな事言ってる場合じゃないよね！: I had a bit of a rough time too, but now's not the time to say that!
translations.疲れたら私が癒してあげるから、ガンバって！: If you're tired, I'll heal you, so hang in there!
translations.しっかり休んで元気になったらデートしようね。: Rest well and let's go on a date when you're better.
translations.何に疲れたの？まさか私のせいじゃないよね？: What are you tired from？ It can't be my fault, right？
translations.はいはい、いい子いい子、なでなで。: Okay, okay, good boy, good boy, pat pat.
translations.無理してるのかな？ほどほどにね。: Are you pushing yourself too hard？ Take it easy.
translations.高い栄養ドリンクを飲んじゃおう！たまにはいいかもね。: Let's drink an expensive energy drink! It might be nice once in a while.
translations.疲れたときはしっかり寝ることだよ。子守唄を歌ってあげようか？: When you're tired, make sure to get plenty of sleep. Want me to sing you a lullaby？
translations.お姉さんが悩みを聴いてあげましょうか？: Shall I listen to your worries, big sister？
translations.そんなに疲れるような事ってなんだろ？今度聞かせてね。: What could be so tiring？ Tell me next time.
translations.疲れてるだけなら大丈夫。すぐ回復するよ。: If you're just tired, that's okay. You'll recover quickly.
translations.でも大丈夫、メールしてくる元気があるんだもん。すぐ元気になるって！: But it's okay, you have enough energy to email me. You'll be fine soon!
translations.たまには疲れるようなことしないと、強くなれないんだよ。だから平気！: Sometimes you need to do tiring things to get stronger. So it's all good!
translations.疲れはガンバった証拠だよ[●]: Tiredness is proof that you did your best! [●]
translations.デートまでには元気出そう？: Will you feel better by the time of our date？
translations.疲れなんてすぐに回復しちゃうよ。男の子だもん！: You'll recover from tiredness quickly. You're a boy!
translations.疲れてるのにメールありがと[●]元気になったらデートしようね[●]: Thanks for the email even though you're tired! [●] Let's go on a date when you feel better! [●]
translations.今度スタミナがつく料理を食べさせてあげるね[●]: Next time, I'll treat you to a stamina-boosting meal! [●]
translations.癒しの歌を歌ってあげるよ。象だって一発で熟睡しちゃうんだから！: I'll sing a healing song for you. Even elephants fall asleep instantly!
translations.じゃあ今度マッサージしてあげる。お父さんがね、私のマッサージ上手いって♪: Then I'll give you a massage next time. My dad says I'm good at it! ♪
translations.回復魔法をかけてあげるね。ぽんぽっこぽっこりん！ぽんぽっこり～～ん♪: I'll cast a recovery spell on you. Ponpokopon! Ponpokoriiin! ♪
translations.極上のドーナツを求めて: In search of the finest donuts
translations.気になるクレープは何処: Where to find the crepe I'm curious about？
translations.甘栗探しは甘くない？: Isn't searching for sweet chestnuts not so sweet？
translations.やっぱり冬は焼き芋: Winter is definitely for baked sweet potatoes.
translations.カノジョの欲しい本探し: Searching for the books my girlfriend wants.
translations.人探し。ストリートミュージシャン（女）を見つける: Searching for people. Looking for a street musician (female).

translations.自発的にデキシーズの◙美化に取り組む寧々さん。◙先輩だけに仕事させるわけ◙にはい:
Nene is voluntarily
working on beautifying
the Dexies. Can't just
let the seniors do all
the work.
translations.寧々さんが先生から仕事を◙頼まれて困ってる？ ◙やっぱり先生からも頼られ◙てるん:
Is Nene troubled because
the teacher asked her
for help？ Seems like
she's relied on by the
teacher too.
translations.寧々さんからの個別特訓。◙甘やかさないって宣言され◙たけど……これも一人前に◙な:
Individual training from
Nene. She declared she
won't pamper me... but
is this a trial to
become independent？
translations.なんとなくぼやいただけ◙なのに、寧々さんが◙モーニングメール送って◙くれるなんて:
I just casually
complained, yet Nene
sends me a morning
email. I need to reply
properly.
translations.店のメニューを覚えるのは◙大変……。でも寧々さんが◙付き合ってくれるなら？:
Memorizing the store
menu is tough... But if
Nene is willing to help？
translations.寧々さんが預かる犬の◙散歩に付き合うことに。◙……犬に感謝した方が◙いいかも？:
I decided to join Nene
in walking the dog
she's taking care of.
Maybe I should be
thankful to the dog？
translations.バイトのスタッフが◙少ない……。遅れたら◙店にも寧々さんにも迷惑が◙かかる。絶対:
There are few staff at
the part-time job... If
I'm late, it will
trouble both the store
and Nene. I absolutely
won't be late!
translations.毎日真面目に宿題……◙そう上手くはいかないけど◙寧々さんに見られてると◙思うと？:
Doing homework seriously
every day... It doesn't
go that smoothly, but
thinking Nene is
watching？
translations.また店長に新メニューの◙アイディア出しを頼まれた◙寧々さん。これも、もしかし◙て:
Nene was asked by the
manager for new menu
ideas again. Could
this be a date？
translations.やっぱり仕事を頼まれてた◙寧々さん。新メニューの試◙作ってバイトの仕事か？◙力に:
Nene was indeed asked to
work. Is testing new
menu items part of her
part-time job？ I'll help
her.
translations.毎日寧々さんにおやすみ◙メールを送ることに。◙これじゃあまるで……。:
I've decided to send
Nene a goodnight email
every day. This feels
like...？

translations.バイトの穴埋め: Filling in for a part-time job
translations.犬の散歩で夕方デート？: Evening date while walking the dog？
translations.街のどこかに美味しい◙ドーナツ屋のワゴンが◙あるらしいけど……。:
Heard there's a
delicious donut
stand somewhere in
town...
translations.街のどこかに美味しい◙クレープ屋のワゴンが◙あるらしいけど……。:
Heard there's a
delicious crepe
stand somewhere in
town...
translations.街のどこかに美味しい◙ジェラート屋のワゴンが◙あるらしいけど……。:

delicious gelato stand
somewhere in town...
translations.カノジョが気になってる◙甘栗屋を探そう。街の◙どこかにあるらしいけど◙栗は秋の味:

chestnut shop she's
interested in. It's
said to be somewhere
in town, but chestnuts
are an autumn treat.
Before the season
changes...
translations.カノジョが気になってる◙焼き芋屋を探そう。街の◙どこかにあるらしいけど◙焼き芋は:
Let's find the baked
sweet potato shop
she's interested in.
It's said to be
somewhere in town, but
baked sweet potatoes
are a winter treat.
Before winter ends...
translations.とわのにＵＦＯなんてすぐ◙には信じられない。街の◙どこかで写真が撮れない◙だろう:
I can't believe there's
a UFO in Towano right
away. I wonder if I can
take a picture somewhere
in town...
translations.十羽野湖にトワッシーが◙出る噂は本当なのか？◙タイミングがあえば写真を◙撮れるか:
Is the rumor true that
Towassy appears at Lake
Jubano？ If the timing is
right, I might be able
to take a picture.
translations.十羽野城址に夜な夜な◙出るという月風魔の亡霊。◙真相を何とかして知りたい。◙街に:
The ghost of the moon wind
demon that supposedly
appears nightly at the
ruins of Jubano Castle. I
want to know the truth
somehow. Is there anyone
in town who knows？
translations.古びた洋館に棲んでいる◙というドラキュラ伯爵の噂。◙本当だとは思えないが、◙誰か:
Rumor has it that a
Count Dracula lives in
an old mansion. I can't
believe it's true, but
is there anyone who knows？
translations.天羽山のどこかに幻の◙ビッグフットが現れるとか◙なんとか。街のどこかに◙事情を知:
They say a phantom
Bigfoot appears
somewhere on Amabayama.
Is there anyone in town
who knows the details？
translations.渓谷に出るという幽霊。◙十羽野七不思議の一つ◙らしいけど、誰か真相を◙知ってる人:
A ghost said to appear
in the valley. It's
one of the seven
wonders of Jubano, but
does anyone know the
truth？
translations.カノジョの落し物を探しに◙遊園地に行かなくては。◙噂のうさぎの着ぐるみ◙お化けは:
I have to go to the
amusement park to find
her lost item. Will the
rumored rabbit mascot
ghost appear？
translations.次のテストでは何としても◙学年一位を目指すぞ！◙きっとカノジョももっと◙惚れ直す:
I will aim for the top
of my grade in the next
test no matter what! She
will surely fall for me
even more？!
translations.次のテストではさすがに◙一番は無理でも、なんとか◙学年上位を狙いたい！◙頑張るぞ:
I might not be able to
be first in the next
test, but I want to aim
for the top of my grade!
I'll do my best!
translations.次のテストでは◙学年100位内くらいは◙目指そう。100位内だって◙大したもんだ:
In the next test, I want
to aim for within the top
100 of my grade. Being in
the top 100 is still
impressive.
translations.一年で一番大事な◙カノジョの誕生日。◙気持ちこもってるのは◙当然。喜んでもらえる:
The most important day
of the year is her
birthday. It's natural
to put my feelings into
it. I have to give her a
gift that will make her
happy.
translations.七夕の願いの短冊。◙カノジョと約束したし◙用意しておかなきゃな。:
Tanabata wish strip. I
promised her, so I
have to prepare it.
translations.折角の花火なんだから、◙なんとかカノジョといい◙場所で花火を見たい。◙どこから観:

fireworks display, I
want to see it with
her from a good spot.
Where would be the
best place to watch？
translations.体育祭でカノジョに良い◙ところを見せたい！◙練習しておくか……。:
I want to show her a
good side at the
sports festival!
Should I practice...？
translations.クリスマスは一大イベント！◙カノジョに喜んでもらえる◙ようなプレゼントを前日まで:
Christmas is a major
event! I need to prepare a
gift that will make her
happy by the day before.
translations.バレンタインデーの◙おかえし忘れないように◙しなきゃ。ホワイトデーの◙前日までに:
I must not forget to
return the favor for
Valentine's Day. I
should prepare it
properly by the day
before White Day.
translations.学校の体力測定。◙少し面倒くさいけど◙どうするかな。:
School physical
fitness test. It's
a bit of a hassle,
but what should I
do？
translations.テニス部で練習試合。◙個人練習しないと◙負けそう。:
Practice match in
the tennis club. I
might lose if I
don't practice
individually.
translations.学校の小テスト。◙小テストとはいっても◙さすがに勉強しないと◙まずいかな。:
School quiz. Even
though it's just a
quiz, I guess I need
to study or it will
be bad.
translations.学校の実力テスト。◙ちゃんと勉強しないと◙ボロボロだろうな。:
School proficiency
test. If I don't
study properly, I'll
probably do poorly.

translations.音楽の授業で発表。◙準備しないとなにもできず◙に終わるかも。:
Presentation in music
class. If I don't
prepare, it might end
without doing anything.
translations.図書委員会恒例の図書室◙だより。せっかくだからいい◙ものにしたいな。:
Library committee's
regular newsletter. I want
to make it a good one.
translations.美術の授業で作品の提出。◙ちゃんと準備すれば◙いいものが作れるかも。:
Submitting artwork in
art class. If I prepare
properly, I might create
something good.
translations.バイト先のフェアに向けて◙準備。手を抜くとお客さんも◙来ないかも。:
Preparing for the fair at
my part-time job. If I cut
corners, customers might
not come.
translations.音楽の授業で発表。◙準備しないとなにも◙できずに終わるかも。:
Presentation in
music class. If I
don't prepare, I
might end up doing
nothing.
translations.高嶺が、拾った財布の落と◙し主を探してるみたいだ。◙落とし主を探してあげよう。:
Takane seems to be looking
for the owner of a wallet
she found. Let's help her
find the owner.
translations.超重量級の掃除用具入れ◙を一人で運ぼうとしている◙高嶺。手伝ってあげないと。:
Takane is trying to carry
a super heavy cleaning
supply cabinet by herself.
I should help her.
translations.部活動の改善という堅い◙目的のアンケート。高嶺の◙ために協力してあげよう。:
A serious survey about
improving club
activities. Let's
cooperate for Takane.
translations.高嶺がメールの写真添付◙について、悩んでいるみた◙いだ。教えてあげよう。:
Takane seems to be
struggling with
attaching photos to
emails. I should help
her.
translations.テニス部の備品の手入れ◙をする高嶺。一人でさせる◙のはかわいそうだ。:
Takane is taking care of
the tennis club
equipment. It's unfair
to make her do it alone.
translations.高嶺が回収していた◙プリントを校内に落としてし◙まった。一緒に探そう。:
Takane dropped the prints
she was collecting around
school. Let's search for
them together.
translations.新品のシューズを足になじ◙ませるために、ラリーの相◙手を探す高嶺。◙ここは一肌脱:
Takane is looking for a
partner to break in her
new shoes for rallying.
Maybe I should step in.
translations.最近、部活の他にクラスの◙仕事で高嶺の帰りが遅い。◙夜道は危険だから◙一緒に帰ろ:
Recently, Takane has
been coming home late
due to class work
besides club activities.
It's dangerous at night,
so let's go home
together.
translations.後輩の練習メニューを考え◙ている高嶺。でもちょっと◙悩んでるみたいだ。◙手伝って:
Takane is thinking about
practice menus for the
juniors. She seems a bit
troubled, so I should
help her.
translations.パパへのプレゼント選びに◙悩む高嶺に、男代表として◙アドバイスをしてあげよう。:
Takane is struggling to
choose a gift for her dad.
As a representative of
guys, I should give her
advice.
translations.誰かが高嶺のラケットを◙間違って持っていって◙しまった。犯人は男子部員◙みたいだ:
Someone mistakenly took
Takane's racket. The
culprit seems to be a
male club member.
translations.教室の鉢植えの世話をする◙高嶺。早朝の水やりに付き◙合ってあげよう。:
Takane is taking care of
the potted plants in the
classroom. I should
accompany her for the
early morning watering.
translations.フォーム改善のため◙居残り練習をしている高嶺。◙付き合ってあげよう。:
Takane is staying late for
practice to improve her
form. I should keep her
company.
translations.夜の公園で練習をしたい◙という高嶺。練習相手兼◙用心棒になってあげよう。:
Takane wants to practice
in the park at night. I
should be her practice
partner and bodyguard.
translations.高嶺が友達へのプレゼント◙で手作りお菓子を作る◙らしい。味見してあげよう。:
Takane is making homemade
sweets as a gift for her
friend. I should taste
them.
translations.テニス部で練習試合。◙個人練習しないと負けそう。:
Practice match in the
tennis club. I might lose
if I don't practice
individually.
translations.職員室に行きたくないから◙代わりにノートを持って◙いって欲しいと頼む（？）◙小早:
Kobayakawa asks me to
take her notebook to the
staff room because she
doesn't want to go.
Should I do it？
translations.めんどくさいという理由で◙図書委員を代わって欲しい◙と頼む（？）小早川。◙引き受:
Kobayakawa asks me to
substitute for the
library committee
because it's a hassle.
Should I take it on？
translations.未返却図書のリスト作: Create a list of unreturned books.
translations.小早川が聴いている◙音楽はどんな曲なんだろう。◙聴かせてくれるみたい◙だけど。:
I wonder what kind of
music Kobayakawa is

translations.今日、高校で文化祭なのね。: Today is the cultural festival at school.
translations.文化祭か、遊びに行こうかな。: Cultural festival, should I go have fun？
translations.テニス部は焼きそば模擬店だって！: The tennis club has a yakisoba stall!
translations.名作童話の紙芝居どんなかな？: I wonder how the classic fairy tale paper play will be？
translations.喫茶店のメニュー楽しみだなあ。: I'm looking forward to the café menu.
translations.プレゼント、何が貰えるのなあ。: I wonder what kind of present I'll get.
translations.プレゼントどうすっかなあ。: What should I do about the present？
translations.今年もカレと一緒に……ねっ。: This year too, with my boyfriend... right？
translations.カップル多いな……。: There are a lot of couples...
translations.今年もひとりだと思ってたけど…。: I thought I'd be alone again this year...
translations.ばあさんや、来年もよろしくなあ。: Granny, let's have another good year next year.
translations.なあ、今年も冬のアレ行ったか？: Hey, did you go to that winter event this year？
translations.年越しそば、どこで食べようかな。: Where should I eat soba for New Year's？
translations.カウントダウン行こうかな。: Should I go to the countdown？
translations.よし！カウント０で海に飛び込むぞ: Alright! I'll jump into the sea at count 0.
translations.じゃあ、年明けの瞬間ジャンプな！: Then, let's jump at the moment the new year starts!
translations.ねえねえ、このまま初日の出？: Hey, hey, should we wait for the first sunrise like this？
translations.初日の出まで起きてよう。: Let's stay up until the first sunrise.
translations.今年もよろしくお願いします。: Looking forward to this year too.
translations.今年こそ、がんばろう。: This year, let's do our best.
translations.お年玉で何買おうかな！: What should I buy with my New Year's money？
translations.初詣に行こっか！: Shall we go for the first shrine visit？
translations.今年はチョコ作っちゃおうかな？: Should I make chocolate this year？
translations.はあ、渡せるかなあ。: Huh, I wonder if I can give it.
translations.この仕事が終わったら渡すんだ。: I'll give it after this job is done.
translations.キャー！先輩にあげちゃった！: Eek! I gave it to my senpai!
translations.おかしいな、どこにもチョコがない: That's strange, there's no chocolate anywhere.
translations.チョコのお返しは１０倍返しだ！: The return for chocolate is tenfold!
translations.やばい！チョコのお返し、どうしよ: Oh no! What should I do about the chocolate return？
translations.カレがお返し用意してない……。: He hasn't prepared a return gift...
translations.アメと一緒に指輪だなんて、もう！: A ring with candy, come on!
translations.俺には関係ねえな……。: That has nothing to do with me...
translations.あー、モテちゃうな。今日も。: Ah, I'm getting popular. Again today.
translations.やだ、もう。水着恥ずかしいなあ。: No way, this is embarrassing in a swimsuit.
translations.プールサイドに女神降臨っ！: A goddess descends at the poolside!
translations.今年ももうすぐお祭りだなあ。: The festival is coming soon this year.
translations.りんごアメ！りんごアメ食べたい！: Candy apple! I want to eat a candy apple!
translations.今日でお祭りも終わりだ。: Today is the last day of the festival.
translations.はあ、今年もカレシ出来なかったな: Sigh, I couldn't get a boyfriend this year either.
translations.うぉー！花火何発打ってるんだ！？: Whoa! How many fireworks are being launched!？

translations.今、水族館でマンボウ見れたっけ。: I can see a sunfish at the aquarium now.
translations.はなびら満開だ！: The petals are in full bloom!
translations.別れがあれば、出会いもね。: With parting, there are also meetings.
translations.夜桜は、また雰囲気が変わるねえ。: The cherry blossoms at night have a different atmosphere.
translations.どうしよう。携帯落としちゃった。: What should I do？ I dropped my phone.
translations.ふふふ、みんな私を見てる。: Hehe, everyone is looking at me.
translations.カレシと相合傘しちゃったり。: Sharing an umbrella with my boyfriend.
translations.早くプロポーズしてくれないかな。: I wish you would propose soon.
translations.夏に向けて、ダイエットするぞ！: I'm going to diet for summer!
translations.ついつい、開放的になっちゃうな。: I can't help but feel so free.
translations.やりたいことが、多すぎる！: There are too many things I want to do!
translations.海いきてぇー！: I want to go to the beach!
translations.はあ…、宿題しないと。: Ah... I need to do my homework.
translations.ふふん、スポーツの秋ってか。: Hehe, it's the autumn of sports.
translations.ママー！焼き芋食べたーい！: Mom! I want to eat baked sweet potatoes!
translations.食べすぎ、気をつけなきゃ。: I have to be careful not to overeat.
translations.やば…、食べ過ぎた…。: Oh no... I ate too much...
translations.あーん、今日デートなのにぃ～。: Ah, but I have a date today!
translations.雪だ！積もるかなぁ～？: It's snowing! I wonder if it will accumulate？
translations.おぉ～い、雪だよ寒いなぁー。: Hey, it's snowing, it's so cold!
translations.明日なんだっけ？国語？: What do we have tomorrow？ Japanese class？
translations.連休だし、スキー行かねぇ？: It's a long weekend, want to go skiing？
translations.高校生デビューしちゃおっかな。: Should I make my high school debut？
translations.暑い～。プールでも行くかあ。: It's hot. Should I go to the pool？
translations.何かさっぱりしたもの食べたいな。: I want to eat something refreshing.
translations.こんなに近くで見れちゃうんだ。: I can see it up close like this.
translations.わー、海だー。…違うか。: Wow, it's the sea... or not.
translations.パパー、いちごパフェ食べたーい。: Daddy, I want a strawberry parfait!
translations.ラーメン１つ！…あれ、無いんだ？: One ramen please! ... Huh, it's not here？
translations.その先は歩行者通行禁止ですよ。: Beyond this point, no pedestrians allowed.
translations.ワンコインで済ませたいな。: I want to keep it to one coin.
translations.やめて！あまり見ないでー！: Stop it! Don't look too much!
translations.おーい！ボールそっち行ったぞー。: Hey! The ball went over there!
translations.そこ！廊下を、走らなーい！: There! Don't run in the hallway!
translations.紅葉でも見に行こうかしら。: Shall we go see the autumn leaves？
translations.お、なんかイベントやってる？: Oh, is there an event happening？
translations.さっぶぅ…。心も身体も、ってか。: So cold... both my heart and body.
translations.早く帰ってコタツで温まりたい…。: I want to go home and warm up in the kotatsu...
translations.お肌のお手入れ大変なのよね。: Taking care of my skin is tough.
translations.桜もいいけど、梅もきれい。: Cherry blossoms are nice, but plums are beautiful too.
translations.スキー終わる前に行こうかな。: Maybe I'll go before skiing ends.
translations.さむい！コンビニ寄ってこ。: It's cold! Let's stop by the convenience store.
translations.うわ、誰からだよこのメール！: Whoa, who is this email from？!
